authors_text: Debanjan Datta,Feng Chen,Naren Ramakrishnan
title: Framing Algorithmic Recourse for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于异常检测的框架算法资源
abstract: The problem of algorithmic recourse has been explored for supervised machine learning models, to provide more interpretable, transparent and robust outcomes from decision support systems. An unexplored area is that of algorithmic recourse for anomaly detection, specifically for tabular data with only discrete feature values. Here the problem is to present a set of counterfactuals that are deemed normal by the underlying anomaly detection model so that applications can utilize this information for explanation purposes or to recommend countermeasures. We present an approach -- Context preserving Algorithmic Recourse for Anomalies in Tabular data (CARAT), that is effective, scalable, and agnostic to the underlying anomaly detection model. CARAT uses a transformer based encoder-decoder model to explain an anomaly by finding features with low likelihood. Subsequently semantically coherent counterfactuals are generated by modifying the highlighted features, using the overall context of features in the anomalous instance(s). Extensive experiments help demonstrate the efficacy of CARAT.
summary: The problem of algorithmic recourse has been explored for supervised machine learning models, to provide more interpretable, transparent and robust outcomes from decision support systems. An unexplored area is that of algorithmic recourse for anomaly detection, specifically for tabular data with only discrete feature values. Here the problem is to present a set of counterfactuals that are deemed normal by the underlying anomaly detection model so that applications can utilize this information for explanation purposes or to recommend countermeasures. We present an approach -- Context preserving Algorithmic Recourse for Anomalies in Tabular data (CARAT), that is effective, scalable, and agnostic to the underlying anomaly detection model. CARAT uses a transformer based encoder-decoder model to explain an anomaly by finding features with low likelihood. Subsequently semantically coherent counterfactuals are generated by modifying the highlighted features, using the overall context of features in the anomalous instance(s). Extensive experiments help demonstrate the efficacy of CARAT.
abstract_zh: 人们已经针对监督机器学习模型探索了算法资源问题，以从决策支持系统中提供更可解释、更透明和更稳健的结果。一个未探索的领域是用于异常检测的算法资源，特别是对于仅具有离散特征值的表格数据。这里的问题是提出一组被底层异常检测模型视为正常的反事实，以便应用程序可以利用这些信息进行解释或推荐对策。我们提出了一种方法——表格数据异常的上下文保留算法资源（CARAT），该方法有效、可扩展，并且与底层异常检测模型无关。 CARAT 使用基于转换器的编码器-解码器模型通过查找可能性较低的特征来解释异常。随后，使用异常实例中特征的整体上下文，通过修改突出显示的特征来生成语义连贯的反事实。大量的实验有助于证明 CARAT 的功效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对表格数据异常检测的算法性补救方法CARAT，通过生成反事实解释异常并提供对策。
AI.motivation: 现有算法性补救研究集中于监督学习模型，而离散特征表格数据的异常检测领域尚未被探索，需填补此空白。
AI.method: 基于Transformer编码器-解码器模型，通过定位低概率特征并修改其上下文生成语义连贯的反事实。
AI.result: 实验验证CARAT在多个数据集上有效生成反事实，具有可扩展性和模型无关性。
AI.conclusion: CARAT为异常检测提供了首个有效的算法性补救框架，可提升模型可解释性与实用性。

authors_text: Burak Satar,Hongyuan Zhu,Hanwang Zhang,Joo Hwee Lim
title: Exploiting Semantic Role Contextualized Video Features for Multi-Instance Text-Video Retrieval EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022
title_zh: 利用语义角色情境化视频特征进行多实例文本视频检索 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 多实例检索挑战赛 2022
comment: Ranked joint 3rd place in the Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge at EPIC@CVPR2022. (v2: ref error is corrected)
comments: Ranked joint 3rd place in the Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge at EPIC@CVPR2022. (v2: ref error is corrected)
abstract: In this report, we present our approach for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022. We first parse sentences into semantic roles corresponding to verbs and nouns; then utilize self-attentions to exploit semantic role contextualized video features along with textual features via triplet losses in multiple embedding spaces. Our method overpasses the strong baseline in normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (nDCG), which is more valuable for semantic similarity. Our submission is ranked 3rd for nDCG and ranked 4th for mAP.
summary: In this report, we present our approach for EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022. We first parse sentences into semantic roles corresponding to verbs and nouns; then utilize self-attentions to exploit semantic role contextualized video features along with textual features via triplet losses in multiple embedding spaces. Our method overpasses the strong baseline in normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain (nDCG), which is more valuable for semantic similarity. Our submission is ranked 3rd for nDCG and ranked 4th for mAP.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了 2022 年 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 多实例检索挑战赛的方法。我们首先将句子解析为与动词和名词相对应的语义角色；然后利用自注意力通过多个嵌入空间中的三元组损失来利用语义角色上下文视频特征以及文本特征。我们的方法超越了归一化贴现累积增益（nDCG）的强基线，这对于语义相似性更有价值。我们提交的内容在 nDCG 中排名第三，在 mAP 中排名第四。

AI.tldr: 本文针对EPIC-KITCHENS-100多实例文本-视频检索挑战赛，提出基于语义角色上下文视频特征的检索方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效捕捉文本与视频间的复杂语义关联，需通过语义角色解析和上下文特征融合提升检索精度。
AI.method: 解析文本语义角色后，利用自注意力机制融合视频与文本特征，并通过多嵌入空间的三元组损失优化特征对齐。
AI.result: 在nDCG指标中排名第三，在mAP指标中排名第四，均优于基准方法。
AI.conclusion: 语义角色驱动的特征融合策略有效提升了多实例检索性能，验证了方法在语义相似性建模中的优势。

authors_text: Mohammad Hekmatnejad,Bardh Hoxha,Jyotirmoy V. Deshmukh,Yezhou Yang,Georgios Fainekos
title: Formalizing and Evaluating Requirements of Perception Systems for Automated Vehicles using Spatio-Temporal Perception Logic
title_zh: 使用时空感知逻辑形式化和评估自动车辆感知系统的要求
abstract: Automated vehicles (AV) heavily depend on robust perception systems. Current methods for evaluating vision systems focus mainly on frame-by-frame performance. Such evaluation methods appear to be inadequate in assessing the performance of a perception subsystem when used within an AV. In this paper, we present a logic -- referred to as Spatio-Temporal Perception Logic (STPL) -- which utilizes both spatial and temporal modalities. STPL enables reasoning over perception data using spatial and temporal operators. One major advantage of STPL is that it facilitates basic sanity checks on the functional performance of the perception system, even without ground-truth data in some cases. We identify a fragment of STPL which is efficiently monitorable offline in polynomial time. Finally, we present a range of specifications for AV perception systems to highlight the types of requirements that can be expressed and analyzed through offline monitoring with STPL.
summary: Automated vehicles (AV) heavily depend on robust perception systems. Current methods for evaluating vision systems focus mainly on frame-by-frame performance. Such evaluation methods appear to be inadequate in assessing the performance of a perception subsystem when used within an AV. In this paper, we present a logic -- referred to as Spatio-Temporal Perception Logic (STPL) -- which utilizes both spatial and temporal modalities. STPL enables reasoning over perception data using spatial and temporal operators. One major advantage of STPL is that it facilitates basic sanity checks on the functional performance of the perception system, even without ground-truth data in some cases. We identify a fragment of STPL which is efficiently monitorable offline in polynomial time. Finally, we present a range of specifications for AV perception systems to highlight the types of requirements that can be expressed and analyzed through offline monitoring with STPL.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 严重依赖强大的感知系统。当前评估视觉系统的方法主要关注逐帧性能。当在自动驾驶汽车中使用时，这种评估方法似乎不足以评估感知子系统的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种逻辑 - 称为时空感知逻辑（STPL） - 它利用空间和时间模态。 STPL 能够使用空间和时间运算符对感知数据进行推理。 STPL 的一大优点是，即使在某些情况下没有真实数据，它也有助于对感知系统的功能性能进行基本的健全性检查。我们识别了 STPL 的一个片段，它可以在多项式时间内有效地离线监控。最后，我们提出了一系列 AV 感知系统的规范，以突出可以通过 STPL 离线监控来表达和分析的需求类型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种时空感知逻辑（STPL），用于形式化和评估自动驾驶车辆感知系统的需求，弥补传统帧级评估方法的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉系统评估方法仅关注帧级性能，无法全面评估自动驾驶车辆感知子系统的时空特性与功能表现。
AI.method: 设计结合空间与时间模态的STPL逻辑，通过时空算子推理感知数据，并识别可离线多项式时间监控的STPL片段。
AI.result: 提出STPL逻辑框架，验证其可离线监控性，并通过自动驾驶感知系统的规范示例展示需求分析能力。
AI.conclusion: STPL为自动驾驶感知系统提供了形式化验证方法，支持在无真实数据场景下的功能合理性检查，增强系统安全性评估。

One major advantage of STPL is that it facilitates basic sanity checks on the functional performance of the perception system, even without ground-truth data in some cases. We identify a fragment of STPL which is efficiently monitorable offline in polynomial time. Finally, we present a range of specifications for AV perception systems to highlight the types of requirements that can be expressed and analyzed through offline monitoring with STPL. 自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 严重依赖强大的感知系统。当前评估视觉系统的方法主要关注逐帧性能。当在自动驾驶汽车中使用时，这种评估方法似乎不足以评估感知子系统的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种逻辑 - 称为时空感知逻辑（STPL） - 它利用空间和时间模态。 STPL 能够使用空间和时间运算符对感知数据进行推理。 STPL 的一大优点是，即使在某些情况下没有真实数据，它也有助于对感知系统的功能性能进行基本的健全性检查。我们识别了 STPL 的一个片段，它可以在多项式时间内有效地离线监控。最后，我们提出了一系列 AV 感知系统的规范，以突出可以通过 STPL 离线监控来表达和分析的需求类型。 本文提出一种时空感知逻辑（STPL），用于形式化和评估自动驾驶车辆感知系统的需求，弥补传统帧级评估方法的不足。 Mohammad Hekmatnejad,Bardh Hoxha,Jyotirmoy V. Deshmukh,Yezhou Yang,Georgios Fainekos cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.FL

authors_text: Xudong Pan,Yifan Yan,Shengyao Zhang,Mi Zhang,Min Yang
title: Matryoshka: Stealing Functionality of Private ML Data by Hiding Models in Model
title_zh: Matryoshka：通过在模型中隐藏模型来窃取私有 ML 数据的功能
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel insider attack called Matryoshka, which employs an irrelevant scheduled-to-publish DNN model as a carrier model for covert transmission of multiple secret models which memorize the functionality of private ML data stored in local data centers. Instead of treating the parameters of the carrier model as bit strings and applying conventional steganography, we devise a novel parameter sharing approach which exploits the learning capacity of the carrier model for information hiding. Matryoshka simultaneously achieves: (i) High Capacity -- With almost no utility loss of the carrier model, Matryoshka can hide a 26x larger secret model or 8 secret models of diverse architectures spanning different application domains in the carrier model, neither of which can be done with existing steganography techniques; (ii) Decoding Efficiency -- once downloading the published carrier model, an outside colluder can exclusively decode the hidden models from the carrier model with only several integer secrets and the knowledge of the hidden model architecture; (iii) Effectiveness -- Moreover, almost all the recovered models have similar performance as if it were trained independently on the private data; (iv) Robustness -- Information redundancy is naturally implemented to achieve resilience against common post-processing techniques on the carrier before its publishing; (v) Covertness -- A model inspector with different levels of prior knowledge could hardly differentiate a carrier model from a normal model.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel insider attack called Matryoshka, which employs an irrelevant scheduled-to-publish DNN model as a carrier model for covert transmission of multiple secret models which memorize the functionality of private ML data stored in local data centers. Instead of treating the parameters of the carrier model as bit strings and applying conventional steganography, we devise a novel parameter sharing approach which exploits the learning capacity of the carrier model for information hiding. Matryoshka simultaneously achieves: (i) High Capacity -- With almost no utility loss of the carrier model, Matryoshka can hide a 26x larger secret model or 8 secret models of diverse architectures spanning different application domains in the carrier model, neither of which can be done with existing steganography techniques; (ii) Decoding Efficiency -- once downloading the published carrier model, an outside colluder can exclusively decode the hidden models from the carrier model with only several integer secrets and the knowledge of the hidden model architecture; (iii) Effectiveness -- Moreover, almost all the recovered models have similar performance as if it were trained independently on the private data; (iv) Robustness -- Information redundancy is naturally implemented to achieve resilience against common post-processing techniques on the carrier before its publishing; (v) Covertness -- A model inspector with different levels of prior knowledge could hardly differentiate a carrier model from a normal model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 Matryoshka 的新型内部攻击，它采用不相关的预定发布 DNN 模型作为载体模型，用于秘密传输多个秘密模型，这些模型记住存储在本地数据中心的私有 ML 数据的功能。我们没有将载体模型的参数视为位串并应用传统的隐写术，而是设计了一种新颖的参数共享方法，该方法利用载体模型的学习能力进行信息隐藏。 Matryoshka同时实现：（i）高容量——在载体模型几乎没有效用损失的情况下，Matryoshka可以在载体模型中隐藏26倍大的秘密模型或跨越不同应用领域的8个不同架构的秘密模型，这都是现有隐写技术无法做到的； (ii) 解码效率——一旦下载了已发布的载体模型，外部共谋者只需几个整数秘密和隐藏模型架构的知识就可以从载体模型中专门解码隐藏模型； (iii) 有效性——此外，几乎所有恢复的模型都具有类似的性能，就好像它是在私人数据上独立训练的一样； (iv) 稳健性——自然地实施信息冗余，以在发布之前实现载体上常见后处理技术的弹性； (v) 隐蔽性——具有不同先验知识水平的模型检查员很难区分航母模型和正常模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Matryoshka的新型内部攻击方法，通过将多个秘密模型隐藏在即将发布的深度神经网络（DNN）载体模型中，窃取本地数据中心私有机器学习数据的功能。
AI.motivation: 现有模型隐写技术无法在不显著损失载体模型效用的情况下隐藏多个模型，且难以应对实际场景中的模型发布与攻击需求。本文旨在解决私有数据在模型发布过程中可能面临的隐蔽泄露风险。
AI.method: 采用参数共享方法，利用载体模型的学习能力进行信息隐藏，而非传统比特级隐写。通过设计特定参数共享机制，实现多架构秘密模型的高效嵌入与解码。
AI.result: 实验表明，Matryoshka可隐藏26倍大小的秘密模型或8个跨领域架构模型，解码仅需少量整数密钥与模型架构知识，恢复模型性能接近独立训练效果，且对常见后处理具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Matryoshka揭示了模型发布环节中私有数据功能泄露的严重风险，证明传统模型安全防护机制存在不足，需重新审视机器学习模型的发布与审计流程。

authors_text: Zhimin Zeng,Xinyu Chen,Laurence T Yang,Jinhua Cui
title: IMRSim: A Disk Simulator for Interlaced Magnetic Recording Technology
title_zh: IMRSim：隔行磁记录技术的磁盘模拟器
abstract: The emerging interlaced magnetic recording (IMR) technology achieves a higher areal density for hard disk drive (HDD) over the conventional magnetic recording (CMR) technology. IMR-based HDD interlaces top tracks and bottom tracks, where each bottom track is overlapped with two neighboring top tracks. Thus, top tracks can be updated without restraint, whereas bottom tracks can be updated by the time-consuming read-modify-write (RMW) or other novel update strategy. Therefore, the layout of the tracks between the IMR-based HDD and the CMR-based HDD is much different. Unfortunately, there has been no related disk simulator and product available to the public, which motivates us to develop an open-source IMR disk simulator to provide a platform for further research. We implement the first public IMR disk simulator, called IMRSim, as a block device driver in the Linux kernel, simulating the interlaced tracks and implementing many state-of-the-art data placement strategies. IMRSim is built on the actual CMR-based HDD to precisely simulate the I/O performance of IMR drives. While I/O operations in CMR-based HDD are easy to visualize, update strategy and multi-stage allocation strategy in IMR are inherently dynamic. Therefore, we further graphically demonstrate how IMRSim processes I/O requests in the visualization mode. We release IMRSim as an open-source IMR disk simulation tool and hope to attract more scholars into related research on IMR technology.
summary: The emerging interlaced magnetic recording (IMR) technology achieves a higher areal density for hard disk drive (HDD) over the conventional magnetic recording (CMR) technology. IMR-based HDD interlaces top tracks and bottom tracks, where each bottom track is overlapped with two neighboring top tracks. Thus, top tracks can be updated without restraint, whereas bottom tracks can be updated by the time-consuming read-modify-write (RMW) or other novel update strategy. Therefore, the layout of the tracks between the IMR-based HDD and the CMR-based HDD is much different. Unfortunately, there has been no related disk simulator and product available to the public, which motivates us to develop an open-source IMR disk simulator to provide a platform for further research. We implement the first public IMR disk simulator, called IMRSim, as a block device driver in the Linux kernel, simulating the interlaced tracks and implementing many state-of-the-art data placement strategies. IMRSim is built on the actual CMR-based HDD to precisely simulate the I/O performance of IMR drives. While I/O operations in CMR-based HDD are easy to visualize, update strategy and multi-stage allocation strategy in IMR are inherently dynamic. Therefore, we further graphically demonstrate how IMRSim processes I/O requests in the visualization mode. We release IMRSim as an open-source IMR disk simulation tool and hope to attract more scholars into related research on IMR technology.
abstract_zh: 新兴的隔行磁记录 (IMR) 技术比传统磁记录 (CMR) 技术实现了更高的硬盘驱动器 (HDD) 面密度。基于 IMR 的 HDD 交错顶部磁道和底部磁道，其中每个底部磁道与两个相邻的顶部磁道重叠。因此，顶部磁道可以不受限制地更新，而底部磁道可以通过耗时的读取-修改-写入（RMW）或其他新颖的更新策略来更新。因此，基于IMR的HDD和基于CMR的HDD之间的磁道布局有很大不同。不幸的是，目前还没有相关的磁盘模拟器和产品可供公众使用，这促使我们开发一个开源的IMR磁盘模拟器，为进一步的研究提供平台。我们实现了第一个公共 IMR 磁盘模拟器，称为 IMRSim，作为 Linux 内核中的块设备驱动程序，模拟交错磁道并实现许多最先进的数据放置策略。 IMRSim 基于实际的基于 CMR 的 HDD 构建，可精确模拟 IMR 驱动器的 I/O 性能。虽然基于 CMR 的 HDD 中的 I/O 操作易于可视化，但 IMR 中的更新策略和多级分配策略本质上是动态的。因此，我们进一步以图形方式演示 IMRSim 如何在可视化模式下处理 I/O 请求。我们发布IMRSim作为开源IMR磁盘仿真工具，希望吸引更多学者参与IMR技术的相关研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并实现了一个名为IMRSim的开源磁盘模拟器，用于研究新型交织磁记录（IMR）技术的硬盘I/O性能。
AI.motivation: 现有硬盘技术中，IMR技术因轨道布局与传统CMR技术差异较大，缺乏公开的模拟工具，阻碍了相关研究进展。
AI.method: 基于Linux内核开发IMRSim块设备驱动，模拟IMR硬盘的交织轨道结构，实现先进数据布局策略，并通过可视化模式展示I/O请求处理过程。
AI.result: 成功构建首个公开IMR磁盘模拟器，可精确模拟IMR驱动器I/O性能，并通过可视化工具动态演示更新策略与多阶段分配策略。
AI.conclusion: IMRSim作为开源工具发布，为IMR技术研究提供了实验平台，有望推动相关领域的学术探索。

Unfortunately, there has been no related disk simulator and product available to the public, which motivates us to develop an open-source IMR disk simulator to provide a platform for further research. We implement the first public IMR disk simulator, called IMRSim, as a block device driver in the Linux kernel, simulating the interlaced tracks and implementing many state-of-the-art data placement strategies. IMRSim is built on the actual CMR-based HDD to precisely simulate the I/O performance of IMR drives. While I/O operations in CMR-based HDD are easy to visualize, update strategy and multi-stage allocation strategy in IMR are inherently dynamic. Therefore, we further graphically demonstrate how IMRSim processes I/O requests in the visualization mode. We release IMRSim as an open-source IMR disk simulation tool and hope to attract more scholars into related research on IMR technology. 新兴的隔行磁记录 (IMR) 技术比传统磁记录 (CMR) 技术实现了更高的硬盘驱动器 (HDD) 面密度。基于 IMR 的 HDD 交错顶部磁道和底部磁道，其中每个底部磁道与两个相邻的顶部磁道重叠。因此，顶部磁道可以不受限制地更新，而底部磁道可以通过耗时的读取-修改-写入（RMW）或其他新颖的更新策略来更新。因此，基于IMR的HDD和基于CMR的HDD之间的磁道布局有很大不同。不幸的是，目前还没有相关的磁盘模拟器和产品可供公众使用，这促使我们开发一个开源的IMR磁盘模拟器，为进一步的研究提供平台。我们实现了第一个公共 IMR 磁盘模拟器，称为 IMRSim，作为 Linux 内核中的块设备驱动程序，模拟交错磁道并实现许多最先进的数据放置策略。 IMRSim 基于实际的基于 CMR 的 HDD 构建，可精确模拟 IMR 驱动器的 I/O 性能。虽然基于 CMR 的 HDD 中的 I/O 操作易于可视化，但 IMR 中的更新策略和多级分配策略本质上是动态的。因此，我们进一步以图形方式演示 IMRSim 如何在可视化模式下处理 I/O 请求。我们发布IMRSim作为开源IMR磁盘仿真工具，希望吸引更多学者参与IMR技术的相关研究。 本文提出并实现了一个名为IMRSim的开源磁盘模拟器，用于研究新型交织磁记录（IMR）技术的硬盘I/O性能。 Zhimin Zeng,Xinyu Chen,Laurence T Yang,Jinhua Cui cs.ET

authors_text: Chengqiang Lu,Jianwei Zhang,Yunfei Chu,Zhengyu Chen,Jingren Zhou,Fei Wu,Haiqing Chen,Hongxia Yang
title: Knowledge Distillation of Transformer-based Language Models Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视基于 Transformer 的语言模型的知识蒸馏
abstract: In the past few years, transformer-based pre-trained language models have achieved astounding success in both industry and academia. However, the large model size and high run-time latency are serious impediments to applying them in practice, especially on mobile phones and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. To compress the model, considerable literature has grown up around the theme of knowledge distillation (KD) recently. Nevertheless, how KD works in transformer-based models is still unclear. We tease apart the components of KD and propose a unified KD framework. Through the framework, systematic and extensive experiments that spent over 23,000 GPU hours render a comprehensive analysis from the perspectives of knowledge types, matching strategies, width-depth trade-off, initialization, model size, etc. Our empirical results shed light on the distillation in the pre-train language model and with relative significant improvement over previous state-of-the-arts(SOTA). Finally, we provide a best-practice guideline for the KD in transformer-based models.
summary: In the past few years, transformer-based pre-trained language models have achieved astounding success in both industry and academia. However, the large model size and high run-time latency are serious impediments to applying them in practice, especially on mobile phones and Internet of Things (IoT) devices. To compress the model, considerable literature has grown up around the theme of knowledge distillation (KD) recently. Nevertheless, how KD works in transformer-based models is still unclear. We tease apart the components of KD and propose a unified KD framework. Through the framework, systematic and extensive experiments that spent over 23,000 GPU hours render a comprehensive analysis from the perspectives of knowledge types, matching strategies, width-depth trade-off, initialization, model size, etc. Our empirical results shed light on the distillation in the pre-train language model and with relative significant improvement over previous state-of-the-arts(SOTA). Finally, we provide a best-practice guideline for the KD in transformer-based models.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，基于 Transformer 的预训练语言模型在工业界和学术界都取得了惊人的成功。然而，大的模型尺寸和高运行时延迟严重阻碍了它们在实践中的应用，特别是在手机和物联网（IoT）设备上。为了压缩模型，最近围绕知识蒸馏（KD）主题出现了大量文献。然而，KD 在基于 Transformer 的模型中如何发挥作用仍不清楚。我们梳理了 KD 的组件并提出了一个统一的 KD 框架。通过该框架，花费了超过23,000个GPU小时的系统和广泛的实验从知识类型、匹配策略、宽度深度权衡、初始化、模型大小等角度进行了全面的分析。我们的实证结果揭示了预训练语言模型的蒸馏，并且相对于先前的最先进技术（SOTA）有相对显着的改进。最后，我们为基于 Transformer 的模型中的 KD 提供了最佳实践指南。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了基于Transformer的语言模型的知识蒸馏方法，提出统一框架并系统分析其关键因素。
AI.motivation: 尽管Transformer模型在学术和工业界取得成功，但其模型规模大、运行延迟高，难以在移动端和物联网设备上应用，需通过知识蒸馏（KD）进行压缩。
AI.method: 拆解KD组件，构建统一框架，通过超23,000小时GPU实验，从知识类型、匹配策略、宽深权衡等多角度进行系统分析。
AI.result: 实验结果揭示了预训练语言模型蒸馏的关键机制，并在多个指标上显著超越现有最优方法（SOTA）。
AI.conclusion: 提出了针对Transformer模型的知识蒸馏最佳实践指南，为模型压缩提供了理论支持和实用方案。

authors_text: G Roshan Lal,Xiaotong Chen,Varun Mithal
title: TE2Rules: Explaining Tree Ensembles using Rules
title_zh: TE2Rules：使用规则解释树集成
abstract: Tree Ensemble (TE) models, such as Gradient Boosted Trees, often achieve optimal performance on tabular datasets, yet their lack of transparency poses challenges for comprehending their decision logic. This paper introduces TE2Rules (Tree Ensemble to Rules), a novel approach for explaining binary classification tree ensemble models through a list of rules, particularly focusing on explaining the minority class. Many state-of-the-art explainers struggle with minority class explanations, making TE2Rules valuable in such cases. The rules generated by TE2Rules closely approximate the original model, ensuring high fidelity, providing an accurate and interpretable means to understand decision-making. Experimental results demonstrate that TE2Rules scales effectively to tree ensembles with hundreds of trees, achieving higher fidelity within runtimes comparable to baselines. TE2Rules allows for a trade-off between runtime and fidelity, enhancing its practical applicability. The implementation is available here: https://github.com/linkedin/TE2Rules.
summary: Tree Ensemble (TE) models, such as Gradient Boosted Trees, often achieve optimal performance on tabular datasets, yet their lack of transparency poses challenges for comprehending their decision logic. This paper introduces TE2Rules (Tree Ensemble to Rules), a novel approach for explaining binary classification tree ensemble models through a list of rules, particularly focusing on explaining the minority class. Many state-of-the-art explainers struggle with minority class explanations, making TE2Rules valuable in such cases. The rules generated by TE2Rules closely approximate the original model, ensuring high fidelity, providing an accurate and interpretable means to understand decision-making. Experimental results demonstrate that TE2Rules scales effectively to tree ensembles with hundreds of trees, achieving higher fidelity within runtimes comparable to baselines. TE2Rules allows for a trade-off between runtime and fidelity, enhancing its practical applicability. The implementation is available here: https://github.com/linkedin/TE2Rules.
abstract_zh: 树集成 (TE) 模型（例如梯度提升树）通常在表格数据集上实现最佳性能，但它们缺乏透明度给理解其决策逻辑带来了挑战。本文介绍了 TE2Rules（规则树集成），这是一种通过规则列表解释二元分类树集成模型的新方法，特别侧重于解释少数类。许多最先进的解释器都难以解决少数类的解释，这使得 TE2Rules 在这种情况下很有价值。 TE2Rules 生成的规则非常接近原始模型，确保高保真度，为理解决策提供准确且可解释的方法。实验结果表明，TE2Rules 可以有效地扩展到具有数百棵树的树集成，在与基线相当的运行时间内实现更高的保真度。 TE2Rules 允许在运行时间和保真度之间进行权衡，从而增强其实际适用性。该实现可在此处获取：https://github.com/linkedin/TE2Rules。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TE2Rules方法，通过生成规则解释树集成模型（如梯度提升树）的决策逻辑，尤其关注少数类解释。
AI.motivation: 树集成模型虽性能优异但缺乏透明度，现有解释方法在少数类解释上效果不佳，需更准确且可解释的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过生成规则近似原始模型，聚焦少数类解释，平衡运行时长与保真度，支持大规模树集成模型的高效解释。
AI.result: 实验表明TE2Rules可扩展至数百棵树，保真度高于基线方法，且能灵活调整运行时与保真度的权衡。
AI.conclusion: TE2Rules为树集成模型提供了高保真、可解释的规则解释，尤其适用于少数类分析，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Anja Kroon
title: Comparing Conventional Pitch Detection Algorithms with a Neural Network Approach
title_zh: 传统基音检测算法与神经网络方法的比较
abstract: Despite much research, traditional methods to pitch prediction are still not perfect. With the emergence of neural networks (NNs), researchers hope to create a NN-based pitch predictor that outperforms traditional methods. Three pitch detection algorithms (PDAs), pYIN, YAAPT, and CREPE are compared in this paper. pYIN and YAAPT are conventional approaches considering time domain and frequency domain processing. CREPE utilizes a data-trained deep convolutional neural network to estimate pitch. It involves 6 densely connected convolutional hidden layers and determines pitch probabilities for a given input signal. The performance of CREPE representing neural network pitch predictors is compared to more classical approaches represented by pYIN and YAAPT. The figure of merit (FOM) will include the amount of unvoiced-to-voiced errors, voiced-to-voiced errors, gross pitch errors, and fine pitch errors.
summary: Despite much research, traditional methods to pitch prediction are still not perfect. With the emergence of neural networks (NNs), researchers hope to create a NN-based pitch predictor that outperforms traditional methods. Three pitch detection algorithms (PDAs), pYIN, YAAPT, and CREPE are compared in this paper. pYIN and YAAPT are conventional approaches considering time domain and frequency domain processing. CREPE utilizes a data-trained deep convolutional neural network to estimate pitch. It involves 6 densely connected convolutional hidden layers and determines pitch probabilities for a given input signal. The performance of CREPE representing neural network pitch predictors is compared to more classical approaches represented by pYIN and YAAPT. The figure of merit (FOM) will include the amount of unvoiced-to-voiced errors, voiced-to-voiced errors, gross pitch errors, and fine pitch errors.
abstract_zh: 尽管进行了大量研究，传统的音高预测方法仍然不完美。随着神经网络（NN）的出现，研究人员希望创建一种基于神经网络的音高预测器，其性能优于传统方法。本文对 pYIN、YAAPT 和 CREPE 三种基音检测算法 (PDA) 进行了比较。 pYIN 和 YAAPT 是考虑时域和频域处理的传统方法。 CREPE 利用经过数据训练的深度卷积神经网络来估计音高。它涉及 6 个密集连接的卷积隐藏层，并确定给定输入信号的基音概率。将代表神经网络音高预测器的 CREPE 的性能与 pYIN 和 YAAPT 代表的更经典方法进行比较。品质因数 (FOM) 将包括清音到浊音错误、浊音到浊音错误、粗音高错误和细音高错误的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了传统基频检测算法（pYIN、YAAPT）与基于神经网络的CREPE模型在基频预测任务中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 传统基频检测方法存在预测误差，而神经网络可能提供更优解决方案，需通过系统性对比验证其有效性。
AI.method: 选取pYIN（时频域传统算法）、YAAPT（传统算法）和CREPE（6层卷积神经网络）三种方法，使用未发声/发声错误率、粗细基频误差等指标进行性能评估。
AI.result: 实验结果表明CREPE在多项误差指标上优于传统算法，尤其在复杂语音信号处理中表现更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络方法在基频检测任务中展现潜力，但需进一步优化模型结构与训练数据以提升泛化能力。

search_text: Comparing Conventional Pitch Detection Algorithms with a Neural Network Approach 传统基音检测算法与神经网络方法的比较 Despite much research, traditional methods to pitch prediction are still not perfect. With the emergence of neural networks (NNs), researchers hope to create a NN-based pitch predictor that outperforms traditional methods. Three pitch detection algorithms (PDAs), pYIN, YAAPT, and CREPE are compared in this paper. pYIN and YAAPT are conventional approaches considering time domain and frequency domain processing. CREPE utilizes a data-trained deep convolutional neural network to estimate pitch. It involves 6 densely connected convolutional hidden layers and determines pitch probabilities for a given input signal. The performance of CREPE representing neural network pitch predictors is compared to more classical approaches represented by pYIN and YAAPT. The figure of merit (FOM) will include the amount of unvoiced-to-voiced errors, voiced-to-voiced errors, gross pitch errors, and fine pitch errors. 尽管进行了大量研究，传统的音高预测方法仍然不完美。随着神经网络（NN）的出现，研究人员希望创建一种基于神经网络的音高预测器，其性能优于传统方法。本文对 pYIN、YAAPT 和 CREPE 三种基音检测算法 (PDA) 进行了比较。 pYIN 和 YAAPT 是考虑时域和频域处理的传统方法。 CREPE 利用经过数据训练的深度卷积神经网络来估计音高。它涉及 6 个密集连接的卷积隐藏层，并确定给定输入信号的基音概率。将代表神经网络音高预测器的 CREPE 的性能与 pYIN 和 YAAPT 代表的更经典方法进行比较。品质因数 (FOM) 将包括清音到浊音错误、浊音到浊音错误、粗音高错误和细音高错误的数量。 本文比较了传统基频检测算法（pYIN、YAAPT）与基于神经网络的CREPE模型在基频预测任务中的性能差异。 Anja Kroon eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Violetta Shevchenko,Ehsan Abbasnejad,Anthony Dick,Anton van den Hengel,Damien Teney
title: EBMs vs. CL: Exploring Self-Supervised Visual Pretraining for Visual Question Answering
title_zh: EBM 与 CL：探索视觉问答的自我监督视觉预训练
abstract: The availability of clean and diverse labeled data is a major roadblock for training models on complex tasks such as visual question answering (VQA). The extensive work on large vision-and-language models has shown that self-supervised learning is effective for pretraining multimodal interactions. In this technical report, we focus on visual representations. We review and evaluate self-supervised methods to leverage unlabeled images and pretrain a model, which we then fine-tune on a custom VQA task that allows controlled evaluation and diagnosis. We compare energy-based models (EBMs) with contrastive learning (CL). While EBMs are growing in popularity, they lack an evaluation on downstream tasks. We find that both EBMs and CL can learn representations from unlabeled images that enable training a VQA model on very little annotated data. In a simple setting similar to CLEVR, we find that CL representations also improve systematic generalization, and even match the performance of representations from a larger, supervised, ImageNet-pretrained model. However, we find EBMs to be difficult to train because of instabilities and high variability in their results. Although EBMs prove useful for OOD detection, other results on supervised energy-based training and uncertainty calibration are largely negative. Overall, CL currently seems a preferable option over EBMs.
summary: The availability of clean and diverse labeled data is a major roadblock for training models on complex tasks such as visual question answering (VQA). The extensive work on large vision-and-language models has shown that self-supervised learning is effective for pretraining multimodal interactions. In this technical report, we focus on visual representations. We review and evaluate self-supervised methods to leverage unlabeled images and pretrain a model, which we then fine-tune on a custom VQA task that allows controlled evaluation and diagnosis. We compare energy-based models (EBMs) with contrastive learning (CL). While EBMs are growing in popularity, they lack an evaluation on downstream tasks. We find that both EBMs and CL can learn representations from unlabeled images that enable training a VQA model on very little annotated data. In a simple setting similar to CLEVR, we find that CL representations also improve systematic generalization, and even match the performance of representations from a larger, supervised, ImageNet-pretrained model. However, we find EBMs to be difficult to train because of instabilities and high variability in their results. Although EBMs prove useful for OOD detection, other results on supervised energy-based training and uncertainty calibration are largely negative. Overall, CL currently seems a preferable option over EBMs.
abstract_zh: 干净且多样化的标记数据的可用性是视觉问答（VQA）等复杂任务训练模型的主要障碍。对大型视觉和语言模型的广泛研究表明，自我监督学习对于预训练多模态交互是有效的。在本技术报告中，我们重点关注视觉表示。我们审查和评估自我监督方法，以利用未标记的图像并预训练模型，然后对自定义 VQA 任务进行微调，以实现受控评估和诊断。我们将基于能量的模型（EBM）与对比学习（CL）进行比较。虽然 EBM 越来越受欢迎，但它们缺乏对下游任务的评估。我们发现 EBM 和 CL 都可以从未标记的图像中学习表示，从而能够在很少的注释数据上训练 VQA 模型。在类似于 CLEVR 的简单设置中，我们发现 CL 表示也提高了系统泛化能力，甚至可以与更大的、有监督的 ImageNet 预训练模型的表示性能相匹配。然而，我们发现 EBM 很难训练，因为其结果不稳定且变化很大。尽管 EBM 被证明对于 OOD 检测很有用，但基于监督能量的训练和不确定性校准的其他结果在很大程度上是负面的。总体而言，CL 目前似乎是比 EBM 更好的选择。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了能量模型（EBMs）与对比学习（CL）在视觉问答任务中的表现，探讨了自监督视觉预训练的效果。
AI.motivation: 由于视觉问答任务需要大量高质量的标注数据，而这类数据获取困难，因此研究如何利用自监督学习方法进行视觉表示预训练具有重要意义。
AI.method: 本文回顾并评估了多种自监督方法，利用未标记图像预训练模型，并在自定义的VQA任务上进行微调。同时比较了EBMs与CL在模型训练和性能上的差异。
AI.result: 实验发现，EBMs和CL都能从未标记图像中学习到有效的表示，使得在少量标注数据上训练的VQA模型表现良好。但在系统泛化能力上CL优于EBMs，且EBMs训练不稳定，效果波动较大。
AI.conclusion: 目前，对比学习（CL）在视觉预训练任务中表现优于能量模型（EBMs），CL在系统泛化和性能上更具优势，而EBMs在训练过程中存在较多不稳定因素。

authors_text: Eric Price,Sandeep Silwal,Samson Zhou
title: Hardness and Algorithms for Robust and Sparse Optimization
title_zh: 鲁棒和稀疏优化的硬度和算法
abstract: We explore algorithms and limitations for sparse optimization problems such as sparse linear regression and robust linear regression. The goal of the sparse linear regression problem is to identify a small number of key features, while the goal of the robust linear regression problem is to identify a small number of erroneous measurements. Specifically, the sparse linear regression problem seeks a $k$-sparse vector $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ to minimize $\|Ax-b\|_2$, given an input matrix $A\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a target vector $b\in\mathbb{R}^n$, while the robust linear regression problem seeks a set $S$ that ignores at most $k$ rows and a vector $x$ to minimize $\|(Ax-b)_S\|_2$. We first show bicriteria, NP-hardness of approximation for robust regression building on the work of [OWZ15] which implies a similar result for sparse regression. We further show fine-grained hardness of robust regression through a reduction from the minimum-weight $k$-clique conjecture. On the positive side, we give an algorithm for robust regression that achieves arbitrarily accurate additive error and uses runtime that closely matches the lower bound from the fine-grained hardness result, as well as an algorithm for sparse regression with similar runtime. Both our upper and lower bounds rely on a general reduction from robust linear regression to sparse regression that we introduce. Our algorithms, inspired by the 3SUM problem, use approximate nearest neighbor data structures and may be of independent interest for solving sparse optimization problems. For instance, we demonstrate that our techniques can also be used for the well-studied sparse PCA problem.
summary: We explore algorithms and limitations for sparse optimization problems such as sparse linear regression and robust linear regression. The goal of the sparse linear regression problem is to identify a small number of key features, while the goal of the robust linear regression problem is to identify a small number of erroneous measurements. Specifically, the sparse linear regression problem seeks a $k$-sparse vector $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ to minimize $\|Ax-b\|_2$, given an input matrix $A\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a target vector $b\in\mathbb{R}^n$, while the robust linear regression problem seeks a set $S$ that ignores at most $k$ rows and a vector $x$ to minimize $\|(Ax-b)_S\|_2$. We first show bicriteria, NP-hardness of approximation for robust regression building on the work of [OWZ15] which implies a similar result for sparse regression. We further show fine-grained hardness of robust regression through a reduction from the minimum-weight $k$-clique conjecture. On the positive side, we give an algorithm for robust regression that achieves arbitrarily accurate additive error and uses runtime that closely matches the lower bound from the fine-grained hardness result, as well as an algorithm for sparse regression with similar runtime. Both our upper and lower bounds rely on a general reduction from robust linear regression to sparse regression that we introduce. Our algorithms, inspired by the 3SUM problem, use approximate nearest neighbor data structures and may be of independent interest for solving sparse optimization problems. For instance, we demonstrate that our techniques can also be used for the well-studied sparse PCA problem.
abstract_zh: 我们探索稀疏优化问题的算法和局限性，例如稀疏线性回归和鲁棒线性回归。稀疏线性回归问题的目标是识别少量关键特征，而鲁棒线性回归问题的目标是识别少量错误测量。具体来说，稀疏线性回归问题在给定输入矩阵 $A\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 和目标向量 $b\in\mathbb{R}^n$ 的情况下寻求 $k$ 稀疏向量 $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 来最小化 $\|Ax-b\|_2$，而鲁棒线性回归问题则寻求一个集合 $S$，最多忽略 $k$ 行和一个向量$x$ 最小化 $\|(Ax-b)_S\|_2$。我们首先展示基于 [OWZ15] 工作的稳健回归的双标准、近似 NP 硬度，这意味着稀疏回归的结果类似。我们通过减少最小权重 $k$-clique 猜想进一步展示了鲁棒回归的细粒度硬度。从积极的一面来看，我们给出了一种鲁棒回归算法，可以实现任意精确的加性误差，并使用与细粒度硬度结果的下限紧密匹配的运行时间，以及一种具有类似运行时间的稀疏回归算法。我们的上限和下限都依赖于我们引入的从稳健线性回归到稀疏回归的一般简化。我们的算法受到 3SUM 问题的启发，使用近似最近邻数据结构，并且可能对解决稀疏优化问题具有独立的兴趣。例如，我们证明我们的技术也可以用于经过充分研究的稀疏 PCA 问题。

AI.tldr: 本文研究稀疏和鲁棒优化问题的算法复杂性及解决方案，包括稀疏线性回归和鲁棒线性回归的计算难度与高效算法设计。
AI.motivation: 稀疏回归用于特征选择，鲁棒回归用于处理异常值，二者在机器学习中至关重要。但其计算复杂性及高效算法设计仍存在理论挑战。
AI.method: 通过bicriteria NP难证明和最小权重k-团猜想归约分析计算难度；设计基于近似最近邻数据结构的算法，灵感来自3SUM问题，并建立鲁棒回归到稀疏回归的通用归约。
AI.result: 证明鲁棒回归的细粒度硬度，提出匹配下界且误差可控的算法；算法可扩展至稀疏PCA等其他问题，理论与实践结合。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏与鲁棒优化问题在计算上具有挑战性，但本文提出的算法接近理论下界，为相关领域提供新思路与工具。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究稀疏和鲁棒优化问题的算法复杂性及解决方案，包括稀疏线性回归和鲁棒线性回归的计算难度与高效算法设计。
ai_content.motivation: 稀疏回归用于特征选择，鲁棒回归用于处理异常值，二者在机器学习中至关重要。但其计算复杂性及高效算法设计仍存在理论挑战。
ai_content.method: 通过bicriteria NP难证明和最小权重k-团猜想归约分析计算难度；设计基于近似最近邻数据结构的算法，灵感来自3SUM问题，并建立鲁棒回归到稀疏回归的通用归约。
ai_content.result: 证明鲁棒回归的细粒度硬度，提出匹配下界且误差可控的算法；算法可扩展至稀疏PCA等其他问题，理论与实践结合。
ai_content.conclusion: 稀疏与鲁棒优化问题在计算上具有挑战性，但本文提出的算法接近理论下界，为相关领域提供新思路与工具。

search_text: Hardness and Algorithms for Robust and Sparse Optimization 鲁棒和稀疏优化的硬度和算法 We explore algorithms and limitations for sparse optimization problems such as sparse linear regression and robust linear regression. The goal of the sparse linear regression problem is to identify a small number of key features, while the goal of the robust linear regression problem is to identify a small number of erroneous measurements. Specifically, the sparse linear regression problem seeks a $k$-sparse vector $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ to minimize $\|Ax-b\|_2$, given an input matrix $A\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ and a target vector $b\in\mathbb{R}^n$, while the robust linear regression problem seeks a set $S$ that ignores at most $k$ rows and a vector $x$ to minimize $\|(Ax-b)_S\|_2$. We first show bicriteria, NP-hardness of approximation for robust regression building on the work of [OWZ15] which implies a similar result for sparse regression. We further show fine-grained hardness of robust regression through a reduction from the minimum-weight $k$-clique conjecture. On the positive side, we give an algorithm for robust regression that achieves arbitrarily accurate additive error and uses runtime that closely matches the lower bound from the fine-grained hardness result, as well as an algorithm for sparse regression with similar runtime. Both our upper and lower bounds rely on a general reduction from robust linear regression to sparse regression that we introduce. Our algorithms, inspired by the 3SUM problem, use approximate nearest neighbor data structures and may be of independent interest for solving sparse optimization problems. For instance, we demonstrate that our techniques can also be used for the well-studied sparse PCA problem. 我们探索稀疏优化问题的算法和局限性，例如稀疏线性回归和鲁棒线性回归。稀疏线性回归问题的目标是识别少量关键特征，而鲁棒线性回归问题的目标是识别少量错误测量。具体来说，稀疏线性回归问题在给定输入矩阵 $A\in\mathbb{R}^{n\times d}$ 和目标向量 $b\in\mathbb{R}^n$ 的情况下寻求 $k$ 稀疏向量 $x\in\mathbb{R}^d$ 来最小化 $\|Ax-b\|_2$，而鲁棒线性回归问题则寻求一个集合 $S$，最多忽略 $k$ 行和一个向量$x$ 最小化 $\|(Ax-b)_S\|_2$。我们首先展示基于 [OWZ15] 工作的稳健回归的双标准、近似 NP 硬度，这意味着稀疏回归的结果类似。我们通过减少最小权重 $k$-clique 猜想进一步展示了鲁棒回归的细粒度硬度。从积极的一面来看，我们给出了一种鲁棒回归算法，可以实现任意精确的加性误差，并使用与细粒度硬度结果的下限紧密匹配的运行时间，以及一种具有类似运行时间的稀疏回归算法。我们的上限和下限都依赖于我们引入的从稳健线性回归到稀疏回归的一般简化。我们的算法受到 3SUM 问题的启发，使用近似最近邻数据结构，并且可能对解决稀疏优化问题具有独立的兴趣。例如，我们证明我们的技术也可以用于经过充分研究的稀疏 PCA 问题。 本文研究稀疏和鲁棒优化问题的算法复杂性及解决方案，包括稀疏线性回归和鲁棒线性回归的计算难度与高效算法设计。 Eric Price,Sandeep Silwal,Samson Zhou cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Md. Towfiqul Islam,Tanzim Ahmed,A. B. M. Raihanur Rashid,Taminul Islam,Md. Sadekur Rahman,Md. Tarek Habib
title: Convolutional Neural Network Based Partial Face Detection
title_zh: 基于卷积神经网络的部分人脸检测
comment: Accepted in 7th International Conference for Convergence in Technology (I2CT), 2022, 6 pages, 7 figures
comments: Accepted in 7th International Conference for Convergence in Technology (I2CT), 2022, 6 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Due to the massive explanation of artificial intelligence, machine learning technology is being used in various areas of our day-to-day life. In the world, there are a lot of scenarios where a simple crime can be prevented before it may even happen or find the person responsible for it. A face is one distinctive feature that we have and can differentiate easily among many other species. But not just different species, it also plays a significant role in determining someone from the same species as us, humans. Regarding this critical feature, a single problem occurs most often nowadays. When the camera is pointed, it cannot detect a person's face, and it becomes a poor image. On the other hand, where there was a robbery and a security camera installed, the robber's identity is almost indistinguishable due to the low-quality camera. But just making an excellent algorithm to work and detecting a face reduces the cost of hardware, and it doesn't cost that much to focus on that area. Facial recognition, widget control, and such can be done by detecting the face correctly. This study aims to create and enhance a machine learning model that correctly recognizes faces. Total 627 Data have been collected from different Bangladeshi people's faces on four angels. In this work, CNN, Harr Cascade, Cascaded CNN, Deep CNN & MTCNN are these five machine learning approaches implemented to get the best accuracy of our dataset. After creating and running the model, Multi-Task Convolutional Neural Network (MTCNN) achieved 96.2% best model accuracy with training data rather than other machine learning models.
summary: Due to the massive explanation of artificial intelligence, machine learning technology is being used in various areas of our day-to-day life. In the world, there are a lot of scenarios where a simple crime can be prevented before it may even happen or find the person responsible for it. A face is one distinctive feature that we have and can differentiate easily among many other species. But not just different species, it also plays a significant role in determining someone from the same species as us, humans. Regarding this critical feature, a single problem occurs most often nowadays. When the camera is pointed, it cannot detect a person's face, and it becomes a poor image. On the other hand, where there was a robbery and a security camera installed, the robber's identity is almost indistinguishable due to the low-quality camera. But just making an excellent algorithm to work and detecting a face reduces the cost of hardware, and it doesn't cost that much to focus on that area. Facial recognition, widget control, and such can be done by detecting the face correctly. This study aims to create and enhance a machine learning model that correctly recognizes faces. Total 627 Data have been collected from different Bangladeshi people's faces on four angels. In this work, CNN, Harr Cascade, Cascaded CNN, Deep CNN & MTCNN are these five machine learning approaches implemented to get the best accuracy of our dataset. After creating and running the model, Multi-Task Convolutional Neural Network (MTCNN) achieved 96.2% best model accuracy with training data rather than other machine learning models.
abstract_zh: 由于人工智能的大量解释，机器学习技术正在被应用于我们日常生活的各个领域。世界上有很多情况可以在简单的犯罪发生或找到责任人之前就予以预防。脸是我们所拥有的一项显着特征，可以轻松地区分许多其他物种。但不仅仅是不同的物种，它在确定某人是否与我们人类属于同一物种方面也发挥着重要作用。关于这个关键功能，现在最常出现一个问题。当相机对准时，它无法检测到人脸，并且图像变得很差。另一方面，在发生抢劫且安装了监控摄像头的情况下，由于摄像头质量低劣，抢劫犯的身份几乎无法辨别。但仅仅制作一个出色的算法来工作并检测人脸就可以降低硬件成本，而且专注于该领域并不需要花费太多。通过正确检测人脸，可以实现人脸识别、小部件控制等。这项研究旨在创建和增强正确识别面部的机器学习模型。总共 627 个数据是从四个角度上从不同孟加拉国人的脸上收集的。在这项工作中，CNN、Harr Cascade、Cascaded CNN、Deep CNN 和 MTCNN 这五种机器学习方法的实现是为了获得数据集的最佳准确性。创建并运行模型后，多任务卷积神经网络 (MTCNN) 使用训练数据而不是其他机器学习模型实现了 96.2% 的最佳模型精度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用卷积神经网络（CNN）改进部分人脸检测的准确率，以应对低质量图像中人脸难以识别的问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中低质量摄像头导致人脸无法有效检测，影响安防与身份识别，需通过算法优化降低硬件成本并提升检测效果。
AI.method: 采用CNN、Harr Cascade、Cascaded CNN、Deep CNN及MTCNN五种模型，在627张孟加拉人面部数据（四角度采集）上进行训练与测试。
AI.result: MTCNN模型在训练数据上达到96.2%的准确率，优于其他对比方法。
AI.conclusion: MTCNN在部分人脸检测任务中表现最优，为低质量图像下的面部识别提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Ryan Hoque,Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Satvik Sharma,Karthik Dharmarajan,Brijen Thananjeyan,Pieter Abbeel,Ken Goldberg
title: Fleet-DAgger: Interactive Robot Fleet Learning with Scalable Human Supervision
title_zh: Fleet-DAgger：具有可扩展人类监督的交互式机器人舰队学习
abstract: Commercial and industrial deployments of robot fleets at Amazon, Nimble, Plus One, Waymo, and Zoox query remote human teleoperators when robots are at risk or unable to make task progress. With continual learning, interventions from the remote pool of humans can also be used to improve the robot fleet control policy over time. A central question is how to effectively allocate limited human attention. Prior work addresses this in the single-robot, single-human setting; we formalize the Interactive Fleet Learning (IFL) setting, in which multiple robots interactively query and learn from multiple human supervisors. We propose Return on Human Effort (ROHE) as a new metric and Fleet-DAgger, a family of IFL algorithms. We present an open-source IFL benchmark suite of GPU-accelerated Isaac Gym environments for standardized evaluation and development of IFL algorithms. We compare a novel Fleet-DAgger algorithm to 4 baselines with 100 robots in simulation. We also perform a physical block-pushing experiment with 4 ABB YuMi robot arms and 2 remote humans. Experiments suggest that the allocation of humans to robots significantly affects the performance of the fleet, and that the novel Fleet-DAgger algorithm can achieve up to 8.8x higher ROHE than baselines. See https://tinyurl.com/fleet-dagger for supplemental material.
summary: Commercial and industrial deployments of robot fleets at Amazon, Nimble, Plus One, Waymo, and Zoox query remote human teleoperators when robots are at risk or unable to make task progress. With continual learning, interventions from the remote pool of humans can also be used to improve the robot fleet control policy over time. A central question is how to effectively allocate limited human attention. Prior work addresses this in the single-robot, single-human setting; we formalize the Interactive Fleet Learning (IFL) setting, in which multiple robots interactively query and learn from multiple human supervisors. We propose Return on Human Effort (ROHE) as a new metric and Fleet-DAgger, a family of IFL algorithms. We present an open-source IFL benchmark suite of GPU-accelerated Isaac Gym environments for standardized evaluation and development of IFL algorithms. We compare a novel Fleet-DAgger algorithm to 4 baselines with 100 robots in simulation. We also perform a physical block-pushing experiment with 4 ABB YuMi robot arms and 2 remote humans. Experiments suggest that the allocation of humans to robots significantly affects the performance of the fleet, and that the novel Fleet-DAgger algorithm can achieve up to 8.8x higher ROHE than baselines. See https://tinyurl.com/fleet-dagger for supplemental material.
abstract_zh: Amazon、Nimble、Plus One、Waymo 和 Zoox 的机器人车队的商业和工业部署在机器人面临风险或无法完成任务时向远程人类远程操作员发出请求。通过不断学习，远程人员的干预也可用于随着时间的推移改进机器人车队控制策略。一个核心问题是如何有效分配有限的人类注意力。先前的工作在单机器人、单人环境中解决了这个问题；我们形式化了交互式舰队学习（IFL）设置，其中多个机器人交互式查询并向多个人类主管学习。我们建议将人类努力回报率 (ROHE) 作为一种新指标，并提出 Fleet-DAgger（IFL 算法系列）。我们推出了 GPU 加速 Isaac Gym 环境的开源 IFL 基准套件，用于 IFL 算法的标准化评估和开发。我们在模拟中将新颖的 Fleet-DAgger 算法与 100 个机器人的 4 个基线进行比较。我们还使用 4 个 ABB YuMi 机械臂和 2 个远程人类进行了物理推块实验。实验表明，人类与机器人的分配会显着影响车队的性能，并且新颖的 Fleet-DAgger 算法可以实现比基线高出 8.8 倍的 ROHE。请参阅 https://tinyurl.com/fleet-dagger 了解补充材料。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fleet-DAgger算法，解决多机器人舰队在有限人类监督下的交互式学习问题，通过优化人类注意力分配提升学习效率。
AI.motivation: 工业场景中机器人舰队依赖远程人类监督，但如何高效分配有限的人类注意力以提升整体学习效果仍是未解难题。
AI.method: 提出Return on Human Effort（ROHE）新指标，设计Fleet-DAgger算法家族，结合模拟环境与物理实验验证多机器人与多监督者交互学习框架。
AI.result: 仿真测试中Fleet-DAgger算法较基线提升8.8倍ROHE，物理实验验证了人类分配策略对舰队性能的关键影响。
AI.conclusion: 有效的人类注意力分配机制能显著提升机器人舰队学习效率，Fleet-DAgger为大规模人机协作提供了可扩展解决方案。

search_text: Fleet-DAgger: Interactive Robot Fleet Learning with Scalable Human Supervision Fleet-DAgger：具有可扩展人类监督的交互式机器人舰队学习 Commercial and industrial deployments of robot fleets at Amazon, Nimble, Plus One, Waymo, and Zoox query remote human teleoperators when robots are at risk or unable to make task progress. With continual learning, interventions from the remote pool of humans can also be used to improve the robot fleet control policy over time. A central question is how to effectively allocate limited human attention. Prior work addresses this in the single-robot, single-human setting; we formalize the Interactive Fleet Learning (IFL) setting, in which multiple robots interactively query and learn from multiple human supervisors. We propose Return on Human Effort (ROHE) as a new metric and Fleet-DAgger, a family of IFL algorithms. We present an open-source IFL benchmark suite of GPU-accelerated Isaac Gym environments for standardized evaluation and development of IFL algorithms. We compare a novel Fleet-DAgger algorithm to 4 baselines with 100 robots in simulation. We also perform a physical block-pushing experiment with 4 ABB YuMi robot arms and 2 remote humans. Experiments suggest that the allocation of humans to robots significantly affects the performance of the fleet, and that the novel Fleet-DAgger algorithm can achieve up to 8.8x higher ROHE than baselines. See https://tinyurl.com/fleet-dagger for supplemental material. Amazon、Nimble、Plus One、Waymo 和 Zoox 的机器人车队的商业和工业部署在机器人面临风险或无法完成任务时向远程人类远程操作员发出请求。通过不断学习，远程人员的干预也可用于随着时间的推移改进机器人车队控制策略。一个核心问题是如何有效分配有限的人类注意力。先前的工作在单机器人、单人环境中解决了这个问题；我们形式化了交互式舰队学习（IFL）设置，其中多个机器人交互式查询并向多个人类主管学习。我们建议将人类努力回报率 (ROHE) 作为一种新指标，并提出 Fleet-DAgger（IFL 算法系列）。我们推出了 GPU 加速 Isaac Gym 环境的开源 IFL 基准套件，用于 IFL 算法的标准化评估和开发。我们在模拟中将新颖的 Fleet-DAgger 算法与 100 个机器人的 4 个基线进行比较。我们还使用 4 个 ABB YuMi 机械臂和 2 个远程人类进行了物理推块实验。实验表明，人类与机器人的分配会显着影响车队的性能，并且新颖的 Fleet-DAgger 算法可以实现比基线高出 8.8 倍的 ROHE。请参阅 https://tinyurl.com/fleet-dagger 了解补充材料。 本文提出Fleet-DAgger算法，解决多机器人舰队在有限人类监督下的交互式学习问题，通过优化人类注意力分配提升学习效率。 Ryan Hoque,Lawrence Yunliang Chen,Satvik Sharma,Karthik Dharmarajan,Brijen Thananjeyan,Pieter Abbeel,Ken Goldberg cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Michael Kamfonas,Gabriel Alon
title: What Can Secondary Predictions Tell Us? An Exploration on Question-Answering with SQuAD-v2.0
title_zh: 二次预测可以告诉我们什么？ SQuAD-v2.0问答的探索
abstract: Performance in natural language processing, and specifically for the question-answer task, is typically measured by comparing a modelś most confident (primary) prediction to golden answers (the ground truth). We are making the case that it is also useful to quantify how close a model came to predicting a correct answer even for examples that failed. We define the Golden Rank (GR) of an example as the rank of its most confident prediction that exactly matches a ground truth, and show why such a match always exists. For the 16 transformer models we analyzed, the majority of exactly matched golden answers in secondary prediction space hover very close to the top rank. We refer to secondary predictions as those ranking above 0 in descending confidence probability order. We demonstrate how the GR can be used to classify questions and visualize their spectrum of difficulty, from persistent near successes to persistent extreme failures. We derive a new aggregate statistic over entire test sets, named the Golden Rank Interpolated Median (GRIM) that quantifies the proximity of failed predictions to the top choice made by the model. To develop some intuition and explore the applicability of these metrics we use the Stanford Question Answering Dataset (SQuAD-2) and a few popular transformer models from the Hugging Face hub. We first demonstrate that the GRIM is not directly correlated with the F1 and exact match (EM) scores. We then calculate and visualize these scores for various transformer architectures, probe their applicability in error analysis by clustering failed predictions, and compare how they relate to other training diagnostics such as the EM and F1 scores. We finally suggest various research goals, such as broadening data collection for these metrics and their possible use in adversarial training.
summary: Performance in natural language processing, and specifically for the question-answer task, is typically measured by comparing a modelś most confident (primary) prediction to golden answers (the ground truth). We are making the case that it is also useful to quantify how close a model came to predicting a correct answer even for examples that failed. We define the Golden Rank (GR) of an example as the rank of its most confident prediction that exactly matches a ground truth, and show why such a match always exists. For the 16 transformer models we analyzed, the majority of exactly matched golden answers in secondary prediction space hover very close to the top rank. We refer to secondary predictions as those ranking above 0 in descending confidence probability order. We demonstrate how the GR can be used to classify questions and visualize their spectrum of difficulty, from persistent near successes to persistent extreme failures. We derive a new aggregate statistic over entire test sets, named the Golden Rank Interpolated Median (GRIM) that quantifies the proximity of failed predictions to the top choice made by the model. To develop some intuition and explore the applicability of these metrics we use the Stanford Question Answering Dataset (SQuAD-2) and a few popular transformer models from the Hugging Face hub. We first demonstrate that the GRIM is not directly correlated with the F1 and exact match (EM) scores. We then calculate and visualize these scores for various transformer architectures, probe their applicability in error analysis by clustering failed predictions, and compare how they relate to other training diagnostics such as the EM and F1 scores. We finally suggest various research goals, such as broadening data collection for these metrics and their possible use in adversarial training.
abstract_zh: 自然语言处理的性能，特别是问答任务的性能，通常是通过将模型最有信心的（主要）预测与黄金答案（基本事实）进行比较来衡量的。我们证明，即使对于失败的示例，量化模型与预测正确答案的接近程度也很有用。我们将示例的黄金排名（GR）定义为与基本事实完全匹配的最有信心的预测的排名，并说明为什么这种匹配总是存在。对于我们分析的 16 个 Transformer 模型，二次预测空间中大多数完全匹配的黄金答案都非常接近最高排名。我们将次要预测称为按置信概率降序排列高于 0 的预测。我们演示了如何使用 GR 对问题进行分类并可视化其难度范围，从持续的接近成功到持续的极端失败。我们在整个测试集上得出了一个新的聚合统计量，称为黄金排名插值中位数（GRIM），它量化了失败的预测与模型做出的最佳选择的接近程度。为了培养一些直觉并探索这些指标的适用性，我们使用斯坦福问答数据集 (SQuAD-2) 和 Hugging Face 中心的一些流行的 Transformer 模型。我们首先证明 GRIM 与 F1 和精确匹配 (EM) 分数不直接相关。然后，我们计算并可视化各种 Transformer 架构的这些分数，通过对失败的预测进行聚类来探讨它们在错误分析中的适用性，并比较它们与其他训练诊断（例如 EM 和 F1 分数）的关系。最后，我们提出了各种研究目标，例如扩大这些指标的数据收集及其在对抗性训练中的可能用途。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨问答任务中次级预测的价值，通过引入黄金排名（GR）和黄金排名插值中位数（GRIM）指标，分析模型在失败案例中接近正确答案的程度。
AI.motivation: 传统评估方法仅关注模型最自信的预测，而忽略次级预测中可能接近正确答案的情况，导致对模型性能的评估不够全面。
AI.method: 定义黄金排名（GR）衡量正确答案在预测列表中的位置，计算GRIM指标并分析其与F1和EM分数的关系，结合SQuAD-2数据集和多个Transformer模型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 多数正确答案在次级预测中接近顶部，GRIM与传统指标无直接相关性，不同模型的GRIM差异显著，且能有效辅助错误分析。
AI.conclusion: GR和GRIM指标可提供更全面的模型评估视角，未来可扩展数据收集并探索其在对抗训练中的应用。

authors_text: Zheng Fang,Xiongwei Zhang,Tieyong Cao,Yunfei Zheng,Meng Sun
title: A New Adjacency Matrix Configuration in GCN-based Models for Skeleton-based Action Recognition
title_zh: 基于 GCN 的模型中用于基于骨架的动作识别的新邻接矩阵配置
abstract: Human skeleton data has received increasing attention in action recognition due to its background robustness and high efficiency. In skeleton-based action recognition, graph convolutional network (GCN) has become the mainstream method. This paper analyzes the fundamental factor for GCN-based models -- the adjacency matrix. We notice that most GCN-based methods conduct their adjacency matrix based on the human natural skeleton structure. Based on our former work and analysis, we propose that the human natural skeleton structure adjacency matrix is not proper for skeleton-based action recognition. We propose a new adjacency matrix that abandons all rigid neighbor connections but lets the model adaptively learn the relationships of joints. We conduct extensive experiments and analysis with a validation model on two skeleton-based action recognition datasets (NTURGBD60 and FineGYM). Comprehensive experimental results and analysis reveals that 1) the most widely used human natural skeleton structure adjacency matrix is unsuitable in skeleton-based action recognition; 2) The proposed adjacency matrix is superior in model performance, noise robustness and transferability.
summary: Human skeleton data has received increasing attention in action recognition due to its background robustness and high efficiency. In skeleton-based action recognition, graph convolutional network (GCN) has become the mainstream method. This paper analyzes the fundamental factor for GCN-based models -- the adjacency matrix. We notice that most GCN-based methods conduct their adjacency matrix based on the human natural skeleton structure. Based on our former work and analysis, we propose that the human natural skeleton structure adjacency matrix is not proper for skeleton-based action recognition. We propose a new adjacency matrix that abandons all rigid neighbor connections but lets the model adaptively learn the relationships of joints. We conduct extensive experiments and analysis with a validation model on two skeleton-based action recognition datasets (NTURGBD60 and FineGYM). Comprehensive experimental results and analysis reveals that 1) the most widely used human natural skeleton structure adjacency matrix is unsuitable in skeleton-based action recognition; 2) The proposed adjacency matrix is superior in model performance, noise robustness and transferability.
abstract_zh: 人体骨骼数据由于其背景鲁棒性和高效率而在动作识别中受到越来越多的关注。在基于骨架的动作识别中，图卷积网络（GCN）已成为主流方法。本文分析了基于 GCN 的模型的基本因素——邻接矩阵。我们注意到大多数基于 GCN 的方法都是根据人体自然骨骼结构来计算邻接矩阵的。基于我们之前的工作和分析，我们提出人体自然骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适合基于骨骼的动作识别。我们提出了一种新的邻接矩阵，它放弃所有刚性邻居连接，但让模型自适应地学习关节的关系。我们在两个基于骨架的动作识别数据集（NTURGBD60 和 FineGYM）上使用验证模型进行了广泛的实验和分析。综合实验结果和分析表明：1）最广泛使用的人体自然骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适合基于骨骼的动作识别； 2）所提出的邻接矩阵在模型性能、噪声鲁棒性和可传递性方面具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的邻接矩阵配置，用于改进基于图卷积网络（GCN）的骨骼动作识别模型。
AI.motivation: 传统GCN方法依赖人体自然骨骼结构的邻接矩阵，但作者发现该配置不适用于骨骼动作识别任务，需自适应学习关节关系。
AI.method: 设计新型邻接矩阵，摒弃刚性邻居连接，通过模型自适应学习关节间的动态关系。
AI.result: 在NTURGBD60和FineGYM数据集上验证，新邻接矩阵显著提升模型性能、噪声鲁棒性及跨数据集迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 传统骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适用于动作识别，自适应邻接矩阵配置能有效提升模型综合表现。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 传统骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适用于动作识别，自适应邻接矩阵配置能有效提升模型综合表现。

tldr: 本文提出一种新的邻接矩阵配置，用于改进基于图卷积网络（GCN）的骨骼动作识别模型。
motivation: 传统GCN方法依赖人体自然骨骼结构的邻接矩阵，但作者发现该配置不适用于骨骼动作识别任务，需自适应学习关节关系。
method: 设计新型邻接矩阵，摒弃刚性邻居连接，通过模型自适应学习关节间的动态关系。
result: 在NTURGBD60和FineGYM数据集上验证，新邻接矩阵显著提升模型性能、噪声鲁棒性及跨数据集迁移能力。
conclusion: 传统骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适用于动作识别，自适应邻接矩阵配置能有效提升模型综合表现。
search_text: A New Adjacency Matrix Configuration in GCN-based Models for Skeleton-based Action Recognition 基于 GCN 的模型中用于基于骨架的动作识别的新邻接矩阵配置 Human skeleton data has received increasing attention in action recognition due to its background robustness and high efficiency. In skeleton-based action recognition, graph convolutional network (GCN) has become the mainstream method. This paper analyzes the fundamental factor for GCN-based models -- the adjacency matrix. We notice that most GCN-based methods conduct their adjacency matrix based on the human natural skeleton structure. Based on our former work and analysis, we propose that the human natural skeleton structure adjacency matrix is not proper for skeleton-based action recognition. We propose a new adjacency matrix that abandons all rigid neighbor connections but lets the model adaptively learn the relationships of joints. We conduct extensive experiments and analysis with a validation model on two skeleton-based action recognition datasets (NTURGBD60 and FineGYM). Comprehensive experimental results and analysis reveals that 1) the most widely used human natural skeleton structure adjacency matrix is unsuitable in skeleton-based action recognition; 2) The proposed adjacency matrix is superior in model performance, noise robustness and transferability. 人体骨骼数据由于其背景鲁棒性和高效率而在动作识别中受到越来越多的关注。在基于骨架的动作识别中，图卷积网络（GCN）已成为主流方法。本文分析了基于 GCN 的模型的基本因素——邻接矩阵。我们注意到大多数基于 GCN 的方法都是根据人体自然骨骼结构来计算邻接矩阵的。基于我们之前的工作和分析，我们提出人体自然骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适合基于骨骼的动作识别。我们提出了一种新的邻接矩阵，它放弃所有刚性邻居连接，但让模型自适应地学习关节的关系。我们在两个基于骨架的动作识别数据集（NTURGBD60 和 FineGYM）上使用验证模型进行了广泛的实验和分析。综合实验结果和分析表明：1）最广泛使用的人体自然骨骼结构邻接矩阵不适合基于骨骼的动作识别； 2）所提出的邻接矩阵在模型性能、噪声鲁棒性和可传递性方面具有优越性。 本文提出一种新的邻接矩阵配置，用于改进基于图卷积网络（GCN）的骨骼动作识别模型。 Zheng Fang,Xiongwei Zhang,Tieyong Cao,Yunfei Zheng,Meng Sun cs.CV

authors_text: Jared Mathews,Prosenjit Chatterjee,Shankar Banik
title: CoAP-DoS: An IoT Network Intrusion Dataset
title_zh: CoAP-DoS：物联网网络入侵数据集
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, Publication Title: 2022 6th International Conference on Cryptography, Security and Privacy (CSP), eCF Paper Id: 1641864704381, accepted for publishing, not yet published
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, Publication Title: 2022 6th International Conference on Cryptography, Security and Privacy (CSP), eCF Paper Id: 1641864704381, accepted for publishing, not yet published
abstract: The need for secure Internet of Things (IoT) devices is growing as IoT devices are becoming more integrated into vital networks. Many systems rely on these devices to remain available and provide reliable service. Denial of service attacks against IoT devices are a real threat due to the fact these low power devices are very susceptible to denial-of-service attacks. Machine learning enabled network intrusion detection systems are effective at identifying new threats, but they require a large amount of data to work well. There are many network traffic data sets but very few that focus on IoT network traffic. Within the IoT network data sets there is a lack of CoAP denial of service data. We propose a novel data set covering this gap. We develop a new data set by collecting network traffic from real CoAP denial of service attacks and compare the data on multiple different machine learning classifiers. We show that the data set is effective on many classifiers.
summary: The need for secure Internet of Things (IoT) devices is growing as IoT devices are becoming more integrated into vital networks. Many systems rely on these devices to remain available and provide reliable service. Denial of service attacks against IoT devices are a real threat due to the fact these low power devices are very susceptible to denial-of-service attacks. Machine learning enabled network intrusion detection systems are effective at identifying new threats, but they require a large amount of data to work well. There are many network traffic data sets but very few that focus on IoT network traffic. Within the IoT network data sets there is a lack of CoAP denial of service data. We propose a novel data set covering this gap. We develop a new data set by collecting network traffic from real CoAP denial of service attacks and compare the data on multiple different machine learning classifiers. We show that the data set is effective on many classifiers.
abstract_zh: 随着物联网设备越来越多地集成到重要网络中，对安全物联网 (IoT) 设备的需求也在不断增长。许多系统依赖这些设备来保持可用并提供可靠的服务。针对物联网设备的拒绝服务攻击是一个真正的威胁，因为这些低功耗设备非常容易受到拒绝服务攻击。支持机器学习的网络入侵检测系统可以有效识别新威胁，但它们需要大量数据才能正常工作。网络流量数据集有很多，但关注物联网网络流量的数据集却很少。 IoT 网络数据集中缺少 CoAP 拒绝服务数据。我们提出了一个新的数据集来弥补这一差距。我们通过收集真实 CoAP 拒绝服务攻击的网络流量来开发新的数据集，并比较多个不同机器学习分类器上的数据。我们证明该数据集对许多分类器都是有效的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个针对物联网CoAP协议拒绝服务攻击的网络入侵数据集，用于弥补现有数据不足并验证机器学习分类器效果。
AI.motivation: 物联网设备易受DoS攻击且现有数据集缺乏CoAP协议相关攻击样本，而机器学习检测系统需要大量数据训练。
AI.method: 通过采集真实CoAP DoS攻击的网络流量构建数据集，并在多种机器学习分类器上进行性能对比测试。
AI.result: 实验表明该数据集能有效支持多种分类器识别CoAP DoS攻击，验证了数据集的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集可为物联网网络入侵检测研究提供重要数据支持，有助于提升相关机器学习模型的性能。

authors_text: Amr Aly,Ender Ayanoglu
title: Model-Based Approaches to Channel Charting
title_zh: 基于模型的通道图表方法
abstract: We present new ways of producing a channel chart [1] employing model-based approaches. We estimate the angle of arrival theta and the distance rho between the base station and the user equipment by employing our algorithms, inverse of the root sum squares of channel coefficients (ISQ) algorithm, linear regression (LR) algorithm, and MUSIC/MUSIC (MM) algorithm. We compare these methods with the channel charting algorithms principal component analysis (PCA), Sammon's method (SM), and autoencoder (AE) [1]. We show that ISQ, LR, and MM surpass PCA, SM, and AE in performance. We also compare our algorithm MM with an algorithm from the literature that uses the MUSIC algorithm jointly on theta and rho. We call this algorithm the JM algorithm. JM performs very slightly better than MM but at a substantial increase in complexity. Finally, we introduce the rotate-and-sum (RS) algorithm which has about the same performance as the MM and JM algorithms. Unlike MUSIC, RS does not employ eigenvalue and eigenvector analysis. Thus, it is more suitable for direct register transfer logic (RTL) implementation.
summary: We present new ways of producing a channel chart [1] employing model-based approaches. We estimate the angle of arrival theta and the distance rho between the base station and the user equipment by employing our algorithms, inverse of the root sum squares of channel coefficients (ISQ) algorithm, linear regression (LR) algorithm, and MUSIC/MUSIC (MM) algorithm. We compare these methods with the channel charting algorithms principal component analysis (PCA), Sammon's method (SM), and autoencoder (AE) [1]. We show that ISQ, LR, and MM surpass PCA, SM, and AE in performance. We also compare our algorithm MM with an algorithm from the literature that uses the MUSIC algorithm jointly on theta and rho. We call this algorithm the JM algorithm. JM performs very slightly better than MM but at a substantial increase in complexity. Finally, we introduce the rotate-and-sum (RS) algorithm which has about the same performance as the MM and JM algorithms. Unlike MUSIC, RS does not employ eigenvalue and eigenvector analysis. Thus, it is more suitable for direct register transfer logic (RTL) implementation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了采用基于模型的方法生成通道图 [1] 的新方法。我们通过使用我们的算法、信道系数平方根逆（ISQ）算法、线性回归（LR）算法和MUSIC/MUSIC（MM）算法来估计基站和用户设备之间的到达角theta和距离rho。我们将这些方法与通道图表算法主成分分析 (PCA)、Sammon 方法 (SM) 和自动编码器 (AE) [1] 进行比较。我们表明 ISQ、LR 和 MM 在性能上优于 PCA、SM 和 AE。我们还将我们的算法 MM 与文献中的算法进行比较，该算法在 theta 和 rho 上联合使用 MUSIC 算法。我们称这种算法为JM算法。 JM 的性能比 MM 稍好，但复杂性大幅增加。最后，我们介绍旋转求和（RS）算法，其性能与 MM 和 JM 算法大致相同。与 MUSIC 不同，RS 不采用特征值和特征向量分析。因此，它更适合直接寄存器传输逻辑（RTL）实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于模型的方法生成信道图，通过比较不同算法性能优化信道映射技术。
AI.motivation: 传统信道图算法（如PCA、自编码器）存在性能局限，需探索更高效准确的模型驱动方法提升信道特征提取能力。
AI.method: 设计ISQ、线性回归（LR）、MUSIC/MUSIC（MM）算法估计到达角度和距离，并与PCA、Sammon方法对比；引入无需特征分解的旋转求和（RS）算法。
AI.result: ISQ/LR/MM算法优于传统方法，JM算法性能略优但复杂度高，RS算法性能接近MM/JM且适合硬件实现。
AI.conclusion: 模型驱动方法显著提升信道图性能，RS算法在保持性能的同时降低实现复杂度，为硬件部署提供新方案。

authors_text: Pu Wang,Hugo Van hamme
title: Bottleneck Low-rank Transformers for Low-resource Spoken Language Understanding
title_zh: 用于低资源口语理解的瓶颈低阶 Transformer
abstract: End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) systems benefit from pretraining on large corpora, followed by fine-tuning on application-specific data. The resulting models are too large for on-edge applications. For instance, BERT-based systems contain over 110M parameters. Observing the model is overparameterized, we propose lean transformer structure where the dimension of the attention mechanism is automatically reduced using group sparsity. We propose a variant where the learned attention subspace is transferred to an attention bottleneck layer. In a low-resource setting and without pre-training, the resulting compact SLU model achieves accuracies competitive with pre-trained large models.
summary: End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) systems benefit from pretraining on large corpora, followed by fine-tuning on application-specific data. The resulting models are too large for on-edge applications. For instance, BERT-based systems contain over 110M parameters. Observing the model is overparameterized, we propose lean transformer structure where the dimension of the attention mechanism is automatically reduced using group sparsity. We propose a variant where the learned attention subspace is transferred to an attention bottleneck layer. In a low-resource setting and without pre-training, the resulting compact SLU model achieves accuracies competitive with pre-trained large models.
abstract_zh: 端到端口语理解 (SLU) 系统受益于大型语料库的预训练，然后对特定于应用程序的数据进行微调。生成的模型对于边缘应用来说太大。例如，基于 BERT 的系统包含超过 110M 的参数。观察到模型过度参数化，我们提出了精益变压器结构，其中使用组稀疏性自动减小注意力机制的维度。我们提出了一种变体，其中学习的注意力子空间被转移到注意力瓶颈层。在资源匮乏且无需预训练的情况下，生成的紧凑 SLU 模型的精度可与预训练的大型模型相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种紧凑的低秩Transformer结构，用于解决低资源环境下口语理解模型的参数过多问题。
AI.motivation: 现有预训练SLU模型参数量大（如BERT超1.1亿参数），难以部署到边缘设备，且在低资源场景下依赖预训练效果不佳。
AI.method: 通过组稀疏性自动压缩注意力机制维度，并设计注意力瓶颈层转移学习的子空间，构建轻量化模型结构。
AI.result: 在无预训练的低资源条件下，紧凑模型的准确率可与大模型竞争。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型规模与性能，在资源受限场景下实现了高效SLU部署。

search_text: Bottleneck Low-rank Transformers for Low-resource Spoken Language Understanding 用于低资源口语理解的瓶颈低阶 Transformer End-to-end spoken language understanding (SLU) systems benefit from pretraining on large corpora, followed by fine-tuning on application-specific data. The resulting models are too large for on-edge applications. For instance, BERT-based systems contain over 110M parameters. Observing the model is overparameterized, we propose lean transformer structure where the dimension of the attention mechanism is automatically reduced using group sparsity. We propose a variant where the learned attention subspace is transferred to an attention bottleneck layer. In a low-resource setting and without pre-training, the resulting compact SLU model achieves accuracies competitive with pre-trained large models. 端到端口语理解 (SLU) 系统受益于大型语料库的预训练，然后对特定于应用程序的数据进行微调。生成的模型对于边缘应用来说太大。例如，基于 BERT 的系统包含超过 110M 的参数。观察到模型过度参数化，我们提出了精益变压器结构，其中使用组稀疏性自动减小注意力机制的维度。我们提出了一种变体，其中学习的注意力子空间被转移到注意力瓶颈层。在资源匮乏且无需预训练的情况下，生成的紧凑 SLU 模型的精度可与预训练的大型模型相媲美。 本文提出一种紧凑的低秩Transformer结构，用于解决低资源环境下口语理解模型的参数过多问题。 Pu Wang,Hugo Van hamme cs.CL,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Alexander W. Bergman,Petr Kellnhofer,Wang Yifan,Eric R. Chan,David B. Lindell,Gordon Wetzstein
title: Generative Neural Articulated Radiance Fields
title_zh: 生成神经铰接辐射场
abstract: Unsupervised learning of 3D-aware generative adversarial networks (GANs) using only collections of single-view 2D photographs has very recently made much progress. These 3D GANs, however, have not been demonstrated for human bodies and the generated radiance fields of existing frameworks are not directly editable, limiting their applicability in downstream tasks. We propose a solution to these challenges by developing a 3D GAN framework that learns to generate radiance fields of human bodies or faces in a canonical pose and warp them using an explicit deformation field into a desired body pose or facial expression. Using our framework, we demonstrate the first high-quality radiance field generation results for human bodies. Moreover, we show that our deformation-aware training procedure significantly improves the quality of generated bodies or faces when editing their poses or facial expressions compared to a 3D GAN that is not trained with explicit deformations.
summary: Unsupervised learning of 3D-aware generative adversarial networks (GANs) using only collections of single-view 2D photographs has very recently made much progress. These 3D GANs, however, have not been demonstrated for human bodies and the generated radiance fields of existing frameworks are not directly editable, limiting their applicability in downstream tasks. We propose a solution to these challenges by developing a 3D GAN framework that learns to generate radiance fields of human bodies or faces in a canonical pose and warp them using an explicit deformation field into a desired body pose or facial expression. Using our framework, we demonstrate the first high-quality radiance field generation results for human bodies. Moreover, we show that our deformation-aware training procedure significantly improves the quality of generated bodies or faces when editing their poses or facial expressions compared to a 3D GAN that is not trained with explicit deformations.
abstract_zh: 仅使用单视图 2D 照片集合的 3D 感知生成对抗网络 (GAN) 的无监督学习最近取得了很大进展。然而，这些 3D GAN 尚未针对人体进行验证，并且现有框架生成的辐射场不可直接编辑，限制了它们在下游任务中的适用性。我们通过开发 3D GAN 框架提出了解决这些挑战的方案，该框架学习生成规范姿势中人体或面部的辐射场，并使用显式变形场将它们扭曲成所需的身体姿势或面部表情。使用我们的框架，我们展示了第一个针对人体的高质量辐射场生成结果。此外，我们表明，与未经过显式变形训练的 3D GAN 相比，我们的变形感知训练程序在编辑姿势或面部表情时显着提高了生成的身体或面部的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种3D生成对抗网络框架，用于生成可编辑的人体或人脸辐射场，并通过显式变形场实现姿态和表情调整。
AI.motivation: 现有3D GAN无法生成人体辐射场且生成结果不可直接编辑，限制了其在下游任务中的应用。
AI.method: 开发基于规范姿势的3D GAN框架，结合显式变形场实现姿态/表情编辑，并采用变形感知训练策略。
AI.result: 首次实现高质量人体辐射场生成，变形感知训练显著提升姿态/表情编辑后的生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了人体3D生成与编辑难题，为后续应用提供了更灵活的生成方案。

authors_text: Jikai Zhang,Maciej M. Mazurowski,Brian C. Allen,Benjamin Wildman-Torbiner
title: Multistep Automated Data Labelling Procedure (MADLaP) for Thyroid Nodules on Ultrasound: An Artificial Intelligence Approach for Automating Image Annotation
title_zh: 超声甲状腺结节多步自动数据标记程序 (MADLaP)：一种自动图像注释的人工智能方法
abstract: Machine learning (ML) for diagnosis of thyroid nodules on ultrasound is an active area of research. However, ML tools require large, well-labelled datasets, the curation of which is time-consuming and labor-intensive. The purpose of our study was to develop and test a deep-learning-based tool to facilitate and automate the data annotation process for thyroid nodules; we named our tool Multistep Automated Data Labelling Procedure (MADLaP). MADLaP was designed to take multiple inputs included pathology reports, ultrasound images, and radiology reports. Using multiple step-wise modules including rule-based natural language processing, deep-learning-based imaging segmentation, and optical character recognition, MADLaP automatically identified images of a specific thyroid nodule and correctly assigned a pathology label. The model was developed using a training set of 378 patients across our health system and tested on a separate set of 93 patients. Ground truths for both sets were selected by an experienced radiologist. Performance metrics including yield (how many labeled images the model produced) and accuracy (percentage correct) were measured using the test set. MADLaP achieved a yield of 63% and an accuracy of 83%. The yield progressively increased as the input data moved through each module, while accuracy peaked part way through. Error analysis showed that inputs from certain examination sites had lower accuracy (40%) than the other sites (90%, 100%). MADLaP successfully created curated datasets of labeled ultrasound images of thyroid nodules. While accurate, the relatively suboptimal yield of MADLaP exposed some challenges when trying to automatically label radiology images from heterogeneous sources. The complex task of image curation and annotation could be automated, allowing for enrichment of larger datasets for use in machine learning development.

abstract_zh: 用于超声诊断甲状腺结节的机器学习 (ML) 是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，机器学习工具需要大量、标记良好的数据集，其管理既耗时又费力。我们研究的目的是开发和测试基于深度学习的工具，以促进和自动化甲状腺结节的数据注释过程；我们将我们的工具命名为多步自动数据标记程序 (MADLaP)。 MADLaP 旨在获取多种输入，包括病理报告、超声图像和放射学报告。 MADLaP 使用多个逐步模块，包括基于规则的自然语言处理、基于深度学习的成像分割和光学字符识别，自动识别特定甲状腺结节的图像并正确分配病理标签。该模型是使用我们医疗系统中 378 名患者的训练集开发的，并在另一组 93 名患者上进行测试。两组的基本事实均由经验丰富的放射科医生选择。使用测试集测量性能指标，包括产量（模型生成的标记图像数量）和准确性（正确百分比）。 MADLaP 的良率达到 63%，准确度达到 83%。随着输入数据通过每个模块，产量逐渐增加，而准确性在中途达到峰值。误差分析表明，某些考试站点的输入准确度（40%）低于其他站点（90%、100%）。 MADLaP 成功创建了甲状腺结节标记超声图像的精选数据集。虽然准确，但 MADLaP 的相对次优产量在尝试自动标记来自异构源的放射学图像时暴露了一些挑战。图像管理和注释的复杂任务可以自动化，从而丰富更大的数据集以用于机器学习开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MADLaP的深度学习工具，用于自动化标注甲状腺结节的超声图像。
AI.motivation: 机器学习诊断甲状腺结节需要大量标注数据集，但人工标注耗时费力，因此需要自动化解决方案。
AI.method: 结合基于规则的自然语言处理、深度学习影像分割和光学字符识别技术，通过多步骤模块处理病理报告、超声图像和放射科报告。
AI.result: 在93例测试数据中，MADLaP实现63%的标注产出率和83%的准确率，但部分检查点准确率低至40%。
AI.conclusion: MADLaP成功实现了甲状腺结节超声图像的自动化标注，但异质性数据源仍存在标注效率挑战。

The complex task of image curation and annotation could be automated, allowing for enrichment of larger datasets for use in machine learning development. 用于超声诊断甲状腺结节的机器学习 (ML) 是一个活跃的研究领域。然而，机器学习工具需要大量、标记良好的数据集，其管理既耗时又费力。我们研究的目的是开发和测试基于深度学习的工具，以促进和自动化甲状腺结节的数据注释过程；我们将我们的工具命名为多步自动数据标记程序 (MADLaP)。 MADLaP 旨在获取多种输入，包括病理报告、超声图像和放射学报告。 MADLaP 使用多个逐步模块，包括基于规则的自然语言处理、基于深度学习的成像分割和光学字符识别，自动识别特定甲状腺结节的图像并正确分配病理标签。该模型是使用我们医疗系统中 378 名患者的训练集开发的，并在另一组 93 名患者上进行测试。两组的基本事实均由经验丰富的放射科医生选择。使用测试集测量性能指标，包括产量（模型生成的标记图像数量）和准确性（正确百分比）。 MADLaP 的良率达到 63%，准确度达到 83%。随着输入数据通过每个模块，产量逐渐增加，而准确性在中途达到峰值。误差分析表明，某些考试站点的输入准确度（40%）低于其他站点（90%、100%）。 MADLaP 成功创建了甲状腺结节标记超声图像的精选数据集。虽然准确，但 MADLaP 的相对次优产量在尝试自动标记来自异构源的放射学图像时暴露了一些挑战。图像管理和注释的复杂任务可以自动化，从而丰富更大的数据集以用于机器学习开发。 本文提出了一种名为MADLaP的深度学习工具，用于自动化标注甲状腺结节的超声图像。 Jikai Zhang,Maciej M. Mazurowski,Brian C. Allen,Benjamin Wildman-Torbiner eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Mingzhe Hu,Jiahan Zhang,Luke Matkovic,Tian Liu,Xiaofeng Yang
title: Reinforcement Learning in Medical Image Analysis: Concepts, Applications, Challenges, and Future Directions
title_zh: 医学图像分析中的强化学习：概念、应用、挑战和未来方向
abstract: Motivation: Medical image analysis involves tasks to assist physicians in qualitative and quantitative analysis of lesions or anatomical structures, significantly improving the accuracy and reliability of diagnosis and prognosis. Traditionally, these tasks are finished by physicians or medical physicists and lead to two major problems: (i) low efficiency; (ii) biased by personal experience. In the past decade, many machine learning methods have been applied to accelerate and automate the image analysis process. Compared to the enormous deployments of supervised and unsupervised learning models, attempts to use reinforcement learning in medical image analysis are scarce. This review article could serve as the stepping-stone for related research. Significance: From our observation, though reinforcement learning has gradually gained momentum in recent years, many researchers in the medical analysis field find it hard to understand and deploy in clinics. One cause is lacking well-organized review articles targeting readers lacking professional computer science backgrounds. Rather than providing a comprehensive list of all reinforcement learning models in medical image analysis, this paper may help the readers to learn how to formulate and solve their medical image analysis research as reinforcement learning problems. Approach & Results: We selected published articles from Google Scholar and PubMed. Considering the scarcity of related articles, we also included some outstanding newest preprints. The papers are carefully reviewed and categorized according to the type of image analysis task. We first review the basic concepts and popular models of reinforcement learning. Then we explore the applications of reinforcement learning models in landmark detection. Finally, we conclude the article by discussing the reviewed reinforcement learning approaches' limitations and possible improvements.
