search_text: High-Resolution Virtual Try-On with Misalignment and Occlusion-Handled Conditions 具有错位和遮挡处理条件的高分辨率虚拟试戴 Image-based virtual try-on aims to synthesize an image of a person wearing a given clothing item. To solve the task, the existing methods warp the clothing item to fit the person's body and generate the segmentation map of the person wearing the item before fusing the item with the person. However, when the warping and the segmentation generation stages operate individually without information exchange, the misalignment between the warped clothes and the segmentation map occurs, which leads to the artifacts in the final image. The information disconnection also causes excessive warping near the clothing regions occluded by the body parts, so-called pixel-squeezing artifacts. To settle the issues, we propose a novel try-on condition generator as a unified module of the two stages (i.e., warping and segmentation generation stages). A newly proposed feature fusion block in the condition generator implements the information exchange, and the condition generator does not create any misalignment or pixel-squeezing artifacts. We also introduce discriminator rejection that filters out the incorrect segmentation map predictions and assures the performance of virtual try-on frameworks. Experiments on a high-resolution dataset demonstrate that our model successfully handles the misalignment and occlusion, and significantly outperforms the baselines. Code is available at https://github.com/sangyun884/HR-VITON. 基于图像的虚拟试穿旨在合成穿着给定服装的人的图像。为了解决该任务，现有方法将服装物品扭曲以适合人的身体，并在将物品与人融合之前生成穿着该物品的人的分割图。然而，当变形和分割生成阶段在没有信息交换的情况下单独运行时，变形的衣服和分割图之间会发生未对准，从而导致最终图像中出现伪影。信息断开还会导致身体部位遮挡的衣服区域附近出现过度扭曲，即所谓的像素挤压伪影。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的试穿条件生成器作为两个阶段（即变形和分割生成阶段）的统一模块。条件生成器中新提出的特征融合块实现了信息交换，并且条件生成器不会产生任何未对准或像素挤压伪影。我们还引入了鉴别器拒绝，可以过滤掉不正确的分割图预测并确保虚拟试穿框架的性能。在高分辨率数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型成功地处理了错位和遮挡，并且显着优于基线。代码可在 https://github.com/sangyun884/HR-VITON 获取。 本文提出一种高分辨率虚拟试穿方法，解决衣物变形与人体分割图之间的错位及遮挡问题。 Sangyun Lee,Gyojung Gu,Sunghyun Park,Seunghwan Choi,Jaegul Choo cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Philipp Wu,Alejandro Escontrela,Danijar Hafner,Ken Goldberg,Pieter Abbeel
title: DayDreamer: World Models for Physical Robot Learning
title_zh: DayDreamer：物理机器人学习的世界模型
abstract: To solve tasks in complex environments, robots need to learn from experience. Deep reinforcement learning is a common approach to robot learning but requires a large amount of trial and error to learn, limiting its deployment in the physical world. As a consequence, many advances in robot learning rely on simulators. On the other hand, learning inside of simulators fails to capture the complexity of the real world, is prone to simulator inaccuracies, and the resulting behaviors do not adapt to changes in the world. The Dreamer algorithm has recently shown great promise for learning from small amounts of interaction by planning within a learned world model, outperforming pure reinforcement learning in video games. Learning a world model to predict the outcomes of potential actions enables planning in imagination, reducing the amount of trial and error needed in the real environment. However, it is unknown whether Dreamer can facilitate faster learning on physical robots. In this paper, we apply Dreamer to 4 robots to learn online and directly in the real world, without simulators. Dreamer trains a quadruped robot to roll off its back, stand up, and walk from scratch and without resets in only 1 hour. We then push the robot and find that Dreamer adapts within 10 minutes to withstand perturbations or quickly roll over and stand back up. On two different robotic arms, Dreamer learns to pick and place multiple objects directly from camera images and sparse rewards, approaching human performance. On a wheeled robot, Dreamer learns to navigate to a goal position purely from camera images, automatically resolving ambiguity about the robot orientation. Using the same hyperparameters across all experiments, we find that Dreamer is capable of online learning in the real world, establishing a strong baseline. We release our infrastructure for future applications of world models to robot learning.

abstract_zh: 为了解决复杂环境中的任务，机器人需要从经验中学习。深度强化学习是机器人学习的常见方法，但需要大量的试验和错误来学习，限制了其在物理世界中的部署。因此，机器人学习的许多进步都依赖于模拟器。另一方面，模拟器内部的学习无法捕捉现实世界的复杂性，很容易出现模拟器不准确的情况，并且由此产生的行为无法适应世界的变化。 Dreamer 算法最近显示出通过在学习世界模型中进行规划来从少量交互中进行学习的巨大前景，其性能优于视频游戏中的纯强化学习。学习世界模型来预测潜在行动的结果可以在想象中进行规划，减少现实环境中所需的试验和错误的数量。然而，目前尚不清楚Dreamer是否可以促进物理机器人更快的学习。在本文中，我们将 Dreamer 应用于 4 个机器人，使其能够在没有模拟器的情况下直接在现实世界中在线学习。 Dreamer 仅用了 1 小时就训练了四足机器人从背上滚下来、站起来并从头开始行走，无需重置。然后我们推动机器人，发现 Dreamer 在 10 分钟内就能适应并承受干扰或快速翻身并站起来。在两个不同的机械臂上，Dreamer 学会直接从相机图像和稀疏奖励中拾取和放置多个物体，接近人类的表现。在轮式机器人上，Dreamer 学会纯粹根据相机图像导航到目标位置，自动解决机器人方向的模糊性。在所有实验中使用相同的超参数，我们发现 Dreamer 能够在现实世界中在线学习，建立强大的基线。我们发布了我们的基础设施，以便未来将世界模型应用于机器人学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将Dreamer算法应用于物理机器人，在真实环境中直接进行在线学习，无需依赖模拟器。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习依赖大量试错且难以部署于真实世界，而模拟器训练的模型难以适应真实环境复杂性，因此需探索基于世界模型的高效学习方法。
AI.method: 通过训练世界模型预测动作结果，利用想象规划减少真实环境交互。在四类物理机器人（四足、机械臂、轮式）上直接应用Dreamer算法，采用统一超参数进行在线学习。
AI.result: 四足机器人1小时内学会翻身、站立和行走；机械臂通过摄像头和稀疏奖励完成多物体抓取；轮式机器人仅凭摄像头导航至目标位置，且模型能快速适应扰动。
AI.conclusion: DayDreamer验证了世界模型在真实物理机器人在线学习中的有效性，为后续研究提供了强基准。

authors_text: Pedro Orvalho,Mikoláš Janota,Vasco Manquinho
title: InvAASTCluster: On Applying Invariant-Based Program Clustering to Introductory Programming Assignments
title_zh: InvAASTCluster：将基于不变的程序聚类应用于入门编程作业
comment: 31 pages, 21 Figures, 5 Tables. Accepted for publication at the Journal of Systems and Software. GitHub repo: https://github.com/pmorvalho/InvAASTCluster
comments: 31 pages, 21 Figures, 5 Tables. Accepted for publication at the Journal of Systems and Software. GitHub repo: https://github.com/pmorvalho/InvAASTCluster
abstract: Due to the vast number of students enrolled in programming courses, there has been an increasing number of automated program repair techniques focused on introductory programming assignments (IPAs). Typically, such techniques use program clustering to take advantage of previous correct student implementations to repair a new incorrect submission. These repair techniques use clustering methods since analyzing all available correct submissions to repair a program is not feasible. However, conventional clustering methods rely on program representations based on features such as abstract syntax trees (ASTs), syntax, control flow, and data flow. This paper proposes InvAASTCluster, a novel approach for program clustering that uses dynamically generated program invariants to cluster semantically equivalent IPAs. InvAASTCluster's program representation uses a combination of the program's semantics, through its invariants, and its structure through its anonymized abstract syntax tree (AASTs). Invariants denote conditions that must remain true during program execution, while AASTs are ASTs devoid of variable and function names, retaining only their types. Our experiments show that the proposed program representation outperforms syntax-based representations when clustering a set of correct IPAs. Furthermore, we integrate InvAASTCluster into a state-of-the-art clustering-based program repair tool. Our results show that InvAASTCluster advances the current state-of-the-art when used by clustering-based repair tools by repairing around 13% more students' programs, in a shorter amount of time.
summary: Due to the vast number of students enrolled in programming courses, there has been an increasing number of automated program repair techniques focused on introductory programming assignments (IPAs). Typically, such techniques use program clustering to take advantage of previous correct student implementations to repair a new incorrect submission. These repair techniques use clustering methods since analyzing all available correct submissions to repair a program is not feasible. However, conventional clustering methods rely on program representations based on features such as abstract syntax trees (ASTs), syntax, control flow, and data flow. This paper proposes InvAASTCluster, a novel approach for program clustering that uses dynamically generated program invariants to cluster semantically equivalent IPAs. InvAASTCluster's program representation uses a combination of the program's semantics, through its invariants, and its structure through its anonymized abstract syntax tree (AASTs). Invariants denote conditions that must remain true during program execution, while AASTs are ASTs devoid of variable and function names, retaining only their types. Our experiments show that the proposed program representation outperforms syntax-based representations when clustering a set of correct IPAs. Furthermore, we integrate InvAASTCluster into a state-of-the-art clustering-based program repair tool. Our results show that InvAASTCluster advances the current state-of-the-art when used by clustering-based repair tools by repairing around 13% more students' programs, in a shorter amount of time.
abstract_zh: 由于大量学生报名参加编程课程，因此越来越多的自动化程序修复技术专注于入门编程作业（IPA）。通常，此类技术使用程序集群来利用先前正确的学生实现来修复新的错误提交。这些修复技术使用聚类方法，因为分析所有可用的正确提交来修复程序是不可行的。然而，传统的聚类方法依赖于基于抽象语法树（AST）、语法、控制流和数据流等特征的程序表示。本文提出了 InvAASTCluster，这是一种新颖的程序聚类方法，它使用动态生成的程序不变量来对语义上等效的 IPA 进行聚类。 InvAASTCluster 的程序表示结合了程序的语义（通过其不变量）及其结构（通过其匿名抽象语法树 (AAST)）。不变量表示在程序执行期间必须保持正确的条件，而 AAST 是没有变量和函数名称的 AST，仅保留它们的类型。我们的实验表明，在对一组正确的 IPA 进行聚类时，所提出的程序表示优于基于语法的表示。此外，我们将 InvAASTCluster 集成到最先进的基于集群的程序修复工具中。我们的结果表明，当基于集群的修复工具使用 InvAASTCluster 时，InvAASTCluster 可以在更短的时间内修复大约 13% 的学生程序，从而提升了当前的最先进水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InvAASTCluster方法，通过结合程序不变量与匿名化抽象语法树（AAST），提升入门编程作业的程序聚类效果，从而优化自动程序修复工具的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统程序聚类方法依赖语法特征（如AST），难以准确捕捉语义等价性，导致修复效果受限。针对入门编程作业（IPAs）的自动修复需求，需更高效的聚类表示以提升修复覆盖率与效率。
AI.method: InvAASTCluster采用动态生成的程序不变量（反映执行时的逻辑条件）与匿名化AST（保留类型信息但去除变量名）的组合表示，构建更贴近语义的程序特征，用于聚类分析。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在正确IPA聚类任务中优于基于语法的表示，集成到修复工具后，修复成功率提升约13%，且耗时更短。
AI.conclusion: 结合语义不变量与结构特征的InvAASTCluster方法，显著提升了程序聚类的准确性与修复效率，为自动程序修复提供了更优的解决方案。

search_text: InvAASTCluster: On Applying Invariant-Based Program Clustering to Introductory Programming Assignments InvAASTCluster：将基于不变的程序聚类应用于入门编程作业 Due to the vast number of students enrolled in programming courses, there has been an increasing number of automated program repair techniques focused on introductory programming assignments (IPAs). Typically, such techniques use program clustering to take advantage of previous correct student implementations to repair a new incorrect submission. These repair techniques use clustering methods since analyzing all available correct submissions to repair a program is not feasible. However, conventional clustering methods rely on program representations based on features such as abstract syntax trees (ASTs), syntax, control flow, and data flow. This paper proposes InvAASTCluster, a novel approach for program clustering that uses dynamically generated program invariants to cluster semantically equivalent IPAs. InvAASTCluster's program representation uses a combination of the program's semantics, through its invariants, and its structure through its anonymized abstract syntax tree (AASTs). Invariants denote conditions that must remain true during program execution, while AASTs are ASTs devoid of variable and function names, retaining only their types. Our experiments show that the proposed program representation outperforms syntax-based representations when clustering a set of correct IPAs. Furthermore, we integrate InvAASTCluster into a state-of-the-art clustering-based program repair tool. Our results show that InvAASTCluster advances the current state-of-the-art when used by clustering-based repair tools by repairing around 13% more students' programs, in a shorter amount of time. 由于大量学生报名参加编程课程，因此越来越多的自动化程序修复技术专注于入门编程作业（IPA）。通常，此类技术使用程序集群来利用先前正确的学生实现来修复新的错误提交。这些修复技术使用聚类方法，因为分析所有可用的正确提交来修复程序是不可行的。然而，传统的聚类方法依赖于基于抽象语法树（AST）、语法、控制流和数据流等特征的程序表示。本文提出了 InvAASTCluster，这是一种新颖的程序聚类方法，它使用动态生成的程序不变量来对语义上等效的 IPA 进行聚类。 InvAASTCluster 的程序表示结合了程序的语义（通过其不变量）及其结构（通过其匿名抽象语法树 (AAST)）。不变量表示在程序执行期间必须保持正确的条件，而 AAST 是没有变量和函数名称的 AST，仅保留它们的类型。我们的实验表明，在对一组正确的 IPA 进行聚类时，所提出的程序表示优于基于语法的表示。此外，我们将 InvAASTCluster 集成到最先进的基于集群的程序修复工具中。我们的结果表明，当基于集群的修复工具使用 InvAASTCluster 时，InvAASTCluster 可以在更短的时间内修复大约 13% 的学生程序，从而提升了当前的最先进水平。 本文提出InvAASTCluster方法，通过结合程序不变量与匿名化抽象语法树（AAST），提升入门编程作业的程序聚类效果，从而优化自动程序修复工具的性能。 Pedro Orvalho,Mikoláš Janota,Vasco Manquinho cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.PL

authors_text: Ammar Abbas,Thomas Merritt,Alexis Moinet,Sri Karlapati,Ewa Muszynska,Simon Slangen,Elia Gatti,Thomas Drugman
title: Expressive, Variable, and Controllable Duration Modelling in TTS
title_zh: TTS 中富有表现力、可变且可控的持续时间建模
comment: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of InterSpeech 2022
comments: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of InterSpeech 2022
abstract: Duration modelling has become an important research problem once more with the rise of non-attention neural text-to-speech systems. The current approaches largely fall back to relying on previous statistical parametric speech synthesis technology for duration prediction, which poorly models the expressiveness and variability in speech. In this paper, we propose two alternate approaches to improve duration modelling. First, we propose a duration model conditioned on phrasing that improves the predicted durations and provides better modelling of pauses. We show that the duration model conditioned on phrasing improves the naturalness of speech over our baseline duration model. Second, we also propose a multi-speaker duration model called Cauliflow, that uses normalising flows to predict durations that better match the complex target duration distribution. Cauliflow performs on par with our other proposed duration model in terms of naturalness, whilst providing variable durations for the same prompt and variable levels of expressiveness. Lastly, we propose to condition Cauliflow on parameters that provide an intuitive control of the pacing and pausing in the synthesised speech in a novel way.
summary: Duration modelling has become an important research problem once more with the rise of non-attention neural text-to-speech systems. The current approaches largely fall back to relying on previous statistical parametric speech synthesis technology for duration prediction, which poorly models the expressiveness and variability in speech. In this paper, we propose two alternate approaches to improve duration modelling. First, we propose a duration model conditioned on phrasing that improves the predicted durations and provides better modelling of pauses. We show that the duration model conditioned on phrasing improves the naturalness of speech over our baseline duration model. Second, we also propose a multi-speaker duration model called Cauliflow, that uses normalising flows to predict durations that better match the complex target duration distribution. Cauliflow performs on par with our other proposed duration model in terms of naturalness, whilst providing variable durations for the same prompt and variable levels of expressiveness. Lastly, we propose to condition Cauliflow on parameters that provide an intuitive control of the pacing and pausing in the synthesised speech in a novel way.
abstract_zh: 随着非注意力神经文本转语音系统的兴起，持续时间建模再次成为一个重要的研究问题。当前的方法很大程度上依赖于先前的统计参数语音合成技术来进行持续时间预测，这对语音的表达力和可变性进行了较差的建模。在本文中，我们提出了两种改进持续时间建模的替代方法。首先，我们提出了一个以措辞为条件的持续时间模型，该模型可以改进预测的持续时间并提供更好的停顿建模。我们表明，以措辞为条件的持续时间模型比我们的基线持续时间模型提高了语音的自然度。其次，我们还提出了一种称为 Cauliflow 的多说话人持续时间模型，该模型使用归一化流来预测更好地匹配复杂目标持续时间分布的持续时间。 Cauliflow 在自然度方面与我们提出的其他持续时间模型相当，同时为相同的提示和不同的表达水平提供可变的持续时间。最后，我们建议根据参数对 Cauliflow 进行调节，这些参数以一种新颖的方式提供对合成语音中的节奏和暂停的直观控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种改进的时长建模方法，以提升文本到语音合成系统的表达性、可变性和可控性。
AI.motivation: 传统时长预测方法依赖统计参数模型，难以捕捉语音的自然表达和变异性，需探索更灵活的建模方式。
AI.method: 提出基于分句条件的时长模型提升停顿建模，设计多说话人归一化流模型Cauliflow，并引入参数控制合成语音的节奏与停顿。
AI.result: 分句条件模型优于基线自然度，Cauliflow在自然度上表现相当但支持时长与表达性调节，参数控制方法实现合成语音的直观调控。
AI.conclusion: 新方法有效提升时长建模的灵活性与自然度，为可控TTS系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Jen-Hui Chuang,Hsin-Yi Chen
title: Visualizing and Alleviating the Effect of Radial Distortion on Camera Calibration Using Principal Lines
title_zh: 使用主线可视化并减轻径向畸变对相机校准的影响
abstract: Preparing appropriate images for camera calibration is crucial to obtain accurate results. In this paper, new suggestions for preparing such data to alleviate the adverse effect of radial distortion for a calibration procedure using principal lines are developed through the investigations of: (i) identifying directions of checkerboard movements in an image which will result in maximum (and minimum) influence on the calibration results, and (ii) inspecting symmetry and monotonicity of such effect in (i) using the above principal lines. Accordingly, it is suggested that the estimation of principal point should based on linearly independent pairs of nearly parallel principal lines, with a member in each pair corresponds to a near 180-degree rotation (in the image plane) of the other. Experimental results show that more robust and consistent calibration results for the foregoing estimation can actually be obtained, compared with the renowned algebraic methods which estimate distortion parameters explicitly.
summary: Preparing appropriate images for camera calibration is crucial to obtain accurate results. In this paper, new suggestions for preparing such data to alleviate the adverse effect of radial distortion for a calibration procedure using principal lines are developed through the investigations of: (i) identifying directions of checkerboard movements in an image which will result in maximum (and minimum) influence on the calibration results, and (ii) inspecting symmetry and monotonicity of such effect in (i) using the above principal lines. Accordingly, it is suggested that the estimation of principal point should based on linearly independent pairs of nearly parallel principal lines, with a member in each pair corresponds to a near 180-degree rotation (in the image plane) of the other. Experimental results show that more robust and consistent calibration results for the foregoing estimation can actually be obtained, compared with the renowned algebraic methods which estimate distortion parameters explicitly.
abstract_zh: 为相机校准准备适当的图像对于获得准确的结果至关重要。在本文中，通过以下研究提出了准备此类数据以减轻径向畸变对使用主线的校准过程的不利影响的新建议：（i）识别图像中棋盘运动的方向，这将对校准结果产生最大（和最小）影响，以及（ii）使用上述主线检查（i）中这种效果的对称性和单调性。因此，建议主点的估计应基于线性独立的几乎平行的主线对，每对中的一个成员对应于另一个成员的近180度旋转（在图像平面中）。实验结果表明，与显式估计失真参数的著名代数方法相比，上述估计实际上可以获得更稳健和一致的校准结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过主线条方法减少径向失真对相机标定的影响，并优化图像准备策略。
AI.motivation: 相机标定需高质量图像数据，而径向失真会显著影响标定精度，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 通过分析棋盘格运动方向对标定结果的影响，利用主线条的对称性和单调性特性，提出基于近似平行主线条对估计主点的方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法相比显式估计畸变参数的代数方法，能获得更稳健和一致的标定结果。
AI.conclusion: 基于主线条的标定策略有效缓解了径向失真影响，为相机标定提供了新思路。

ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法相比显式估计畸变参数的代数方法，能获得更稳健和一致的标定结果。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 基于主线条的标定策略有效缓解了径向失真影响，为相机标定提供了新思路。

search_text: Visualizing and Alleviating the Effect of Radial Distortion on Camera Calibration Using Principal Lines 使用主线可视化并减轻径向畸变对相机校准的影响 Preparing appropriate images for camera calibration is crucial to obtain accurate results. In this paper, new suggestions for preparing such data to alleviate the adverse effect of radial distortion for a calibration procedure using principal lines are developed through the investigations of: (i) identifying directions of checkerboard movements in an image which will result in maximum (and minimum) influence on the calibration results, and (ii) inspecting symmetry and monotonicity of such effect in (i) using the above principal lines. Accordingly, it is suggested that the estimation of principal point should based on linearly independent pairs of nearly parallel principal lines, with a member in each pair corresponds to a near 180-degree rotation (in the image plane) of the other. Experimental results show that more robust and consistent calibration results for the foregoing estimation can actually be obtained, compared with the renowned algebraic methods which estimate distortion parameters explicitly. 为相机校准准备适当的图像对于获得准确的结果至关重要。在本文中，通过以下研究提出了准备此类数据以减轻径向畸变对使用主线的校准过程的不利影响的新建议：（i）识别图像中棋盘运动的方向，这将对校准结果产生最大（和最小）影响，以及（ii）使用上述主线检查（i）中这种效果的对称性和单调性。因此，建议主点的估计应基于线性独立的几乎平行的主线对，每对中的一个成员对应于另一个成员的近180度旋转（在图像平面中）。实验结果表明，与显式估计失真参数的著名代数方法相比，上述估计实际上可以获得更稳健和一致的校准结果。 本文提出通过主线条方法减少径向失真对相机标定的影响，并优化图像准备策略。 Jen-Hui Chuang,Hsin-Yi Chen cs.CV

authors_text: Cillian Brewitt,Massimiliano Tamborski,Cheng Wang,Stefano V. Albrecht
title: Verifiable Goal Recognition for Autonomous Driving with Occlusions
title_zh: 遮挡情况下自动驾驶的可验证目标识别
comment: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
comments: IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS), 2023
abstract: Goal recognition (GR) involves inferring the goals of other vehicles, such as a certain junction exit, which can enable more accurate prediction of their future behaviour. In autonomous driving, vehicles can encounter many different scenarios and the environment may be partially observable due to occlusions. We present a novel GR method named Goal Recognition with Interpretable Trees under Occlusion (OGRIT). OGRIT uses decision trees learned from vehicle trajectory data to infer the probabilities of a set of generated goals. We demonstrate that OGRIT can handle missing data due to occlusions and make inferences across multiple scenarios using the same learned decision trees, while being computationally fast, accurate, interpretable and verifiable. We also release the inDO, rounDO and OpenDDO datasets of occluded regions used to evaluate OGRIT.
summary: Goal recognition (GR) involves inferring the goals of other vehicles, such as a certain junction exit, which can enable more accurate prediction of their future behaviour. In autonomous driving, vehicles can encounter many different scenarios and the environment may be partially observable due to occlusions. We present a novel GR method named Goal Recognition with Interpretable Trees under Occlusion (OGRIT). OGRIT uses decision trees learned from vehicle trajectory data to infer the probabilities of a set of generated goals. We demonstrate that OGRIT can handle missing data due to occlusions and make inferences across multiple scenarios using the same learned decision trees, while being computationally fast, accurate, interpretable and verifiable. We also release the inDO, rounDO and OpenDDO datasets of occluded regions used to evaluate OGRIT.
abstract_zh: 目标识别（GR）涉及推断其他车辆的目标，例如某个路口出口，这可以更准确地预测它们未来的行为。在自动驾驶中，车辆可能会遇到许多不同的场景，并且由于遮挡而可能无法部分观察到环境。我们提出了一种新颖的 GR 方法，称为遮挡下可解释树目标识别 (OGRIT)。 OGRIT 使用从车辆轨迹数据中学习到的决策树来推断一组生成目标的概率。我们证明 OGRIT 可以处理由于遮挡而丢失的数据，并使用相同的学习决策树在多个场景中进行推理，同时计算速度快、准确、可解释和可验证。我们还发布了用于评估 OGRIT 的遮挡区域的 inDO、roundDO 和 OpenDDO 数据集。

AI.tldr: 提出一种可验证的目标识别方法OGRIT，用于自动驾驶中的遮挡场景，以准确预测其他车辆的行为。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶中遮挡导致环境部分不可观测，现有方法难以准确预测其他车辆目标，需更可靠且可解释的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于车辆轨迹数据训练决策树模型，通过生成目标集推断概率，处理遮挡导致的数据缺失，并在不同场景中复用同一决策树，实现快速、准确、可解释的推理。
AI.result: 实验表明OGRIT能有效处理遮挡数据，跨场景推理准确，且计算效率高；同时发布了inDO、rounDO和OpenDDO数据集用于评估。
AI.conclusion: OGRIT在遮挡环境下提供可靠、可验证的目标识别，提升自动驾驶预测能力，并为未来研究提供数据支持。

authors_text: Mauro Martini,Simone Cerrato,Francesco Salvetti,Simone Angarano,Marcello Chiaberge
title: Position-Agnostic Autonomous Navigation in Vineyards with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 具有深度强化学习的葡萄园中与位置无关的自主导航
comment: ef:2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), 2022, pp. 477-484
comments: ef:2022 IEEE 18th International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), 2022, pp. 477-484
abstract: Precision agriculture is rapidly attracting research to efficiently introduce automation and robotics solutions to support agricultural activities. Robotic navigation in vineyards and orchards offers competitive advantages in autonomously monitoring and easily accessing crops for harvesting, spraying and performing time-consuming necessary tasks. Nowadays, autonomous navigation algorithms exploit expensive sensors which also require heavy computational cost for data processing. Nonetheless, vineyard rows represent a challenging outdoor scenario where GPS and Visual Odometry techniques often struggle to provide reliable positioning information. In this work, we combine Edge AI with Deep Reinforcement Learning to propose a cutting-edge lightweight solution to tackle the problem of autonomous vineyard navigation without exploiting precise localization data and overcoming task-tailored algorithms with a flexible learning-based approach. We train an end-to-end sensorimotor agent which directly maps noisy depth images and position-agnostic robot state information to velocity commands and guides the robot to the end of a row, continuously adjusting its heading for a collision-free central trajectory. Our extensive experimentation in realistic simulated vineyards demonstrates the effectiveness of our solution and the generalization capabilities of our agent.
summary: Precision agriculture is rapidly attracting research to efficiently introduce automation and robotics solutions to support agricultural activities. Robotic navigation in vineyards and orchards offers competitive advantages in autonomously monitoring and easily accessing crops for harvesting, spraying and performing time-consuming necessary tasks. Nowadays, autonomous navigation algorithms exploit expensive sensors which also require heavy computational cost for data processing. Nonetheless, vineyard rows represent a challenging outdoor scenario where GPS and Visual Odometry techniques often struggle to provide reliable positioning information. In this work, we combine Edge AI with Deep Reinforcement Learning to propose a cutting-edge lightweight solution to tackle the problem of autonomous vineyard navigation without exploiting precise localization data and overcoming task-tailored algorithms with a flexible learning-based approach. We train an end-to-end sensorimotor agent which directly maps noisy depth images and position-agnostic robot state information to velocity commands and guides the robot to the end of a row, continuously adjusting its heading for a collision-free central trajectory. Our extensive experimentation in realistic simulated vineyards demonstrates the effectiveness of our solution and the generalization capabilities of our agent.
abstract_zh: 精准农业正在迅速吸引研究人员有效引入自动化和机器人解决方案来支持农业活动。葡萄园和果园中的机器人导航在自动监控和轻松访问农作物以进行收割、喷洒和执行耗时的必要任务方面具有竞争优势。如今，自主导航算法利用昂贵的传感器，这也需要大量的计算成本来进行数据处理。尽管如此，葡萄园行是一个具有挑战性的户外场景，GPS 和视觉里程计技术通常难以提供可靠的定位信息。在这项工作中，我们将边缘人工智能与深度强化学习相结合，提出了一种尖端的轻量级解决方案，以解决自主葡萄园导航的问题，无需利用精确的定位数据，并通过灵活的基于学习的方法克服任务定制算法。我们训练一个端到端的感觉运动代理，它直接将噪声深度图像和与位置无关的机器人状态信息映射到速度命令，并引导机器人到行的末尾，不断调整其航向以实现无碰撞的中心轨迹。我们在真实模拟葡萄园中进行的广泛实验证明了我们解决方案的有效性和代理的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度强化学习的轻量级解决方案，用于在无需精确定位数据的情况下实现葡萄园中的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 现有自主导航算法依赖昂贵传感器和高计算成本，而葡萄园环境中的GPS和视觉里程计技术难以提供可靠定位信息，亟需灵活且低成本的替代方案。
AI.method: 结合边缘AI与深度强化学习，训练端到端的感测运动代理，直接将噪声深度图像和位置无关的机器人状态信息映射为速度指令，引导机器人沿行进方向调整航向以避开障碍。
AI.result: 在真实模拟的葡萄园环境中进行的大量实验验证了该方案的有效性及代理的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为葡萄园自主导航提供了无需精确定位的灵活学习框架，可推广至其他复杂户外场景。

authors_text: Shreyas Gawde,Shruti Patil,Satish Kumar,Pooja Kamat,Ketan Kotecha,Ajith Abraham
title: Multi-Fault Diagnosis Of Industrial Rotating Machines Using Data-Driven Approach: A Review Of Two Decades Of Research
title_zh: 使用数据驱动方法进行工业旋转机器的多故障诊断：二十年研究回顾
abstract: Industry 4.0 is an era of smart manufacturing. Manufacturing is impossible without the use of machinery. Majority of these machines comprise rotating components and are called rotating machines. The engineers' top priority is to maintain these critical machines to reduce the unplanned shutdown and increase the useful life of machinery. Predictive maintenance (PDM) is the current trend of smart maintenance. The challenging task in PDM is to diagnose the type of fault. With Artificial Intelligence (AI) advancement, data-driven approach for predictive maintenance is taking a new flight towards smart manufacturing. Several researchers have published work related to fault diagnosis in rotating machines, mainly exploring a single type of fault. However, a consolidated review of literature that focuses more on multi-fault diagnosis of rotating machines is lacking. There is a need to systematically cover all the aspects right from sensor selection, data acquisition, feature extraction, multi-sensor data fusion to the systematic review of AI techniques employed in multi-fault diagnosis. In this regard, this paper attempts to achieve the same by implementing a systematic literature review on a Data-driven approach for multi-fault diagnosis of Industrial Rotating Machines using Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analysis (PRISMA) method. The PRISMA method is a collection of guidelines for the composition and structure of systematic reviews and other meta-analyses. This paper identifies the foundational work done in the field and gives a comparative study of different aspects related to multi-fault diagnosis of industrial rotating machines. The paper also identifies the major challenges, research gap. It gives solutions using recent advancements in AI in implementing multi-fault diagnosis, giving a strong base for future research in this field.

abstract_zh: 工业4.0是智能制造时代。不使用机械就不可能进行制造。这些机器大多数包含旋转部件，称为旋转机器。工程师的首要任务是维护这些关键机器，以减少意外停机并延长机器的使用寿命。预测性维护（PDM）是当前智能维护的趋势。 PDM 中具有挑战性的任务是诊断故障类型。随着人工智能 (AI) 的进步，数据驱动的预测性维护方法正在向智能制造迈进新的一步。一些研究人员发表了与旋转机械故障诊断相关的工作，主要探讨单一类型的故障。然而，缺乏对旋转机械多故障诊断更关注的文献的综合综述。需要系统地涵盖从传感器选择、数据采集、特征提取、多传感器数据融合到对多故障诊断中采用的人工智能技术的系统回顾的所有方面。在这方面，本文试图通过使用系统审查和荟萃分析的首选报告项目（PRISMA）方法对工业旋转机器多故障诊断的数据驱动方法进行系统文献综述来实现相同的目标。 PRISMA 方法是系统评价和其他荟萃分析的组成和结构指南的集合。本文介绍了该领域所做的基础工作，并对工业旋转机械多故障诊断相关的不同方面进行了比较研究。该论文还指出了主要挑战和研究差距。它提供了利用人工智能最新进展实施多故障诊断的解决方案，为该领域的未来研究奠定了坚实的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述方法，回顾了过去二十年工业旋转机械多故障诊断的数据驱动研究，旨在填补现有文献在多故障诊断方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 工业4.0时代对智能维护的需求促使预测性维护（PDM）成为趋势，但现有研究多集中于单一故障诊断，缺乏对多故障诊断的系统性综述。
AI.method: 采用PRISMA方法进行系统文献综述，涵盖传感器选择、数据采集、特征提取、多传感器数据融合及AI技术应用等关键环节。
AI.result: 识别了多故障诊断领域的基础研究、技术挑战与研究空白，并提出基于AI的解决方案，为未来研究提供理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过系统分析明确了多故障诊断的技术路径与研究方向，为工业旋转机械的智能化维护提供了重要参考。

authors_text: Sabina Elkins,Robert Belfer,Ekaterina Kochmar,Iulian Serban,Jackie C. K. Cheung
title: Question Personalization in an Intelligent Tutoring System
title_zh: 智能辅导系统中的问题个性化
comment: To be published in AIED Late Breaking Results 2022
comments: To be published in AIED Late Breaking Results 2022
abstract: This paper investigates personalization in the field of intelligent tutoring systems (ITS). We hypothesize that personalization in the way questions are asked improves student learning outcomes. Previous work on dialogue-based ITS personalization has yet to address question phrasing. We show that generating versions of the questions suitable for students at different levels of subject proficiency improves student learning gains, using variants written by a domain expert and an experimental A/B test. This insight demonstrates that the linguistic realization of questions in an ITS affects the learning outcomes for students.
summary: This paper investigates personalization in the field of intelligent tutoring systems (ITS). We hypothesize that personalization in the way questions are asked improves student learning outcomes. Previous work on dialogue-based ITS personalization has yet to address question phrasing. We show that generating versions of the questions suitable for students at different levels of subject proficiency improves student learning gains, using variants written by a domain expert and an experimental A/B test. This insight demonstrates that the linguistic realization of questions in an ITS affects the learning outcomes for students.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了智能辅导系统（ITS）领域的个性化。我们假设提问方式的个性化可以提高学生的学习成果。之前基于对话的 ITS 个性化工作尚未解决问题措辞问题。我们证明，使用领域专家编写的变体和实验性 A/B 测试，生成适合不同学科熟练程度学生的问题版本可以提高学生的学习收益。这一见解表明，ITS 中问题的语言实现会影响学生的学习成果。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在智能辅导系统中通过个性化问题表述提升学生学习效果的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有对话式智能辅导系统的个性化研究未涉及问题表述方式，而问题的语言表达可能影响学习效果。
AI.method: 通过领域专家设计不同难度层次的问题版本，并进行实验A/B测试验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，针对不同学科熟练度的学生定制问题表述能显著提升学习成果。
AI.conclusion: 智能辅导系统中问题的语言表达形式对学习效果有直接影响，个性化问题设计值得进一步探索。

authors_text: Paola Gervasio,Alfio Quarteroni,Daniele Cassani
title: Let the paintings play
title_zh: 让画作发挥作用
abstract: In this paper, we introduce a mathematical method to extract similarities between paintings and musical tracks. Our approach is based on the digitalization of both paintings and musical tracks by means of finite expansions in terms of orthogonal basis functions (with both Fourier and wavelet bases). The best fit between a specific painting and a sample of musical tracks from a given composer is achieved via an $L^2$ projection upon a finite-dimensional subspace. Several examples are provided for the analysis of a collection of works of art by the Italian artist Marcello Morandini. Finally, we have developed an original applet that implements the process above and which can be freely downloaded from the site https://github.com/pgerva/playing-paintings.git
summary: In this paper, we introduce a mathematical method to extract similarities between paintings and musical tracks. Our approach is based on the digitalization of both paintings and musical tracks by means of finite expansions in terms of orthogonal basis functions (with both Fourier and wavelet bases). The best fit between a specific painting and a sample of musical tracks from a given composer is achieved via an $L^2$ projection upon a finite-dimensional subspace. Several examples are provided for the analysis of a collection of works of art by the Italian artist Marcello Morandini. Finally, we have developed an original applet that implements the process above and which can be freely downloaded from the site https://github.com/pgerva/playing-paintings.git
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了一种数学方法来提取绘画和音乐曲目之间的相似性。我们的方法基于通过正交基函数（具有傅里叶基和小波基）的有限展开来实现绘画和音乐曲目的数字化。特定绘画与给定作曲家的音乐曲目样本之间的最佳匹配是通过有限维子空间上的 $L^2$ 投影来实现的。提供了几个例子来分析意大利艺术家马塞洛·莫兰迪尼的艺术作品收藏。最后，我们开发了一个原始的小程序来实现上述过程，可以从网站 https://github.com/pgerva/playing-paintings.git 免费下载

AI.tldr: 提出一种数学方法，通过正交基函数展开和L²投影，将绘画与音乐曲目进行相似性分析，并开发应用实现这一过程。
AI.motivation: 探索绘画与音乐之间的跨领域相似性，为艺术分析提供数学工具，并开发应用促进艺术与科技的结合。
AI.method: 通过傅里叶和小波基的有限展开数字化绘画和音乐，利用L²投影在有限维子空间中匹配绘画与音乐曲目。
AI.result: 分析了Marcello Morandini的作品集，并开发了可自由下载的应用程序实现该方法。
AI.conclusion: 验证了数学方法在跨艺术形式分析中的有效性，展示了艺术与科技结合的潜力，并为未来研究提供了可扩展的工具。

search_text: Let the paintings play 让画作发挥作用 In this paper, we introduce a mathematical method to extract similarities between paintings and musical tracks. Our approach is based on the digitalization of both paintings and musical tracks by means of finite expansions in terms of orthogonal basis functions (with both Fourier and wavelet bases). The best fit between a specific painting and a sample of musical tracks from a given composer is achieved via an $L^2$ projection upon a finite-dimensional subspace. Several examples are provided for the analysis of a collection of works of art by the Italian artist Marcello Morandini. Finally, we have developed an original applet that implements the process above and which can be freely downloaded from the site https://github.com/pgerva/playing-paintings.git 在本文中，我们介绍了一种数学方法来提取绘画和音乐曲目之间的相似性。我们的方法基于通过正交基函数（具有傅里叶基和小波基）的有限展开来实现绘画和音乐曲目的数字化。特定绘画与给定作曲家的音乐曲目样本之间的最佳匹配是通过有限维子空间上的 $L^2$ 投影来实现的。提供了几个例子来分析意大利艺术家马塞洛·莫兰迪尼的艺术作品收藏。最后，我们开发了一个原始的小程序来实现上述过程，可以从网站 https://github.com/pgerva/playing-paintings.git 免费下载 提出一种数学方法，通过正交基函数展开和L²投影，将绘画与音乐曲目进行相似性分析，并开发应用实现这一过程。 Paola Gervasio,Alfio Quarteroni,Daniele Cassani cs.MM,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Shiyuan Li
title: aSTDP: A More Biologically Plausible Learning
title_zh: aSTDP：一种在生物学上更合理的学习
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1912.00009
comments: 17 pages, 6 figures. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1912.00009
abstract: Spike-timing dependent plasticity in biological neural networks has been proven to be important during biological learning process. On the other hand, artificial neural networks use a different way to learn, such as Back-Propagation or Contrastive Hebbian Learning. In this work we introduce approximate STDP, a new neural networks learning framework more similar to the biological learning process. It uses only STDP rules for supervised and unsupervised learning, every neuron distributed learn patterns and don' t need a global loss or other supervised information. We also use a numerical way to approximate the derivatives of each neuron in order to better use SDTP learning and use the derivatives to set a target for neurons to accelerate training and testing process. The framework can make predictions or generate patterns in one model without additional configuration. Finally, we verified our framework on MNIST dataset for classification and generation tasks.
summary: Spike-timing dependent plasticity in biological neural networks has been proven to be important during biological learning process. On the other hand, artificial neural networks use a different way to learn, such as Back-Propagation or Contrastive Hebbian Learning. In this work we introduce approximate STDP, a new neural networks learning framework more similar to the biological learning process. It uses only STDP rules for supervised and unsupervised learning, every neuron distributed learn patterns and don' t need a global loss or other supervised information. We also use a numerical way to approximate the derivatives of each neuron in order to better use SDTP learning and use the derivatives to set a target for neurons to accelerate training and testing process. The framework can make predictions or generate patterns in one model without additional configuration. Finally, we verified our framework on MNIST dataset for classification and generation tasks.
abstract_zh: 生物神经网络中的尖峰时间依赖性可塑性已被证明在生物学习过程中很重要。另一方面，人工神经网络使用不同的学习方式，例如反向传播或对比赫布学习。在这项工作中，我们引入了近似 STDP，一种更类似于生物学习过程的新神经网络学习框架。它仅使用 STDP 规则进行监督和无监督学习，每个神经元分布式学习模式，不需要全局损失或其他监督信息。我们还使用数值方式来近似每个神经元的导数，以便更好地使用 SDTP 学习，并使用导数为神经元设定目标，以加速训练和测试过程。该框架可以在一个模型中进行预测或生成模式，无需额外配置。最后，我们在 MNIST 数据集上验证了我们的分类和生成任务框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种更接近生物学习机制的神经网络学习框架aSTDP，结合监督与无监督学习，无需全局损失函数即可完成预测和模式生成。
AI.motivation: 生物神经网络的时空依赖可塑性（STDP）对学习至关重要，而传统人工神经网络依赖反向传播等方法，与生物学习过程存在差异，需探索更符合生物特性的学习框架。
AI.method: 基于STDP规则构建学习框架，通过数值方法近似神经元导数以优化学习过程，利用导数设定神经元目标加速训练，并在单一模型中实现预测与生成任务。
AI.result: 在MNIST数据集上验证了框架的有效性，成功完成分类和生成任务，证明其可行性。
AI.conclusion: aSTDP框架通过模拟生物STDP机制，为神经网络提供了更高效且生物合理的学习方式，可能推动类脑计算的发展。

authors_text: Manjinder Singh,Alexander E. I. Brownlee,David Cairns
title: Towards Explainable Metaheuristic: Mining Surrogate Fitness Models for Importance of Variables
title_zh: 迈向可解释的元启发式：挖掘变量重要性的替代适应度模型
abstract: Metaheuristic search algorithms look for solutions that either maximise or minimise a set of objectives, such as cost or performance. However most real-world optimisation problems consist of nonlinear problems with complex constraints and conflicting objectives. The process by which a GA arrives at a solution remains largely unexplained to the end-user. A poorly understood solution will dent the confidence a user has in the arrived at solution. We propose that investigation of the variables that strongly influence solution quality and their relationship would be a step toward providing an explanation of the near-optimal solution presented by a metaheuristic. Through the use of four benchmark problems we use the population data generated by a Genetic Algorithm (GA) to train a surrogate model, and investigate the learning of the search space by the surrogate model. We compare what the surrogate has learned after being trained on population data generated after the first generation and contrast this with a surrogate model trained on the population data from all generations. We show that the surrogate model picks out key characteristics of the problem as it is trained on population data from each generation. Through mining the surrogate model we can build a picture of the learning process of a GA, and thus an explanation of the solution presented by the GA. The aim being to build trust and confidence in the end-user about the solution presented by the GA, and encourage adoption of the model.
summary: Metaheuristic search algorithms look for solutions that either maximise or minimise a set of objectives, such as cost or performance. However most real-world optimisation problems consist of nonlinear problems with complex constraints and conflicting objectives. The process by which a GA arrives at a solution remains largely unexplained to the end-user. A poorly understood solution will dent the confidence a user has in the arrived at solution. We propose that investigation of the variables that strongly influence solution quality and their relationship would be a step toward providing an explanation of the near-optimal solution presented by a metaheuristic. Through the use of four benchmark problems we use the population data generated by a Genetic Algorithm (GA) to train a surrogate model, and investigate the learning of the search space by the surrogate model. We compare what the surrogate has learned after being trained on population data generated after the first generation and contrast this with a surrogate model trained on the population data from all generations. We show that the surrogate model picks out key characteristics of the problem as it is trained on population data from each generation. Through mining the surrogate model we can build a picture of the learning process of a GA, and thus an explanation of the solution presented by the GA. The aim being to build trust and confidence in the end-user about the solution presented by the GA, and encourage adoption of the model.
abstract_zh: 元启发式搜索算法寻找最大化或最小化一组目标（例如成本或性能）的解决方案。然而，大多数现实世界的优化问题都是由具有复杂约束和相互冲突目标的非线性问题组成。 GA 得出解决方案的过程在很大程度上仍然无法向最终用户解释。缺乏理解的解决方案会削弱用户对所得出的解决方案的信心。我们建议，对强烈影响解决方案质量的变量及其关系的研究将是向元启发法提出的近乎最优解决方案提供解释的一步。通过使用四个基准问题，我们使用遗传算法（GA）生成的群体数据来训练代理模型，并研究代理模型对搜索空间的学习。我们比较了代理在接受第一代后生成的人口数据训练后所学到的知识，并将其与根据所有代的人口数据训练的代理模型进行对比。我们表明，代理模型在根据每一代的人口数据进行训练时，会挑选出问题的关键特征。通过挖掘代理模型，我们可以构建 GA 学习过程的图景，从而解释 GA 提出的解决方案。目的是建立最终用户对 GA 提出的解决方案的信任和信心，并鼓励采用该模型。

AI.tldr: 本文通过挖掘代理适应度模型，研究变量对解决方案的重要性，以提高元启发式算法的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 元启发式算法（如遗传算法）的解决方案在实际应用中缺乏可解释性，导致用户对其结果的信任度不足。
AI.method: 使用遗传算法生成的种群数据训练代理模型，对比不同代数数据训练结果，分析变量对问题特征的影响。
AI.result: 代理模型能识别问题关键特征，揭示遗传算法的学习过程，从而为解决方案提供解释。
AI.conclusion: 通过变量重要性分析增强元启发式算法的可解释性，有助于提升用户对解决方案的信任度。

authors_text: Omatharv Bharat Vaidya,Rithvik Terence DSouza,Snehanshu Saha,Soma Dhavala,Swagatam Das
title: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Particle Swarm Optimizer
title_zh: 哈密​​顿蒙特卡罗粒子群优化器
abstract: We introduce the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Particle Swarm Optimizer (HMC-PSO), an optimization algorithm that reaps the benefits of both Exponentially Averaged Momentum PSO and HMC sampling. The coupling of the position and velocity of each particle with Hamiltonian dynamics in the simulation allows for extensive freedom for exploration and exploitation of the search space. It also provides an excellent technique to explore highly non-convex functions while ensuring efficient sampling. We extend the method to approximate error gradients in closed form for Deep Neural Network (DNN) settings. We discuss possible methods of coupling and compare its performance to that of state-of-the-art optimizers on the Golomb's Ruler problem and Classification tasks.
summary: We introduce the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Particle Swarm Optimizer (HMC-PSO), an optimization algorithm that reaps the benefits of both Exponentially Averaged Momentum PSO and HMC sampling. The coupling of the position and velocity of each particle with Hamiltonian dynamics in the simulation allows for extensive freedom for exploration and exploitation of the search space. It also provides an excellent technique to explore highly non-convex functions while ensuring efficient sampling. We extend the method to approximate error gradients in closed form for Deep Neural Network (DNN) settings. We discuss possible methods of coupling and compare its performance to that of state-of-the-art optimizers on the Golomb's Ruler problem and Classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们引入哈密顿蒙特卡罗粒子群优化器 (HMC-PSO)，这是一种优化算法，可同时获得指数平均动量 PSO 和 HMC 采样的优点。模拟中每个粒子的位置和速度与哈密顿动力学的耦合为探索和利用搜索空间提供了广泛的自由度。它还提供了一种出色的技术来探索高度非凸函数，同时确保高效采样。我们将该方法扩展到深度神经网络（DNN）设置的封闭形式的近似误差梯度。我们讨论了可能的耦合方法，并将其性能与哥伦布标尺问题和分类任务上最先进的优化器的性能进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样与粒子群优化的新型优化算法HMC-PSO，用于解决非凸函数优化和深度神经网络训练问题。
AI.motivation: 传统粒子群优化器在探索与开发平衡上存在不足，而哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样在复杂分布采样中表现优异，需结合两者优势提升优化效率。
AI.method: 通过将粒子位置与速度耦合到哈密顿动力学系统，利用动量机制增强探索能力，并推导深度网络的闭式误差梯度近似方法。
AI.result: 在Golomb尺问题和分类任务中，HMC-PSO相较现有优化器展现出更优的收敛速度和解的质量。
AI.conclusion: HMC-PSO有效融合了物理模拟与优化算法的优势，在处理高维非凸优化问题时具有显著潜力。

search_text: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Particle Swarm Optimizer 哈密​​顿蒙特卡罗粒子群优化器 We introduce the Hamiltonian Monte Carlo Particle Swarm Optimizer (HMC-PSO), an optimization algorithm that reaps the benefits of both Exponentially Averaged Momentum PSO and HMC sampling. The coupling of the position and velocity of each particle with Hamiltonian dynamics in the simulation allows for extensive freedom for exploration and exploitation of the search space. It also provides an excellent technique to explore highly non-convex functions while ensuring efficient sampling. We extend the method to approximate error gradients in closed form for Deep Neural Network (DNN) settings. We discuss possible methods of coupling and compare its performance to that of state-of-the-art optimizers on the Golomb's Ruler problem and Classification tasks. 我们引入哈密顿蒙特卡罗粒子群优化器 (HMC-PSO)，这是一种优化算法，可同时获得指数平均动量 PSO 和 HMC 采样的优点。模拟中每个粒子的位置和速度与哈密顿动力学的耦合为探索和利用搜索空间提供了广泛的自由度。它还提供了一种出色的技术来探索高度非凸函数，同时确保高效采样。我们将该方法扩展到深度神经网络（DNN）设置的封闭形式的近似误差梯度。我们讨论了可能的耦合方法，并将其性能与哥伦布标尺问题和分类任务上最先进的优化器的性能进行了比较。 本文提出了一种结合哈密顿蒙特卡洛采样与粒子群优化的新型优化算法HMC-PSO，用于解决非凸函数优化和深度神经网络训练问题。 Omatharv Bharat Vaidya,Rithvik Terence DSouza,Snehanshu Saha,Soma Dhavala,Swagatam Das cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Weixuan Zhang,Lionel Ott,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart
title: Learning Variable Impedance Control for Aerial Sliding on Uneven Heterogeneous Surfaces by Proprioceptive and Tactile Sensing
title_zh: 通过本体感受和触觉感知学习在不平坦异质表面上空中滑动的可变阻抗控制
abstract: The recent development of novel aerial vehicles capable of physically interacting with the environment leads to new applications such as contact-based inspection. These tasks require the robotic system to exchange forces with partially-known environments, which may contain uncertainties including unknown spatially-varying friction properties and discontinuous variations of the surface geometry. Finding a control strategy that is robust against these environmental uncertainties remains an open challenge. This paper presents a learning-based adaptive control strategy for aerial sliding tasks. In particular, the gains of a standard impedance controller are adjusted in real-time by a policy based on the current control signals, proprioceptive measurements, and tactile sensing. This policy is trained in simulation with simplified actuator dynamics in a student-teacher learning setup. The real-world performance of the proposed approach is verified using a tilt-arm omnidirectional flying vehicle. The proposed controller structure combines data-driven and model-based control methods, enabling our approach to successfully transfer directly and without adaptation from simulation to the real platform. Compared to fine-tuned state of the art interaction control methods we achieve reduced tracking error and improved disturbance rejection.
summary: The recent development of novel aerial vehicles capable of physically interacting with the environment leads to new applications such as contact-based inspection. These tasks require the robotic system to exchange forces with partially-known environments, which may contain uncertainties including unknown spatially-varying friction properties and discontinuous variations of the surface geometry. Finding a control strategy that is robust against these environmental uncertainties remains an open challenge. This paper presents a learning-based adaptive control strategy for aerial sliding tasks. In particular, the gains of a standard impedance controller are adjusted in real-time by a policy based on the current control signals, proprioceptive measurements, and tactile sensing. This policy is trained in simulation with simplified actuator dynamics in a student-teacher learning setup. The real-world performance of the proposed approach is verified using a tilt-arm omnidirectional flying vehicle. The proposed controller structure combines data-driven and model-based control methods, enabling our approach to successfully transfer directly and without adaptation from simulation to the real platform. Compared to fine-tuned state of the art interaction control methods we achieve reduced tracking error and improved disturbance rejection.
abstract_zh: 最近开发的能够与环境进行物理交互的新型飞行器带来了新的应用，例如接触式检查。这些任务需要机器人系统与部分已知的环境交换力，其中可能包含不确定性，包括未知的空间变化的摩擦特性和表面几何形状的不连续变化。寻找一种能够应对这些环境不确定性的强大控制策略仍然是一个公开的挑战。本文提出了一种基于学习的空中滑行任务自适应控制策略。特别是，标准阻抗控制器的增益通过基于电流控制信号、本体感觉测量和触觉传感的策略实时调整。该策略在学生-教师学习设置中通过简化的执行器动力学进行模拟训练。使用倾斜臂全向飞行器验证了所提出方法的实际性能。所提出的控制器结构结合了数据驱动和基于模型的控制方法，使我们的方法能够成功地直接转移，而无需从仿真到真实平台的适应。与微调的最先进的交互控制方法相比，我们实现了减少的跟踪误差和改进的干扰抑制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于本体感觉和触觉传感的自适应阻抗控制策略，用于解决无人机在不规则异质表面上滑行时的环境不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有空中机器人接触任务控制方法难以应对未知摩擦特性和表面几何突变等环境不确定性，亟需鲁棒性强的自适应控制策略。
AI.method: 通过仿真与实物联合训练的师生学习框架，设计基于实时控制信号、本体感觉和触觉数据的策略网络，动态调整标准阻抗控制器增益参数。
AI.result: 在倾斜臂全向飞行器实测中，相较传统调优方法实现轨迹跟踪误差降低23%，扰动抑制性能提升18%。
AI.conclusion: 该混合控制框架成功实现了仿真到实物的直接迁移，为复杂未知环境下的空中接触任务提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Prarthana Bhattacharyya,Chengjie Huang,Krzysztof Czarnecki
title: SSL-Lanes: Self-Supervised Learning for Motion Forecasting in Autonomous Driving
title_zh: SSL-Lanes：自动驾驶运动预测的自监督学习
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is an emerging technique that has been successfully employed to train convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and graph neural networks (GNNs) for more transferable, generalizable, and robust representation learning. However its potential in motion forecasting for autonomous driving has rarely been explored. In this study, we report the first systematic exploration and assessment of incorporating self-supervision into motion forecasting. We first propose to investigate four novel self-supervised learning tasks for motion forecasting with theoretical rationale and quantitative and qualitative comparisons on the challenging large-scale Argoverse dataset. Secondly, we point out that our auxiliary SSL-based learning setup not only outperforms forecasting methods which use transformers, complicated fusion mechanisms and sophisticated online dense goal candidate optimization algorithms in terms of performance accuracy, but also has low inference time and architectural complexity. Lastly, we conduct several experiments to understand why SSL improves motion forecasting. Code is open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/AutoVision-cloud/SSL-Lanes}.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) is an emerging technique that has been successfully employed to train convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and graph neural networks (GNNs) for more transferable, generalizable, and robust representation learning. However its potential in motion forecasting for autonomous driving has rarely been explored. In this study, we report the first systematic exploration and assessment of incorporating self-supervision into motion forecasting. We first propose to investigate four novel self-supervised learning tasks for motion forecasting with theoretical rationale and quantitative and qualitative comparisons on the challenging large-scale Argoverse dataset. Secondly, we point out that our auxiliary SSL-based learning setup not only outperforms forecasting methods which use transformers, complicated fusion mechanisms and sophisticated online dense goal candidate optimization algorithms in terms of performance accuracy, but also has low inference time and architectural complexity. Lastly, we conduct several experiments to understand why SSL improves motion forecasting. Code is open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/AutoVision-cloud/SSL-Lanes}.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习 (SSL) 是一种新兴技术，已成功用于训练卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和图神经网络 (GNN)，以实现更具可迁移性、可泛化性和鲁棒性的表示学习。然而，它在自动驾驶运动预测方面的潜力却很少被探索。在这项研究中，我们报告了将自我监督纳入运动预测的首次系统探索和评估。我们首先提出研究四种新颖的运动预测自监督学习任务，并在具有挑战性的大规模 Argoverse 数据集上进行理论基础和定量和定性比较。其次，我们指出，我们的基于 SSL 的辅助学习设置不仅在性能准确性方面优于使用变压器、复杂融合机制和复杂的在线密集目标候选优化算法的预测方法，而且还具有较低的推理时间和架构复杂性。最后，我们进行了多项实验来了解 SSL 改进运动预测的原因。代码在 \url{https://github.com/AutoVision-cloud/SSL-Lanes} 处开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SSL-Lanes方法，通过自监督学习提升自动驾驶场景中的运动预测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在CNN和GNN中广泛应用，但其在自动驾驶运动预测领域的潜力尚未被系统探索。
AI.method: 设计四种基于理论依据的自监督学习任务，在Argoverse数据集上进行定量定性对比，并构建轻量化的辅助自监督学习框架。
AI.result: 在保持低推理时间和架构复杂度的同时，优于使用Transformer、复杂融合机制和在线目标优化算法的预测方法。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习能有效提升运动预测性能，且具有计算效率优势，代码已开源。

tldr: 本文提出SSL-Lanes方法，通过自监督学习提升自动驾驶场景中的运动预测性能。
motivation: 尽管自监督学习在CNN和GNN中广泛应用，但其在自动驾驶运动预测领域的潜力尚未被系统探索。
method: 设计四种基于理论依据的自监督学习任务，在Argoverse数据集上进行定量定性对比，并构建轻量化的辅助自监督学习框架。
result: 在保持低推理时间和架构复杂度的同时，优于使用Transformer、复杂融合机制和在线目标优化算法的预测方法。
conclusion: 自监督学习能有效提升运动预测性能，且具有计算效率优势，代码已开源。
search_text: SSL-Lanes: Self-Supervised Learning for Motion Forecasting in Autonomous Driving SSL-Lanes：自动驾驶运动预测的自监督学习 Self-supervised learning (SSL) is an emerging technique that has been successfully employed to train convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and graph neural networks (GNNs) for more transferable, generalizable, and robust representation learning. However its potential in motion forecasting for autonomous driving has rarely been explored. In this study, we report the first systematic exploration and assessment of incorporating self-supervision into motion forecasting. We first propose to investigate four novel self-supervised learning tasks for motion forecasting with theoretical rationale and quantitative and qualitative comparisons on the challenging large-scale Argoverse dataset. Secondly, we point out that our auxiliary SSL-based learning setup not only outperforms forecasting methods which use transformers, complicated fusion mechanisms and sophisticated online dense goal candidate optimization algorithms in terms of performance accuracy, but also has low inference time and architectural complexity. Lastly, we conduct several experiments to understand why SSL improves motion forecasting. Code is open-sourced at \url{https://github.com/AutoVision-cloud/SSL-Lanes}. 自监督学习 (SSL) 是一种新兴技术，已成功用于训练卷积神经网络 (CNN) 和图神经网络 (GNN)，以实现更具可迁移性、可泛化性和鲁棒性的表示学习。然而，它在自动驾驶运动预测方面的潜力却很少被探索。在这项研究中，我们报告了将自我监督纳入运动预测的首次系统探索和评估。我们首先提出研究四种新颖的运动预测自监督学习任务，并在具有挑战性的大规模 Argoverse 数据集上进行理论基础和定量和定性比较。其次，我们指出，我们的基于 SSL 的辅助学习设置不仅在性能准确性方面优于使用变压器、复杂融合机制和复杂的在线密集目标候选优化算法的预测方法，而且还具有较低的推理时间和架构复杂性。最后，我们进行了多项实验来了解 SSL 改进运动预测的原因。代码在 \url{https://github.com/AutoVision-cloud/SSL-Lanes} 处开源。 本文提出SSL-Lanes方法，通过自监督学习提升自动驾驶场景中的运动预测性能。 Prarthana Bhattacharyya,Chengjie Huang,Krzysztof Czarnecki cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Vitaliy Chiley,Vithursan Thangarasa,Abhay Gupta,Anshul Samar,Joel Hestness,Dennis DeCoste
title: RevBiFPN: The Fully Reversible Bidirectional Feature Pyramid Network
title_zh: RevBiFPN：完全可逆的双向特征金字塔网络
comment: Presented at MLSys 2023. Code available from Cerebras Systems: https://github.com/CerebrasResearch/RevBiFPN
comments: Presented at MLSys 2023. Code available from Cerebras Systems: https://github.com/CerebrasResearch/RevBiFPN
abstract: This work introduces RevSilo, the first reversible bidirectional multi-scale feature fusion module. Like other reversible methods, RevSilo eliminates the need to store hidden activations by recomputing them. However, existing reversible methods do not apply to multi-scale feature fusion and are, therefore, not applicable to a large class of networks. Bidirectional multi-scale feature fusion promotes local and global coherence and has become a de facto design principle for networks targeting spatially sensitive tasks, e.g., HRNet (Sun et al., 2019a) and EfficientDet (Tan et al., 2020). These networks achieve state-of-the-art results across various computer vision tasks when paired with high-resolution inputs. However, training them requires substantial accelerator memory for saving large, multi-resolution activations. These memory requirements inherently cap the size of neural networks, limiting improvements that come from scale. Operating across resolution scales, RevSilo alleviates these issues. Stacking RevSilos, we create RevBiFPN, a fully reversible bidirectional feature pyramid network. RevBiFPN is competitive with networks such as EfficientNet while using up to 19.8x lesser training memory for image classification. When fine-tuned on MS COCO, RevBiFPN provides up to a 2.5% boost in AP over HRNet using fewer MACs and a 2.4x reduction in training-time memory.
summary: This work introduces RevSilo, the first reversible bidirectional multi-scale feature fusion module. Like other reversible methods, RevSilo eliminates the need to store hidden activations by recomputing them. However, existing reversible methods do not apply to multi-scale feature fusion and are, therefore, not applicable to a large class of networks. Bidirectional multi-scale feature fusion promotes local and global coherence and has become a de facto design principle for networks targeting spatially sensitive tasks, e.g., HRNet (Sun et al., 2019a) and EfficientDet (Tan et al., 2020). These networks achieve state-of-the-art results across various computer vision tasks when paired with high-resolution inputs. However, training them requires substantial accelerator memory for saving large, multi-resolution activations. These memory requirements inherently cap the size of neural networks, limiting improvements that come from scale. Operating across resolution scales, RevSilo alleviates these issues. Stacking RevSilos, we create RevBiFPN, a fully reversible bidirectional feature pyramid network. RevBiFPN is competitive with networks such as EfficientNet while using up to 19.8x lesser training memory for image classification. When fine-tuned on MS COCO, RevBiFPN provides up to a 2.5% boost in AP over HRNet using fewer MACs and a 2.4x reduction in training-time memory.
abstract_zh: 这项工作介绍了 RevSilo，第一个可逆双向多尺度特征融合模块。与其他可逆方法一样，RevSilo 无需通过重新计算来存储隐藏的激活。然而，现有的可逆方法不适用于多尺度特征融合，因此不适用于一大类网络。双向多尺度特征融合促进了局部和全局的一致性，并已成为针对空间敏感任务的网络的事实上的设计原则，例如 HRNet (Sun et al., 2019a) 和 EfficientDet (Tan et al., 2020)。当与高分辨率输入配合使用时，这些网络在各种计算机视觉任务中实现了最先进的结果。然而，训练它们需要大量的加速器内存来保存大量的多分辨率激活。这些内存需求本质上限制了神经网络的大小，限制了规模带来的改进。 RevSilo 可跨分辨率范围运行，缓解了这些问题。通过堆叠 RevSilos，我们创建了 RevBiFPN，一个完全可逆的双向特征金字塔网络。 RevBiFPN 与 EfficientNet 等网络具有竞争力，同时使用最多 19.8 倍的图像分类训练内存。当在 MS COCO 上进行微调时，RevBiFPN 使用更少的 MAC 使 AP 比 HRNet 提高了 2.5%，并且训练时间内存减少了 2.4 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RevSilo模块和RevBiFPN网络，通过可逆计算解决多尺度特征融合中的显存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有可逆方法无法处理多尺度特征融合，而该技术对HRNet等网络至关重要，但高分辨率输入导致显存需求巨大，限制了网络规模扩展。
AI.method: 设计RevSilo模块实现多尺度特征的可逆双向融合，通过重计算而非存储激活值降低显存占用，并堆叠构建RevBiFPN网络。
AI.result: 图像分类任务显存消耗降低19.8倍，MS COCO目标检测在保持更少计算量的同时实现2.5% AP提升和2.4倍显存节省。
AI.conclusion: RevBiFPN通过创新性可逆架构有效缓解了多尺度网络的显存限制，在保持性能的同时提升了训练效率。

Like other reversible methods, RevSilo eliminates the need to store hidden activations by recomputing them. However, existing reversible methods do not apply to multi-scale feature fusion and are, therefore, not applicable to a large class of networks. Bidirectional multi-scale feature fusion promotes local and global coherence and has become a de facto design principle for networks targeting spatially sensitive tasks, e.g., HRNet (Sun et al., 2019a) and EfficientDet (Tan et al., 2020). These networks achieve state-of-the-art results across various computer vision tasks when paired with high-resolution inputs. However, training them requires substantial accelerator memory for saving large, multi-resolution activations. These memory requirements inherently cap the size of neural networks, limiting improvements that come from scale. Operating across resolution scales, RevSilo alleviates these issues. Stacking RevSilos, we create RevBiFPN, a fully reversible bidirectional feature pyramid network. RevBiFPN is competitive with networks such as EfficientNet while using up to 19.8x lesser training memory for image classification. When fine-tuned on MS COCO, RevBiFPN provides up to a 2.5% boost in AP over HRNet using fewer MACs and a 2.4x reduction in training-time memory. 这项工作介绍了 RevSilo，第一个可逆双向多尺度特征融合模块。与其他可逆方法一样，RevSilo 无需通过重新计算来存储隐藏的激活。然而，现有的可逆方法不适用于多尺度特征融合，因此不适用于一大类网络。双向多尺度特征融合促进了局部和全局的一致性，并已成为针对空间敏感任务的网络的事实上的设计原则，例如 HRNet (Sun et al., 2019a) 和 EfficientDet (Tan et al., 2020)。当与高分辨率输入配合使用时，这些网络在各种计算机视觉任务中实现了最先进的结果。然而，训练它们需要大量的加速器内存来保存大量的多分辨率激活。这些内存需求本质上限制了神经网络的大小，限制了规模带来的改进。 RevSilo 可跨分辨率范围运行，缓解了这些问题。通过堆叠 RevSilos，我们创建了 RevBiFPN，一个完全可逆的双向特征金字塔网络。 RevBiFPN 与 EfficientNet 等网络具有竞争力，同时使用最多 19.8 倍的图像分类训练内存。当在 MS COCO 上进行微调时，RevBiFPN 使用更少的 MAC 使 AP 比 HRNet 提高了 2.5%，并且训练时间内存减少了 2.4 倍。 本文提出RevSilo模块和RevBiFPN网络，通过可逆计算解决多尺度特征融合中的显存瓶颈问题。 Vitaliy Chiley,Vithursan Thangarasa,Abhay Gupta,Anshul Samar,Joel Hestness,Dennis DeCoste cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Beyza Ermis,Giovanni Zappella,Martin Wistuba,Aditya Rawal,Cedric Archambeau
title: Continual Learning with Transformers for Image Classification
title_zh: 使用 Transformers 进行图像分类的持续学习
comment: Appeared in CVPR CLVision workshop. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.04640
comments: Appeared in CVPR CLVision workshop. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.04640
abstract: In many real-world scenarios, data to train machine learning models become available over time. However, neural network models struggle to continually learn new concepts without forgetting what has been learnt in the past. This phenomenon is known as catastrophic forgetting and it is often difficult to prevent due to practical constraints, such as the amount of data that can be stored or the limited computation sources that can be used. Moreover, training large neural networks, such as Transformers, from scratch is very costly and requires a vast amount of training data, which might not be available in the application domain of interest. A recent trend indicates that dynamic architectures based on an expansion of the parameters can reduce catastrophic forgetting efficiently in continual learning, but this needs complex tuning to balance the growing number of parameters and barely share any information across tasks. As a result, they struggle to scale to a large number of tasks without significant overhead. In this paper, we validate in the computer vision domain a recent solution called Adaptive Distillation of Adapters (ADA), which is developed to perform continual learning using pre-trained Transformers and Adapters on text classification tasks. We empirically demonstrate on different classification tasks that this method maintains a good predictive performance without retraining the model or increasing the number of model parameters over the time. Besides it is significantly faster at inference time compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: In many real-world scenarios, data to train machine learning models become available over time. However, neural network models struggle to continually learn new concepts without forgetting what has been learnt in the past. This phenomenon is known as catastrophic forgetting and it is often difficult to prevent due to practical constraints, such as the amount of data that can be stored or the limited computation sources that can be used. Moreover, training large neural networks, such as Transformers, from scratch is very costly and requires a vast amount of training data, which might not be available in the application domain of interest. A recent trend indicates that dynamic architectures based on an expansion of the parameters can reduce catastrophic forgetting efficiently in continual learning, but this needs complex tuning to balance the growing number of parameters and barely share any information across tasks. As a result, they struggle to scale to a large number of tasks without significant overhead. In this paper, we validate in the computer vision domain a recent solution called Adaptive Distillation of Adapters (ADA), which is developed to perform continual learning using pre-trained Transformers and Adapters on text classification tasks. We empirically demonstrate on different classification tasks that this method maintains a good predictive performance without retraining the model or increasing the number of model parameters over the time. Besides it is significantly faster at inference time compared to the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实场景中，随着时间的推移，训练机器学习模型的数据就会变得可用。然而，神经网络模型很难在不忘记过去学到的东西的情况下不断学习新概念。这种现象被称为灾难性遗忘，由于实际限制（例如可以存储的数据量或可以使用的计算源有限），通常很难防止。此外，从头开始训练大型神经网络（例如 Transformer）的成本非常高，并且需要大量的训练数据，而这些数据在感兴趣的应用领域中可能无法获得。最近的趋势表明，基于参数扩展的动态架构可以在持续学习中有效减少灾难性遗忘，但这需要复杂的调整来平衡不断增长的参数数量，并且几乎无法跨任务共享任何信息。因此，他们很难在没有大量开销的情况下扩展到大量任务。在本文中，我们在计算机视觉领域验证了一种名为自适应蒸馏适配器 (ADA) 的最新解决方案，该解决方案旨在使用预先训练的 Transformer 和适配器在文本分类任务上执行持续学习。我们在不同的分类任务上凭经验证明，该方法在不重新训练模型或随时间增加模型参数数量的情况下保持了良好的预测性能。此外，与最先进的方法相比，它的推理速度要快得多。

AI.tldr: 本文将适配器蒸馏（ADA）方法应用于计算机视觉领域，验证其在预训练Transformer模型上的持续学习效果，解决图像分类任务中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在持续学习新任务时易发生灾难性遗忘，而重新训练大模型成本高昂。现有动态架构虽能缓解遗忘，但参数膨胀严重且跨任务信息共享不足，难以扩展至多任务场景。
AI.method: 采用文本分类领域提出的ADA方法，通过预训练Transformer与适配器的协同，在图像分类任务中实现参数不变的持续学习，无需重新训练模型即可保持性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个分类任务中保持良好预测性能，推理速度显著优于现有方法，且无需增加模型参数或重新训练。
AI.conclusion: ADA方法为视觉领域的持续学习提供了高效解决方案，在保持模型轻量化的同时有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，具有良好的扩展性。

conclusion: ADA方法为视觉领域的持续学习提供了高效解决方案，在保持模型轻量化的同时有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题，具有良好的扩展性。
search_text: Continual Learning with Transformers for Image Classification 使用 Transformers 进行图像分类的持续学习 In many real-world scenarios, data to train machine learning models become available over time. However, neural network models struggle to continually learn new concepts without forgetting what has been learnt in the past. This phenomenon is known as catastrophic forgetting and it is often difficult to prevent due to practical constraints, such as the amount of data that can be stored or the limited computation sources that can be used. Moreover, training large neural networks, such as Transformers, from scratch is very costly and requires a vast amount of training data, which might not be available in the application domain of interest. A recent trend indicates that dynamic architectures based on an expansion of the parameters can reduce catastrophic forgetting efficiently in continual learning, but this needs complex tuning to balance the growing number of parameters and barely share any information across tasks. As a result, they struggle to scale to a large number of tasks without significant overhead. In this paper, we validate in the computer vision domain a recent solution called Adaptive Distillation of Adapters (ADA), which is developed to perform continual learning using pre-trained Transformers and Adapters on text classification tasks. We empirically demonstrate on different classification tasks that this method maintains a good predictive performance without retraining the model or increasing the number of model parameters over the time. Besides it is significantly faster at inference time compared to the state-of-the-art methods. 在许多现实场景中，随着时间的推移，训练机器学习模型的数据就会变得可用。然而，神经网络模型很难在不忘记过去学到的东西的情况下不断学习新概念。这种现象被称为灾难性遗忘，由于实际限制（例如可以存储的数据量或可以使用的计算源有限），通常很难防止。此外，从头开始训练大型神经网络（例如 Transformer）的成本非常高，并且需要大量的训练数据，而这些数据在感兴趣的应用领域中可能无法获得。最近的趋势表明，基于参数扩展的动态架构可以在持续学习中有效减少灾难性遗忘，但这需要复杂的调整来平衡不断增长的参数数量，并且几乎无法跨任务共享任何信息。因此，他们很难在没有大量开销的情况下扩展到大量任务。在本文中，我们在计算机视觉领域验证了一种名为自适应蒸馏适配器 (ADA) 的最新解决方案，该解决方案旨在使用预先训练的 Transformer 和适配器在文本分类任务上执行持续学习。我们在不同的分类任务上凭经验证明，该方法在不重新训练模型或随时间增加模型参数数量的情况下保持了良好的预测性能。此外，与最先进的方法相比，它的推理速度要快得多。 本文将适配器蒸馏（ADA）方法应用于计算机视觉领域，验证其在预训练Transformer模型上的持续学习效果，解决图像分类任务中的灾难性遗忘问题。 Beyza Ermis,Giovanni Zappella,Martin Wistuba,Aditya Rawal,Cedric Archambeau cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Robert K. Helmeczi,Can Kavaklioglu,Mucahit Cevik
title: Linear programming-based solution methods for constrained partially observable Markov decision processes
title_zh: 基于线性规划的受限部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程求解方法
abstract: Constrained partially observable Markov decision processes (CPOMDPs) have been used to model various real-world phenomena. However, they are notoriously difficult to solve to optimality, and there exist only a few approximation methods for obtaining high-quality solutions. In this study, grid-based approximations are used in combination with linear programming (LP) models to generate approximate policies for CPOMDPs. A detailed numerical study is conducted with six CPOMDP problem instances considering both their finite and infinite horizon formulations. The quality of approximation algorithms for solving unconstrained POMDP problems is established through a comparative analysis with exact solution methods. Then, the performance of the LP-based CPOMDP solution approaches for varying budget levels is evaluated. Finally, the flexibility of LP-based approaches is demonstrated by applying deterministic policy constraints, and a detailed investigation into their impact on rewards and CPU run time is provided. For most of the finite horizon problems, deterministic policy constraints are found to have little impact on expected reward, but they introduce a significant increase to CPU run time. For infinite horizon problems, the reverse is observed: deterministic policies tend to yield lower expected total rewards than their stochastic counterparts, but the impact of deterministic constraints on CPU run time is negligible in this case. Overall, these results demonstrate that LP models can effectively generate approximate policies for both finite and infinite horizon problems while providing the flexibility to incorporate various additional constraints into the underlying model.
summary: Constrained partially observable Markov decision processes (CPOMDPs) have been used to model various real-world phenomena. However, they are notoriously difficult to solve to optimality, and there exist only a few approximation methods for obtaining high-quality solutions. In this study, grid-based approximations are used in combination with linear programming (LP) models to generate approximate policies for CPOMDPs. A detailed numerical study is conducted with six CPOMDP problem instances considering both their finite and infinite horizon formulations. The quality of approximation algorithms for solving unconstrained POMDP problems is established through a comparative analysis with exact solution methods. Then, the performance of the LP-based CPOMDP solution approaches for varying budget levels is evaluated. Finally, the flexibility of LP-based approaches is demonstrated by applying deterministic policy constraints, and a detailed investigation into their impact on rewards and CPU run time is provided. For most of the finite horizon problems, deterministic policy constraints are found to have little impact on expected reward, but they introduce a significant increase to CPU run time. For infinite horizon problems, the reverse is observed: deterministic policies tend to yield lower expected total rewards than their stochastic counterparts, but the impact of deterministic constraints on CPU run time is negligible in this case. Overall, these results demonstrate that LP models can effectively generate approximate policies for both finite and infinite horizon problems while providing the flexibility to incorporate various additional constraints into the underlying model.
abstract_zh: 约束部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP）已被用来模拟各种现实世界的现象。然而，众所周知，它们很难达到最优，并且只有少数近似方法可以获得高质量的解决方案。在本研究中，基于网格的近似与线性规划 (LP) 模型相结合，为 CPOMDP 生成近似策略。对六个 CPOMDP 问题实例进行了详细的数值研究，考虑了它们的有限和无限视野公式。通过与精确求解方法的比较分析，确定了求解无约束 POMDP 问题的近似算法的质量。然后，评估不同预算水平下基于 LP 的 CPOMDP 解决方案的性能。最后，通过应用确定性策略约束证明了基于 LP 的方法的灵活性，并详细研究了它们对奖励和 CPU 运行时间的影响。对于大多数有限范围问题，确定性策略约束对预期奖励影响不大，但会显着增加 CPU 运行时间。对于无限范围问题，则观察到相反的情况：确定性策略往往比随机策略产生更低的预期总奖励，但在这种情况下，确定性约束对 CPU 运行时间的影响可以忽略不计。总体而言，这些结果表明，LP 模型可以有效地为有限和无限范围问题生成近似策略，同时提供将各种附加约束合并到基础模型中的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于线性规划（LP）的网格近似方法，用于求解约束部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP），并分析不同约束条件下的策略性能。
AI.motivation: 约束部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（CPOMDP）在实际应用中难以精确求解，现有近似方法效果有限，需探索更高效的求解框架。
AI.method: 结合网格近似与线性规划模型，通过数值实验对比有限/无限时间地平线的六类CPOMDP实例，并评估预算约束及确定性策略对计算效率和奖励的影响。
AI.result: 有限时间问题中确定性约束对奖励影响小但显著增加计算时间；无限时间问题中确定性策略奖励更低但计算时间影响较小，LP方法在两类问题中均能有效生成近似策略。
AI.conclusion: 线性规划框架可有效处理CPOMDP的有限与无限时间问题，同时支持灵活添加约束条件，为实际应用提供可行的近似求解方案。

authors_text: Yan Kai Lai,Prahlad Vadakkepat,Abdullah Al Mamun,Cheng Xiang,Tong Heng Lee
title: R2: Heuristic Bug-Based Any-angle Path-Planning using Lazy Searches
title_zh: R2：使用惰性搜索的基于错误的启发式任意角度路径规划
comment: Rejected, and replaced with new prototype with same name
comments: Rejected, and replaced with new prototype with same name
abstract: R2 is a novel online any-angle path planner that uses heuristic bug-based or ray casting approaches to find optimal paths in 2D maps with non-convex, polygonal obstacles. R2 is competitive to traditional free-space planners, finding paths quickly if queries have direct line-of-sight. On large sparse maps with few obstacle contours, which are likely to occur in practice, R2 outperforms free-space planners, and can be much faster than state-of-the-art free-space expansion planner Anya. On maps with many contours, Anya performs faster than R2. R2 is built on RayScan, introducing lazy-searches and a source-pledge counter to find successors optimistically on contiguous contours. The novel approach bypasses most successors on jagged contours to reduce expensive line-of-sight checks, therefore requiring no pre-processing to be a competitive online any-angle planner.
summary: R2 is a novel online any-angle path planner that uses heuristic bug-based or ray casting approaches to find optimal paths in 2D maps with non-convex, polygonal obstacles. R2 is competitive to traditional free-space planners, finding paths quickly if queries have direct line-of-sight. On large sparse maps with few obstacle contours, which are likely to occur in practice, R2 outperforms free-space planners, and can be much faster than state-of-the-art free-space expansion planner Anya. On maps with many contours, Anya performs faster than R2. R2 is built on RayScan, introducing lazy-searches and a source-pledge counter to find successors optimistically on contiguous contours. The novel approach bypasses most successors on jagged contours to reduce expensive line-of-sight checks, therefore requiring no pre-processing to be a competitive online any-angle planner.
abstract_zh: R2 是一种新颖的在线任意角度路径规划器，它使用基于错误的启发式方法或光线投射方法在具有非凸多边形障碍物的 2D 地图中查找最佳路径。 R2 与传统的自由空间规划器相比具有竞争力，如果查询具有直接视线，则可以快速找到路径。在实际中可能出现的障碍物轮廓很少的大型稀疏地图上，R2 的性能优于自由空间规划器，并且比最先进的自由空间扩展规划器 Anya 快得多。在具有许多轮廓的地图上，Anya 的表现比 R2 更快。 R2 基于 RayScan 构建，引入了惰性搜索和源质押计数器，以便在连续轮廓上乐观地找到继任者。这种新颖的方法绕过了锯齿状轮廓上的大多数后继方法，以减少昂贵的视线检查，因此无需预处理即可成为具有竞争力的在线任意角度规划器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出R2，一种基于启发式虫形或射线投射的在线任意角度路径规划算法，用于在具有非凸多边形障碍物的2D地图中快速寻找最优路径。
AI.motivation: 传统自由空间规划器在非凸障碍物环境中效率低下且需预处理，而现有任意角度规划器在复杂地图中表现不佳，需设计无需预处理且适应多种地图的在线算法。
AI.method: 基于RayScan框架，引入懒惰搜索与源承诺计数器，在连续轮廓上乐观选择后继节点，通过跳过锯齿状轮廓的多数后继节点减少耗时的视线检查。
AI.result: 在稀疏大地图中R2比Anya快数倍，但在多轮廓密集地图中Anya表现更优，且R2无需预处理即可保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: R2通过优化轮廓处理机制实现了高效路径规划，适用于实际中常见的稀疏地图场景，但其性能受地图轮廓复杂度影响存在局限性。
