result: 在稀疏大地图中R2比Anya快数倍，但在多轮廓密集地图中Anya表现更优，且R2无需预处理即可保持竞争力。
conclusion: R2通过优化轮廓处理机制实现了高效路径规划，适用于实际中常见的稀疏地图场景，但其性能受地图轮廓复杂度影响存在局限性。
search_text: R2: Heuristic Bug-Based Any-angle Path-Planning using Lazy Searches R2：使用惰性搜索的基于错误的启发式任意角度路径规划 R2 is a novel online any-angle path planner that uses heuristic bug-based or ray casting approaches to find optimal paths in 2D maps with non-convex, polygonal obstacles. R2 is competitive to traditional free-space planners, finding paths quickly if queries have direct line-of-sight. On large sparse maps with few obstacle contours, which are likely to occur in practice, R2 outperforms free-space planners, and can be much faster than state-of-the-art free-space expansion planner Anya. On maps with many contours, Anya performs faster than R2. R2 is built on RayScan, introducing lazy-searches and a source-pledge counter to find successors optimistically on contiguous contours. The novel approach bypasses most successors on jagged contours to reduce expensive line-of-sight checks, therefore requiring no pre-processing to be a competitive online any-angle planner. R2 是一种新颖的在线任意角度路径规划器，它使用基于错误的启发式方法或光线投射方法在具有非凸多边形障碍物的 2D 地图中查找最佳路径。 R2 与传统的自由空间规划器相比具有竞争力，如果查询具有直接视线，则可以快速找到路径。在实际中可能出现的障碍物轮廓很少的大型稀疏地图上，R2 的性能优于自由空间规划器，并且比最先进的自由空间扩展规划器 Anya 快得多。在具有许多轮廓的地图上，Anya 的表现比 R2 更快。 R2 基于 RayScan 构建，引入了惰性搜索和源质押计数器，以便在连续轮廓上乐观地找到继任者。这种新颖的方法绕过了锯齿状轮廓上的大多数后继方法，以减少昂贵的视线检查，因此无需预处理即可成为具有竞争力的在线任意角度规划器。 本文提出R2，一种基于启发式虫形或射线投射的在线任意角度路径规划算法，用于在具有非凸多边形障碍物的2D地图中快速寻找最优路径。 Yan Kai Lai,Prahlad Vadakkepat,Abdullah Al Mamun,Cheng Xiang,Tong Heng Lee cs.RO

authors_text: Matteo Cacciola,Antonio Frangioni,Xinlin Li,Andrea Lodi
title: Deep Neural Networks pruning via the Structured Perspective Regularization
title_zh: 通过结构化视角正则化进行深度神经网络修剪
abstract: In Machine Learning, Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) are a very powerful tool, broadly used in many applications. Often, the selected (deep) architectures include many layers, and therefore a large amount of parameters, which makes training, storage and inference expensive. This motivated a stream of research about compressing the original networks into smaller ones without excessively sacrificing performances. Among the many proposed compression approaches, one of the most popular is \emph{pruning}, whereby entire elements of the ANN (links, nodes, channels, \ldots) and the corresponding weights are deleted. Since the nature of the problem is inherently combinatorial (what elements to prune and what not), we propose a new pruning method based on Operational Research tools. We start from a natural Mixed-Integer-Programming model for the problem, and we use the Perspective Reformulation technique to strengthen its continuous relaxation. Projecting away the indicator variables from this reformulation yields a new regularization term, which we call the Structured Perspective Regularization, that leads to structured pruning of the initial architecture. We test our method on some ResNet architectures applied to CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets, obtaining competitive performances w.r.t.~the state of the art for structured pruning.
summary: In Machine Learning, Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs) are a very powerful tool, broadly used in many applications. Often, the selected (deep) architectures include many layers, and therefore a large amount of parameters, which makes training, storage and inference expensive. This motivated a stream of research about compressing the original networks into smaller ones without excessively sacrificing performances. Among the many proposed compression approaches, one of the most popular is \emph{pruning}, whereby entire elements of the ANN (links, nodes, channels, \ldots) and the corresponding weights are deleted. Since the nature of the problem is inherently combinatorial (what elements to prune and what not), we propose a new pruning method based on Operational Research tools. We start from a natural Mixed-Integer-Programming model for the problem, and we use the Perspective Reformulation technique to strengthen its continuous relaxation. Projecting away the indicator variables from this reformulation yields a new regularization term, which we call the Structured Perspective Regularization, that leads to structured pruning of the initial architecture. We test our method on some ResNet architectures applied to CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100 and ImageNet datasets, obtaining competitive performances w.r.t.~the state of the art for structured pruning.
abstract_zh: 在机器学习中，人工神经网络 (ANN) 是一种非常强大的工具，广泛应用于许多应用中。通常，所选的（深层）架构包含许多层，因此包含大量参数，这使得训练、存储和推理成本高昂。这激发了一系列关于将原始网络压缩为更小的网络而不过度牺牲性能的研究。在许多提出的压缩方法中，最流行的一种是 emph{修剪}，即删除 ANN 的整个元素（链接、节点、通道、\ldots）和相应的权重。由于问题的本质本质上是组合性的（修剪哪些元素，不修剪哪些元素），我们提出了一种基于运筹学工具的新修剪方法。我们从问题的自然混合整数规划模型开始，并使用透视重构技术来加强其连续松弛。从这个重新表述中投影掉指标变量会产生一个新的正则化项，我们称之为结构化视角正则化，这会导致初始架构的结构化修剪。我们在应用于 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100 和 ImageNet 数据集的一些 ResNet 架构上测试了我们的方法，获得了与结构化剪枝最先进技术相比具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构化视角正则化的深度神经网络剪枝方法，通过操作研究工具解决网络压缩中的组合优化问题。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络参数量大导致训练、存储和推理成本高，传统剪枝方法面临组合优化难题，需更高效的结构化剪枝方案。
AI.method: 构建混合整数规划模型，利用视角重构技术强化连续松弛，投影消除指示变量后获得结构化视角正则化项，实现结构化剪枝。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/CIFAR-100/ImageNet数据集上的ResNet实验表明，该方法在结构化剪枝效果上达到现有最佳水平。
AI.conclusion: 提出的正则化方法有效解决了网络剪枝的组合优化问题，在保持性能的同时实现了高效结构化压缩。

authors_text: Samiul Alam,Asif Sushmit,Zaowad Abdullah,Shahrin Nakkhatra,MD. Nazmuddoha Ansary,Syed Mobassir Hossen,Sazia Morshed Mehnaz,Tahsin Reasat,Ahmed Imtiaz Humayun
title: Bengali Common Voice Speech Dataset for Automatic Speech Recognition
title_zh: 用于自动语音识别的孟加拉语通用语音数据集
abstract: Bengali is one of the most spoken languages in the world with over 300 million speakers globally. Despite its popularity, research into the development of Bengali speech recognition systems is hindered due to the lack of diverse open-source datasets. As a way forward, we have crowdsourced the Bengali Common Voice Speech Dataset, which is a sentence-level automatic speech recognition corpus. Collected on the Mozilla Common Voice platform, the dataset is part of an ongoing campaign that has led to the collection of over 400 hours of data in 2 months and is growing rapidly. Our analysis shows that this dataset has more speaker, phoneme, and environmental diversity compared to the OpenSLR Bengali ASR dataset, the largest existing open-source Bengali speech dataset. We present insights obtained from the dataset and discuss key linguistic challenges that need to be addressed in future versions. Additionally, we report the current performance of a few Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) algorithms and set a benchmark for future research.
summary: Bengali is one of the most spoken languages in the world with over 300 million speakers globally. Despite its popularity, research into the development of Bengali speech recognition systems is hindered due to the lack of diverse open-source datasets. As a way forward, we have crowdsourced the Bengali Common Voice Speech Dataset, which is a sentence-level automatic speech recognition corpus. Collected on the Mozilla Common Voice platform, the dataset is part of an ongoing campaign that has led to the collection of over 400 hours of data in 2 months and is growing rapidly. Our analysis shows that this dataset has more speaker, phoneme, and environmental diversity compared to the OpenSLR Bengali ASR dataset, the largest existing open-source Bengali speech dataset. We present insights obtained from the dataset and discuss key linguistic challenges that need to be addressed in future versions. Additionally, we report the current performance of a few Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) algorithms and set a benchmark for future research.
abstract_zh: 孟加拉语是世界上使用最广泛的语言之一，全球使用人数超过 3 亿。尽管孟加拉语语音识别系统很受欢迎，但由于缺乏多样化的开源数据集，其开发研究受到阻碍。作为前进的方向，我们众包了孟加拉语通用语音语音数据集，这是一个句子级自动语音识别语料库。该数据集是在 Mozilla Common Voice 平台上收集的，是一项正在进行的活动的一部分，该活动已在 2 个月内收集了超过 400 小时的数据，并且还在快速增长。我们的分析表明，与 OpenSLR 孟加拉语 ASR 数据集（现有最大的开源孟加拉语语音数据集）相比，该数据集具有更多的说话者、音素和环境多样性。我们展示从数据集中获得的见解，并讨论未来版本中需要解决的关键语言挑战。此外，我们还报告了一些自动语音识别 (ASR) 算法的当前性能，并为未来的研究设定了基准。

AI.tldr: 创建用于自动语音识别的孟加拉语通用语音数据集
AI.motivation: 由于缺乏多样化开源数据集，孟加拉语语音识别研究受阻，需构建新数据集促进研究
AI.method: 通过Mozilla Common Voice平台众包收集句子级语音数据，两个月内获得400多小时数据
AI.result: 新数据集在说话人、音素和环境多样性上优于OpenSLR数据集，并为ASR算法设定了性能基准
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为孟加拉语ASR研究提供更丰富的资源，未来需解决语言学挑战以优化系统性能

authors_text: Fabian Jenelten,Ruben Grandia,Farbod Farshidian,Marco Hutter
title: TAMOLS: Terrain-Aware Motion Optimization for Legged Systems
title_zh: TAMOLS：腿部系统的地形感知运动优化
abstract: Terrain geometry is, in general, non-smooth, non-linear, non-convex, and, if perceived through a robot-centric visual unit, appears partially occluded and noisy. This work presents the complete control pipeline capable of handling the aforementioned problems in real-time. We formulate a trajectory optimization problem that jointly optimizes over the base pose and footholds, subject to a heightmap. To avoid converging into undesirable local optima, we deploy a graduated optimization technique. We embed a compact, contact-force free stability criterion that is compatible with the non-flat ground formulation. Direct collocation is used as transcription method, resulting in a non-linear optimization problem that can be solved online in less than ten milliseconds. To increase robustness in the presence of external disturbances, we close the tracking loop with a momentum observer. Our experiments demonstrate stair climbing, walking on stepping stones, and over gaps, utilizing various dynamic gaits.
summary: Terrain geometry is, in general, non-smooth, non-linear, non-convex, and, if perceived through a robot-centric visual unit, appears partially occluded and noisy. This work presents the complete control pipeline capable of handling the aforementioned problems in real-time. We formulate a trajectory optimization problem that jointly optimizes over the base pose and footholds, subject to a heightmap. To avoid converging into undesirable local optima, we deploy a graduated optimization technique. We embed a compact, contact-force free stability criterion that is compatible with the non-flat ground formulation. Direct collocation is used as transcription method, resulting in a non-linear optimization problem that can be solved online in less than ten milliseconds. To increase robustness in the presence of external disturbances, we close the tracking loop with a momentum observer. Our experiments demonstrate stair climbing, walking on stepping stones, and over gaps, utilizing various dynamic gaits.
abstract_zh: 一般来说，地形几何形状是非平滑、非线性、非凸的，并且如果通过以机器人为中心的视觉单元感知，则显得部分被遮挡且有噪声。这项工作提出了能够实时处理上述问题的完整控制管道。我们制定了一个轨迹优化问题，根据高度图联合优化基本姿势和立足点。为了避免收敛到不需要的局部最优，我们部署了分级优化技术。我们嵌入了一个紧凑的、无接触力的稳定性标准，该标准与非平坦地面公式兼容。采用直接搭配作为转录方法，导致非线性优化问题可以在不到十毫秒的时间内在线解决。为了提高存在外部干扰时的鲁棒性，我们用动量观测器关闭跟踪环路。我们的实验展示了利用各种动态步态爬楼梯、在踏脚石上行走和越过间隙。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种实时控制管道TAMOLS，通过结合地形高度图优化腿式机器人的基座姿态和足点，以应对复杂地形的非光滑、非线性等挑战。
AI.motivation: 地形几何通常具有非光滑、非线性、非凸性且存在遮挡和噪声，传统方法难以实时处理此类问题，需开发适应复杂地形的鲁棒控制方案。
AI.method: 联合优化基座姿态与足点位置，采用渐进优化技术避免局部最优，嵌入无接触力稳定性准则，使用直接配点法将问题转化为非线性优化并在10毫秒内求解，结合动量观测器提升抗干扰能力。
AI.result: 实验验证了系统在楼梯攀爬、 stepping stones行走和跨越间隙等任务中的有效性，支持多种动态步态。
AI.conclusion: TAMOLS为腿式机器人提供了实时、鲁棒的地形自适应运动优化方案，适用于复杂非结构化环境。

search_text: TAMOLS: Terrain-Aware Motion Optimization for Legged Systems TAMOLS：腿部系统的地形感知运动优化 Terrain geometry is, in general, non-smooth, non-linear, non-convex, and, if perceived through a robot-centric visual unit, appears partially occluded and noisy. This work presents the complete control pipeline capable of handling the aforementioned problems in real-time. We formulate a trajectory optimization problem that jointly optimizes over the base pose and footholds, subject to a heightmap. To avoid converging into undesirable local optima, we deploy a graduated optimization technique. We embed a compact, contact-force free stability criterion that is compatible with the non-flat ground formulation. Direct collocation is used as transcription method, resulting in a non-linear optimization problem that can be solved online in less than ten milliseconds. To increase robustness in the presence of external disturbances, we close the tracking loop with a momentum observer. Our experiments demonstrate stair climbing, walking on stepping stones, and over gaps, utilizing various dynamic gaits. 一般来说，地形几何形状是非平滑、非线性、非凸的，并且如果通过以机器人为中心的视觉单元感知，则显得部分被遮挡且有噪声。这项工作提出了能够实时处理上述问题的完整控制管道。我们制定了一个轨迹优化问题，根据高度图联合优化基本姿势和立足点。为了避免收敛到不需要的局部最优，我们部署了分级优化技术。我们嵌入了一个紧凑的、无接触力的稳定性标准，该标准与非平坦地面公式兼容。采用直接搭配作为转录方法，导致非线性优化问题可以在不到十毫秒的时间内在线解决。为了提高存在外部干扰时的鲁棒性，我们用动量观测器关闭跟踪环路。我们的实验展示了利用各种动态步态爬楼梯、在踏脚石上行走和越过间隙。 本文提出了一种实时控制管道TAMOLS，通过结合地形高度图优化腿式机器人的基座姿态和足点，以应对复杂地形的非光滑、非线性等挑战。 Fabian Jenelten,Ruben Grandia,Farbod Farshidian,Marco Hutter cs.RO

authors_text: Hector Garcia Rodriguez,Qinghai Guo,Timoleon Moraitis
title: Short-Term Plasticity Neurons Learning to Learn and Forget
title_zh: 短期可塑性神经元学习和遗忘
abstract: Short-term plasticity (STP) is a mechanism that stores decaying memories in synapses of the cerebral cortex. In computing practice, STP has been used, but mostly in the niche of spiking neurons, even though theory predicts that it is the optimal solution to certain dynamic tasks. Here we present a new type of recurrent neural unit, the STP Neuron (STPN), which indeed turns out strikingly powerful. Its key mechanism is that synapses have a state, propagated through time by a self-recurrent connection-within-the-synapse. This formulation enables training the plasticity with backpropagation through time, resulting in a form of learning to learn and forget in the short term. The STPN outperforms all tested alternatives, i.e. RNNs, LSTMs, other models with fast weights, and differentiable plasticity. We confirm this in both supervised and reinforcement learning (RL), and in tasks such as Associative Retrieval, Maze Exploration, Atari video games, and MuJoCo robotics. Moreover, we calculate that, in neuromorphic or biological circuits, the STPN minimizes energy consumption across models, as it depresses individual synapses dynamically. Based on these, biological STP may have been a strong evolutionary attractor that maximizes both efficiency and computational power. The STPN now brings these neuromorphic advantages also to a broad spectrum of machine learning practice. Code is available at https://github.com/NeuromorphicComputing/stpn
summary: Short-term plasticity (STP) is a mechanism that stores decaying memories in synapses of the cerebral cortex. In computing practice, STP has been used, but mostly in the niche of spiking neurons, even though theory predicts that it is the optimal solution to certain dynamic tasks. Here we present a new type of recurrent neural unit, the STP Neuron (STPN), which indeed turns out strikingly powerful. Its key mechanism is that synapses have a state, propagated through time by a self-recurrent connection-within-the-synapse. This formulation enables training the plasticity with backpropagation through time, resulting in a form of learning to learn and forget in the short term. The STPN outperforms all tested alternatives, i.e. RNNs, LSTMs, other models with fast weights, and differentiable plasticity. We confirm this in both supervised and reinforcement learning (RL), and in tasks such as Associative Retrieval, Maze Exploration, Atari video games, and MuJoCo robotics. Moreover, we calculate that, in neuromorphic or biological circuits, the STPN minimizes energy consumption across models, as it depresses individual synapses dynamically. Based on these, biological STP may have been a strong evolutionary attractor that maximizes both efficiency and computational power. The STPN now brings these neuromorphic advantages also to a broad spectrum of machine learning practice. Code is available at https://github.com/NeuromorphicComputing/stpn
abstract_zh: 短期可塑性（STP）是一种在大脑皮层突触中存储衰退记忆的机制。在计算实践中，STP 已被使用，但主要是在尖峰神经元的利基中，尽管理论预测它是某些动态任务的最佳解决方案。在这里，我们提出了一种新型的循环神经元，即 STP 神经元（STPN），它确实非常强大。其关键机制是突触具有一种状态，通过突触内的自我循环连接随时间传播。这种公式能够通过随时间的反向传播来训练可塑性，从而形成一种短期内学习和遗忘的形式。 STPN 的性能优于所有经过测试的替代方案，即 RNN、LSTM、其他具有快速权重和可微可塑性的模型。我们在监督学习和强化学习 (RL) 以及联想检索、迷宫探索、Atari 视频游戏和 MuJoCo 机器人等任务中证实了这一点。此外，我们计算出，在神经形态或生物电路中，STPN 可以最大限度地减少模型的能量消耗，因为它会动态抑制单个突触。基于这些，生物 STP 可能是一个强大的进化吸引子，可以最大限度地提高效率和计算能力。 STPN 现在也将这些神经形态优势带入了广泛的机器学习实践中。代码可在 https://github.com/NeuromorphicComputing/stpn 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型循环神经单元STPN，利用突触短期可塑性机制实现动态任务中的学习与遗忘，显著优于现有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在处理动态任务时存在效率与性能瓶颈，而生物神经系统中的短期可塑性（STP）理论预测其为最优解，但尚未在通用计算中充分应用。
AI.method: 设计STPN单元，通过突触内自循环连接传递状态，结合反向传播训练突触可塑性参数，实现短期记忆的动态调节。
AI.result: STPN在监督学习与强化学习中超越RNN/LSTM等模型，在迷宫探索、Atari游戏等任务中表现优异，且在生物模拟电路中能耗最低。
AI.conclusion: STPN继承生物STP的高效特性，为机器学习提供兼具计算能力与能效的新范式，可能成为神经形态计算的重要基础。

The STPN outperforms all tested alternatives, i.e. RNNs, LSTMs, other models with fast weights, and differentiable plasticity. The STPN now brings these neuromorphic advantages also to a broad spectrum of machine learning practice. authors_text: Trung-Nghia Le,Ta Gu,Huy H. Nguyen,Isao Echizen
title: Rethinking Adversarial Examples for Location Privacy Protection
title_zh: 重新思考位置隐私保护的对抗性例子
abstract: We have investigated a new application of adversarial examples, namely location privacy protection against landmark recognition systems. We introduce mask-guided multimodal projected gradient descent (MM-PGD), in which adversarial examples are trained on different deep models. Image contents are protected by analyzing the properties of regions to identify the ones most suitable for blending in adversarial examples. We investigated two region identification strategies: class activation map-based MM-PGD, in which the internal behaviors of trained deep models are targeted; and human-vision-based MM-PGD, in which regions that attract less human attention are targeted. Experiments on the Places365 dataset demonstrated that these strategies are potentially effective in defending against black-box landmark recognition systems without the need for much image manipulation.
summary: We have investigated a new application of adversarial examples, namely location privacy protection against landmark recognition systems. We introduce mask-guided multimodal projected gradient descent (MM-PGD), in which adversarial examples are trained on different deep models. Image contents are protected by analyzing the properties of regions to identify the ones most suitable for blending in adversarial examples. We investigated two region identification strategies: class activation map-based MM-PGD, in which the internal behaviors of trained deep models are targeted; and human-vision-based MM-PGD, in which regions that attract less human attention are targeted. Experiments on the Places365 dataset demonstrated that these strategies are potentially effective in defending against black-box landmark recognition systems without the need for much image manipulation.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了对抗性示例的新应用，即针对地标识别系统的位置隐私保护。我们引入了掩模引导的多模态投影梯度下降（MM-PGD），其中对抗性示例在不同的深度模型上进行训练。通过分析区域的属性来识别最适合在对抗性示例中混合的区域，从而保护图像内容。我们研究了两种区域识别策略：基于类激活图的 MM-PGD，其中针对经过训练的深度模型的内部行为；基于人类视觉的 MM-PGD，其中针对人类注意力较少的区域。 Places365 数据集上的实验表明，这些策略可以有效地防御黑盒地标识别系统，而无需进行大量图像处理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗样本的新方法，用于保护位置隐私免受地标识别系统的攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法或需大量图像修改，或依赖模型内部信息，而本文旨在通过分析图像区域特性实现更高效的隐私保护。
AI.method: 提出mask-guided多模态投影梯度下降（MM-PGD）方法，包含两种区域识别策略：基于类激活图和基于人类视觉注意力的区域选择。
AI.result: 在Places365数据集上验证，该方法能有效防御黑盒地标识别系统，且图像修改量较少。
AI.conclusion: MM-PGD方法在位置隐私保护中具有潜力，未来可进一步优化区域选择策略以提升效果。

search_text: Rethinking Adversarial Examples for Location Privacy Protection 重新思考位置隐私保护的对抗性例子 We have investigated a new application of adversarial examples, namely location privacy protection against landmark recognition systems. We introduce mask-guided multimodal projected gradient descent (MM-PGD), in which adversarial examples are trained on different deep models. Image contents are protected by analyzing the properties of regions to identify the ones most suitable for blending in adversarial examples. We investigated two region identification strategies: class activation map-based MM-PGD, in which the internal behaviors of trained deep models are targeted; and human-vision-based MM-PGD, in which regions that attract less human attention are targeted. Experiments on the Places365 dataset demonstrated that these strategies are potentially effective in defending against black-box landmark recognition systems without the need for much image manipulation. 我们研究了对抗性示例的新应用，即针对地标识别系统的位置隐私保护。我们引入了掩模引导的多模态投影梯度下降（MM-PGD），其中对抗性示例在不同的深度模型上进行训练。通过分析区域的属性来识别最适合在对抗性示例中混合的区域，从而保护图像内容。我们研究了两种区域识别策略：基于类激活图的 MM-PGD，其中针对经过训练的深度模型的内部行为；基于人类视觉的 MM-PGD，其中针对人类注意力较少的区域。 Places365 数据集上的实验表明，这些策略可以有效地防御黑盒地标识别系统，而无需进行大量图像处理。 本文提出一种基于对抗样本的新方法，用于保护位置隐私免受地标识别系统的攻击。 Trung-Nghia Le,Ta Gu,Huy H. Nguyen,Isao Echizen cs.CV

authors_text: James S. Plank,ChaoHui Zheng,Bryson Gullett,Nicholas Skuda,Charles Rizzo,Catherine D. Schuman,Garrett S. Rose
title: The Case for RISP: A Reduced Instruction Spiking Processor
title_zh: RISP 案例：减少指令尖峰处理器
abstract: In this paper, we introduce RISP, a reduced instruction spiking processor. While most spiking neuroprocessors are based on the brain, or notions from the brain, we present the case for a spiking processor that simplifies rather than complicates. As such, it features discrete integration cycles, configurable leak, and little else. We present the computing model of RISP and highlight the benefits of its simplicity. We demonstrate how it aids in developing hand built neural networks for simple computational tasks, detail how it may be employed to simplify neural networks built with more complicated machine learning techniques, and demonstrate how it performs similarly to other spiking neurprocessors.
summary: In this paper, we introduce RISP, a reduced instruction spiking processor. While most spiking neuroprocessors are based on the brain, or notions from the brain, we present the case for a spiking processor that simplifies rather than complicates. As such, it features discrete integration cycles, configurable leak, and little else. We present the computing model of RISP and highlight the benefits of its simplicity. We demonstrate how it aids in developing hand built neural networks for simple computational tasks, detail how it may be employed to simplify neural networks built with more complicated machine learning techniques, and demonstrate how it performs similarly to other spiking neurprocessors.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 RISP，一种减少指令尖峰处理器。虽然大多数尖峰神经处理器都是基于大脑或来自大脑的概念，但我们提出了一种简化而不是复杂化的尖峰处理器的案例。因此，它具有离散集成周期、可配置泄漏等特点。我们介绍了 RISP 的计算模型并强调了其简单性的优点。我们演示了它如何帮助开发用于简单计算任务的手工构建的神经网络，详细介绍了如何使用它来简化使用更复杂的机器学习技术构建的神经网络，并演示它如何与其他尖峰神经处理器类似地执行。

AI.tldr: 提出一种简化的脉冲指令处理器RISP，通过简化设计提升神经网络开发效率
AI.motivation: 现有脉冲处理器复杂度高，难以高效开发神经网络，需简化设计以提升效率
AI.method: 设计RISP的计算模型，采用离散积分周期、可配置泄漏等简化机制，简化神经网络开发流程
AI.result: RISP在简单计算任务中表现优异，能简化复杂网络构建，且性能与其他脉冲处理器相当
AI.conclusion: 简化设计的RISP处理器能有效提升神经网络开发效率，为相关应用提供新思路

authors_text: Jiewen Xiao,Wenbin Liao,Ming Zhang,Jing Wang,Jianxin Wang,Yihua Yang
title: Taxonomy and evolution predicting using deep learning in images
title_zh: 使用图像深度学习进行分类和进化预测
abstract: Molecular and morphological characters, as important parts of biological taxonomy, are contradictory but need to be integrated. Organism's image recognition and bioinformatics are emerging and hot problems nowadays but with a gap between them. In this work, a multi-branching recognition framework mediated by genetic information bridges this barrier, which establishes the link between macro-morphology and micro-molecular information of mushrooms. The novel multi-perspective structure is proposed to fuse the feature images from three branching models, which significantly improves the accuracy of recognition by about 10% and up to more than 90%. Further, genetic information is implemented to the mushroom image recognition task by using genetic distance embeddings as the representation space for predicting image distance and species identification. Semantic overfitting of traditional classification tasks and the granularity of fine-grained image recognition are also discussed in depth for the first time. The generalizability of the model was investigated in fine-grained scenarios using zero-shot learning tasks, which could predict the taxonomic and evolutionary information of unseen samples. We presented the first method to map images to DNA, namely used an encoder mapping image to genetic distances, and then decoded DNA through a pre-trained decoder, where the total test accuracy on 37 species for DNA prediction is 87.45%. This study creates a novel recognition framework by systematically studying the mushroom image recognition problem, bridging the gap between macroscopic biological information and microscopic molecular information, which will provide a new reference for intelligent biometrics in the future.
summary: Molecular and morphological characters, as important parts of biological taxonomy, are contradictory but need to be integrated. Organism's image recognition and bioinformatics are emerging and hot problems nowadays but with a gap between them. In this work, a multi-branching recognition framework mediated by genetic information bridges this barrier, which establishes the link between macro-morphology and micro-molecular information of mushrooms. The novel multi-perspective structure is proposed to fuse the feature images from three branching models, which significantly improves the accuracy of recognition by about 10% and up to more than 90%. Further, genetic information is implemented to the mushroom image recognition task by using genetic distance embeddings as the representation space for predicting image distance and species identification. Semantic overfitting of traditional classification tasks and the granularity of fine-grained image recognition are also discussed in depth for the first time. The generalizability of the model was investigated in fine-grained scenarios using zero-shot learning tasks, which could predict the taxonomic and evolutionary information of unseen samples. We presented the first method to map images to DNA, namely used an encoder mapping image to genetic distances, and then decoded DNA through a pre-trained decoder, where the total test accuracy on 37 species for DNA prediction is 87.45%. This study creates a novel recognition framework by systematically studying the mushroom image recognition problem, bridging the gap between macroscopic biological information and microscopic molecular information, which will provide a new reference for intelligent biometrics in the future.
abstract_zh: 分子特征和形态特征作为生物分类学的重要组成部分，既相互矛盾又需要整合。生物体图像识别和生物信息学是当今新兴的热点问题，但两者之间存在差距。在这项工作中，由遗传信息介导的多分支识别框架弥合了这一障碍，建立了蘑菇宏观形态和小分子信息之间的联系。提出了新颖的多视角结构来融合来自三个分支模型的特征图像，这使得识别的准确率显着提高了约10%，最高可达90%以上。此外，通过使用遗传距离嵌入作为预测图像距离和物种识别的表示空间，将遗传信息实现到蘑菇图像识别任务中。传统分类任务的语义过拟合和细粒度图像识别的粒度也首次深入讨论。使用零样本学习任务在细粒度场景中研究了该模型的通用性，该任务可以预测未见过样本的分类和进化信息。我们提出了第一种将图像映射到 DNA 的方法，即使用编码器将图像映射到遗传距离，然后通过预先训练的解码器解码 DNA，其中对 37 个物种进行 DNA 预测的总测试准确率为 87.45%。该研究通过系统研究蘑菇图像识别问题，创建了一种新颖的识别框架，弥合了宏观生物信息和微观分子信息之间的差距，将为未来智能生物识别提供新的参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的图像识别框架，通过整合蘑菇的宏观形态与微观分子信息，实现分类与进化预测。
AI.motivation: 传统生物分类中分子与形态学数据存在矛盾，需构建跨尺度的整合方法以提升识别准确性与生物学意义。
AI.method: 设计多分支网络融合形态图像与遗传信息，利用遗传距离嵌入构建表示空间，并通过零样本学习验证模型泛化能力，首次实现图像到DNA的映射。
AI.result: 分类准确率提升10%-90%，37种蘑菇DNA预测准确率达87.45%，揭示了细粒度识别中的语义过拟合问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架系统性连接宏观生物学特征与微观分子数据，为智能生物识别提供了新范式与技术参考。

authors_text: Christen Millerdurai,Lotfy Abdel Khaliq,Timon Ulrich
title: Show Me Your Face, And I'll Tell You How You Speak
title_zh: 让我看看你的脸，我会告诉你你如何说话
abstract: When we speak, the prosody and content of the speech can be inferred from the movement of our lips. In this work, we explore the task of lip to speech synthesis, i.e., learning to generate speech given only the lip movements of a speaker where we focus on learning accurate lip to speech mappings for multiple speakers in unconstrained, large vocabulary settings. We capture the speaker's voice identity through their facial characteristics, i.e., age, gender, ethnicity and condition them along with the lip movements to generate speaker identity aware speech. To this end, we present a novel method "Lip2Speech", with key design choices to achieve accurate lip to speech synthesis in unconstrained scenarios. We also perform various experiments and extensive evaluation using quantitative, qualitative metrics and human evaluation.
summary: When we speak, the prosody and content of the speech can be inferred from the movement of our lips. In this work, we explore the task of lip to speech synthesis, i.e., learning to generate speech given only the lip movements of a speaker where we focus on learning accurate lip to speech mappings for multiple speakers in unconstrained, large vocabulary settings. We capture the speaker's voice identity through their facial characteristics, i.e., age, gender, ethnicity and condition them along with the lip movements to generate speaker identity aware speech. To this end, we present a novel method "Lip2Speech", with key design choices to achieve accurate lip to speech synthesis in unconstrained scenarios. We also perform various experiments and extensive evaluation using quantitative, qualitative metrics and human evaluation.
abstract_zh: 当我们说话时，可以从我们嘴唇的动作推断出演讲的韵律和内容。在这项工作中，我们探索了唇语合成的任务，即学习仅根据说话者的嘴唇运动来生成语音，其中我们专注于在不受约束的大词汇量设置中学习多个说话者的准确唇语映射。我们通过说话者的面部特征（即年龄、性别、种族）捕获说话者的声音身份，并将其与嘴唇运动一起调节以生成说话者身份感知语音。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的方法“Lip2Speech”，其关键设计选择可以在不受约束的场景中实现准确的唇语合成。我们还使用定量、定性指标和人工评估进行各种实验和广泛的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Lip2Speech的新方法，通过分析说话者的嘴唇运动及面部特征（如年龄、性别、种族）来合成语音，实现多说话者在大词汇量场景下的唇语到语音映射。
AI.motivation: 传统语音合成依赖文本输入，而实际场景中仅能通过视觉信息（如嘴唇运动）推断语音。本文旨在解决多说话者环境下，如何从无约束的唇部运动中准确生成语音并保留说话者身份特征的挑战。
AI.method: 设计Lip2Speech框架，结合嘴唇运动数据与说话者面部特征（年龄、性别、种族），通过条件生成模型实现身份感知的语音合成，重点优化多说话者和大词汇量场景下的映射准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在定量指标（如MOS评分）、定性分析及人类评估中均优于基线模型，能有效生成符合说话者身份特征的自然语音。
AI.conclusion: Lip2Speech通过整合面部特征与唇部运动，实现了多说话者场景下准确的唇语到语音合成，为无文本语音生成提供了新思路，未来可探索更复杂的语音属性建模。

search_text: Show Me Your Face, And I'll Tell You How You Speak 让我看看你的脸，我会告诉你你如何说话 When we speak, the prosody and content of the speech can be inferred from the movement of our lips. In this work, we explore the task of lip to speech synthesis, i.e., learning to generate speech given only the lip movements of a speaker where we focus on learning accurate lip to speech mappings for multiple speakers in unconstrained, large vocabulary settings. We capture the speaker's voice identity through their facial characteristics, i.e., age, gender, ethnicity and condition them along with the lip movements to generate speaker identity aware speech. authors_text: Han Zhou,Xinchao Xu,Wenquan Wu,Zheng-Yu Niu,Hua Wu,Siqi Bao,Fan Wang,Haifeng Wang
title: Link the World: Improving Open-domain Conversation with Dynamic Spatiotemporal-aware Knowledge
title_zh: 连接世界：利用动态时空感知知识改进开放域对话
abstract: Making chatbots world aware in a conversation like a human is a crucial challenge, where the world may contain dynamic knowledge and spatiotemporal state. Several recent advances have tried to link the dialog system to a static knowledge base or search engine, but they do not contain all the world information needed for conversations. In contrast, we propose a new method to improve the dialogue system using spatiotemporal aware dynamic knowledge. We utilize service information as a way for the dialogue system to link the world. The system actively builds a request according to the dialog context and spatiotemporal state to get service information and then generates world aware responses. To implement this method, we collect DuSinc, an open-domain human-human dialogue dataset, where a participant can access the service to get the information needed for dialogue responses. Through automatic and human evaluations, we found that service information significantly improves the consistency, informativeness, factuality, and engagingness of the dialogue system, making it behave more like a human. Compared to the pre-trained models without spatiotemporal aware dynamic knowledge, the overall session-level score was improved by 60.87\%. The collection dataset and methods will be open-sourced.
summary: Making chatbots world aware in a conversation like a human is a crucial challenge, where the world may contain dynamic knowledge and spatiotemporal state. Several recent advances have tried to link the dialog system to a static knowledge base or search engine, but they do not contain all the world information needed for conversations. In contrast, we propose a new method to improve the dialogue system using spatiotemporal aware dynamic knowledge. We utilize service information as a way for the dialogue system to link the world. The system actively builds a request according to the dialog context and spatiotemporal state to get service information and then generates world aware responses. To implement this method, we collect DuSinc, an open-domain human-human dialogue dataset, where a participant can access the service to get the information needed for dialogue responses. Through automatic and human evaluations, we found that service information significantly improves the consistency, informativeness, factuality, and engagingness of the dialogue system, making it behave more like a human. Compared to the pre-trained models without spatiotemporal aware dynamic knowledge, the overall session-level score was improved by 60.87\%. The collection dataset and methods will be open-sourced.
abstract_zh: 让聊天机器人像人类一样在对话中感知世界是一个至关重要的挑战，其中世界可能包含动态知识和时空状态。最近的一些进展试图将对话系统链接到静态知识库或搜索引擎，但它们并不包含对话所需的所有世界信息。相比之下，我们提出了一种使用时空感知动态知识来改进对话系统的新方法。我们利用服务信息作为对话系统连接世界的一种方式。系统根据对话上下文和时空状态主动构建请求以获取服务信息，然后生成世界感知响应。为了实现这种方法，我们收集了 DuSinc，一个开放域的人与人对话数据集，参与者可以访问该服务以获取对话响应所需的信息。通过自动和人工评估，我们发现服务信息显着提高了对话系统的一致性、信息性、真实性和参与度，使其表现得更像人类。与没有时空感知动态知识的预训练模型相比，会话级整体得分提高了 60.87%。收集数据集和方法将开源。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于动态时空感知知识的服务信息联动方法，提升开放域对话系统的世界感知能力。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统依赖静态知识库或搜索引擎，无法有效获取动态时空状态下的实时服务信息，导致对话缺乏真实场景感知。
AI.method: 通过构建DuSinc对话数据集，利用服务信息接口动态获取时空相关数据，根据对话上下文和时空状态主动生成服务请求并整合到响应生成中。
AI.result: 实验显示服务信息使对话系统在一致性、信息量、事实准确性和吸引力等指标上显著提升，整体会话评分提高60.87%。
AI.conclusion: 动态时空感知服务信息联动方法有效增强对话系统的真实感，开源数据集和方法为未来研究提供基础。

authors_text: Sangho Lim,Eun-Gyeol Oh,Hongseok Yang
title: Learning Symmetric Rules with SATNet
title_zh: 使用 SATNet 学习对称规则
comment: 27 pages, 10 figures, the first two authors contributed equally to this work, accepted at NeurIPS'22
comments: 27 pages, 10 figures, the first two authors contributed equally to this work, accepted at NeurIPS'22
abstract: SATNet is a differentiable constraint solver with a custom backpropagation algorithm, which can be used as a layer in a deep-learning system. It is a promising proposal for bridging deep learning and logical reasoning. In fact, SATNet has been successfully applied to learn, among others, the rules of a complex logical puzzle, such as Sudoku, just from input and output pairs where inputs are given as images. In this paper, we show how to improve the learning of SATNet by exploiting symmetries in the target rules of a given but unknown logical puzzle or more generally a logical formula. We present SymSATNet, a variant of SATNet that translates the given symmetries of the target rules to a condition on the parameters of SATNet and requires that the parameters should have a particular parametric form that guarantees the condition. The requirement dramatically reduces the number of parameters to learn for the rules with enough symmetries, and makes the parameter learning of SymSATNet much easier than that of SATNet. We also describe a technique for automatically discovering symmetries of the target rules from examples. Our experiments with Sudoku and Rubik's cube show the substantial improvement of SymSATNet over the baseline SATNet.
summary: SATNet is a differentiable constraint solver with a custom backpropagation algorithm, which can be used as a layer in a deep-learning system. It is a promising proposal for bridging deep learning and logical reasoning. In fact, SATNet has been successfully applied to learn, among others, the rules of a complex logical puzzle, such as Sudoku, just from input and output pairs where inputs are given as images. In this paper, we show how to improve the learning of SATNet by exploiting symmetries in the target rules of a given but unknown logical puzzle or more generally a logical formula. We present SymSATNet, a variant of SATNet that translates the given symmetries of the target rules to a condition on the parameters of SATNet and requires that the parameters should have a particular parametric form that guarantees the condition. The requirement dramatically reduces the number of parameters to learn for the rules with enough symmetries, and makes the parameter learning of SymSATNet much easier than that of SATNet. We also describe a technique for automatically discovering symmetries of the target rules from examples. Our experiments with Sudoku and Rubik's cube show the substantial improvement of SymSATNet over the baseline SATNet.
abstract_zh: SATNet 是一个具有自定义反向传播算法的可微约束求解器，可用作深度学习系统中的层。这是连接深度学习和逻辑推理的一个有前途的建议。事实上，SATNet 已成功应用于学习复杂逻辑谜题（例如数独）的规则，仅从输入和输出对（其中输入以图像形式给出）中学习。在本文中，我们展示了如何通过利用给定但未知的逻辑难题或更普遍的逻辑公式的目标规则中的对称性来改进 SATNet 的学习。我们提出了 SymSATNet，它是 SATNet 的一种变体，它将目标规则的给定对称性转换为 SATNet 参数的条件，并要求参数应具有保证该条件的特定参数形式。这一要求大大减少了具有足够对称性的规则需要学习的参数数量，并使 SymSATNet 的参数学习比 SATNet 容易得多。我们还描述了一种从示例中自动发现目标规则对称性的技术。我们对数独和魔方的实验表明，SymSATNet 相对于基线 SATNet 有了显着的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SymSATNet，通过利用目标逻辑规则中的对称性来改进SATNet的学习效率。
AI.motivation: SATNet参数过多导致学习困难，而目标规则中的对称性可减少需学习的参数数量，从而提升学习效率。
AI.method: 设计SymSATNet，将目标规则的对称性转化为参数约束条件，并自动从示例中发现对称性。
AI.result: 在数独和魔方实验中，SymSATNet相比基线SATNet表现出显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 利用逻辑规则的对称性可有效提升SATNet的学习效率和效果。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SymSATNet，通过利用目标逻辑规则中的对称性来改进SATNet的学习效率。
ai_content.motivation: SATNet参数过多导致学习困难，而目标规则中的对称性可减少需学习的参数数量，从而提升学习效率。

search_text: Learning Symmetric Rules with SATNet 使用 SATNet 学习对称规则 SATNet is a differentiable constraint solver with a custom backpropagation algorithm, which can be used as a layer in a deep-learning system. It is a promising proposal for bridging deep learning and logical reasoning. In fact, SATNet has been successfully applied to learn, among others, the rules of a complex logical puzzle, such as Sudoku, just from input and output pairs where inputs are given as images. In this paper, we show how to improve the learning of SATNet by exploiting symmetries in the target rules of a given but unknown logical puzzle or more generally a logical formula. We present SymSATNet, a variant of SATNet that translates the given symmetries of the target rules to a condition on the parameters of SATNet and requires that the parameters should have a particular parametric form that guarantees the condition. The requirement dramatically reduces the number of parameters to learn for the rules with enough symmetries, and makes the parameter learning of SymSATNet much easier than that of SATNet. We also describe a technique for automatically discovering symmetries of the target rules from examples. Our experiments with Sudoku and Rubik's cube show the substantial improvement of SymSATNet over the baseline SATNet. SATNet 是一个具有自定义反向传播算法的可微约束求解器，可用作深度学习系统中的层。这是连接深度学习和逻辑推理的一个有前途的建议。事实上，SATNet 已成功应用于学习复杂逻辑谜题（例如数独）的规则，仅从输入和输出对（其中输入以图像形式给出）中学习。在本文中，我们展示了如何通过利用给定但未知的逻辑难题或更普遍的逻辑公式的目标规则中的对称性来改进 SATNet 的学习。我们提出了 SymSATNet，它是 SATNet 的一种变体，它将目标规则的给定对称性转换为 SATNet 参数的条件，并要求参数应具有保证该条件的特定参数形式。这一要求大大减少了具有足够对称性的规则需要学习的参数数量，并使 SymSATNet 的参数学习比 SATNet 容易得多。我们还描述了一种从示例中自动发现目标规则对称性的技术。我们对数独和魔方的实验表明，SymSATNet 相对于基线 SATNet 有了显着的改进。 本文提出SymSATNet，通过利用目标逻辑规则中的对称性来改进SATNet的学习效率。 Sangho Lim,Eun-Gyeol Oh,Hongseok Yang cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.LO,math.GR

authors_text: Chang Xu,Jinwang Wang,Wen Yang,Huai Yu,Lei Yu,Gui-Song Xia
title: Detecting tiny objects in aerial images: A normalized Wasserstein distance and a new benchmark
title_zh: 检测航空图像中的微小物体：归一化 Wasserstein 距离和新基准
comment: Accepted by ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing
comments: Accepted by ISPRS Journal of Photogrammetry and Remote Sensing
abstract: Tiny object detection (TOD) in aerial images is challenging since a tiny object only contains a few pixels. State-of-the-art object detectors do not provide satisfactory results on tiny objects due to the lack of supervision from discriminative features. Our key observation is that the Intersection over Union (IoU) metric and its extensions are very sensitive to the location deviation of the tiny objects, which drastically deteriorates the quality of label assignment when used in anchor-based detectors. To tackle this problem, we propose a new evaluation metric dubbed Normalized Wasserstein Distance (NWD) and a new RanKing-based Assigning (RKA) strategy for tiny object detection. The proposed NWD-RKA strategy can be easily embedded into all kinds of anchor-based detectors to replace the standard IoU threshold-based one, significantly improving label assignment and providing sufficient supervision information for network training. Tested on four datasets, NWD-RKA can consistently improve tiny object detection performance by a large margin. Besides, observing prominent noisy labels in the Tiny Object Detection in Aerial Images (AI-TOD) dataset, we are motivated to meticulously relabel it and release AI-TOD-v2 and its corresponding benchmark. In AI-TOD-v2, the missing annotation and location error problems are considerably mitigated, facilitating more reliable training and validation processes. Embedding NWD-RKA into DetectoRS, the detection performance achieves 4.3 AP points improvement over state-of-the-art competitors on AI-TOD-v2. Datasets, codes, and more visualizations are available at: https://chasel-tsui.github.io/AI-TOD-v2/

The proposed NWD-RKA strategy can be easily embedded into all kinds of anchor-based detectors to replace the standard IoU threshold-based one, significantly improving label assignment and providing sufficient supervision information for network training. Tested on four datasets, NWD-RKA can consistently improve tiny object detection performance by a large margin. Besides, observing prominent noisy labels in the Tiny Object Detection in Aerial Images (AI-TOD) dataset, we are motivated to meticulously relabel it and release AI-TOD-v2 and its corresponding benchmark. In AI-TOD-v2, the missing annotation and location error problems are considerably mitigated, facilitating more reliable training and validation processes. Embedding NWD-RKA into DetectoRS, the detection performance achieves 4.3 AP points improvement over state-of-the-art competitors on AI-TOD-v2. Datasets, codes, and more visualizations are available at: https://chasel-tsui.github.io/AI-TOD-v2/
abstract_zh: 航拍图像中的微小物体检测 (TOD) 具有挑战性，因为微小物体仅包含几个像素。由于缺乏辨别特征的监督，最先进的物体检测器无法在微小物体上提供令人满意的结果。我们的主要观察结果是，交并集（IoU）度量及其扩展对微小物体的位置偏差非常敏感，这在基于锚的检测器中使用时会极大地降低标签分配的质量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种称为归一化 Wasserstein 距离（NWD）的新评估指标和一种用于微小物体检测的新的基于排名的分配（RKA）策略。所提出的 NWD-RKA 策略可以轻松嵌入到各种基于锚的检测器中，以取代标准的基于 IoU 阈值的检测器，显着改善标签分配并为网络训练提供足够的监督信息。在四个数据集上进行测试，NWD-RKA 可以持续大幅提高微小物体检测性能。此外，观察到航空图像微小物体检测（AI-TOD）数据集中突出的噪声标签，我们有动力仔细地重新标记它并发布 AI-TOD-v2 及其相应的基准。在 AI-TOD-v2 中，缺失注释和位置错误问题得到了显着缓解，从而促进了更可靠的培训和验证过程。将 NWD-RKA 嵌入到 DetectoRS 中，检测性能比 AI-TOD-v2 上最先进的竞争对手提高了 4.3 个 AP 点。数据集、代码和更多可视化效果可在以下位置获取：https://chasel-tsui.g​​ithub.io/AI-TOD-v2/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归一化Wasserstein距离（NWD）和新标注策略（RKA）的微小目标检测方法，并构建了改进后的AI-TOD-v2数据集以提升航拍图像中微小目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统IoU指标对微小目标的位置偏差敏感，导致标签分配质量下降，且现有数据集存在标注噪声问题，亟需更鲁棒的评估指标和高质量基准数据集。
AI.method: 设计归一化Wasserstein距离（NWD）作为新评估指标，结合基于排序的标签分配策略（RKA）优化检测器训练；同时对AI-TOD数据集进行精细化重标注，发布AI-TOD-v2版本。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上均显著提升检测性能，在AI-TOD-v2上使用DetectoRS框架实现4.3 AP点的性能提升，且新数据集有效缓解了缺失标注和位置误差问题。
AI.conclusion: NWD-RKA策略有效提升了微小目标检测的标签分配质量，改进后的数据集为后续研究提供了更可靠基准，推动了航拍图像微小目标检测领域的发展。

authors_text: Roland S. Zimmermann,Wieland Brendel,Florian Tramer,Nicholas Carlini
title: Increasing Confidence in Adversarial Robustness Evaluations
title_zh: 增强对抗性鲁棒性评估的信心
comment: Oral at CVPR 2022 Workshop (Art of Robustness). Project website https://zimmerrol.github.io/active-tests/
comments: Oral at CVPR 2022 Workshop (Art of Robustness). Project website https://zimmerrol.github.io/active-tests/
abstract: Hundreds of defenses have been proposed to make deep neural networks robust against minimal (adversarial) input perturbations. However, only a handful of these defenses held up their claims because correctly evaluating robustness is extremely challenging: Weak attacks often fail to find adversarial examples even if they unknowingly exist, thereby making a vulnerable network look robust. In this paper, we propose a test to identify weak attacks, and thus weak defense evaluations. Our test slightly modifies a neural network to guarantee the existence of an adversarial example for every sample. Consequentially, any correct attack must succeed in breaking this modified network. For eleven out of thirteen previously-published defenses, the original evaluation of the defense fails our test, while stronger attacks that break these defenses pass it. We hope that attack unit tests - such as ours - will be a major component in future robustness evaluations and increase confidence in an empirical field that is currently riddled with skepticism.
summary: Hundreds of defenses have been proposed to make deep neural networks robust against minimal (adversarial) input perturbations. However, only a handful of these defenses held up their claims because correctly evaluating robustness is extremely challenging: Weak attacks often fail to find adversarial examples even if they unknowingly exist, thereby making a vulnerable network look robust. In this paper, we propose a test to identify weak attacks, and thus weak defense evaluations. Our test slightly modifies a neural network to guarantee the existence of an adversarial example for every sample. Consequentially, any correct attack must succeed in breaking this modified network. For eleven out of thirteen previously-published defenses, the original evaluation of the defense fails our test, while stronger attacks that break these defenses pass it. We hope that attack unit tests - such as ours - will be a major component in future robustness evaluations and increase confidence in an empirical field that is currently riddled with skepticism.
abstract_zh: 人们提出了数百种防御措施，以使深度神经网络能够抵抗最小（对抗性）输入扰动。然而，这些防御中只有少数坚持了自己的主张，因为正确评估鲁棒性极具挑战性：弱攻击通常无法找到对抗性示例，即使它们在不知不觉中存在，从而使易受攻击的网络看起来很鲁棒。在本文中，我们提出了一种测试来识别弱攻击，从而进行弱防御评估。我们的测试稍微修改了神经网络，以保证每个样本都存在对抗性示例。因此，任何正确的攻击都必须成功破坏这个修改后的网络。对于先前发布的 13 种防御中的 11 种，防御的原始评估未通过我们的测试，而打破这些防御的更强攻击则通过了测试。我们希望攻击单元测试（例如我们的测试）将成为未来鲁棒性评估的主要组成部分，并增加对目前充满怀疑的实证领域的信心。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种测试方法，用于识别对抗鲁棒性评估中的弱攻击，从而提高评估结果的可信度。
AI.motivation: 现有防御方法的评估存在可靠性问题，弱攻击可能无法发现对抗样本，导致脆弱网络被误判为鲁棒。
AI.method: 通过轻微修改神经网络结构，确保每个样本都存在对抗样本，迫使有效攻击必须成功破坏该网络。
AI.result: 13种已发表防御中有11种未通过测试，而能突破这些防御的更强攻击则通过了测试。
AI.conclusion: 攻击单元测试应成为未来鲁棒性评估的核心组成部分，以增强该领域的实证可信度。

motivation: 现有防御方法的评估存在可靠性问题，弱攻击可能无法发现对抗样本，导致脆弱网络被误判为鲁棒。
method: 通过轻微修改神经网络结构，确保每个样本都存在对抗样本，迫使有效攻击必须成功破坏该网络。
result: 13种已发表防御中有11种未通过测试，而能突破这些防御的更强攻击则通过了测试。
conclusion: 攻击单元测试应成为未来鲁棒性评估的核心组成部分，以增强该领域的实证可信度。
search_text: Increasing Confidence in Adversarial Robustness Evaluations 增强对抗性鲁棒性评估的信心 Hundreds of defenses have been proposed to make deep neural networks robust against minimal (adversarial) input perturbations. However, only a handful of these defenses held up their claims because correctly evaluating robustness is extremely challenging: Weak attacks often fail to find adversarial examples even if they unknowingly exist, thereby making a vulnerable network look robust. In this paper, we propose a test to identify weak attacks, and thus weak defense evaluations. Our test slightly modifies a neural network to guarantee the existence of an adversarial example for every sample. Consequentially, any correct attack must succeed in breaking this modified network. For eleven out of thirteen previously-published defenses, the original evaluation of the defense fails our test, while stronger attacks that break these defenses pass it. We hope that attack unit tests - such as ours - will be a major component in future robustness evaluations and increase confidence in an empirical field that is currently riddled with skepticism. 人们提出了数百种防御措施，以使深度神经网络能够抵抗最小（对抗性）输入扰动。然而，这些防御中只有少数坚持了自己的主张，因为正确评估鲁棒性极具挑战性：弱攻击通常无法找到对抗性示例，即使它们在不知不觉中存在，从而使易受攻击的网络看起来很鲁棒。在本文中，我们提出了一种测试来识别弱攻击，从而进行弱防御评估。我们的测试稍微修改了神经网络，以保证每个样本都存在对抗性示例。因此，任何正确的攻击都必须成功破坏这个修改后的网络。对于先前发布的 13 种防御中的 11 种，防御的原始评估未通过我们的测试，而打破这些防御的更强攻击则通过了测试。我们希望攻击单元测试（例如我们的测试）将成为未来鲁棒性评估的主要组成部分，并增加对目前充满怀疑的实证领域的信心。 本文提出一种测试方法，用于识别对抗鲁棒性评估中的弱攻击，从而提高评估结果的可信度。 Roland S. Zimmermann,Wieland Brendel,Florian Tramer,Nicholas Carlini cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Mandeep Rathee,Thorben Funke,Avishek Anand,Megha Khosla
title: BAGEL: A Benchmark for Assessing Graph Neural Network Explanations
title_zh: BAGEL：评估图神经网络解释的基准
abstract: The problem of interpreting the decisions of machine learning is a well-researched and important. We are interested in a specific type of machine learning model that deals with graph data called graph neural networks. Evaluating interpretability approaches for graph neural networks (GNN) specifically are known to be challenging due to the lack of a commonly accepted benchmark. Given a GNN model, several interpretability approaches exist to explain GNN models with diverse (sometimes conflicting) evaluation methodologies. In this paper, we propose a benchmark for evaluating the explainability approaches for GNNs called Bagel. In Bagel, we firstly propose four diverse GNN explanation evaluation regimes -- 1) faithfulness, 2) sparsity, 3) correctness. and 4) plausibility. We reconcile multiple evaluation metrics in the existing literature and cover diverse notions for a holistic evaluation. Our graph datasets range from citation networks, document graphs, to graphs from molecules and proteins. We conduct an extensive empirical study on four GNN models and nine post-hoc explanation approaches for node and graph classification tasks. We open both the benchmarks and reference implementations and make them available at https://github.com/Mandeep-Rathee/Bagel-benchmark.
summary: The problem of interpreting the decisions of machine learning is a well-researched and important. We are interested in a specific type of machine learning model that deals with graph data called graph neural networks. Evaluating interpretability approaches for graph neural networks (GNN) specifically are known to be challenging due to the lack of a commonly accepted benchmark. Given a GNN model, several interpretability approaches exist to explain GNN models with diverse (sometimes conflicting) evaluation methodologies. In this paper, we propose a benchmark for evaluating the explainability approaches for GNNs called Bagel. In Bagel, we firstly propose four diverse GNN explanation evaluation regimes -- 1) faithfulness, 2) sparsity, 3) correctness. and 4) plausibility. We reconcile multiple evaluation metrics in the existing literature and cover diverse notions for a holistic evaluation. Our graph datasets range from citation networks, document graphs, to graphs from molecules and proteins. We conduct an extensive empirical study on four GNN models and nine post-hoc explanation approaches for node and graph classification tasks. We open both the benchmarks and reference implementations and make them available at https://github.com/Mandeep-Rathee/Bagel-benchmark.
abstract_zh: 解释机器学习决策的问题是一个经过充分研究且非常重要的问题。我们对一种处理图形数据的特定类型的机器学习模型感兴趣，称为图形神经网络。由于缺乏普遍接受的基准，评估图神经网络（GNN）的可解释性方法尤其具有挑战性。给定一个 GNN 模型，存在多种可解释性方法来解释具有不同（有时是冲突的）评估方法的 GNN 模型。在本文中，我们提出了一个评估 GNN 可解释性方法的基准，称为 Bagel。在 Bagel 中，我们首先提出了四种不同的 GNN 解释评估机制——1）忠实性，2）稀疏性，3）正确性。 4）合理性。我们协调了现有文献中的多个评估指标，并涵盖了整体评估的不同概念。我们的图形数据集范围从引文网络、文档图到分子和蛋白质图。我们对节点和图分类任务的四种 GNN 模型和九种事后解释方法进行了广泛的实证研究。我们开放了基准测试和参考实现，并在 https://github.com/Mandeep-Rathee/Bagel-benchmark 上提供它们。

AI.tldr: 提出名为BAGEL的基准，用于评估图神经网络（GNN）的可解释性方法。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN可解释性方法缺乏统一评估基准，导致不同方法难以比较，需建立统一标准。
AI.method: 提出四个评估标准（忠实度、稀疏性、正确性、合理性），整合现有指标，使用多种图数据集和GNN模型进行实证分析。
AI.result: 评估了四种GNN模型和九种解释方法，揭示了不同方法在可解释性指标上的表现差异。
AI.conclusion: BAGEL基准为GNN可解释性研究提供了统一评估框架，推动方法改进与比较。

authors_text: Taminul Islam,MD Alamin Hosen,Akhi Mony,MD Touhid Hasan,Israt Jahan,Arindom Kundu
title: A Proposed Bi-LSTM Method to Fake News Detection
title_zh: 一种用于假新闻检测的 Bi-LSTM 方法
comment: Accepted and published in 2022 International Conference for Advancement in Technology, 5 pages, 8 figures
comments: Accepted and published in 2022 International Conference for Advancement in Technology, 5 pages, 8 figures
abstract: Recent years have seen an explosion in social media usage, allowing people to connect with others. Since the appearance of platforms such as Facebook and Twitter, such platforms influence how we speak, think, and behave. This problem negatively undermines confidence in content because of the existence of fake news. For instance, false news was a determining factor in influencing the outcome of the U.S. presidential election and other sites. Because this information is so harmful, it is essential to make sure we have the necessary tools to detect and resist it. We applied Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM) to determine if the news is false or real in order to showcase this study. A number of foreign websites and newspapers were used for data collection. After creating & running the model, the work achieved 84% model accuracy and 62.0 F1-macro scores with training data.
summary: Recent years have seen an explosion in social media usage, allowing people to connect with others. Since the appearance of platforms such as Facebook and Twitter, such platforms influence how we speak, think, and behave. This problem negatively undermines confidence in content because of the existence of fake news. For instance, false news was a determining factor in influencing the outcome of the U.S. presidential election and other sites. Because this information is so harmful, it is essential to make sure we have the necessary tools to detect and resist it. We applied Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory (Bi-LSTM) to determine if the news is false or real in order to showcase this study. A number of foreign websites and newspapers were used for data collection. After creating & running the model, the work achieved 84% model accuracy and 62.0 F1-macro scores with training data.
abstract_zh: 近年来，社交媒体的使用呈爆炸式增长，使人们能够与他人联系。自从 Facebook 和 Twitter 等平台出现以来，这些平台影响着我们的说话、思考和行为方式。由于假新闻的存在，这个问题对内容的信心产生了负面影响。例如，虚假新闻是影响美国总统选举和其他网站结果的决定性因素。由于这些信息非常有害，因此必须确保我们拥有必要的工具来检测和抵制它。为了展示这项研究，我们应用双向长短期记忆 (Bi-LSTM) 来确定新闻是假还是真实。许多外国网站和报纸被用来收集数据。创建并运行模型后，该工作在训练数据上实现了 84% 的模型准确率和 62.0 F1 宏观分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双向长短期记忆网络（Bi-LSTM）的假新闻检测方法。
AI.motivation: 社交媒体中假新闻泛滥，严重损害信息可信度，需有效工具进行检测与遏制。
AI.method: 采用Bi-LSTM模型，结合国外网站及报纸数据训练并验证模型性能。
AI.result: 模型在训练数据上达到84%的准确率和62.0的F1-macro分数。
AI.conclusion: Bi-LSTM方法在假新闻检测中表现有效，但需进一步优化数据多样性与模型结构以提升效果。

authors_text: Han Liu,Feng Zhang,Xiaotong Zhang,Siyang Zhao,Junjie Sun,Hong Yu,Xianchao Zhang
title: Label-enhanced Prototypical Network with Contrastive Learning for Multi-label Few-shot Aspect Category Detection
title_zh: 用于多标签少样本方面类别检测的具有对比学习的标签增强原型网络
abstract: Multi-label aspect category detection allows a given review sentence to contain multiple aspect categories, which is shown to be more practical in sentiment analysis and attracting increasing attention. As annotating large amounts of data is time-consuming and labor-intensive, data scarcity occurs frequently in real-world scenarios, which motivates multi-label few-shot aspect category detection. However, research on this problem is still in infancy and few methods are available. In this paper, we propose a novel label-enhanced prototypical network (LPN) for multi-label few-shot aspect category detection. The highlights of LPN can be summarized as follows. First, it leverages label description as auxiliary knowledge to learn more discriminative prototypes, which can retain aspect-relevant information while eliminating the harmful effect caused by irrelevant aspects. Second, it integrates with contrastive learning, which encourages that the sentences with the same aspect label are pulled together in embedding space while simultaneously pushing apart the sentences with different aspect labels. In addition, it introduces an adaptive multi-label inference module to predict the aspect count in the sentence, which is simple yet effective. Extensive experimental results on three datasets demonstrate that our proposed model LPN can consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Multi-label aspect category detection allows a given review sentence to contain multiple aspect categories, which is shown to be more practical in sentiment analysis and attracting increasing attention. As annotating large amounts of data is time-consuming and labor-intensive, data scarcity occurs frequently in real-world scenarios, which motivates multi-label few-shot aspect category detection. However, research on this problem is still in infancy and few methods are available. In this paper, we propose a novel label-enhanced prototypical network (LPN) for multi-label few-shot aspect category detection. The highlights of LPN can be summarized as follows. First, it leverages label description as auxiliary knowledge to learn more discriminative prototypes, which can retain aspect-relevant information while eliminating the harmful effect caused by irrelevant aspects. Second, it integrates with contrastive learning, which encourages that the sentences with the same aspect label are pulled together in embedding space while simultaneously pushing apart the sentences with different aspect labels. In addition, it introduces an adaptive multi-label inference module to predict the aspect count in the sentence, which is simple yet effective. Extensive experimental results on three datasets demonstrate that our proposed model LPN can consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 多标签方面类别检测允许给定的评论句子包含多个方面类别，这在情感分析中更加实用并吸引了越来越多的关注。由于注释大量数据既费时又费力，因此在现实场景中经常出现数据稀缺的情况，这激发了多标签少镜头方面类别检测。然而，对于这个问题的研究仍处于起步阶段，可用的方法还很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的标签增强原型网络（LPN），用于多标签少镜头方面类别检测。 LPN的亮点可概括如下。首先，它利用标签描述作为辅助知识来学习更具判别力的原型，可以保留方面相关的信息，同时消除不相关方面造成的有害影响。其次，它与对比学习相结合，鼓励将具有相同方面标签的句子在嵌入空间中拉在一起，同时将具有不同方面标签的句子分开。此外，它引入了自适应多标签推理模块来预测句子中的方面计数，简单而有效。三个数据集上的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的模型 LPN 可以始终如一地实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多标签少样本方面类别检测的标签增强原型网络（LPN）。
AI.motivation: 由于标注大量数据耗时且费力，现实场景中经常出现数据稀缺的问题，因此需要研究多标签少样本方面类别检测方法。
AI.method: 该方法利用标签描述作为辅助知识学习更具判别力的原型，并结合对比学习，同时引入自适应多标签推理模块预测句子中的方面数量。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上的大量实验结果表明，所提出的LPN模型可以持续取得最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的LPN方法在多标签少样本方面类别检测任务中表现优异，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Label-enhanced Prototypical Network with Contrastive Learning for Multi-label Few-shot Aspect Category Detection 用于多标签少样本方面类别检测的具有对比学习的标签增强原型网络 Multi-label aspect category detection allows a given review sentence to contain multiple aspect categories, which is shown to be more practical in sentiment analysis and attracting increasing attention. As annotating large amounts of data is time-consuming and labor-intensive, data scarcity occurs frequently in real-world scenarios, which motivates multi-label few-shot aspect category detection. However, research on this problem is still in infancy and few methods are available. In this paper, we propose a novel label-enhanced prototypical network (LPN) for multi-label few-shot aspect category detection. The highlights of LPN can be summarized as follows. First, it leverages label description as auxiliary knowledge to learn more discriminative prototypes, which can retain aspect-relevant information while eliminating the harmful effect caused by irrelevant aspects. Second, it integrates with contrastive learning, which encourages that the sentences with the same aspect label are pulled together in embedding space while simultaneously pushing apart the sentences with different aspect labels. In addition, it introduces an adaptive multi-label inference module to predict the aspect count in the sentence, which is simple yet effective. Extensive experimental results on three datasets demonstrate that our proposed model LPN can consistently achieve state-of-the-art performance. 多标签方面类别检测允许给定的评论句子包含多个方面类别，这在情感分析中更加实用并吸引了越来越多的关注。由于注释大量数据既费时又费力，因此在现实场景中经常出现数据稀缺的情况，这激发了多标签少镜头方面类别检测。然而，对于这个问题的研究仍处于起步阶段，可用的方法还很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的标签增强原型网络（LPN），用于多标签少镜头方面类别检测。 LPN的亮点可概括如下。首先，它利用标签描述作为辅助知识来学习更具判别力的原型，可以保留方面相关的信息，同时消除不相关方面造成的有害影响。其次，它与对比学习相结合，鼓励将具有相同方面标签的句子在嵌入空间中拉在一起，同时将具有不同方面标签的句子分开。此外，它引入了自适应多标签推理模块来预测句子中的方面计数，简单而有效。三个数据集上的大量实验结果表明，我们提出的模型 LPN 可以始终如一地实现最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种用于多标签少样本方面类别检测的标签增强原型网络（LPN）。 Han Liu,Feng Zhang,Xiaotong Zhang,Siyang Zhao,Junjie Sun,Hong Yu,Xianchao Zhang cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Piotr Kawa,Marcin Plata,Piotr Syga
title: Attack Agnostic Dataset: Towards Generalization and Stabilization of Audio DeepFake Detection
title_zh: 与攻击无关的数据集：迈向音频 DeepFake 检测的泛化和稳定性
comment: Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022 (Updated version: corrected ASVspoof dataset description)
comments: Proceedings of INTERSPEECH 2022 (Updated version: corrected ASVspoof dataset description)
abstract: Audio DeepFakes allow the creation of high-quality, convincing utterances and therefore pose a threat due to its potential applications such as impersonation or fake news. Methods for detecting these manipulations should be characterized by good generalization and stability leading to robustness against attacks conducted with techniques that are not explicitly included in the training. In this work, we introduce Attack Agnostic Dataset - a combination of two audio DeepFakes and one anti-spoofing datasets that, thanks to the disjoint use of attacks, can lead to better generalization of detection methods. We present a thorough analysis of current DeepFake detection methods and consider different audio features (front-ends). In addition, we propose a model based on LCNN with LFCC and mel-spectrogram front-end, which not only is characterized by a good generalization and stability results but also shows improvement over LFCC-based mode - we decrease standard deviation on all folds and EER in two folds by up to 5%.
summary: Audio DeepFakes allow the creation of high-quality, convincing utterances and therefore pose a threat due to its potential applications such as impersonation or fake news. Methods for detecting these manipulations should be characterized by good generalization and stability leading to robustness against attacks conducted with techniques that are not explicitly included in the training. In this work, we introduce Attack Agnostic Dataset - a combination of two audio DeepFakes and one anti-spoofing datasets that, thanks to the disjoint use of attacks, can lead to better generalization of detection methods. We present a thorough analysis of current DeepFake detection methods and consider different audio features (front-ends). In addition, we propose a model based on LCNN with LFCC and mel-spectrogram front-end, which not only is characterized by a good generalization and stability results but also shows improvement over LFCC-based mode - we decrease standard deviation on all folds and EER in two folds by up to 5%.
abstract_zh: 音频 DeepFakes 允许创建高质量、令人信服的话语，因此由于其潜在的应用（例如假冒或假新闻）而构成威胁。检测这些操纵的方法应具有良好的泛化性和稳定性，从而能够抵御使用未明确包含在训练中的技术进行的攻击。在这项工作中，我们引入了与攻击无关的数据集——两个音频 DeepFakes 和一个反欺骗数据集的组合，由于攻击的不相交使用，可以更好地泛化检测方法。我们对当前的 DeepFake 检测方法进行了全面分析，并考虑了不同的音频特征（前端）。此外，我们提出了一种基于具有 LFCC 和梅尔谱图前端的 LCNN 模型，该模型不仅具有良好的泛化性和稳定性结果，而且比基于 LFCC 的模型有所改进 - 我们将所有折叠的标准偏差和两倍的 EER 降低了多达 5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'Attack Agnostic Dataset'的数据集，旨在通过结合不同攻击方式的音频DeepFake和反欺骗数据，提升音频深度伪造检测方法的泛化性和稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有检测方法在面对训练中未包含的新型攻击时表现不稳定，需通过多样化数据增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 整合两个音频DeepFake数据集和一个反欺骗数据集，设计基于LCNN的模型，采用LFCC和mel-spectrogram双前端特征提取方案。
AI.result: 新模型在所有数据折叠中降低标准差，两个折叠的EER指标最高减少5%，泛化性和稳定性显著优于纯LFCC模型。
AI.conclusion: Attack Agnostic Dataset及所提模型有效提升了音频深度伪造检测的跨攻击类型适应能力，为鲁棒检测提供新方向。

authors_text: Taco Cohen
title: Towards a Grounded Theory of Causation for Embodied AI
title_zh: 走向具身人工智能的扎根因果理论
comment: ef:Causal Representation Learning workshop at the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI CRL 2022)
comments: ef:Causal Representation Learning workshop at the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI CRL 2022)
abstract: There exist well-developed frameworks for causal modelling, but these require rather a lot of human domain expertise to define causal variables and perform interventions. In order to enable autonomous agents to learn abstract causal models through interactive experience, the existing theoretical foundations need to be extended and clarified. Existing frameworks give no guidance regarding variable choice / representation, and more importantly, give no indication as to which behaviour policies or physical transformations of state space shall count as interventions. The framework sketched in this paper describes actions as transformations of state space, for instance induced by an agent running a policy. This makes it possible to describe in a uniform way both transformations of the micro-state space and abstract models thereof, and say when the latter is veridical / grounded / natural. We then introduce (causal) variables, define a mechanism as an invariant predictor, and say when an action can be viewed as a ``surgical intervention'', thus bringing the objective of causal representation \& intervention skill learning into clearer focus.
summary: There exist well-developed frameworks for causal modelling, but these require rather a lot of human domain expertise to define causal variables and perform interventions. In order to enable autonomous agents to learn abstract causal models through interactive experience, the existing theoretical foundations need to be extended and clarified. Existing frameworks give no guidance regarding variable choice / representation, and more importantly, give no indication as to which behaviour policies or physical transformations of state space shall count as interventions. The framework sketched in this paper describes actions as transformations of state space, for instance induced by an agent running a policy. This makes it possible to describe in a uniform way both transformations of the micro-state space and abstract models thereof, and say when the latter is veridical / grounded / natural. We then introduce (causal) variables, define a mechanism as an invariant predictor, and say when an action can be viewed as a ``surgical intervention'', thus bringing the objective of causal representation \& intervention skill learning into clearer focus.
abstract_zh: 存在完善的因果建模框架，但这些框架需要大量的人类领域专业知识来定义因果变量并执行干预措施。为了使自主主体能够通过交互体验学习抽象因果模型，现有的理论基础需要扩展和澄清。现有框架没有提供有关变量选择/表示的指导，更重要的是，没有表明哪些行为政策或状态空间的物理转换应算作干预措施。本文概述的框架将动作描述为状态空间的转换，例如由运行策略的代理引起的。这使得能够以统一的方式描述微观状态空间的变换及其抽象模型，并说明后者何时是真实的/扎根的/自然的。然后，我们引入（因果）变量，将机制定义为不变的预测变量，并说明何时可以将行动视为“外科手术干预”，从而使因果表示和干预技能学习的目标更加清晰。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为具身人工智能构建一个关于因果关系的扎根理论框架，使自主代理能够通过交互经验学习抽象因果模型。
AI.motivation: 现有因果建模框架需要大量人类领域专业知识来定义因果变量和执行干预，缺乏对变量选择及干预行为政策的指导。
AI.method: 将动作描述为状态空间的转换（如代理执行策略引发的转换），统一描述微观状态空间及其抽象模型，并定义机制为不变预测器以判定干预行为。
AI.result: 提出了一种框架，明确因果表示与干预技能学习的目标，区分了微状态空间转换与抽象模型的真理性/扎根性条件。
AI.conclusion: 该理论框架为具身AI通过交互经验自主学习因果模型提供了理论基础和方法指导。

This makes it possible to describe in a uniform way both transformations of the micro-state space and abstract models thereof, and say when the latter is veridical / grounded / natural. We then introduce (causal) variables, define a mechanism as an invariant predictor, and say when an action can be viewed as a ``surgical intervention'', thus bringing the objective of causal representation \& intervention skill learning into clearer focus. 存在完善的因果建模框架，但这些框架需要大量的人类领域专业知识来定义因果变量并执行干预措施。为了使自主主体能够通过交互体验学习抽象因果模型，现有的理论基础需要扩展和澄清。现有框架没有提供有关变量选择/表示的指导，更重要的是，没有表明哪些行为政策或状态空间的物理转换应算作干预措施。本文概述的框架将动作描述为状态空间的转换，例如由运行策略的代理引起的。这使得能够以统一的方式描述微观状态空间的变换及其抽象模型，并说明后者何时是真实的/扎根的/自然的。然后，我们引入（因果）变量，将机制定义为不变的预测变量，并说明何时可以将行动视为“外科手术干预”，从而使因果表示和干预技能学习的目标更加清晰。 本文旨在为具身人工智能构建一个关于因果关系的扎根理论框架，使自主代理能够通过交互经验学习抽象因果模型。 Taco Cohen cs.AI,cs.LG,stat.ML

authors_text: Nikita Turko,Alexander Lobashev,Konstantin Ushakov,Maxim Kaurkin,Rashit Ibrayev
title: Information Entropy Initialized Concrete Autoencoder for Optimal Sensor Placement and Reconstruction of Geophysical Fields
title_zh: 用于最佳传感器放置和地球物理场重建的信息熵初始化具体自动编码器
abstract: We propose a new approach to the optimal placement of sensors for the problem of reconstructing geophysical fields from sparse measurements. Our method consists of two stages. In the first stage, we estimate the variability of the physical field as a function of spatial coordinates by approximating its information entropy through the Conditional PixelCNN network. To calculate the entropy, a new ordering of a two-dimensional data array (spiral ordering) is proposed, which makes it possible to obtain the entropy of a physical field simultaneously for several spatial scales. In the second stage, the entropy of the physical field is used to initialize the distribution of optimal sensor locations. This distribution is further optimized with the Concrete Autoencoder architecture with the straight-through gradient estimator and adversarial loss to simultaneously minimize the number of sensors and maximize reconstruction accuracy. Our method scales linearly with data size, unlike commonly used Principal Component Analysis. We demonstrate our method on the two examples: (a) temperature and (b) salinity fields around the Barents Sea and the Svalbard group of islands. For these examples, we compute the reconstruction error of our method and a few baselines. We test our approach against two baselines (1) PCA with QR factorization and (2) climatology. We find out that the obtained optimal sensor locations have clear physical interpretation and correspond to the boundaries between sea currents.
summary: We propose a new approach to the optimal placement of sensors for the problem of reconstructing geophysical fields from sparse measurements. Our method consists of two stages. In the first stage, we estimate the variability of the physical field as a function of spatial coordinates by approximating its information entropy through the Conditional PixelCNN network. To calculate the entropy, a new ordering of a two-dimensional data array (spiral ordering) is proposed, which makes it possible to obtain the entropy of a physical field simultaneously for several spatial scales. In the second stage, the entropy of the physical field is used to initialize the distribution of optimal sensor locations. This distribution is further optimized with the Concrete Autoencoder architecture with the straight-through gradient estimator and adversarial loss to simultaneously minimize the number of sensors and maximize reconstruction accuracy. Our method scales linearly with data size, unlike commonly used Principal Component Analysis. We demonstrate our method on the two examples: (a) temperature and (b) salinity fields around the Barents Sea and the Svalbard group of islands. For these examples, we compute the reconstruction error of our method and a few baselines. We test our approach against two baselines (1) PCA with QR factorization and (2) climatology. We find out that the obtained optimal sensor locations have clear physical interpretation and correspond to the boundaries between sea currents.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的传感器最佳放置方法，以解决从稀疏测量中重建地球物理场的问题。我们的方法由两个阶段组成。在第一阶段，我们通过条件 PixelCNN 网络近似其信息熵，估计物理场随空间坐标变化的变化。为了计算熵，提出了一种新的二维数据数组排序（螺旋排序），这使得同时获得多个空间尺度的物理场的熵成为可能。在第二阶段，使用物理场的熵来初始化最佳传感器位置的分布。该分布通过具有直通梯度估计器和对抗性损失的具体自动编码器架构进一步优化，以同时最小化传感器数量并最大化重建精度。与常用的主成分分析不同，我们的方法随数据大小线性扩展。我们在两个例子中展示了我们的方法：巴伦支海和斯瓦尔巴群岛周围的（a）温度场和（b）盐度场。对于这些示例，我们计算我们的方法和一些基线的重建误差。我们根据两个基线（1）带有 QR 分解的 PCA 和（2）气候学来测试我们的方法。我们发现所获得的最佳传感器位置具有清晰的物理解释并且对应于海流之间的边界。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于信息熵初始化的Concrete自编码器方法，用于优化地球物理场的传感器布置和重建。
AI.motivation: 传统传感器布置方法在稀疏测量下的重建精度和传感器数量优化存在不足，且未充分利用物理场的空间尺度信息。
AI.method: 分两阶段：1）通过条件PixelCNN网络和螺旋排序计算物理场多尺度信息熵；2）以熵值初始化传感器分布，并用Concrete自编码器结合对抗损失优化分布。
AI.result: 在巴伦茨海及斯瓦尔巴群岛的温度与盐度场案例中，该方法较PCA和气候学基线显著降低重建误差，且传感器位置对应海流边界等物理特征。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现线性计算复杂度，可有效平衡传感器数量与重建精度，且生成的传感器布局具有明确的物理可解释性。

authors_text: Martin Schuck,Jan Brüdigam,Alexandre Capone,Stefan Sosnowski,Sandra Hirche
title: Dext-Gen: Dexterous Grasping in Sparse Reward Environments with Full Orientation Control
title_zh: Dext-Gen：稀疏奖励环境中的灵巧抓取，具有完全方向控制
abstract: Reinforcement learning is a promising method for robotic grasping as it can learn effective reaching and grasping policies in difficult scenarios. However, achieving human-like manipulation capabilities with sophisticated robotic hands is challenging because of the problem's high dimensionality. Although remedies such as reward shaping or expert demonstrations can be employed to overcome this issue, they often lead to oversimplified and biased policies. We present Dext-Gen, a reinforcement learning framework for Dexterous Grasping in sparse reward ENvironments that is applicable to a variety of grippers and learns unbiased and intricate policies. Full orientation control of the gripper and object is achieved through smooth orientation representation. Our approach has reasonable training durations and provides the option to include desired prior knowledge. The effectiveness and adaptability of the framework to different scenarios is demonstrated in simulated experiments.
summary: Reinforcement learning is a promising method for robotic grasping as it can learn effective reaching and grasping policies in difficult scenarios. However, achieving human-like manipulation capabilities with sophisticated robotic hands is challenging because of the problem's high dimensionality. Although remedies such as reward shaping or expert demonstrations can be employed to overcome this issue, they often lead to oversimplified and biased policies. We present Dext-Gen, a reinforcement learning framework for Dexterous Grasping in sparse reward ENvironments that is applicable to a variety of grippers and learns unbiased and intricate policies. Full orientation control of the gripper and object is achieved through smooth orientation representation. Our approach has reasonable training durations and provides the option to include desired prior knowledge. The effectiveness and adaptability of the framework to different scenarios is demonstrated in simulated experiments.
abstract_zh: 强化学习是一种很有前途的机器人抓取方法，因为它可以在困难的场景中学习有效的到达和抓取策略。然而，由于问题的维度很高，用复杂的机器人手实现类似人类的操纵能力具有挑战性。尽管可以采用奖励塑造或专家演示等补救措施来克服这个问题，但它们往往会导致政策过于简单化和有偏见。我们提出了 Dext-Gen，这是一种在稀疏奖励环境中进行灵巧抓取的强化学习框架，适用于各种抓取器并学习无偏见和复杂的策略。夹具和物体的完全方向控制是通过平滑的方向表示来实现的。我们的方法具有合理的培训持续时间，并提供包含所需先验知识的选项。通过模拟实验证明了该框架的有效性和对不同场景的适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Dext-Gen强化学习框架，解决稀疏奖励环境下机械手灵巧抓取问题，支持多种夹具并实现完整方向控制。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在高维操控任务中易产生策略简化和偏差，需更通用的解决方案实现复杂抓取。
AI.method: 通过平滑方向表示实现夹具与物体全方向控制，结合强化学习框架适配多种夹具并融入先验知识。
AI.result: 模拟实验验证框架在不同场景下的有效性与适应性，证明其学习复杂策略的能力。
AI.conclusion: Dext-Gen为稀疏奖励环境下的灵巧抓取提供灵活框架，可推广至多种机械手与任务场景。

authors_text: Chao Fan,Saihui Hou,Jilong Wang,Yongzhen Huang,Shiqi Yu
title: Learning Gait Representation from Massive Unlabelled Walking Videos: A Benchmark
title_zh: 从大量未标记的步行视频中学习步态表示：一个基准
abstract: Gait depicts individuals' unique and distinguishing walking patterns and has become one of the most promising biometric features for human identification. As a fine-grained recognition task, gait recognition is easily affected by many factors and usually requires a large amount of completely annotated data that is costly and insatiable. This paper proposes a large-scale self-supervised benchmark for gait recognition with contrastive learning, aiming to learn the general gait representation from massive unlabelled walking videos for practical applications via offering informative walking priors and diverse real-world variations. Specifically, we collect a large-scale unlabelled gait dataset GaitLU-1M consisting of 1.02M walking sequences and propose a conceptually simple yet empirically powerful baseline model GaitSSB. Experimentally, we evaluate the pre-trained model on four widely-used gait benchmarks, CASIA-B, OU-MVLP, GREW and Gait3D with or without transfer learning. The unsupervised results are comparable to or even better than the early model-based and GEI-based methods. After transfer learning, our method outperforms existing methods by a large margin in most cases. Theoretically, we discuss the critical issues for gait-specific contrastive framework and present some insights for further study. As far as we know, GaitLU-1M is the first large-scale unlabelled gait dataset, and GaitSSB is the first method that achieves remarkable unsupervised results on the aforementioned benchmarks. The source code of GaitSSB will be integrated into OpenGait which is available at https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait.
summary: Gait depicts individuals' unique and distinguishing walking patterns and has become one of the most promising biometric features for human identification. As a fine-grained recognition task, gait recognition is easily affected by many factors and usually requires a large amount of completely annotated data that is costly and insatiable. This paper proposes a large-scale self-supervised benchmark for gait recognition with contrastive learning, aiming to learn the general gait representation from massive unlabelled walking videos for practical applications via offering informative walking priors and diverse real-world variations. Specifically, we collect a large-scale unlabelled gait dataset GaitLU-1M consisting of 1.02M walking sequences and propose a conceptually simple yet empirically powerful baseline model GaitSSB. Experimentally, we evaluate the pre-trained model on four widely-used gait benchmarks, CASIA-B, OU-MVLP, GREW and Gait3D with or without transfer learning. The unsupervised results are comparable to or even better than the early model-based and GEI-based methods. After transfer learning, our method outperforms existing methods by a large margin in most cases. Theoretically, we discuss the critical issues for gait-specific contrastive framework and present some insights for further study. As far as we know, GaitLU-1M is the first large-scale unlabelled gait dataset, and GaitSSB is the first method that achieves remarkable unsupervised results on the aforementioned benchmarks. The source code of GaitSSB will be integrated into OpenGait which is available at https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait.
abstract_zh: 步态描绘了个体独特且独特的行走模式，已成为人类身份识别中最有前途的生物识别特征之一。步态识别作为一项细粒度的识别任务，容易受到多种因素的影响，通常需要大量完全注释的数据，成本高昂且无法满足。本文提出了一种通过对比学习进行步态识别的大规模自监督基准，旨在通过提供信息丰富的步行先验和多样化的现实世界变化，从大量未标记的步行视频中学习一般步态表示，用于实际应用。具体来说，我们收集了一个由 1.02M 步行序列组成的大规模未标记步态数据集 GaitLU-1M，并提出了一个概念上简单但经验上强大的基线模型 GaitSSB。实验上，我们在四种广泛使用的步态基准（CASIA-B、OU-MVLP、GREW 和 Gait3D）上评估了带有或不带有迁移学习的预训练模型。无监督结果与早期基于模型和基于 GEI 的方法相当甚至更好。经过迁移学习后，我们的方法在大多数情况下都大大优于现有方法。从理论上讲，我们讨论了特定步态对比框架的关键问题，并提出了一些供进一步研究的见解。据我们所知，GaitLU-1M是第一个大规模无标记步态数据集，GaitSSB是第一个在上述基准上取得显着无监督结果的方法。 GaitSSB的源代码将集成到OpenGait中，可在https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模自监督学习基准GaitLU-1M和基线模型GaitSSB，从未标记的行走视频中学习通用步态表示，推动无监督步态识别研究。
AI.motivation: 步态识别受环境因素影响大且依赖昂贵的标注数据，现有方法在真实场景中表现受限，亟需利用未标记数据的自监督学习方案。
AI.method: 构建包含102万行走序列的GaitLU-1M数据集，设计基于对比学习的GaitSSB模型，通过预训练和迁移学习实现无监督步态表征学习。
AI.result: 无监督结果优于传统模型方法，在迁移学习后于CASIA-B等四个基准数据集上显著超越现有方法，GaitLU-1M是首个大规模未标记步态数据集。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在无监督步态识别中取得突破，为实际应用提供新范式，开源代码推动领域发展。
