search_text: Learning Gait Representation from Massive Unlabelled Walking Videos: A Benchmark 从大量未标记的步行视频中学习步态表示：一个基准 Gait depicts individuals' unique and distinguishing walking patterns and has become one of the most promising biometric features for human identification. As a fine-grained recognition task, gait recognition is easily affected by many factors and usually requires a large amount of completely annotated data that is costly and insatiable. This paper proposes a large-scale self-supervised benchmark for gait recognition with contrastive learning, aiming to learn the general gait representation from massive unlabelled walking videos for practical applications via offering informative walking priors and diverse real-world variations. Specifically, we collect a large-scale unlabelled gait dataset GaitLU-1M consisting of 1.02M walking sequences and propose a conceptually simple yet empirically powerful baseline model GaitSSB. Experimentally, we evaluate the pre-trained model on four widely-used gait benchmarks, CASIA-B, OU-MVLP, GREW and Gait3D with or without transfer learning. The unsupervised results are comparable to or even better than the early model-based and GEI-based methods. After transfer learning, our method outperforms existing methods by a large margin in most cases. Theoretically, we discuss the critical issues for gait-specific contrastive framework and present some insights for further study. As far as we know, GaitLU-1M is the first large-scale unlabelled gait dataset, and GaitSSB is the first method that achieves remarkable unsupervised results on the aforementioned benchmarks. The source code of GaitSSB will be integrated into OpenGait which is available at https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait. 步态描绘了个体独特且独特的行走模式，已成为人类身份识别中最有前途的生物识别特征之一。步态识别作为一项细粒度的识别任务，容易受到多种因素的影响，通常需要大量完全注释的数据，成本高昂且无法满足。本文提出了一种通过对比学习进行步态识别的大规模自监督基准，旨在通过提供信息丰富的步行先验和多样化的现实世界变化，从大量未标记的步行视频中学习一般步态表示，用于实际应用。具体来说，我们收集了一个由 1.02M 步行序列组成的大规模未标记步态数据集 GaitLU-1M，并提出了一个概念上简单但经验上强大的基线模型 GaitSSB。实验上，我们在四种广泛使用的步态基准（CASIA-B、OU-MVLP、GREW 和 Gait3D）上评估了带有或不带有迁移学习的预训练模型。无监督结果与早期基于模型和基于 GEI 的方法相当甚至更好。经过迁移学习后，我们的方法在大多数情况下都大大优于现有方法。从理论上讲，我们讨论了特定步态对比框架的关键问题，并提出了一些供进一步研究的见解。据我们所知，GaitLU-1M是第一个大规模无标记步态数据集，GaitSSB是第一个在上述基准上取得显着无监督结果的方法。 GaitSSB的源代码将集成到OpenGait中，可在https://github.com/ShiqiYu/OpenGait中获取。 本文提出一个大规模自监督学习基准GaitLU-1M和基线模型GaitSSB，从未标记的行走视频中学习通用步态表示，推动无监督步态识别研究。 Chao Fan,Saihui Hou,Jilong Wang,Yongzhen Huang,Shiqi Yu cs.CV

authors_text: Lei Wang,Min Dai,Jianan He,Jingwei Huang,Mingwei Sun
title: Primitive Graph Learning for Unified Vector Mapping
title_zh: 统一向量映射的原始图学习
abstract: Large-scale vector mapping is important for transportation, city planning, and survey and census. We propose GraphMapper, a unified framework for end-to-end vector map extraction from satellite images. Our key idea is a novel unified representation of shapes of different topologies named "primitive graph", which is a set of shape primitives and their pairwise relationship matrix. Then, we convert vector shape prediction, regularization, and topology reconstruction into a unique primitive graph learning problem. Specifically, GraphMapper is a generic primitive graph learning network based on global shape context modelling through multi-head-attention. An embedding space sorting method is developed for accurate primitive relationship modelling. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of GraphMapper on two challenging mapping tasks, building footprint regularization and road network topology reconstruction. Our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both tasks on public benchmarks. All code will be publicly available.
summary: Large-scale vector mapping is important for transportation, city planning, and survey and census. We propose GraphMapper, a unified framework for end-to-end vector map extraction from satellite images. Our key idea is a novel unified representation of shapes of different topologies named "primitive graph", which is a set of shape primitives and their pairwise relationship matrix. Then, we convert vector shape prediction, regularization, and topology reconstruction into a unique primitive graph learning problem. Specifically, GraphMapper is a generic primitive graph learning network based on global shape context modelling through multi-head-attention. An embedding space sorting method is developed for accurate primitive relationship modelling. We empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of GraphMapper on two challenging mapping tasks, building footprint regularization and road network topology reconstruction. Our model outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both tasks on public benchmarks. All code will be publicly available.
abstract_zh: 大规模矢量测绘对于交通、城市规划以及调查和人口普查非常重要。我们提出了 GraphMapper，一个从卫星图像中提取端到端矢量图的统一框架。我们的关键思想是一种新颖的统一表示不同拓扑形状的方法，称为“基元图”，它是一组形状基元及其成对关系矩阵。然后，我们将向量形状预测、正则化和拓扑重建转换为独特的原始图学习问题。具体来说，GraphMapper 是一种通用的原始图学习网络，基于多头注意力的全局形状上下文建模。开发了一种嵌入空间排序方法，用于准确的原始关系建模。我们凭经验证明了 GraphMapper 在两个具有挑战性的测绘任务（建筑足迹正则化和道路网络拓扑重建）上的有效性。我们的模型在公共基准测试的两项任务中都优于最先进的方法。所有代码都将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraphMapper框架，通过统一的原始图表示方法，实现从卫星图像中端到端提取向量地图。
AI.motivation: 大规模向量地图在交通、城市规划等领域至关重要，但现有方法难以统一处理不同拓扑结构的地图元素，需提出通用解决方案。
AI.method: 设计原始图表示（包含形状基元及关系矩阵），基于多头注意力机制建模全局形状上下文，并开发嵌入空间排序方法建模基元关系，构建通用学习网络。
AI.result: 在建筑轮廓正则化和道路网络拓扑重建任务中，模型在公开基准测试中均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: GraphMapper通过原始图学习统一处理多任务，验证了方法有效性，未来可扩展至更多地图要素及应用场景。

authors_text: Yanjiang Yu,Puyang Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Wenhan Luo,Changsheng Li,Ye Yuan,Guoren Wang
title: Multi-Prior Learning via Neural Architecture Search for Blind Face Restoration
title_zh: 通过神经架构搜索进行多先验学习以实现盲人面部恢复
comment: We found some problems with the article and need to withdrawal it
comments: We found some problems with the article and need to withdrawal it
abstract: Blind Face Restoration (BFR) aims to recover high-quality face images from low-quality ones and usually resorts to facial priors for improving restoration performance. However, current methods still suffer from two major difficulties: 1) how to derive a powerful network architecture without extensive hand tuning; 2) how to capture complementary information from multiple facial priors in one network to improve restoration performance. To this end, we propose a Face Restoration Searching Network (FRSNet) to adaptively search the suitable feature extraction architecture within our specified search space, which can directly contribute to the restoration quality. On the basis of FRSNet, we further design our Multiple Facial Prior Searching Network (MFPSNet) with a multi-prior learning scheme. MFPSNet optimally extracts information from diverse facial priors and fuses the information into image features, ensuring that both external guidance and internal features are reserved. In this way, MFPSNet takes full advantage of semantic-level (parsing maps), geometric-level (facial heatmaps), reference-level (facial dictionaries) and pixel-level (degraded images) information and thus generates faithful and realistic images. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that MFPSNet performs favorably on both synthetic and real-world datasets against the state-of-the-art BFR methods. The codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/YYJ1anG/MFPSNet.
summary: Blind Face Restoration (BFR) aims to recover high-quality face images from low-quality ones and usually resorts to facial priors for improving restoration performance. However, current methods still suffer from two major difficulties: 1) how to derive a powerful network architecture without extensive hand tuning; 2) how to capture complementary information from multiple facial priors in one network to improve restoration performance. To this end, we propose a Face Restoration Searching Network (FRSNet) to adaptively search the suitable feature extraction architecture within our specified search space, which can directly contribute to the restoration quality. On the basis of FRSNet, we further design our Multiple Facial Prior Searching Network (MFPSNet) with a multi-prior learning scheme. MFPSNet optimally extracts information from diverse facial priors and fuses the information into image features, ensuring that both external guidance and internal features are reserved. In this way, MFPSNet takes full advantage of semantic-level (parsing maps), geometric-level (facial heatmaps), reference-level (facial dictionaries) and pixel-level (degraded images) information and thus generates faithful and realistic images. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that MFPSNet performs favorably on both synthetic and real-world datasets against the state-of-the-art BFR methods. The codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/YYJ1anG/MFPSNet.
abstract_zh: 盲人脸恢复（BFR）旨在从低质量的人脸图像中恢复高质量的人脸图像，通常采用面部先验来提高恢复性能。然而，当前的方法仍然面临两个主要困难：1）如何在不进行大量手动调整的情况下导出强大的网络架构； 2）如何从一个网络中的多个面部先验中捕获互补信息以提高恢复性能。为此，我们提出了一种人脸恢复搜索网络（FRSNet），可以在指定的搜索空间内自适应地搜索合适的特征提取架构，这可以直接提高恢复质量。在 FRSNet 的基础上，我们进一步设计了具有多先验学习方案的多面部先验搜索网络（MFPSNet）。 MFPSNet 从不同的面部先验中最优地提取信息，并将这些信息融合到图像特征中，确保外部指导和内部特征都得到保留。通过这种方式，MFPSNet 充分利用语义级（解析图）、几何级（面部热图）、参考级（面部词典）和像素级（退化图像）信息，从而生成忠实且真实的图像。定量和定性实验表明，与最先进的 BFR 方法相比，MFPSNet 在合成数据集和真实数据集上的表现都非常出色。这些代码可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/YYJ1anG/MFPSNet。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于神经架构搜索的多先验学习方法，用于盲脸修复任务，旨在从低质量人脸图像中恢复高质量图像。
AI.motivation: 现有盲脸修复方法在自动设计强大网络架构和有效融合多个人脸先验信息方面存在不足，导致修复效果受限。
AI.method: 提出Face Restoration Searching Network (FRSNet)进行网络架构搜索，并设计Multiple Facial Prior Searching Network (MFPSNet)通过多先验学习方案融合语义、几何、参考和像素级信息。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上均优于现有最先进的盲脸修复方法，生成更真实且保真度高的修复图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合神经架构搜索与多先验融合策略，有效提升了盲脸修复的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Multi-Prior Learning via Neural Architecture Search for Blind Face Restoration 通过神经架构搜索进行多先验学习以实现盲人面部恢复 Blind Face Restoration (BFR) aims to recover high-quality face images from low-quality ones and usually resorts to facial priors for improving restoration performance. However, current methods still suffer from two major difficulties: 1) how to derive a powerful network architecture without extensive hand tuning; 2) how to capture complementary information from multiple facial priors in one network to improve restoration performance. To this end, we propose a Face Restoration Searching Network (FRSNet) to adaptively search the suitable feature extraction architecture within our specified search space, which can directly contribute to the restoration quality. On the basis of FRSNet, we further design our Multiple Facial Prior Searching Network (MFPSNet) with a multi-prior learning scheme. MFPSNet optimally extracts information from diverse facial priors and fuses the information into image features, ensuring that both external guidance and internal features are reserved. In this way, MFPSNet takes full advantage of semantic-level (parsing maps), geometric-level (facial heatmaps), reference-level (facial dictionaries) and pixel-level (degraded images) information and thus generates faithful and realistic images. Quantitative and qualitative experiments show that MFPSNet performs favorably on both synthetic and real-world datasets against the state-of-the-art BFR methods. The codes are publicly available at: https://github.com/YYJ1anG/MFPSNet. 盲人脸恢复（BFR）旨在从低质量的人脸图像中恢复高质量的人脸图像，通常采用面部先验来提高恢复性能。然而，当前的方法仍然面临两个主要困难：1）如何在不进行大量手动调整的情况下导出强大的网络架构； 2）如何从一个网络中的多个面部先验中捕获互补信息以提高恢复性能。为此，我们提出了一种人脸恢复搜索网络（FRSNet），可以在指定的搜索空间内自适应地搜索合适的特征提取架构，这可以直接提高恢复质量。在 FRSNet 的基础上，我们进一步设计了具有多先验学习方案的多面部先验搜索网络（MFPSNet）。 MFPSNet 从不同的面部先验中最优地提取信息，并将这些信息融合到图像特征中，确保外部指导和内部特征都得到保留。通过这种方式，MFPSNet 充分利用语义级（解析图）、几何级（面部热图）、参考级（面部词典）和像素级（退化图像）信息，从而生成忠实且真实的图像。定量和定性实验表明，与最先进的 BFR 方法相比，MFPSNet 在合成数据集和真实数据集上的表现都非常出色。这些代码可在以下网址公开获取：https://github.com/YYJ1anG/MFPSNet。 该论文提出了一种基于神经架构搜索的多先验学习方法，用于盲脸修复任务，旨在从低质量人脸图像中恢复高质量图像。 Yanjiang Yu,Puyang Zhang,Kaihao Zhang,Wenhan Luo,Changsheng Li,Ye Yuan,Guoren Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Srivas Chennu,Andrew Maher,Jamie Martin,Subash Prabanantham
title: Dynamic Memory for Interpretable Sequential Optimisation
title_zh: 用于可解释的顺序优化的动态内存
comment: 2nd International Workshop on Online and Adaptive Recommender Systems, 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining, 2022, Washington DC
comments: 2nd International Workshop on Online and Adaptive Recommender Systems, 28th ACM SIGKDD Conference on Knowledge Discovery and Data Mining, 2022, Washington DC
abstract: Real-world applications of reinforcement learning for recommendation and experimentation faces a practical challenge: the relative reward of different bandit arms can evolve over the lifetime of the learning agent. To deal with these non-stationary cases, the agent must forget some historical knowledge, as it may no longer be relevant to minimise regret. We present a solution to handling non-stationarity that is suitable for deployment at scale, to provide business operators with automated adaptive optimisation. Our solution aims to provide interpretable learning that can be trusted by humans, whilst responding to non-stationarity to minimise regret. To this end, we develop an adaptive Bayesian learning agent that employs a novel form of dynamic memory. It enables interpretability through statistical hypothesis testing, by targeting a set point of statistical power when comparing rewards and adjusting its memory dynamically to achieve this power. By design, the agent is agnostic to different kinds of non-stationarity. Using numerical simulations, we compare its performance against an existing proposal and show that, under multiple non-stationary scenarios, our agent correctly adapts to real changes in the true rewards. In all bandit solutions, there is an explicit trade-off between learning and achieving maximal performance. Our solution sits on a different point on this trade-off when compared to another similarly robust approach: we prioritise interpretability, which relies on more learning, at the cost of some regret. We describe the architecture of a large-scale deployment of automatic optimisation-as-a-service where our agent achieves interpretability whilst adapting to changing circumstances.

To deal with these non-stationary cases, the agent must forget some historical knowledge, as it may no longer be relevant to minimise regret. We present a solution to handling non-stationarity that is suitable for deployment at scale, to provide business operators with automated adaptive optimisation. Our solution aims to provide interpretable learning that can be trusted by humans, whilst responding to non-stationarity to minimise regret. To this end, we develop an adaptive Bayesian learning agent that employs a novel form of dynamic memory. It enables interpretability through statistical hypothesis testing, by targeting a set point of statistical power when comparing rewards and adjusting its memory dynamically to achieve this power. By design, the agent is agnostic to different kinds of non-stationarity. Using numerical simulations, we compare its performance against an existing proposal and show that, under multiple non-stationary scenarios, our agent correctly adapts to real changes in the true rewards. In all bandit solutions, there is an explicit trade-off between learning and achieving maximal performance. Our solution sits on a different point on this trade-off when compared to another similarly robust approach: we prioritise interpretability, which relies on more learning, at the cost of some regret. We describe the architecture of a large-scale deployment of automatic optimisation-as-a-service where our agent achieves interpretability whilst adapting to changing circumstances.
abstract_zh: 强化学习在推荐和实验方面的实际应用面临着实际挑战：不同老虎机的相对奖励可能会在学习代理的整个生命周期中不断变化。为了处理这些非平稳情况，智能体必须忘记一些历史知识，因为它可能不再与最小化遗憾相关。我们提出了一种适合大规模部署的处理非平稳性的解决方案，为业务运营商提供自动自适应优化。我们的解决方案旨在提供人类可以信任的可解释学习，同时应对非平稳性以最大程度地减少遗憾。为此，我们开发了一种自适应贝叶斯学习代理，它采用了一种新颖的动态记忆形式。它通过统计假设检验实现可解释性，通过在比较奖励时瞄准统计功效的设定点并动态调整其记忆以实现这种功效。根据设计，代理对于不同类型的非平稳性是不可知的。通过数值模拟，我们将其性能与现有提案进行比较，并表明，在多种非平稳场景下，我们的代理可以正确适应真实奖励的实际变化。在所有强盗解决方案中，学习和实现最大性能之间都存在明确的权衡。与另一种类似的稳健方法相比，我们的解决方案在这种权衡上处于不同的位置：我们优先考虑可解释性，这依赖于更多的学习，但代价是一些遗憾。我们描述了大规模部署自动优化即服务的架构，其中我们的代理在适应不断变化的环境的同时实现了可解释性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种动态记忆机制，用于在非平稳环境中实现可解释的序列优化，以应对推荐系统和实验中的奖励变化问题。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在非平稳环境下难以适应奖励变化，导致决策偏差，需在可解释性与性能间找到平衡。
AI.method: 设计基于贝叶斯学习的智能体，通过动态记忆和统计假设检验调整记忆，以维持统计效力并适应环境变化。
AI.result: 仿真表明，该方法在多种非平稳场景下能正确适应真实奖励变化，但因侧重可解释性而牺牲部分最小化遗憾性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方案在可解释性与性能的权衡上不同于现有方法，适用于需要人类信任的自动化优化场景。

authors_text: Lucas Rizzo,Luca Longo
title: Comparing and extending the use of defeasible argumentation with quantitative data in real-world contexts
title_zh: 在现实世界中比较和扩展可废止论证与定量数据的使用
abstract: Dealing with uncertain, contradicting, and ambiguous information is still a central issue in Artificial Intelligence (AI). As a result, many formalisms have been proposed or adapted so as to consider non-monotonicity, with only a limited number of works and researchers performing any sort of comparison among them. A non-monotonic formalism is one that allows the retraction of previous conclusions or claims, from premises, in light of new evidence, offering some desirable flexibility when dealing with uncertainty. This research article focuses on evaluating the inferential capacity of defeasible argumentation, a formalism particularly envisioned for modelling non-monotonic reasoning. In addition to this, fuzzy reasoning and expert systems, extended for handling non-monotonicity of reasoning, are selected and employed as baselines, due to their vast and accepted use within the AI community. Computational trust was selected as the domain of application of such models. Trust is an ill-defined construct, hence, reasoning applied to the inference of trust can be seen as non-monotonic. Inference models were designed to assign trust scalars to editors of the Wikipedia project. In particular, argument-based models demonstrated more robustness than those built upon the baselines despite the knowledge bases or datasets employed. This study contributes to the body of knowledge through the exploitation of defeasible argumentation and its comparison to similar approaches. The practical use of such approaches coupled with a modular design that facilitates similar experiments was exemplified and their respective implementations made publicly available on GitHub [120, 121]. This work adds to previous works, empirically enhancing the generalisability of defeasible argumentation as a compelling approach to reason with quantitative data and uncertain knowledge.

abstract_zh: 处理不确定、矛盾和模糊的信息仍然是人工智能（AI）的核心问题。因此，许多形式主义被提出或采用，以考虑非单调性，只有有限数量的作品和研究人员在它们之间进行任何类型的比较。非单调形式主义是一种允许根据新证据从前提中撤回先前的结论或主张的形式主义，在处理不确定性时提供一些理想的灵活性。这篇研究文章的重点是评估可废止论证的推理能力，这是一种特别为非单调推理建模而设想的形式主义。除此之外，模糊推理和专家系统（扩展用于处理推理的非单调性）被选择并用作基线，因为它们在人工智能社区中得到了广泛和广泛的使用。计算信任被选择作为此类模型的应用领域。信任是一个定义不明确的构造，因此，应用于信任推论的推理可以被视为非单调的。推理模型旨在为维基百科项目的编辑分配信任标量。特别是，尽管使用了知识库或数据集，但基于论证的模型比基于基线构建的模型表现出更强的鲁棒性。这项研究通过利用可废止的论证及其与类似方法的比较，对知识体系做出了贡献。这些方法的实际使用与促进类似实验的模块化设计相结合，并在 GitHub 上公开了它们各自的实现[120, 121]。这项工作补充了之前的工作，从经验上增强了可废止论证的普遍性，作为利用定量数据和不确定知识进行推理的令人信服的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了可废止论证与其他非单调推理方法在处理不确定和矛盾信息时的推理能力，并在计算信任领域进行了实证研究。
AI.motivation: 人工智能中处理不确定、矛盾和模糊信息仍是核心问题，但非单调推理形式之间的比较研究较少，需探索更有效的推理方法。
AI.method: 选取可废止论证、模糊推理和专家系统作为基线方法，在维基百科编辑者信任推断任务中设计模型并进行对比实验。
AI.result: 基于论证的模型在不同知识库和数据集上表现出更强的鲁棒性，验证了可废止论证在处理定量数据和不确定知识中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 可废止论证是一种适用于不确定环境的有力推理框架，其模块化设计为类似研究提供了可复用的实践范式。

ai_content.tldr: 本文比较了可废止论证与其他非单调推理方法在处理不确定和矛盾信息时的推理能力，并在计算信任领域进行了实证研究。

search_text: Comparing and extending the use of defeasible argumentation with quantitative data in real-world contexts 在现实世界中比较和扩展可废止论证与定量数据的使用 Dealing with uncertain, contradicting, and ambiguous information is still a central issue in Artificial Intelligence (AI). As a result, many formalisms have been proposed or adapted so as to consider non-monotonicity, with only a limited number of works and researchers performing any sort of comparison among them. A non-monotonic formalism is one that allows the retraction of previous conclusions or claims, from premises, in light of new evidence, offering some desirable flexibility when dealing with uncertainty. This research article focuses on evaluating the inferential capacity of defeasible argumentation, a formalism particularly envisioned for modelling non-monotonic reasoning. In addition to this, fuzzy reasoning and expert systems, extended for handling non-monotonicity of reasoning, are selected and employed as baselines, due to their vast and accepted use within the AI community. Computational trust was selected as the domain of application of such models. Trust is an ill-defined construct, hence, reasoning applied to the inference of trust can be seen as non-monotonic. Inference models were designed to assign trust scalars to editors of the Wikipedia project. In particular, argument-based models demonstrated more robustness than those built upon the baselines despite the knowledge bases or datasets employed. This study contributes to the body of knowledge through the exploitation of defeasible argumentation and its comparison to similar approaches. The practical use of such approaches coupled with a modular design that facilitates similar experiments was exemplified and their respective implementations made publicly available on GitHub [120, 121]. This work adds to previous works, empirically enhancing the generalisability of defeasible argumentation as a compelling approach to reason with quantitative data and uncertain knowledge. 处理不确定、矛盾和模糊的信息仍然是人工智能（AI）的核心问题。因此，许多形式主义被提出或采用，以考虑非单调性，只有有限数量的作品和研究人员在它们之间进行任何类型的比较。非单调形式主义是一种允许根据新证据从前提中撤回先前的结论或主张的形式主义，在处理不确定性时提供一些理想的灵活性。这篇研究文章的重点是评估可废止论证的推理能力，这是一种特别为非单调推理建模而设想的形式主义。除此之外，模糊推理和专家系统（扩展用于处理推理的非单调性）被选择并用作基线，因为它们在人工智能社区中得到了广泛和广泛的使用。计算信任被选择作为此类模型的应用领域。信任是一个定义不明确的构造，因此，应用于信任推论的推理可以被视为非单调的。推理模型旨在为维基百科项目的编辑分配信任标量。特别是，尽管使用了知识库或数据集，但基于论证的模型比基于基线构建的模型表现出更强的鲁棒性。这项研究通过利用可废止的论证及其与类似方法的比较，对知识体系做出了贡献。这些方法的实际使用与促进类似实验的模块化设计相结合，并在 GitHub 上公开了它们各自的实现[120, 121]。这项工作补充了之前的工作，从经验上增强了可废止论证的普遍性，作为利用定量数据和不确定知识进行推理的令人信服的方法。 本文比较了可废止论证与其他非单调推理方法在处理不确定和矛盾信息时的推理能力，并在计算信任领域进行了实证研究。 Lucas Rizzo,Luca Longo cs.AI

authors_text: Takeshi Kojima,Yutaka Matsuo,Yusuke Iwasawa
title: Robustifying Vision Transformer without Retraining from Scratch by Test-Time Class-Conditional Feature Alignment
title_zh: 通过测试时类条件特征对齐增强视觉变压器，无需从头开始重新训练
comment: Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI2022. Code is available at https://github.com/kojima-takeshi188/CFA
comments: Accepted to IJCAI-ECAI2022. Code is available at https://github.com/kojima-takeshi188/CFA
abstract: Vision Transformer (ViT) is becoming more popular in image processing. Specifically, we investigate the effectiveness of test-time adaptation (TTA) on ViT, a technique that has emerged to correct its prediction during test-time by itself. First, we benchmark various test-time adaptation approaches on ViT-B16 and ViT-L16. It is shown that the TTA is effective on ViT and the prior-convention (sensibly selecting modulation parameters) is not necessary when using proper loss function. Based on the observation, we propose a new test-time adaptation method called class-conditional feature alignment (CFA), which minimizes both the class-conditional distribution differences and the whole distribution differences of the hidden representation between the source and target in an online manner. Experiments of image classification tasks on common corruption (CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, and ImageNet-C) and domain adaptation (digits datasets and ImageNet-Sketch) show that CFA stably outperforms the existing baselines on various datasets. We also verify that CFA is model agnostic by experimenting on ResNet, MLP-Mixer, and several ViT variants (ViT-AugReg, DeiT, and BeiT). Using BeiT backbone, CFA achieves 19.8% top-1 error rate on ImageNet-C, outperforming the existing test-time adaptation baseline 44.0%. This is a state-of-the-art result among TTA methods that do not need to alter training phase.
summary: Vision Transformer (ViT) is becoming more popular in image processing. Specifically, we investigate the effectiveness of test-time adaptation (TTA) on ViT, a technique that has emerged to correct its prediction during test-time by itself. First, we benchmark various test-time adaptation approaches on ViT-B16 and ViT-L16. It is shown that the TTA is effective on ViT and the prior-convention (sensibly selecting modulation parameters) is not necessary when using proper loss function. Based on the observation, we propose a new test-time adaptation method called class-conditional feature alignment (CFA), which minimizes both the class-conditional distribution differences and the whole distribution differences of the hidden representation between the source and target in an online manner. Experiments of image classification tasks on common corruption (CIFAR-10-C, CIFAR-100-C, and ImageNet-C) and domain adaptation (digits datasets and ImageNet-Sketch) show that CFA stably outperforms the existing baselines on various datasets. We also verify that CFA is model agnostic by experimenting on ResNet, MLP-Mixer, and several ViT variants (ViT-AugReg, DeiT, and BeiT). Using BeiT backbone, CFA achieves 19.8% top-1 error rate on ImageNet-C, outperforming the existing test-time adaptation baseline 44.0%. This is a state-of-the-art result among TTA methods that do not need to alter training phase.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformer (ViT) 在图像处理中变得越来越流行。具体来说，我们研究了 ViT 上测试时间适应 (TTA) 的有效性，这是一种在测试期间自行纠正其预测的技术。首先，我们在 ViT-B16 和 ViT-L16 上对各种测试时间适应方法进行基准测试。结果表明，TTA 对 ViT 有效，并且在使用适当的损失函数时不需要先验约定（明智地选择调制参数）。基于观察，我们提出了一种新的测试时适应方法，称为类条件特征对齐（CFA），该方法以在线方式最小化源和目标之间隐藏表示的类条件分布差异和整体分布差异。对常见损坏（CIFAR-10-C、CIFAR-100-C 和 ImageNet-C）和域适应（数字数据集和 ImageNet-Sketch）的图像分类任务的实验表明，CFA 在各种数据集上稳定优于现有基线。我们还通过在 ResNet、MLP-Mixer 和几个 ViT 变体（ViT-AugReg、DeiT 和 BeiT）上进行实验来验证 CFA 与模型无关。使用 BeiT 主干网，CFA 在 ImageNet-C 上实现了 19.8% 的 top-1 错误率，优于现有测试时间适应基线 44.0%。这是不需要改变训练阶段的 TTA 方法中最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需从头训练的测试时适应方法CFA，通过特征对齐提升视觉Transformer在不同域和损坏数据下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时适应方法在ViT上效果有限且依赖先验调参，而合适的损失函数可消除此类需求，需探索更高效的域适应策略。
AI.method: 提出类条件特征对齐（CFA）方法，在线最小化源域与目标域隐藏表示的类条件分布差异和整体分布差异。
AI.result: CFA在CIFAR-10-C、ImageNet-C等数据集上稳定优于现有基线，使用BeiT主干时ImageNet-C的top-1错误率为19.8%，超越先前方法44.0%。
AI.conclusion: CFA是一种模型无关的测试时适应方法，在无需修改训练阶段的前提下实现了SOTA性能，显著提升了ViT等模型的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Manuel Blum,Lenore Blum
title: A Theoretical Computer Science Perspective on Free Will
title_zh: 关于自由意志的理论计算机科学视角
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.13704
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2107.13704
abstract: We consider the paradoxical concept of free will from the perspective of Theoretical Computer Science (TCS), a branch of mathematics concerned with understanding the underlying principles of computation and complexity, including the implications and surprising consequences of resource limitations.
summary: We consider the paradoxical concept of free will from the perspective of Theoretical Computer Science (TCS), a branch of mathematics concerned with understanding the underlying principles of computation and complexity, including the implications and surprising consequences of resource limitations.
abstract_zh: 我们从理论计算机科学（TCS）的角度考虑自由意志的矛盾概念，理论计算机科学是数学的一个分支，涉及理解计算和复杂性的基本原理，包括资源限制的含义和令人惊讶的后果。

AI.tldr: 本文从理论计算机科学角度探讨自由意志的悖论，分析其与计算复杂性及资源限制的关系。
AI.motivation: 自由意志作为哲学悖论，与计算理论中资源约束导致的决策限制存在潜在关联，需通过理论模型揭示其本质。
AI.method: 运用计算复杂性理论、算法分析及资源约束模型，构建形式化框架以模拟自由意志的决策过程。
AI.result: 提出自由意志可视为资源受限计算系统中的非确定性决策机制，其不可预测性源于计算复杂性边界。
AI.conclusion: 理论计算机科学为自由意志提供了新的解释视角，将其本质归因于计算资源限制下的复杂性表现。

search_text: A Theoretical Computer Science Perspective on Free Will 关于自由意志的理论计算机科学视角 We consider the paradoxical concept of free will from the perspective of Theoretical Computer Science (TCS), a branch of mathematics concerned with understanding the underlying principles of computation and complexity, including the implications and surprising consequences of resource limitations. 我们从理论计算机科学（TCS）的角度考虑自由意志的矛盾概念，理论计算机科学是数学的一个分支，涉及理解计算和复杂性的基本原理，包括资源限制的含义和令人惊讶的后果。 本文从理论计算机科学角度探讨自由意志的悖论，分析其与计算复杂性及资源限制的关系。 Manuel Blum,Lenore Blum cs.CC,cs.AI

authors_text: Yining Lu,Changjie Lu,Naina Bandyopadhyay,Manoj Kumar,Gaurav Gupta
title: Functional Optimization Reinforcement Learning for Real-Time Bidding
title_zh: 实时竞价的功能优化强化学习
abstract: Real-time bidding is the new paradigm of programmatic advertising. An advertiser wants to make the intelligent choice of utilizing a \textbf{Demand-Side Platform} to improve the performance of their ad campaigns. Existing approaches are struggling to provide a satisfactory solution for bidding optimization due to stochastic bidding behavior. In this paper, we proposed a multi-agent reinforcement learning architecture for RTB with functional optimization. We designed four agents bidding environment: three Lagrange-multiplier based functional optimization agents and one baseline agent (without any attribute of functional optimization) First, numerous attributes have been assigned to each agent, including biased or unbiased win probability, Lagrange multiplier, and click-through rate. In order to evaluate the proposed RTB strategy's performance, we demonstrate the results on ten sequential simulated auction campaigns. The results show that agents with functional actions and rewards had the most significant average winning rate and winning surplus, given biased and unbiased winning information respectively. The experimental evaluations show that our approach significantly improve the campaign's efficacy and profitability.

In this paper, we proposed a multi-agent reinforcement learning architecture for RTB with functional optimization. We designed four agents bidding environment: three Lagrange-multiplier based functional optimization agents and one baseline agent (without any attribute of functional optimization) First, numerous attributes have been assigned to each agent, including biased or unbiased win probability, Lagrange multiplier, and click-through rate. In order to evaluate the proposed RTB strategy's performance, we demonstrate the results on ten sequential simulated auction campaigns. The results show that agents with functional actions and rewards had the most significant average winning rate and winning surplus, given biased and unbiased winning information respectively. The experimental evaluations show that our approach significantly improve the campaign's efficacy and profitability.
abstract_zh: 实时竞价是程序化广告的新范例。广告商希望做出明智的选择，利用\textbf{需求方平台}来提高其广告活动的效果。由于随机出价行为，现有方法很难为出价优化提供令人满意的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有功能优化的 RTB 多智能体强化学习架构。我们设计了四种代理竞价环境：三个基于拉格朗日乘数的功能优化代理和一个基线代理（没有任何功能优化属性）。首先，为每个代理分配了许多属性，包括有偏或无偏获胜概率、拉格朗日乘数和点击率。为了评估所提出的 RTB 策略的性能，我们展示了十个连续模拟拍卖活动的结果。结果表明，在分别给定有偏和无偏获胜信息的情况下，具有功能性动作和奖励的代理具有最显着的平均获胜率和获胜盈余。实验评估表明，我们的方法显着提高了活动的效果和盈利能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于功能优化的多智能体强化学习架构，用于实时竞价（RTB）以提升广告活动效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因竞价行为的随机性难以提供满意的优化方案，需通过功能优化提升竞价策略的智能化水平。
AI.method: 设计包含三个基于拉格朗日乘数的功能优化智能体和一个基准智能体的多智能体系统，赋予不同属性（如胜率、CTR等），并在十场模拟拍卖中验证性能。
AI.result: 功能优化智能体在有偏和无偏胜率信息下均表现出更高的平均胜率和收益，实验验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过功能优化显著提升了广告活动的效率和盈利能力，优于传统方案。

authors_text: Pierre Guillou,Jules Vidal,Julien Tierny
title: Discrete Morse Sandwich: Fast Computation of Persistence Diagrams for Scalar Data -- An Algorithm and A Benchmark
title_zh: 离散莫尔斯三明治：标量数据持久图的快速计算——一种算法和基准
abstract: This paper introduces an efficient algorithm for persistence diagram computation, given an input piecewise linear scalar field $f$ defined on a $d$-dimensional simplicial complex $K$, with $d \leq 3$. Our work revisits the seminal algorithm "PairSimplices" [31], [103] with discrete Morse theory (DMT) [34], [80], which greatly reduces the number of input simplices to consider. Further, we also extend to DMT and accelerate the stratification strategy described in "PairSimplices" for the fast computation of the $0^{th}$ and $(d - 1)^{th}$ diagrams, noted $D_0(f)$ and $D_{d-1}(f)$. Minima-saddle persistence pairs ($D_0(f)$) and saddle-maximum persistence pairs ($D_{d-1}(f)$) are efficiently computed by processing, with a Union-Find, the unstable sets of $1$-saddles and the stable sets of $(d - 1)$-saddles. This fast pre-computation for the dimensions $0$ and $(d - 1)$ enables an aggressive specialization of [4] to the 3D case, which results in a drastic reduction of the number of input simplices for the computation of $D_1(f)$, the intermediate layer of the sandwich. Finally, we document several performance improvements via shared-memory parallelism. We provide an open-source implementation of our algorithm for reproducibility purposes. We also contribute a reproducible benchmark package, which exploits three-dimensional data from a public repository and compares our algorithm to a variety of publicly available implementations. Extensive experiments indicate that our algorithm improves by two orders of magnitude the time performance of the seminal "PairSimplices" algorithm it extends. Moreover, it also improves memory footprint and time performance over a selection of 14 competing approaches, with a substantial gain over the fastest available approaches, while producing a strictly identical output.
summary: This paper introduces an efficient algorithm for persistence diagram computation, given an input piecewise linear scalar field $f$ defined on a $d$-dimensional simplicial complex $K$, with $d \leq 3$. Our work revisits the seminal algorithm "PairSimplices" [31], [103] with discrete Morse theory (DMT) [34], [80], which greatly reduces the number of input simplices to consider. Further, we also extend to DMT and accelerate the stratification strategy described in "PairSimplices" for the fast computation of the $0^{th}$ and $(d - 1)^{th}$ diagrams, noted $D_0(f)$ and $D_{d-1}(f)$. Minima-saddle persistence pairs ($D_0(f)$) and saddle-maximum persistence pairs ($D_{d-1}(f)$) are efficiently computed by processing, with a Union-Find, the unstable sets of $1$-saddles and the stable sets of $(d - 1)$-saddles. This fast pre-computation for the dimensions $0$ and $(d - 1)$ enables an aggressive specialization of [4] to the 3D case, which results in a drastic reduction of the number of input simplices for the computation of $D_1(f)$, the intermediate layer of the sandwich. Finally, we document several performance improvements via shared-memory parallelism. We provide an open-source implementation of our algorithm for reproducibility purposes. We also contribute a reproducible benchmark package, which exploits three-dimensional data from a public repository and compares our algorithm to a variety of publicly available implementations. Extensive experiments indicate that our algorithm improves by two orders of magnitude the time performance of the seminal "PairSimplices" algorithm it extends. Moreover, it also improves memory footprint and time performance over a selection of 14 competing approaches, with a substantial gain over the fastest available approaches, while producing a strictly identical output.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于持久性图计算的有效算法，给定一个在 $d$ 维单纯复形 $K$ 上定义的输入分段线性标量场 $f$，其中 $d \leq 3$。我们的工作重新审视了具有离散莫尔斯理论（DMT）[34]、[80]的开创性算法“PairSimplices”[31]、[103]，这大大减少了要考虑的输入单纯形的数量。此外，我们还扩展到 DMT 并加速“PairSimplices”中描述的分层策略，以快速计算 $0^{th}$ 和 $(d - 1)^{th}$ 图，注意到 $D_0(f)$ 和 $D_{d-1}(f)$。通过使用并查找处理不稳定的 $1$-鞍点集和稳定的 $(d - 1)$-鞍点集，可以有效地计算最小鞍点持久性对 ($D_0(f)$) 和鞍点最大持久性对 ($D_{d-1}(f)$)。这种对维度 $0$ 和 $(d - 1)$ 的快速预计算使得 [4] 能够对 3D 情况进行积极的专门化，从而大大减少了用于计算 $D_1(f)$ （三明治的中间层）的输入单纯形的数量。最后，我们记录了通过共享内存并行性实现的几项性能改进。出于可重复性的目的，我们提供算法的开源实现。我们还提供了一个可重复的基准测试包，它利用公共存储库中的三维数据，并将我们的算法与各种公开可用的实现进行比较。大量实验表明，我们的算法将其扩展的开创性“PairSimplices”算法的时间性能提高了两个数量级。此外，与选择的 14 种竞争方法相比，它还改善了内存占用和时间性能，比最快的可用方法有显着优势，同时产生完全相同的输出。

AI.tldr: 提出一种高效算法，用于快速计算标量数据的持久性图，并提供基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理高维标量场时计算效率低，资源消耗大，需更高效方法。
AI.method: 结合离散莫尔斯理论减少单纯形数量，扩展分层策略加速特定维度计算，采用共享内存并行优化。
AI.result: 算法比原始方法快100倍，内存和时间优于14种方法，输出一致。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著提升持久性图计算效率和性能，适用于大规模数据处理。

authors_text: Byeonggeun Kim,Seunghan Yang,Jangho Kim,Simyung Chang
title: QTI Submission to DCASE 2021: residual normalization for device-imbalanced acoustic scene classification with efficient design
title_zh: QTI 提交给 DCASE 2021：通过高效设计实现设备不平衡声学场景分类的残差归一化
comment: tech report; won 1st place in DCASE2021 challenge. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.06531
comments: tech report; won 1st place in DCASE2021 challenge. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2111.06531
abstract: This technical report describes the details of our TASK1A submission of the DCASE2021 challenge. The goal of the task is to design an audio scene classification system for device-imbalanced datasets under the constraints of model complexity. This report introduces four methods to achieve the goal. First, we propose Residual Normalization, a novel feature normalization method that uses instance normalization with a shortcut path to discard unnecessary device-specific information without losing useful information for classification. Second, we design an efficient architecture, BC-ResNet-Mod, a modified version of the baseline architecture with a limited receptive field. Third, we exploit spectrogram-to-spectrogram translation from one to multiple devices to augment training data. Finally, we utilize three model compression schemes: pruning, quantization, and knowledge distillation to reduce model complexity. The proposed system achieves an average test accuracy of 76.3% in TAU Urban Acoustic Scenes 2020 Mobile, development dataset with 315k parameters, and average test accuracy of 75.3% after compression to 61.0KB of non-zero parameters. We extend this work to [1].
summary: This technical report describes the details of our TASK1A submission of the DCASE2021 challenge. The goal of the task is to design an audio scene classification system for device-imbalanced datasets under the constraints of model complexity. This report introduces four methods to achieve the goal. First, we propose Residual Normalization, a novel feature normalization method that uses instance normalization with a shortcut path to discard unnecessary device-specific information without losing useful information for classification. Second, we design an efficient architecture, BC-ResNet-Mod, a modified version of the baseline architecture with a limited receptive field. Third, we exploit spectrogram-to-spectrogram translation from one to multiple devices to augment training data. Finally, we utilize three model compression schemes: pruning, quantization, and knowledge distillation to reduce model complexity. The proposed system achieves an average test accuracy of 76.3% in TAU Urban Acoustic Scenes 2020 Mobile, development dataset with 315k parameters, and average test accuracy of 75.3% after compression to 61.0KB of non-zero parameters. We extend this work to [1].
abstract_zh: 本技术报告描述了我们提交 DCASE2021 挑战赛 TASK1A 的详细信息。该任务的目标是在模型复杂性的约束下为设备不平衡数据集设计音频场景分类系统。本报告介绍了实现这一目标的四种方法。首先，我们提出了残差归一化，这是一种新颖的特征归一化方法，它使用带有快捷路径的实例归一化来丢弃不必要的设备特定信息，而不会丢失用于分类的有用信息。其次，我们设计了一种高效的架构 BC-ResNet-Mod，它是具有有限感受野的基线架构的修改版本。第三，我们利用从一台设备到多个设备的频谱图到频谱图的转换来增强训练数据。最后，我们利用三种模型压缩方案：剪枝、量化和知识蒸馏来降低模型复杂性。所提出的系统在具有 315k 参数的开发数据集 TAU Urban Acoustic Sc​​enes 2020 Mobile 中实现了 76.3% 的平均测试精度，在压缩到 61.0KB 非零参数后，平均测试精度为 75.3%。我们将这项工作扩展到[1]。

AI.tldr: 本文针对设备不平衡的音频场景分类任务，提出了一种结合残差归一化和高效设计的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 在设备不平衡的数据集中，传统方法难以兼顾分类准确率与模型复杂度，需设计更高效的模型架构与数据增强策略。
AI.method: 提出残差归一化方法消除设备特异性干扰；设计高效架构BC-ResNet-Mod；利用频谱翻译进行数据增强；采用剪枝、量化和知识蒸馏压缩模型。
AI.result: 在TAU Urban Acoustic Scenes 2020数据集上，模型参数量315k时测试准确率达76.3%，压缩至61.0KB后准确率保持75.3%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了设备不平衡场景下的分类性能与模型效率，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

search_text: QTI Submission to DCASE 2021: residual normalization for device-imbalanced acoustic scene classification with efficient design QTI 提交给 DCASE 2021：通过高效设计实现设备不平衡声学场景分类的残差归一化 This technical report describes the details of our TASK1A submission of the DCASE2021 challenge. The goal of the task is to design an audio scene classification system for device-imbalanced datasets under the constraints of model complexity. This report introduces four methods to achieve the goal. First, we propose Residual Normalization, a novel feature normalization method that uses instance normalization with a shortcut path to discard unnecessary device-specific information without losing useful information for classification. Second, we design an efficient architecture, BC-ResNet-Mod, a modified version of the baseline architecture with a limited receptive field. Third, we exploit spectrogram-to-spectrogram translation from one to multiple devices to augment training data. Finally, we utilize three model compression schemes: pruning, quantization, and knowledge distillation to reduce model complexity. The proposed system achieves an average test accuracy of 76.3% in TAU Urban Acoustic Scenes 2020 Mobile, development dataset with 315k parameters, and average test accuracy of 75.3% after compression to 61.0KB of non-zero parameters. authors_text: Changjie Lu,Shen Zheng,Zirui Wang,Omar Dib,Gaurav Gupta
title: AS-IntroVAE: Adversarial Similarity Distance Makes Robust IntroVAE
title_zh: AS-IntroVAE：对抗性相似距离使 IntroVAE 更稳健
abstract: Recently, introspective models like IntroVAE and S-IntroVAE have excelled in image generation and reconstruction tasks. The principal characteristic of introspective models is the adversarial learning of VAE, where the encoder attempts to distinguish between the real and the fake (i.e., synthesized) images. However, due to the unavailability of an effective metric to evaluate the difference between the real and the fake images, the posterior collapse and the vanishing gradient problem still exist, reducing the fidelity of the synthesized images. In this paper, we propose a new variation of IntroVAE called Adversarial Similarity Distance Introspective Variational Autoencoder (AS-IntroVAE). We theoretically analyze the vanishing gradient problem and construct a new Adversarial Similarity Distance (AS-Distance) using the 2-Wasserstein distance and the kernel trick. With weight annealing on AS-Distance and KL-Divergence, the AS-IntroVAE are able to generate stable and high-quality images. The posterior collapse problem is addressed by making per-batch attempts to transform the image so that it better fits the prior distribution in the latent space. Compared with the per-image approach, this strategy fosters more diverse distributions in the latent space, allowing our model to produce images of great diversity. Comprehensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of AS-IntroVAE on image generation and reconstruction tasks.
summary: Recently, introspective models like IntroVAE and S-IntroVAE have excelled in image generation and reconstruction tasks. The principal characteristic of introspective models is the adversarial learning of VAE, where the encoder attempts to distinguish between the real and the fake (i.e., synthesized) images. However, due to the unavailability of an effective metric to evaluate the difference between the real and the fake images, the posterior collapse and the vanishing gradient problem still exist, reducing the fidelity of the synthesized images. In this paper, we propose a new variation of IntroVAE called Adversarial Similarity Distance Introspective Variational Autoencoder (AS-IntroVAE). We theoretically analyze the vanishing gradient problem and construct a new Adversarial Similarity Distance (AS-Distance) using the 2-Wasserstein distance and the kernel trick. With weight annealing on AS-Distance and KL-Divergence, the AS-IntroVAE are able to generate stable and high-quality images. The posterior collapse problem is addressed by making per-batch attempts to transform the image so that it better fits the prior distribution in the latent space. Compared with the per-image approach, this strategy fosters more diverse distributions in the latent space, allowing our model to produce images of great diversity. Comprehensive experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of AS-IntroVAE on image generation and reconstruction tasks.
abstract_zh: 最近，IntroVAE 和 S-IntroVAE 等内省模型在图像生成和重建任务中表现出色。内省模型的主要特征是 VAE 的对抗性学习，其中编码器试图区分真实图像和假图像（即合成图像）。然而，由于缺乏有效的度量来评估真假图像之间的差异，后验塌陷和梯度消失问题仍然存在，降低了合成图像的保真度。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 IntroVAE 变体，称为对抗相似距离内省变分自动编码器（AS-IntroVAE）。我们从理论上分析了梯度消失问题，并使用 2-Wasserstein 距离和核技巧构造了一个新的对抗相似距离（AS-Distance）。通过对 AS-Distance 和 KL-Divergence 进行权重退火，AS-IntroVAE 能够生成稳定且高质量的图像。通过每批次尝试变换图像以使其更好地适应潜在空间中的先验分布来解决后验塌陷问题。与每个图像的方法相比，这种策略在潜在空间中促进了更多样化的分布，使我们的模型能够产生多样性的图像。对基准数据集的综合实验证明了 AS-IntroVAE 在图像生成和重建任务上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的IntroVAE模型AS-IntroVAE，通过引入对抗相似性距离（AS-Distance）解决图像生成中的后验坍塌和梯度消失问题，提升生成图像的质量和多样性。
AI.motivation: 现有IntroVAE类模型在图像生成与重建任务中存在后验坍塌和梯度消失问题，主要原因是缺乏有效度量真实与生成图像差异的指标，导致生成图像保真度不足且多样性受限。
AI.method: 提出基于2-Wasserstein距离和核技巧的对抗相似性距离（AS-Distance），结合权重退火策略优化AS-Distance与KL散度，并采用批量级潜空间先验适配策略增强潜在空间分布多样性。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，AS-IntroVAE在图像生成和重建任务中均优于现有方法，生成图像质量更高且具有更丰富的多样性。
AI.conclusion: AS-IntroVAE通过理论分析与新型距离度量设计，有效缓解了后验坍塌和梯度消失问题，为生成模型的潜空间建模提供了新思路。

authors_text: James MacGlashan,Evan Archer,Alisa Devlic,Takuma Seno,Craig Sherstan,Peter R. Wurman,Peter Stone
title: Value Function Decomposition for Iterative Design of Reinforcement Learning Agents
title_zh: 强化学习代理迭代设计的价值函数分解
abstract: Designing reinforcement learning (RL) agents is typically a difficult process that requires numerous design iterations. Learning can fail for a multitude of reasons, and standard RL methods provide too few tools to provide insight into the exact cause. In this paper, we show how to integrate value decomposition into a broad class of actor-critic algorithms and use it to assist in the iterative agent-design process. Value decomposition separates a reward function into distinct components and learns value estimates for each. These value estimates provide insight into an agent's learning and decision-making process and enable new training methods to mitigate common problems. As a demonstration, we introduce SAC-D, a variant of soft actor-critic (SAC) adapted for value decomposition. SAC-D maintains similar performance to SAC, while learning a larger set of value predictions. We also introduce decomposition-based tools that exploit this information, including a new reward influence metric, which measures each reward component's effect on agent decision-making. Using these tools, we provide several demonstrations of decomposition's use in identifying and addressing problems in the design of both environments and agents. Value decomposition is broadly applicable and easy to incorporate into existing algorithms and workflows, making it a powerful tool in an RL practitioner's toolbox.
summary: Designing reinforcement learning (RL) agents is typically a difficult process that requires numerous design iterations. Learning can fail for a multitude of reasons, and standard RL methods provide too few tools to provide insight into the exact cause. In this paper, we show how to integrate value decomposition into a broad class of actor-critic algorithms and use it to assist in the iterative agent-design process. Value decomposition separates a reward function into distinct components and learns value estimates for each. These value estimates provide insight into an agent's learning and decision-making process and enable new training methods to mitigate common problems. As a demonstration, we introduce SAC-D, a variant of soft actor-critic (SAC) adapted for value decomposition. SAC-D maintains similar performance to SAC, while learning a larger set of value predictions. We also introduce decomposition-based tools that exploit this information, including a new reward influence metric, which measures each reward component's effect on agent decision-making. Using these tools, we provide several demonstrations of decomposition's use in identifying and addressing problems in the design of both environments and agents. Value decomposition is broadly applicable and easy to incorporate into existing algorithms and workflows, making it a powerful tool in an RL practitioner's toolbox.
abstract_zh: 设计强化学习（RL）代理通常是一个困难的过程，需要大量的设计迭代。学习失败的原因有多种，而标准强化学习方法提供的工具太少，无法深入了解确切原因。在本文中，我们展示了如何将价值分解集成到广泛的参与者批评算法中，并使用它来协助迭代代理设计过程。价值分解将奖励函数分成不同的组成部分，并学习每个组成部分的价值估计。这些价值估计提供了对代理学习和决策过程的深入了解，并支持新的培训方法来缓解常见问题。作为演示，我们介绍 SAC-D，它是软演员批评家 (SAC) 的一种变体，适用于价值分解。 SAC-D 保持与 SAC 类似的性能，同时学习更大的价值预测集。我们还引入了利用这些信息的基于分解的工具，包括新的奖励影响指标，该指标衡量每个奖励成分对代理决策的影响。使用这些工具，我们提供了几个分解在识别和解决环境和代理设计中的问题中的使用演示。价值分解具有广泛的适用性，并且易于合并到现有算法和工作流程中，使其成为强化学习从业者工具箱中的强大工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过价值函数分解方法辅助强化学习智能体的迭代设计，解决传统方法缺乏诊断工具的问题。
AI.motivation: 设计强化学习代理过程复杂且易失败，现有方法难以定位具体问题原因，缺乏有效分析工具。
AI.method: 将价值分解整合到actor-critic算法，提出SAC-D变体，并开发分解工具如奖励影响度量来分析决策过程。
AI.result: SAC-D保持与SAC相近性能的同时学习更多价值预测，通过分解工具成功识别并解决环境与代理设计中的问题。
AI.conclusion: 价值分解方法具有通用性且易于集成，为RL实践者提供了强大的诊断与优化工具。

search_text: Value Function Decomposition for Iterative Design of Reinforcement Learning Agents 强化学习代理迭代设计的价值函数分解 Designing reinforcement learning (RL) agents is typically a difficult process that requires numerous design iterations. Learning can fail for a multitude of reasons, and standard RL methods provide too few tools to provide insight into the exact cause. In this paper, we show how to integrate value decomposition into a broad class of actor-critic algorithms and use it to assist in the iterative agent-design process. Value decomposition separates a reward function into distinct components and learns value estimates for each. These value estimates provide insight into an agent's learning and decision-making process and enable new training methods to mitigate common problems. As a demonstration, we introduce SAC-D, a variant of soft actor-critic (SAC) adapted for value decomposition. SAC-D maintains similar performance to SAC, while learning a larger set of value predictions. We also introduce decomposition-based tools that exploit this information, including a new reward influence metric, which measures each reward component's effect on agent decision-making. Using these tools, we provide several demonstrations of decomposition's use in identifying and addressing problems in the design of both environments and agents. Value decomposition is broadly applicable and easy to incorporate into existing algorithms and workflows, making it a powerful tool in an RL practitioner's toolbox. 设计强化学习（RL）代理通常是一个困难的过程，需要大量的设计迭代。学习失败的原因有多种，而标准强化学习方法提供的工具太少，无法深入了解确切原因。在本文中，我们展示了如何将价值分解集成到广泛的参与者批评算法中，并使用它来协助迭代代理设计过程。价值分解将奖励函数分成不同的组成部分，并学习每个组成部分的价值估计。这些价值估计提供了对代理学习和决策过程的深入了解，并支持新的培训方法来缓解常见问题。作为演示，我们介绍 SAC-D，它是软演员批评家 (SAC) 的一种变体，适用于价值分解。 SAC-D 保持与 SAC 类似的性能，同时学习更大的价值预测集。我们还引入了利用这些信息的基于分解的工具，包括新的奖励影响指标，该指标衡量每个奖励成分对代理决策的影响。使用这些工具，我们提供了几个分解在识别和解决环境和代理设计中的问题中的使用演示。价值分解具有广泛的适用性，并且易于合并到现有算法和工作流程中，使其成为强化学习从业者工具箱中的强大工具。 本文提出通过价值函数分解方法辅助强化学习智能体的迭代设计，解决传统方法缺乏诊断工具的问题。 James MacGlashan,Evan Archer,Alisa Devlic,Takuma Seno,Craig Sherstan,Peter R. authors_text: Joel D. Day,Maria Kosche,Florin Manea,Markus L. Schmid
title: Subsequences With Gap Constraints: Complexity Bounds for Matching and Analysis Problems
title_zh: 具有间隙约束的子序列：匹配和分析问题的复杂性界限
abstract: We consider subsequences with gap constraints, i.e., length-k subsequences p that can be embedded into a string w such that the induced gaps (i.e., the factors of w between the positions to which p is mapped to) satisfy given gap constraints $gc = (C_1, C_2, ..., C_{k-1})$; we call p a gc-subsequence of w. In the case where the gap constraints gc are defined by lower and upper length bounds $C_i = (L^-_i, L^+_i) \in \mathbb{N}^2$ and/or regular languages $C_i \in REG$, we prove tight (conditional on the orthogonal vectors (OV) hypothesis) complexity bounds for checking whether a given p is a gc-subsequence of a string w. We also consider the whole set of all gc-subsequences of a string, and investigate the complexity of the universality, equivalence and containment problems for these sets of gc-subsequences.
summary: We consider subsequences with gap constraints, i.e., length-k subsequences p that can be embedded into a string w such that the induced gaps (i.e., the factors of w between the positions to which p is mapped to) satisfy given gap constraints $gc = (C_1, C_2, ..., C_{k-1})$; we call p a gc-subsequence of w. In the case where the gap constraints gc are defined by lower and upper length bounds $C_i = (L^-_i, L^+_i) \in \mathbb{N}^2$ and/or regular languages $C_i \in REG$, we prove tight (conditional on the orthogonal vectors (OV) hypothesis) complexity bounds for checking whether a given p is a gc-subsequence of a string w. We also consider the whole set of all gc-subsequences of a string, and investigate the complexity of the universality, equivalence and containment problems for these sets of gc-subsequences.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑具有间隙约束的子序列，即长度为 k 的子序列 p 可以嵌入到字符串 w 中，使得引起的间隙（即 p 映射到的位置之间的 w 因子）满足给定的间隙约束 $gc = (C_1, C_2, ..., C_{k-1})$；我们称 p 为 w 的 gc 子序列。在间隙约束 gc 由下限和上限长度边界 $C_i = (L^-_i, L^+_i) \in \mathbb{N}^2$ 和/或常规语言 $C_i \in REG$ 定义的情况下，我们证明了用于检查给定 p 是否是字符串 w 的 gc 子序列的严格（以正交向量 (OV) 假设为条件）复杂度边界。我们还考虑字符串的所有 gc 子序列的整个集合，并研究这些 gc 子序列集合的普遍性、等价性和包含问题的复杂性。

AI.tldr: 研究带有间隔约束的子序列的匹配与分析问题，确定其复杂度界限。
AI.motivation: 解决在不同间隔约束下子序列匹配的复杂度问题，以优化相关算法性能。
AI.method: 基于正交向量假设，结合长度界限和正则语言约束，分析子序列匹配及集合操作的复杂度。
AI.result: 证明了在给定约束下的子序列匹配问题的复杂度下界，并分析了相关集合操作的复杂性。
AI.conclusion: 为带有间隔约束的子序列分析提供了理论复杂度界限，推动了算法设计的优化。

authors_text: Calvin Chen,Stefan Winkler
title: Generating near-infrared facial expression datasets with dimensional affect labels
title_zh: 生成具有维度影响标签的近红外面部表情数据集
abstract: Facial expression analysis has long been an active research area of computer vision. Traditional methods mainly analyse images for prototypical discrete emotions; as a result, they do not provide an accurate depiction of the complex emotional states in humans. Furthermore, illumination variance remains a challenge for face analysis in the visible light spectrum. To address these issues, we propose using a dimensional model based on valence and arousal to represent a wider range of emotions, in combination with near infra-red (NIR) imagery, which is more robust to illumination changes. Since there are no existing NIR facial expression datasets with valence-arousal labels available, we present two complementary data augmentation methods (face morphing and CycleGAN approach) to create NIR image datasets with dimensional emotion labels from existing categorical and/or visible-light datasets. Our experiments show that these generated NIR datasets are comparable to existing datasets in terms of data quality and baseline prediction performance.
summary: Facial expression analysis has long been an active research area of computer vision. Traditional methods mainly analyse images for prototypical discrete emotions; as a result, they do not provide an accurate depiction of the complex emotional states in humans. Furthermore, illumination variance remains a challenge for face analysis in the visible light spectrum. To address these issues, we propose using a dimensional model based on valence and arousal to represent a wider range of emotions, in combination with near infra-red (NIR) imagery, which is more robust to illumination changes. Since there are no existing NIR facial expression datasets with valence-arousal labels available, we present two complementary data augmentation methods (face morphing and CycleGAN approach) to create NIR image datasets with dimensional emotion labels from existing categorical and/or visible-light datasets. Our experiments show that these generated NIR datasets are comparable to existing datasets in terms of data quality and baseline prediction performance.
abstract_zh: 面部表情分析长期以来一直是计算机视觉的一个活跃研究领域。传统方法主要分析图像中典型的离散情感；因此，它们无法准确描述人类复杂的情绪状态。此外，照明方差仍然是可见光谱中人脸分析的一个挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们建议使用基于效价和唤醒度的维度模型来表示更广泛的情绪，并结合近红外（NIR）图像，该图像对光照变化更加鲁棒。由于没有可用的带有效价唤醒标签的现有 NIR 面部表情数据集，我们提出了两种互补的数据增强方法（面部变形和 CycleGAN 方法）来创建带有来自现有分类和/或可见光数据集的维度情感标签的 NIR 图像数据集。我们的实验表明，这些生成的 NIR 数据集在数据质量和基线预测性能方面与现有数据集相当。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在生成带有维度情感标签的近红外面部表情数据集，并提出两种数据增强方法以解决光照变化和情感复杂性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统面部表情分析依赖离散情绪分类，难以表达人类复杂情感，且可见光谱受光照影响较大，需更鲁棒的近红外成像与维度情感模型。
AI.method: 结合效价-唤醒维度模型与近红外成像技术，采用面部变形和CycleGAN两种数据增强方法，从现有数据集生成带维度标签的NIR数据集。
AI.result: 生成的NIR数据集在数据质量及基线预测性能上与现有数据集相当，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法成功构建了首个带维度情感标签的NIR面部表情数据集，为光照鲁棒的情感分析研究提供了新资源。

To address these issues, we propose using a dimensional model based on valence and arousal to represent a wider range of emotions, in combination with near infra-red (NIR) imagery, which is more robust to illumination changes. Since there are no existing NIR facial expression datasets with valence-arousal labels available, we present two complementary data augmentation methods (face morphing and CycleGAN approach) to create NIR image datasets with dimensional emotion labels from existing categorical and/or visible-light datasets. Our experiments show that these generated NIR datasets are comparable to existing datasets in terms of data quality and baseline prediction performance. 面部表情分析长期以来一直是计算机视觉的一个活跃研究领域。传统方法主要分析图像中典型的离散情感；因此，它们无法准确描述人类复杂的情绪状态。此外，照明方差仍然是可见光谱中人脸分析的一个挑战。为了解决这些问题，我们建议使用基于效价和唤醒度的维度模型来表示更广泛的情绪，并结合近红外（NIR）图像，该图像对光照变化更加鲁棒。由于没有可用的带有效价唤醒标签的现有 NIR 面部表情数据集，我们提出了两种互补的数据增强方法（面部变形和 CycleGAN 方法）来创建带有来自现有分类和/或可见光数据集的维度情感标签的 NIR 图像数据集。我们的实验表明，这些生成的 NIR 数据集在数据质量和基线预测性能方面与现有数据集相当。 本文旨在生成带有维度情感标签的近红外面部表情数据集，并提出两种数据增强方法以解决光照变化和情感复杂性问题。 Calvin Chen,Stefan Winkler cs.CV

authors_text: Stephen Hausler,Ming Xu,Sourav Garg,Punarjay Chakravarty,Shubham Shrivastava,Ankit Vora,Michael Milford
title: Improving Worst Case Visual Localization Coverage via Place-specific Sub-selection in Multi-camera Systems
title_zh: 通过多摄像机系统中特定地点的子选择来提高最坏情况下的视觉定位覆盖范围
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, To be published in RA-L 2022
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, To be published in RA-L 2022
abstract: 6-DoF visual localization systems utilize principled approaches rooted in 3D geometry to perform accurate camera pose estimation of images to a map. Current techniques use hierarchical pipelines and learned 2D feature extractors to improve scalability and increase performance. However, despite gains in typical recall@0.25m type metrics, these systems still have limited utility for real-world applications like autonomous vehicles because of their `worst' areas of performance - the locations where they provide insufficient recall at a certain required error tolerance. Here we investigate the utility of using `place specific configurations', where a map is segmented into a number of places, each with its own configuration for modulating the pose estimation step, in this case selecting a camera within a multi-camera system. On the Ford AV benchmark dataset, we demonstrate substantially improved worst-case localization performance compared to using off-the-shelf pipelines - minimizing the percentage of the dataset which has low recall at a certain error tolerance, as well as improved overall localization performance. Our proposed approach is particularly applicable to the crowdsharing model of autonomous vehicle deployment, where a fleet of AVs are regularly traversing a known route.
summary: 6-DoF visual localization systems utilize principled approaches rooted in 3D geometry to perform accurate camera pose estimation of images to a map. Current techniques use hierarchical pipelines and learned 2D feature extractors to improve scalability and increase performance. However, despite gains in typical recall@0.25m type metrics, these systems still have limited utility for real-world applications like autonomous vehicles because of their `worst' areas of performance - the locations where they provide insufficient recall at a certain required error tolerance. Here we investigate the utility of using `place specific configurations', where a map is segmented into a number of places, each with its own configuration for modulating the pose estimation step, in this case selecting a camera within a multi-camera system. On the Ford AV benchmark dataset, we demonstrate substantially improved worst-case localization performance compared to using off-the-shelf pipelines - minimizing the percentage of the dataset which has low recall at a certain error tolerance, as well as improved overall localization performance. Our proposed approach is particularly applicable to the crowdsharing model of autonomous vehicle deployment, where a fleet of AVs are regularly traversing a known route.
abstract_zh: 6-DoF 视觉定位系统利用植根于 3D 几何的原理方法来对地图上的图像进行准确的相机姿态估计。当前的技术使用分层管道和学习的 2D 特征提取器来提高可扩展性并提高性能。然而，尽管典型的recall@0.25m类型指标有所提高，但这些系统对于自动驾驶汽车等现实应用的实用性仍然有限，因为它们的性能“最差”区域——在某些所需的容错能力下无法提供足够的召回的位置。在这里，我们研究使用“特定位置配置”的实用性，其中地图被分割为多个位置，每个位置都有自己的配置来调制姿势估计步骤，在本例中选择多相机系统中的相机。在福特 AV 基准数据集上，与使用现成的管道相比，我们展示了在最坏情况下的本地化性能的显着提高 - 最大限度地减少了在一定容错范围内召回率较低的数据集的百分比，并提高了整体本地化性能。我们提出的方法特别适用于自动驾驶汽车部署的众包模型，其中自动驾驶车队定期穿越已知路线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过多摄像头系统中的场所特异性子选择来改进最坏情况下的视觉定位覆盖的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有的6-DoF视觉定位系统在典型指标上表现良好，但在实际应用（如自动驾驶车辆）中，由于某些区域的性能较差，限制了其实用性。
AI.method: 本文将地图分割成多个场所，每个场所采用特定配置来调整姿态估计步骤，具体为选择多摄像头系统中的某一摄像头。
AI.result: 在Ford AV基准数据集上，该方法显著提升了最坏情况下的定位性能，并减少了在一定误差容忍度下低召回率的数据比例。
AI.conclusion: 该方法特别适用于自动驾驶车辆的共享部署模式，其中车队定期在已知路线上行驶。

authors_text: Tobias Leemann,Michael Kirchhof,Yao Rong,Enkelejda Kasneci,Gjergji Kasneci
title: When are Post-hoc Conceptual Explanations Identifiable?
title_zh: 事后概念解释什么时候可以识别？
comment: v5: UAI2023 camera-ready including supplementary material. The first two authors contributed equally
comments: v5: UAI2023 camera-ready including supplementary material. The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: Interest in understanding and factorizing learned embedding spaces through conceptual explanations is steadily growing. When no human concept labels are available, concept discovery methods search trained embedding spaces for interpretable concepts like object shape or color that can provide post-hoc explanations for decisions. Unlike previous work, we argue that concept discovery should be identifiable, meaning that a number of known concepts can be provably recovered to guarantee reliability of the explanations. As a starting point, we explicitly make the connection between concept discovery and classical methods like Principal Component Analysis and Independent Component Analysis by showing that they can recover independent concepts under non-Gaussian distributions. For dependent concepts, we propose two novel approaches that exploit functional compositionality properties of image-generating processes. Our provably identifiable concept discovery methods substantially outperform competitors on a battery of experiments including hundreds of trained models and dependent concepts, where they exhibit up to 29 % better alignment with the ground truth. Our results highlight the strict conditions under which reliable concept discovery without human labels can be guaranteed and provide a formal foundation for the domain. Our code is available online.
summary: Interest in understanding and factorizing learned embedding spaces through conceptual explanations is steadily growing. When no human concept labels are available, concept discovery methods search trained embedding spaces for interpretable concepts like object shape or color that can provide post-hoc explanations for decisions. Unlike previous work, we argue that concept discovery should be identifiable, meaning that a number of known concepts can be provably recovered to guarantee reliability of the explanations. As a starting point, we explicitly make the connection between concept discovery and classical methods like Principal Component Analysis and Independent Component Analysis by showing that they can recover independent concepts under non-Gaussian distributions. For dependent concepts, we propose two novel approaches that exploit functional compositionality properties of image-generating processes. Our provably identifiable concept discovery methods substantially outperform competitors on a battery of experiments including hundreds of trained models and dependent concepts, where they exhibit up to 29 % better alignment with the ground truth. Our results highlight the strict conditions under which reliable concept discovery without human labels can be guaranteed and provide a formal foundation for the domain. Our code is available online.
abstract_zh: 通过概念解释来理解和分解学习嵌入空间的兴趣正在稳步增长。当没有可用的人类概念标签时，概念发现方法会在经过训练的嵌入空间中搜索可解释的概念，例如对象形状或颜色，这些概念可以为决策提供事后解释。与之前的工作不同，我们认为概念发现应该是可识别的，这意味着可以证明许多已知概念可以被恢复以保证解释的可靠性。作为起点，我们明确地将概念发现与主成分分析和独立成分分析等经典方法联系起来，表明它们可以在非高斯分布下恢复独立概念。对于依赖概念，我们提出了两种利用图像生成过程的功能组合特性的新方法。我们的可证明可识别概念发现方法在一系列实验中远远优于竞争对手，其中包括数百个经过训练的模型和相关概念，它们与地面事实的一致性提高了 29%。我们的结果强调了在没有人类标签的情况下可以保证可靠的概念发现的严格条件，并为该领域提供了正式的基础。我们的代码可在线获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在无人类概念标签情况下，如何通过可证明的方法可靠地识别嵌入空间中的概念，并提供事后解释。
AI.motivation: 现有概念发现方法缺乏理论保证，无法确保解释的可靠性，需建立可识别的理论框架以保证概念发现的可信度。
AI.method: 将概念发现与PCA/ICA关联，提出两种基于图像生成过程功能组合性的新方法，实现依赖概念的可识别恢复。
AI.result: 在数百个模型和依赖概念实验中，方法对齐度提升29%，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的概念发现需严格条件保障，本文为无标签概念解释提供了理论基础和可证明方法。

authors_text: Dacheng Yin,Chuanxin Tang,Yanqing Liu,Xiaoqiang Wang,Zhiyuan Zhao,Yucheng Zhao,Zhiwei Xiong,Sheng Zhao,Chong Luo
title: RetrieverTTS: Modeling Decomposed Factors for Text-Based Speech Insertion
title_zh: RetrieverTTS：为基于文本的语音插入建模分解因素
comment: 5 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables. Accepted by Interspeech 2022
comments: 5 pages, 1 figure, 3 tables. Accepted by Interspeech 2022
abstract: This paper proposes a new "decompose-and-edit" paradigm for the text-based speech insertion task that facilitates arbitrary-length speech insertion and even full sentence generation. In the proposed paradigm, global and local factors in speech are explicitly decomposed and separately manipulated to achieve high speaker similarity and continuous prosody. Specifically, we proposed to represent the global factors by multiple tokens, which are extracted by cross-attention operation and then injected back by link-attention operation. Due to the rich representation of global factors, we manage to achieve high speaker similarity in a zero-shot manner. In addition, we introduce a prosody smoothing task to make the local prosody factor context-aware and therefore achieve satisfactory prosody continuity. We further achieve high voice quality with an adversarial training stage. In the subjective test, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both naturalness and similarity. Audio samples can be found at https://ydcustc.github.io/retrieverTTS-demo/.
summary: This paper proposes a new "decompose-and-edit" paradigm for the text-based speech insertion task that facilitates arbitrary-length speech insertion and even full sentence generation. In the proposed paradigm, global and local factors in speech are explicitly decomposed and separately manipulated to achieve high speaker similarity and continuous prosody. Specifically, we proposed to represent the global factors by multiple tokens, which are extracted by cross-attention operation and then injected back by link-attention operation. Due to the rich representation of global factors, we manage to achieve high speaker similarity in a zero-shot manner. In addition, we introduce a prosody smoothing task to make the local prosody factor context-aware and therefore achieve satisfactory prosody continuity. We further achieve high voice quality with an adversarial training stage. In the subjective test, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both naturalness and similarity. Audio samples can be found at https://ydcustc.github.io/retrieverTTS-demo/.
abstract_zh: 本文为基于文本的语音插入任务提出了一种新的“分解和编辑”范例，可以促进任意长度的语音插入甚至完整句子的生成。在所提出的范式中，语音中的全局和局部因素被明确分解和单独操纵，以实现高说话者相似度和连续韵律。具体来说，我们建议用多个标记来表示全局因素，这些标记通过交叉注意操作提取，然后通过链接注意操作注入回来。由于全局因素的丰富表示，我们设法以零样本的方式实现高说话人相似度。此外，我们引入了韵律平滑任务，使本地韵律因素具有上下文感知，从而实现令人满意的韵律连续性。我们通过对抗性训练阶段进一步实现了高语音质量。在主观测试中，我们的方法在自然性和相似性方面都达到了最先进的性能。音频样本可以在 https://ydcustc.github.io/retrieverTTS-demo/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于文本的语音插入方法RetrieverTTS，通过分解并编辑语音的全局和局部因素，实现任意长度语音插入和全句生成。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到语音合成方法在处理任意长度语音插入时存在说话人相似度低、韵律不连续等问题，需设计更灵活的分解与编辑框架以提升生成质量。
AI.method: 通过交叉注意力提取全局因素（多token表示）并利用链接注意力注入，结合韵律平滑任务优化局部因素，最后通过对抗训练提升语音质量。
AI.result: 主观测试显示该方法在自然度和相似度指标上达到SOTA，音频样本验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 分解-编辑范式能有效建模语音因素，实现高质量、高相似度的文本驱动语音插入，为语音合成与编辑提供新思路。

search_text: RetrieverTTS: Modeling Decomposed Factors for Text-Based Speech Insertion RetrieverTTS：为基于文本的语音插入建模分解因素 This paper proposes a new "decompose-and-edit" paradigm for the text-based speech insertion task that facilitates arbitrary-length speech insertion and even full sentence generation. In the proposed paradigm, global and local factors in speech are explicitly decomposed and separately manipulated to achieve high speaker similarity and continuous prosody. Specifically, we proposed to represent the global factors by multiple tokens, which are extracted by cross-attention operation and then injected back by link-attention operation. Due to the rich representation of global factors, we manage to achieve high speaker similarity in a zero-shot manner. In addition, we introduce a prosody smoothing task to make the local prosody factor context-aware and therefore achieve satisfactory prosody continuity. We further achieve high voice quality with an adversarial training stage. In the subjective test, our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both naturalness and similarity. Audio samples can be found at https://ydcustc.github.io/retrieverTTS-demo/. 本文为基于文本的语音插入任务提出了一种新的“分解和编辑”范例，可以促进任意长度的语音插入甚至完整句子的生成。在所提出的范式中，语音中的全局和局部因素被明确分解和单独操纵，以实现高说话者相似度和连续韵律。具体来说，我们建议用多个标记来表示全局因素，这些标记通过交叉注意操作提取，然后通过链接注意操作注入回来。由于全局因素的丰富表示，我们设法以零样本的方式实现高说话人相似度。此外，我们引入了韵律平滑任务，使本地韵律因素具有上下文感知，从而实现令人满意的韵律连续性。我们通过对抗性训练阶段进一步实现了高语音质量。在主观测试中，我们的方法在自然性和相似性方面都达到了最先进的性能。音频样本可以在 https://ydcustc.github.io/retrieverTTS-demo/ 找到。 本文提出一种基于文本的语音插入方法RetrieverTTS，通过分解并编辑语音的全局和局部因素，实现任意长度语音插入和全句生成。 Dacheng Yin,Chuanxin Tang,Yanqing Liu,Xiaoqiang Wang,Zhiyuan Zhao,Yucheng Zhao,Zhiwei Xiong,Sheng Zhao,Chong Luo eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Dharanidhar Dang,Bill Lin,Debashis Sahoo
title: LiteCON: An All-Photonic Neuromorphic Accelerator for Energy-efficient Deep Learning (Preprint)
title_zh: LiteCON：用于节能深度学习的全光子神经形态加速器（预印本）
comment: 24 pages, 17 figures, to appear in ACM Transactions on Architecture & Code Optimization (TACO). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.10140
comments: 24 pages, 17 figures, to appear in ACM Transactions on Architecture & Code Optimization (TACO). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.10140
abstract: Deep learning is highly pervasive in today's data-intensive era. In particular, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are being widely adopted in a variety of fields for superior accuracy. However, computing deep CNNs on traditional CPUs and GPUs brings several performance and energy pitfalls. Several novel approaches based on ASIC, FPGA, and resistive-memory devices have been recently demonstrated with promising results. Most of them target only the inference (testing) phase of deep learning. There have been very limited attempts to design a full-fledged deep learning accelerator capable of both training and inference. It is due to the highly compute and memory-intensive nature of the training phase. In this paper, we propose LiteCON, a novel analog photonics CNN accelerator. LiteCON uses silicon microdisk-based convolution, memristor-based memory, and dense-wavelength-division-multiplexing for energy-efficient and ultrafast deep learning. We evaluate LiteCON using a commercial CAD framework (IPKISS) on deep learning benchmark models including LeNet and VGG-Net. Compared to the state-of-the-art, LiteCON improves the CNN throughput, energy efficiency, and computational efficiency by up to 32x, 37x, and 5x respectively with trivial accuracy degradation.
summary: Deep learning is highly pervasive in today's data-intensive era. In particular, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are being widely adopted in a variety of fields for superior accuracy. However, computing deep CNNs on traditional CPUs and GPUs brings several performance and energy pitfalls. Several novel approaches based on ASIC, FPGA, and resistive-memory devices have been recently demonstrated with promising results. Most of them target only the inference (testing) phase of deep learning. There have been very limited attempts to design a full-fledged deep learning accelerator capable of both training and inference. It is due to the highly compute and memory-intensive nature of the training phase. In this paper, we propose LiteCON, a novel analog photonics CNN accelerator. LiteCON uses silicon microdisk-based convolution, memristor-based memory, and dense-wavelength-division-multiplexing for energy-efficient and ultrafast deep learning. We evaluate LiteCON using a commercial CAD framework (IPKISS) on deep learning benchmark models including LeNet and VGG-Net. Compared to the state-of-the-art, LiteCON improves the CNN throughput, energy efficiency, and computational efficiency by up to 32x, 37x, and 5x respectively with trivial accuracy degradation.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在当今的数据密集型时代非常普遍。特别是，卷积神经网络（CNN）因其卓越的准确性而被广泛应用于各个领域。然而，在传统 CPU 和 GPU 上计算深度 CNN 会带来一些性能和能耗缺陷。最近已经展示了几种基于 ASIC、FPGA 和电阻存储器件的新颖方法，并取得了可喜的结果。其中大多数仅针对深度学习的推理（测试）阶段。设计能够进行训练和推理的成熟深度学习加速器的尝试非常有限。这是由于训练阶段的高度计算和内存密集型性质。在本文中，我们提出了 LiteCON，一种新型模拟光子 CNN 加速器。 LiteCON 使用基于硅微盘的卷积、基于忆阻器的存储器和密集波分复用来实现节能和超快的深度学习。我们使用商业 CAD 框架 (IPKISS) 在包括 LeNet 和 VGG-Net 在内的深度学习基准模型上评估 LiteCON。与最先进的技术相比，LiteCON 将 CNN 吞吐量、能源效率和计算效率分别提高了 32 倍、37 倍和 5 倍，而精度略有下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LiteCON，一种基于全光子技术的神经形态加速器，用于实现高效深度学习。
AI.motivation: 传统CPU/GPU在运行深度卷积神经网络时存在性能和能耗问题，现有加速方案多仅支持推理阶段，缺乏兼顾训练与推理的高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用硅微盘实现光子卷积、忆阻器存储权重，并结合密集波分复用技术，构建全光子计算架构。
AI.result: 相比现有方案，LiteCON在CNN吞吐量、能效和计算效率上分别提升32倍、37倍和5倍，且精度损失极小。
AI.conclusion: LiteCON通过光子技术突破了传统计算瓶颈，为兼顾训练与推理的深度学习加速提供了创新方案。

In particular, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) are being widely adopted in a variety of fields for superior accuracy. authors_text: Haitao Meng,Changcai Li,Gang Chen,Alois Knoll
title: Accurate and Real-time Pseudo Lidar Detection: Is Stereo Neural Network Really Necessary?
title_zh: 准确实时的伪激光雷达检测：立体神经网络真的有必要吗？
abstract: The proposal of Pseudo-Lidar representation has significantly narrowed the gap between visual-based and active Lidar-based 3D object detection. However, current researches exclusively focus on pushing the accuracy improvement of Pseudo-Lidar by taking the advantage of complex and time-consuming neural networks. Seldom explore the profound characteristics of Pseudo-Lidar representation to obtain the promoting opportunities. In this paper, we dive deep into the pseudo Lidar representation and argue that the performance of 3D object detection is not fully dependent on the high precision stereo depth estimation. We demonstrate that even for the unreliable depth estimation, with proper data processing and refining, it can achieve comparable 3D object detection accuracy. With this finding, we further show the possibility that utilizing fast but inaccurate stereo matching algorithms in the Pseudo-Lidar system to achieve low latency responsiveness. In the experiments, we develop a system with a less powerful stereo matching predictor and adopt the proposed refinement schemes to improve the accuracy. The evaluation on the KITTI benchmark shows that the presented system achieves competitive accuracy to the state-of-the-art approaches with only 23 ms computing, showing it is a suitable candidate for deploying to real car-hold applications.
summary: The proposal of Pseudo-Lidar representation has significantly narrowed the gap between visual-based and active Lidar-based 3D object detection. However, current researches exclusively focus on pushing the accuracy improvement of Pseudo-Lidar by taking the advantage of complex and time-consuming neural networks. Seldom explore the profound characteristics of Pseudo-Lidar representation to obtain the promoting opportunities. In this paper, we dive deep into the pseudo Lidar representation and argue that the performance of 3D object detection is not fully dependent on the high precision stereo depth estimation. We demonstrate that even for the unreliable depth estimation, with proper data processing and refining, it can achieve comparable 3D object detection accuracy. With this finding, we further show the possibility that utilizing fast but inaccurate stereo matching algorithms in the Pseudo-Lidar system to achieve low latency responsiveness. In the experiments, we develop a system with a less powerful stereo matching predictor and adopt the proposed refinement schemes to improve the accuracy. The evaluation on the KITTI benchmark shows that the presented system achieves competitive accuracy to the state-of-the-art approaches with only 23 ms computing, showing it is a suitable candidate for deploying to real car-hold applications.
abstract_zh: 伪激光雷达表示的提出显着缩小了基于视觉和主动激光雷达的 3D 物体检测之间的差距。然而，目前的研究主要集中在利用复杂且耗时的神经网络来推动伪激光雷达的精度提高。很少探索伪激光雷达表征的深刻特征以获得推广机会。在本文中，我们深入研究了伪激光雷达表示，并认为 3D 物体检测的性能并不完全依赖于高精度立体深度估计。我们证明，即使对于不可靠的深度估计，通过适当的数据处理和细化，它也可以实现可比的 3D 物体检测精度。通过这一发现，我们进一步展示了在伪激光雷达系统中利用快速但不准确的立体匹配算法来实现低延迟响应的可能性。在实验中，我们开发了一个具有不太强大的立体匹配预测器的系统，并采用所提出的细化方案来提高准确性。对 KITTI 基准的评估表明，所提出的系统仅用 23 毫秒的计算时间就达到了与最先进方法相比的竞争精度，表明它是部署到实际车载应用的合适候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需复杂立体神经网络的实时伪激光雷达检测方法，通过优化数据处理和深度估计提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度依赖复杂神经网络提升伪激光雷达精度，导致计算耗时且忽视了伪激光雷达本身特性，难以满足车载实时性需求。
AI.method: 采用低复杂度的立体匹配算法生成深度图，结合数据处理与深度优化方案（如深度图修正），在降低计算量的同时提升检测准确性。
AI.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，系统以仅23ms的计算时间达到与先进方法相当的检测精度，验证了方法的实时性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: 高精度立体神经网络并非伪激光雷达检测的必要条件，通过优化处理可实现低延迟、高精度的车载应用方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需复杂立体神经网络的实时伪激光雷达检测方法，通过优化数据处理和深度估计提升检测精度。
ai_content.motivation: 现有研究过度依赖复杂神经网络提升伪激光雷达精度，导致计算耗时且忽视了伪激光雷达本身特性，难以满足车载实时性需求。
ai_content.method: 采用低复杂度的立体匹配算法生成深度图，结合数据处理与深度优化方案（如深度图修正），在降低计算量的同时提升检测准确性。
ai_content.result: 在KITTI基准测试中，系统以仅23ms的计算时间达到与先进方法相当的检测精度，验证了方法的实时性与有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 高精度立体神经网络并非伪激光雷达检测的必要条件，通过优化处理可实现低延迟、高精度的车载应用方案。
