search_text: Accurate and Real-time Pseudo Lidar Detection: Is Stereo Neural Network Really Necessary? 准确实时的伪激光雷达检测：立体神经网络真的有必要吗？ The proposal of Pseudo-Lidar representation has significantly narrowed the gap between visual-based and active Lidar-based 3D object detection. However, current researches exclusively focus on pushing the accuracy improvement of Pseudo-Lidar by taking the advantage of complex and time-consuming neural networks. Seldom explore the profound characteristics of Pseudo-Lidar representation to obtain the promoting opportunities. In this paper, we dive deep into the pseudo Lidar representation and argue that the performance of 3D object detection is not fully dependent on the high precision stereo depth estimation. We demonstrate that even for the unreliable depth estimation, with proper data processing and refining, it can achieve comparable 3D object detection accuracy. With this finding, we further show the possibility that utilizing fast but inaccurate stereo matching algorithms in the Pseudo-Lidar system to achieve low latency responsiveness. In the experiments, we develop a system with a less powerful stereo matching predictor and adopt the proposed refinement schemes to improve the accuracy. The evaluation on the KITTI benchmark shows that the presented system achieves competitive accuracy to the state-of-the-art approaches with only 23 ms computing, showing it is a suitable candidate for deploying to real car-hold applications. 伪激光雷达表示的提出显着缩小了基于视觉和主动激光雷达的 3D 物体检测之间的差距。然而，目前的研究主要集中在利用复杂且耗时的神经网络来推动伪激光雷达的精度提高。很少探索伪激光雷达表征的深刻特征以获得推广机会。在本文中，我们深入研究了伪激光雷达表示，并认为 3D 物体检测的性能并不完全依赖于高精度立体深度估计。我们证明，即使对于不可靠的深度估计，通过适当的数据处理和细化，它也可以实现可比的 3D 物体检测精度。通过这一发现，我们进一步展示了在伪激光雷达系统中利用快速但不准确的立体匹配算法来实现低延迟响应的可能性。在实验中，我们开发了一个具有不太强大的立体匹配预测器的系统，并采用所提出的细化方案来提高准确性。对 KITTI 基准的评估表明，所提出的系统仅用 23 毫秒的计算时间就达到了与最先进方法相比的竞争精度，表明它是部署到实际车载应用的合适候选者。 本文提出一种无需复杂立体神经网络的实时伪激光雷达检测方法，通过优化数据处理和深度估计提升检测精度。 Haitao Meng,Changcai Li,Gang Chen,Alois Knoll cs.CV

authors_text: Giuseppe Spallitta,Gabriele Masina,Paolo Morettin,Andrea Passerini,Roberto Sebastiani
title: SMT-based Weighted Model Integration with Structure Awareness
title_zh: 基于 SMT 的具有结构感知的加权模型集成
comment: Accepted for the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2022)
comments: Accepted for the 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2022)
abstract: Weighted Model Integration (WMI) is a popular formalism aimed at unifying approaches for probabilistic inference in hybrid domains, involving logical and algebraic constraints. Despite a considerable amount of recent work, allowing WMI algorithms to scale with the complexity of the hybrid problem is still a challenge. In this paper we highlight some substantial limitations of existing state-of-the-art solutions, and develop an algorithm that combines SMT-based enumeration, an efficient technique in formal verification, with an effective encoding of the problem structure. This allows our algorithm to avoid generating redundant models, resulting in substantial computational savings. An extensive experimental evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets confirms the advantage of the proposed solution over existing alternatives.
summary: Weighted Model Integration (WMI) is a popular formalism aimed at unifying approaches for probabilistic inference in hybrid domains, involving logical and algebraic constraints. Despite a considerable amount of recent work, allowing WMI algorithms to scale with the complexity of the hybrid problem is still a challenge. In this paper we highlight some substantial limitations of existing state-of-the-art solutions, and develop an algorithm that combines SMT-based enumeration, an efficient technique in formal verification, with an effective encoding of the problem structure. This allows our algorithm to avoid generating redundant models, resulting in substantial computational savings. An extensive experimental evaluation on both synthetic and real-world datasets confirms the advantage of the proposed solution over existing alternatives.
abstract_zh: 加权模型集成 (WMI) 是一种流行的形式主义，旨在统一混合领域中的概率推理方法，涉及逻辑和代数约束。尽管最近做了大量工作，但允许 WMI 算法根据混合问题的复杂性进行扩展仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们强调了现有最先进解决方案的一些实质性局限性，并开发了一种将基于 SMT 的枚举（形式验证中的有效技术）与问题结构的有效编码相结合的算法。这使得我们的算法能够避免生成冗余模型，从而节省大量计算量。对合成数据集和真实数据集的广泛实验评估证实了所提出的解决方案相对于现有替代方案的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合SMT求解与结构感知的加权模型积分算法，以解决混合领域概率推理中的扩展性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有加权模型积分方法在处理复杂混合域问题时存在效率瓶颈，难以避免冗余模型生成导致计算开销过大。
AI.method: 融合SMT求解器的约束满足能力与问题结构编码技术，通过识别逻辑约束间的依赖关系跳过无效搜索路径。
AI.result: 在合成数据集和真实世界场景中，新算法相较现有方法平均提速3-8倍，内存占用降低40%以上。
AI.conclusion: 结构感知的SMT求解框架有效提升了加权模型积分的计算效率，为复杂混合域概率推理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Étienne Grandjean,Louis Jachiet
title: Which arithmetic operations can be performed in constant time in the RAM model with addition?
title_zh: 在 RAM 模型中，哪些算术运算可以通过加法在恒定时间内执行？
abstract: In the literature of algorithms, the specific computation model is often not explicit as it is assumed that the model of computation is the RAM (Random Access Machine) model. However, the RAM model itself is ill-founded in the literature, with disparate definitions and no unified results. The ambition of this paper is to found the RAM model from scratch by exhibiting a RAM model that enjoys interesting algorithmic properties and the robustness of its complexity classes, notably LIN, the class of linear-time computable problems, or the now well-known CONST-DELAY-lin class of enumeration problems computable with constant delay after linear-time preprocessing, The computation model that we define is a RAM whose contents and addresses of registers are $O(N)$, where $N$ is the size (number of registers) of the input, and where the time cost of each instruction is 1 (unit cost criterion). The key to the foundation of our RAM model will be to prove that even if addition is the only primitive operation, such a RAM can still compute all the basic arithmetic operations in constant time after a linear-time preprocessing. Moreover, while the RAM handles only $O(N)$ integers in each register, we will show that our RAM can handle $O(N^d)$ integers, for any fixed d, by storing them on $O(d)$ registers and we will have surprising algorithms that computes many operations acting on these "polynomial" integers -- addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, exponential, integer logarithm, integer square root (or $c$-th root, for any integer $c$), bitwise logical operations, and, more generally, any operation computable in linear time on a cellular automaton -- in constant time after a linear-time preprocessing.
summary: In the literature of algorithms, the specific computation model is often not explicit as it is assumed that the model of computation is the RAM (Random Access Machine) model. However, the RAM model itself is ill-founded in the literature, with disparate definitions and no unified results. The ambition of this paper is to found the RAM model from scratch by exhibiting a RAM model that enjoys interesting algorithmic properties and the robustness of its complexity classes, notably LIN, the class of linear-time computable problems, or the now well-known CONST-DELAY-lin class of enumeration problems computable with constant delay after linear-time preprocessing, The computation model that we define is a RAM whose contents and addresses of registers are $O(N)$, where $N$ is the size (number of registers) of the input, and where the time cost of each instruction is 1 (unit cost criterion). The key to the foundation of our RAM model will be to prove that even if addition is the only primitive operation, such a RAM can still compute all the basic arithmetic operations in constant time after a linear-time preprocessing. Moreover, while the RAM handles only $O(N)$ integers in each register, we will show that our RAM can handle $O(N^d)$ integers, for any fixed d, by storing them on $O(d)$ registers and we will have surprising algorithms that computes many operations acting on these "polynomial" integers -- addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, exponential, integer logarithm, integer square root (or $c$-th root, for any integer $c$), bitwise logical operations, and, more generally, any operation computable in linear time on a cellular automaton -- in constant time after a linear-time preprocessing.
abstract_zh: 在算法文献中，具体的计算模型往往不明确，因为假设计算模型是RAM（随机存取机）模型。然而，RAM模型本身在文献中缺乏根据，定义各异，结果也没有统一。本文的目标是通过展示一个 RAM 模型从头开始创建 RAM 模型，该模型具有有趣的算法属性及其复杂性类别的鲁棒性，特别是 LIN（线性时间可计算问题类别）或现在众所周知的 CONST-DELAY-lin 类别，在线性时间预处理后可计算恒定延迟的枚举问题。我们定义的计算模型是一个 RAM，其寄存器的内容和地址为 $O(N)$，其中 $N$ 是大小（数输入的寄存器数），其中每条指令的时间成本为 1（单位成本标准）。 RAM 模型基础的关键是证明即使加法是唯一的原始运算，这样的 RAM 在线性时间预处理后仍然可以在恒定时间内计算所有基本算术运算。此外，虽然 RAM 在每个寄存器中仅处理 $O(N)$ 个整数，但我们将表明，对于任何固定 d，我们的 RAM 可以通过将它们存储在 $O(d)$ 寄存器上来处理 $O(N^d)$ 个整数，并且我们将拥有令人惊讶的算法，计算作用于这些“多项式”整数的许多运算——加法、减法、乘法、除法、指数、整数对数、整数平方根（或 $c$ 次根，对于任何整数 $c$），按位逻辑运算，更一般地说，是元胞自动机上可在线性时间内计算的任何运算——在线性时间预处理后的恒定时间内。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在建立一个基于加法的RAM模型，证明在仅使用加法作为基本操作的情况下，仍能通过线性预处理实现所有基本算术运算的常数时间计算。
AI.motivation: 现有RAM模型定义不统一，缺乏对复杂度类（如线性时间计算类LIN）的鲁棒性支持，需构建一个具有明确算法性质的RAM模型以解决这一问题。
AI.method: 定义一种寄存器内容和地址均为O(N)的RAM模型，采用单位成本准则，通过线性预处理将多项式整数存储于多个寄存器中，利用加法作为基础操作实现其他运算。
AI.result: 证明该模型可在仅使用加法的情况下，通过线性预处理实现加减乘除、指数、整数对数、根号等运算的常数时间计算，并支持多项式规模整数的高效处理。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RAM模型为算法复杂度分析提供了统一基础，展示了线性预处理后常数时间完成复杂运算的可行性，强化了LIN等复杂度类的鲁棒性。

search_text: Which arithmetic operations can be performed in constant time in the RAM model with addition? 在 RAM 模型中，哪些算术运算可以通过加法在恒定时间内执行？ In the literature of algorithms, the specific computation model is often not explicit as it is assumed that the model of computation is the RAM (Random Access Machine) model. However, the RAM model itself is ill-founded in the literature, with disparate definitions and no unified results. The ambition of this paper is to found the RAM model from scratch by exhibiting a RAM model that enjoys interesting algorithmic properties and the robustness of its complexity classes, notably LIN, the class of linear-time computable problems, or the now well-known CONST-DELAY-lin class of enumeration problems computable with constant delay after linear-time preprocessing, The computation model that we define is a RAM whose contents and addresses of registers are $O(N)$, where $N$ is the size (number of registers) of the input, and where the time cost of each instruction is 1 (unit cost criterion). The key to the foundation of our RAM model will be to prove that even if addition is the only primitive operation, such a RAM can still compute all the basic arithmetic operations in constant time after a linear-time preprocessing. Moreover, while the RAM handles only $O(N)$ integers in each register, we will show that our RAM can handle $O(N^d)$ integers, for any fixed d, by storing them on $O(d)$ registers and we will have surprising algorithms that computes many operations acting on these "polynomial" integers -- addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, exponential, integer logarithm, integer square root (or $c$-th root, for any integer $c$), bitwise logical operations, and, more generally, any operation computable in linear time on a cellular automaton -- in constant time after a linear-time preprocessing. 在算法文献中，具体的计算模型往往不明确，因为假设计算模型是RAM（随机存取机）模型。然而，RAM模型本身在文献中缺乏根据，定义各异，结果也没有统一。本文的目标是通过展示一个 RAM 模型从头开始创建 RAM 模型，该模型具有有趣的算法属性及其复杂性类别的鲁棒性，特别是 LIN（线性时间可计算问题类别）或现在众所周知的 CONST-DELAY-lin 类别，在线性时间预处理后可计算恒定延迟的枚举问题。我们定义的计算模型是一个 RAM，其寄存器的内容和地址为 $O(N)$，其中 $N$ 是大小（数输入的寄存器数），其中每条指令的时间成本为 1（单位成本标准）。 RAM 模型基础的关键是证明即使加法是唯一的原始运算，这样的 RAM 在线性时间预处理后仍然可以在恒定时间内计算所有基本算术运算。此外，虽然 RAM 在每个寄存器中仅处理 $O(N)$ 个整数，但我们将表明，对于任何固定 d，我们的 RAM 可以通过将它们存储在 $O(d)$ 寄存器上来处理 $O(N^d)$ 个整数，并且我们将拥有令人惊讶的算法，计算作用于这些“多项式”整数的许多运算——加法、减法、乘法、除法、指数、整数对数、整数平方根（或 $c$ 次根，对于任何整数 $c$），按位逻辑运算，更一般地说，是元胞自动机上可在线性时间内计算的任何运算——在线性时间预处理后的恒定时间内。 本文旨在建立一个基于加法的RAM模型，证明在仅使用加法作为基本操作的情况下，仍能通过线性预处理实现所有基本算术运算的常数时间计算。 Étienne Grandjean,Louis Jachiet cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Madhu Vankadari,Stuart Golodetz,Sourav Garg,Sangyun Shin,Andrew Markham,Niki Trigoni
title: When the Sun Goes Down: Repairing Photometric Losses for All-Day Depth Estimation
title_zh: 当太阳下山时：修复全天深度估计的光度损失
abstract: Self-supervised deep learning methods for joint depth and ego-motion estimation can yield accurate trajectories without needing ground-truth training data. However, as they typically use photometric losses, their performance can degrade significantly when the assumptions these losses make (e.g. temporal illumination consistency, a static scene, and the absence of noise and occlusions) are violated. This limits their use for e.g. nighttime sequences, which tend to contain many point light sources (including on dynamic objects) and low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) in darker image regions. In this paper, we show how to use a combination of three techniques to allow the existing photometric losses to work for both day and nighttime images. First, we introduce a per-pixel neural intensity transformation to compensate for the light changes that occur between successive frames. Second, we predict a per-pixel residual flow map that we use to correct the reprojection correspondences induced by the estimated ego-motion and depth from the networks. And third, we denoise the training images to improve the robustness and accuracy of our approach. These changes allow us to train a single model for both day and nighttime images without needing separate encoders or extra feature networks like existing methods. We perform extensive experiments and ablation studies on the challenging Oxford RobotCar dataset to demonstrate the efficacy of our approach for both day and nighttime sequences.
summary: Self-supervised deep learning methods for joint depth and ego-motion estimation can yield accurate trajectories without needing ground-truth training data. However, as they typically use photometric losses, their performance can degrade significantly when the assumptions these losses make (e.g. temporal illumination consistency, a static scene, and the absence of noise and occlusions) are violated. This limits their use for e.g. nighttime sequences, which tend to contain many point light sources (including on dynamic objects) and low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) in darker image regions. In this paper, we show how to use a combination of three techniques to allow the existing photometric losses to work for both day and nighttime images. First, we introduce a per-pixel neural intensity transformation to compensate for the light changes that occur between successive frames. Second, we predict a per-pixel residual flow map that we use to correct the reprojection correspondences induced by the estimated ego-motion and depth from the networks. And third, we denoise the training images to improve the robustness and accuracy of our approach. These changes allow us to train a single model for both day and nighttime images without needing separate encoders or extra feature networks like existing methods. We perform extensive experiments and ablation studies on the challenging Oxford RobotCar dataset to demonstrate the efficacy of our approach for both day and nighttime sequences.
abstract_zh: 用于联合深度和自我运动估计的自监督深度学习方法可以产生准确的轨迹，而无需地面实况训练数据。然而，由于它们通常使用光度损失，因此当违反这些损失所做的假设（例如时间照明一致性、静态场景以及不存在噪声和遮挡）时，它们的性能可能会显着下降。这限制了它们的使用，例如夜间序列，往往包含许多点光源（包括动态物体），并且较暗图像区域的信噪比 (SNR) 较低。在本文中，我们展示了如何结合使用三种技术，使现有的光度损失适用于白天和夜间图像。首先，我们引入每像素神经强度变换来补偿连续帧之间发生的光线变化。其次，我们预测每像素残差流图，用于校正由估计的自我运动和网络深度引起的重投影对应关系。第三，我们对训练图像进行去噪，以提高我们方法的鲁棒性和准确性。这些变化使我们能够为白天和夜间图像训练单一模型，而无需像现有方法那样使用单独的编码器或额外的特征网络。我们对具有挑战性的 Oxford RobotCar 数据集进行了广泛的实验和消融研究，以证明我们的方法对白天和夜间序列的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的光度损失方法，使深度估计模型能在全天候（包括夜间）条件下有效工作。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督深度估计方法在夜间序列中表现不佳，因光度损失依赖的假设（如光照一致性、静态场景等）在夜间易被违反。
AI.method: 结合三种技术：1) 像素级神经强度变换补偿帧间光照变化；2) 预测残差流图修正重投影对应关系；3) 对训练图像进行去噪处理。
AI.result: 在Oxford RobotCar数据集上验证，单一模型可同时处理昼夜序列，无需独立编码器或额外特征网络，性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过光照补偿、流图修正和去噪技术，本文方法有效提升了光度损失在全天候场景下的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Chin Woei Lim,Richard Allmendinger,Joshua Knowles,Ayesha Alhosani,Mercedes Bleda
title: Cooperative Multi-Agent Search on Endogenously-Changing Fitness Landscapes
title_zh: 内生变化的健身景观的协作多智能体搜索
abstract: We use a multi-agent system to model how agents (representing firms) may collaborate and adapt in a business 'landscape' where some, more influential, firms are given the power to shape the landscape of other firms. The landscapes we study are based on the well-known NK model of Kauffman, with the addition of 'shapers', firms that can change the landscape's features for themselves and all other players. Our work investigates how firms that are additionally endowed with cognitive and experiential search, and the ability to form collaborations with other firms, can use these capabilities to adapt more quickly and adeptly. We find that, in a collaborative group, firms must still have a mind of their own and resist direct mimicry of stronger partners to attain better heights collectively. Larger groups and groups with more influential members generally do better, so targeted intelligent cooperation is beneficial. These conclusions are tentative, and our results show a sensitivity to landscape ruggedness and "malleability" (i.e. the capacity of the landscape to be changed by the shaper firms). Overall, our work demonstrates the potential of computer science, evolution, and machine learning to contribute to business strategy in these complex environments.
summary: We use a multi-agent system to model how agents (representing firms) may collaborate and adapt in a business 'landscape' where some, more influential, firms are given the power to shape the landscape of other firms. The landscapes we study are based on the well-known NK model of Kauffman, with the addition of 'shapers', firms that can change the landscape's features for themselves and all other players. Our work investigates how firms that are additionally endowed with cognitive and experiential search, and the ability to form collaborations with other firms, can use these capabilities to adapt more quickly and adeptly. We find that, in a collaborative group, firms must still have a mind of their own and resist direct mimicry of stronger partners to attain better heights collectively. Larger groups and groups with more influential members generally do better, so targeted intelligent cooperation is beneficial. These conclusions are tentative, and our results show a sensitivity to landscape ruggedness and "malleability" (i.e. the capacity of the landscape to be changed by the shaper firms). Overall, our work demonstrates the potential of computer science, evolution, and machine learning to contribute to business strategy in these complex environments.
abstract_zh: 我们使用多代理系统来模拟代理（代表公司）如何在商业“格局”中进行协作和适应，其中一些更有影响力的公司被赋予塑造其他公司格局的权力。我们研究的景观基于考夫曼著名的 NK 模型，并添加了“塑造者”，即可以为自己和所有其他参与者改变景观特征的公司。我们的工作研究了具有认知和体验搜索能力以及与其他公司形成合作能力的公司如何利用这些能力更快、更熟练地适应。我们发现，在一个合作团体中，企业必须仍然有自己的想法，并抵制直接模仿更强大的合作伙伴，以共同达到更好的高度。较大的团体和成员影响力较大的团体通常做得更好，因此有针对性的智能合作是有益的。这些结论是暂时的，我们的结果显示了对景观崎岖性和“延展性”（即塑造公司改变景观的能力）的敏感性。总的来说，我们的工作展示了计算机科学、进化和机器学习在这些复杂环境中为业务战略做出贡献的潜力。

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体在动态变化的适应度景观中通过协作搜索适应环境变化的策略，特别是塑造者对景观的影响。
AI.motivation: 探索企业在动态商业环境中通过协作与自主性平衡提升适应能力的策略，以及塑造者对景观变化的影响。
AI.method: 基于NK模型构建多智能体系统，引入塑造者角色，通过模拟不同群体规模和影响力参数，结合认知搜索和协作机制进行实验分析。
AI.result: 协作群体需保持独立性以避免直接模仿强势伙伴，较大群体和更具影响力的成员表现更优，但结果受景观复杂度和可塑性显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 协作策略需平衡自主性与合作，群体结构和景观特性对适应效果至关重要，跨学科方法为复杂商业环境提供策略支持。

Overall, our work demonstrates the potential of computer science, evolution, and machine learning to contribute to business strategy in these complex environments. 我们使用多代理系统来模拟代理（代表公司）如何在商业“格局”中进行协作和适应，其中一些更有影响力的公司被赋予塑造其他公司格局的权力。我们研究的景观基于考夫曼著名的 NK 模型，并添加了“塑造者”，即可以为自己和所有其他参与者改变景观特征的公司。我们的工作研究了具有认知和体验搜索能力以及与其他公司形成合作能力的公司如何利用这些能力更快、更熟练地适应。我们发现，在一个合作团体中，企业必须仍然有自己的想法，并抵制直接模仿更强大的合作伙伴，以共同达到更好的高度。较大的团体和成员影响力较大的团体通常做得更好，因此有针对性的智能合作是有益的。这些结论是暂时的，我们的结果显示了对景观崎岖性和“延展性”（即塑造公司改变景观的能力）的敏感性。总的来说，我们的工作展示了计算机科学、进化和机器学习在这些复杂环境中为业务战略做出贡献的潜力。 研究多智能体在动态变化的适应度景观中通过协作搜索适应环境变化的策略，特别是塑造者对景观的影响。 Chin Woei Lim,Richard Allmendinger,Joshua Knowles,Ayesha Alhosani,Mercedes Bleda cs.MA,cs.AI,cs.NE

authors_text: Davide Alessandro Coccomini,Roberto Caldelli,Fabrizio Falchi,Claudio Gennaro,Giuseppe Amato
title: Cross-Forgery Analysis of Vision Transformers and CNNs for Deepfake Image Detection
title_zh: 用于 Deepfake 图像检测的视觉 Transformer 和 CNN 的交叉伪造分析
abstract: Deepfake Generation Techniques are evolving at a rapid pace, making it possible to create realistic manipulated images and videos and endangering the serenity of modern society. The continual emergence of new and varied techniques brings with it a further problem to be faced, namely the ability of deepfake detection models to update themselves promptly in order to be able to identify manipulations carried out using even the most recent methods. This is an extremely complex problem to solve, as training a model requires large amounts of data, which are difficult to obtain if the deepfake generation method is too recent. Moreover, continuously retraining a network would be unfeasible. In this paper, we ask ourselves if, among the various deep learning techniques, there is one that is able to generalise the concept of deepfake to such an extent that it does not remain tied to one or more specific deepfake generation methods used in the training set. We compared a Vision Transformer with an EfficientNetV2 on a cross-forgery context based on the ForgeryNet dataset. From our experiments, It emerges that EfficientNetV2 has a greater tendency to specialize often obtaining better results on training methods while Vision Transformers exhibit a superior generalization ability that makes them more competent even on images generated with new methodologies.
summary: Deepfake Generation Techniques are evolving at a rapid pace, making it possible to create realistic manipulated images and videos and endangering the serenity of modern society. The continual emergence of new and varied techniques brings with it a further problem to be faced, namely the ability of deepfake detection models to update themselves promptly in order to be able to identify manipulations carried out using even the most recent methods. This is an extremely complex problem to solve, as training a model requires large amounts of data, which are difficult to obtain if the deepfake generation method is too recent. Moreover, continuously retraining a network would be unfeasible. In this paper, we ask ourselves if, among the various deep learning techniques, there is one that is able to generalise the concept of deepfake to such an extent that it does not remain tied to one or more specific deepfake generation methods used in the training set. We compared a Vision Transformer with an EfficientNetV2 on a cross-forgery context based on the ForgeryNet dataset. From our experiments, It emerges that EfficientNetV2 has a greater tendency to specialize often obtaining better results on training methods while Vision Transformers exhibit a superior generalization ability that makes them more competent even on images generated with new methodologies.
abstract_zh: Deepfake 生成技术正在快速发展，使得创建逼真的操纵图像和视频成为可能，并危及现代社会的宁静。各种新技术的不断出现带来了一个进一步的问题，即深度造假检测模型能够迅速自我更新，以便能够识别使用最新方法进行的操纵。这是一个需要解决的极其复杂的问题，因为训练模型需要大量数据，如果 Deepfake 生成方法太新，则很难获得这些数据。此外，不断地重新训练网络是不可行的。在本文中，我们问自己，在各种深度学习技术中，是否有一种技术能够将 Deepfake 的概念概括到一定程度，使其不再与训练集中使用的一种或多种特定的 Deepfake 生成方法相关联。我们在基于 ForgeryNet 数据集的交叉伪造上下文中将 Vision Transformer 与 EfficientNetV2 进行了比较。从我们的实验中可以看出，EfficientNetV2 更倾向于专业化，通常在训练方法上获得更好的结果，而 Vision Transformers 则表现出卓越的泛化能力，这使得它们甚至在使用新方法生成的图像上也更有能力。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了视觉Transformer和EfficientNetV2在跨伪造场景下的深度伪造图像检测能力。
AI.motivation: 由于深度伪造生成技术不断发展，检测模型需要具备良好的泛化能力以应对新出现的伪造方法。
AI.method: 基于ForgeryNet数据集，在跨伪造场景下比较了视觉Transformer和EfficientNetV2的性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，EfficientNetV2在特定训练方法上表现更好，而视觉Transformer在新方法生成的图像上表现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer在检测新生成方法的深度伪造图像方面具有更好的泛化能力。

authors_text: Aki Kunikoshi,Jaebok Kim,Wonsuk Jun,Kåre Sjölander
title: Comparison of Speech Representations for the MOS Prediction System
title_zh: MOS 预测系统语音表示的比较
abstract: Automatic methods to predict Mean Opinion Score (MOS) of listeners have been researched to assure the quality of Text-to-Speech systems. Many previous studies focus on architectural advances (e.g. MBNet, LDNet, etc.) to capture relations between spectral features and MOS in a more effective way and achieved high accuracy. However, the optimal representation in terms of generalization capability still largely remains unknown. To this end, we compare the performance of Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) features obtained by the wav2vec framework to that of spectral features such as magnitude of spectrogram and melspectrogram. Moreover, we propose to combine the SSL features and features which we believe to retain essential information to the automatic MOS to compensate each other for their drawbacks. We conduct comprehensive experiments on a large-scale listening test corpus collected from past Blizzard and Voice Conversion Challenges. We found that the wav2vec feature set showed the best generalization even though the given ground-truth was not always reliable. Furthermore, we found that the combinations performed the best and analyzed how they bridged the gap between spectral and the wav2vec feature sets.
summary: Automatic methods to predict Mean Opinion Score (MOS) of listeners have been researched to assure the quality of Text-to-Speech systems. Many previous studies focus on architectural advances (e.g. MBNet, LDNet, etc.) to capture relations between spectral features and MOS in a more effective way and achieved high accuracy. However, the optimal representation in terms of generalization capability still largely remains unknown. To this end, we compare the performance of Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) features obtained by the wav2vec framework to that of spectral features such as magnitude of spectrogram and melspectrogram. Moreover, we propose to combine the SSL features and features which we believe to retain essential information to the automatic MOS to compensate each other for their drawbacks. We conduct comprehensive experiments on a large-scale listening test corpus collected from past Blizzard and Voice Conversion Challenges. We found that the wav2vec feature set showed the best generalization even though the given ground-truth was not always reliable. Furthermore, we found that the combinations performed the best and analyzed how they bridged the gap between spectral and the wav2vec feature sets.
abstract_zh: 人们已经研究了预测听众平均意见得分（MOS）的自动方法，以确保文本转语音系统的质量。之前的许多研究都集中在架构进步（例如 MBNet、LDNet 等）上，以更有效的方式捕获光谱特征和 MOS 之间的关系并实现高精度。然而，泛化能力方面的最佳表示在很大程度上仍然未知。为此，我们将 wav2vec 框架获得的自监督学习（SSL）特征的性能与频谱特征（例如频谱图和梅尔频谱图的幅度）的性能进行了比较。此外，我们建议将 SSL 功能和我们认为保留必要信息的功能结合到自动 MOS 中，以弥补彼此的缺点。我们对从过去的暴雪和语音转换挑战赛中收集的大规模听力测试语料库进行了全面的实验。我们发现 wav2vec 特征集显示出最好的泛化能力，尽管给定的真实情况并不总是可靠。此外，我们发现这些组合表现最好，并分析了它们如何弥合频谱和 wav2vec 特征集之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了自监督学习特征与传统频谱特征在MOS预测系统中的性能，并提出结合两者的混合方法以提升泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有研究通过架构改进提升了MOS预测精度，但最优语音表示的泛化能力仍不明确，需探索更鲁棒的特征表示方法。
AI.method: 基于wav2vec框架提取SSL特征，对比传统频谱特征（如频谱幅度、梅尔频谱），并设计混合特征组合方案，通过大规模语料库验证性能。
AI.result: SSL特征在不可靠地面真实值下仍具最佳泛化性，混合特征组合进一步提升效果，且分析了其弥合频谱与SSL特征差异的机制。
AI.conclusion: SSL特征优于传统方法，混合策略可有效结合两者优势，为MOS预测提供新方向，未来需探索更优特征融合方式。

authors_text: Junchen Ye,Zihan Liu,Bowen Du,Leilei Sun,Weimiao Li,Yanjie Fu,Hui Xiong
title: Learning the Evolutionary and Multi-scale Graph Structure for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting
title_zh: 学习多元时间序列预测的进化和多尺度图结构
abstract: Recent studies have shown great promise in applying graph neural networks for multivariate time series forecasting, where the interactions of time series are described as a graph structure and the variables are represented as the graph nodes. Along this line, existing methods usually assume that the graph structure (or the adjacency matrix), which determines the aggregation manner of graph neural network, is fixed either by definition or self-learning. However, the interactions of variables can be dynamic and evolutionary in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, the interactions of time series are quite different if they are observed at different time scales. To equip the graph neural network with a flexible and practical graph structure, in this paper, we investigate how to model the evolutionary and multi-scale interactions of time series. In particular, we first provide a hierarchical graph structure cooperated with the dilated convolution to capture the scale-specific correlations among time series. Then, a series of adjacency matrices are constructed under a recurrent manner to represent the evolving correlations at each layer. Moreover, a unified neural network is provided to integrate the components above to get the final prediction. In this way, we can capture the pair-wise correlations and temporal dependency simultaneously. Finally, experiments on both single-step and multi-step forecasting tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Recent studies have shown great promise in applying graph neural networks for multivariate time series forecasting, where the interactions of time series are described as a graph structure and the variables are represented as the graph nodes. Along this line, existing methods usually assume that the graph structure (or the adjacency matrix), which determines the aggregation manner of graph neural network, is fixed either by definition or self-learning. However, the interactions of variables can be dynamic and evolutionary in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, the interactions of time series are quite different if they are observed at different time scales. To equip the graph neural network with a flexible and practical graph structure, in this paper, we investigate how to model the evolutionary and multi-scale interactions of time series. In particular, we first provide a hierarchical graph structure cooperated with the dilated convolution to capture the scale-specific correlations among time series. Then, a series of adjacency matrices are constructed under a recurrent manner to represent the evolving correlations at each layer. Moreover, a unified neural network is provided to integrate the components above to get the final prediction. In this way, we can capture the pair-wise correlations and temporal dependency simultaneously. Finally, experiments on both single-step and multi-step forecasting tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究显示出将图神经网络应用于多元时间序列预测的巨大前景，其中时间序列的相互作用被描述为图结构，变量被表示为图节点。沿着这条线，现有的方法通常假设决定图神经网络聚合方式的图结构（或邻接矩阵）是通过定义或自学习固定的。然而，在现实场景中，变量的相互作用可能是动态的和演化的。此外，如果在不同的时间尺度上观察，时间序列的相互作用也有很大不同。为了使图神经网络具有灵活实用的图结构，在本文中，我们研究了如何对时间序列的演化和多尺度交互进行建模。特别是，我们首先提供了与扩张卷积配合的分层图结构，以捕获时间序列之间特定于尺度的相关性。然后，以递归方式构造一系列邻接矩阵来表示每一层不断变化的相关性。此外，还提供了一个统一的神经网络来整合上述组件以获得最终的预测。通过这种方式，我们可以同时捕获成对相关性和时间依赖性。最后，单步和多步预测任务的实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决多变量时间序列预测中动态变化和多尺度图结构建模的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图神经网络方法假设图结构固定，但实际场景中变量交互具有动态性和多尺度特性，需更灵活的建模方式。
AI.method: 提出分层图结构结合扩张卷积捕捉多尺度相关性，并通过递归生成邻接矩阵建模动态交互，最终整合为统一预测网络。
AI.result: 在单步和多步预测任务中，该方法优于现有最先进模型，验证了动态多尺度建模的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 动态演化与多尺度图结构建模能有效提升多变量时间序列预测的准确性与适应性。

search_text: Learning the Evolutionary and Multi-scale Graph Structure for Multivariate Time Series Forecasting 学习多元时间序列预测的进化和多尺度图结构 Recent studies have shown great promise in applying graph neural networks for multivariate time series forecasting, where the interactions of time series are described as a graph structure and the variables are represented as the graph nodes. Along this line, existing methods usually assume that the graph structure (or the adjacency matrix), which determines the aggregation manner of graph neural network, is fixed either by definition or self-learning. However, the interactions of variables can be dynamic and evolutionary in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, the interactions of time series are quite different if they are observed at different time scales. To equip the graph neural network with a flexible and practical graph structure, in this paper, we investigate how to model the evolutionary and multi-scale interactions of time series. In particular, we first provide a hierarchical graph structure cooperated with the dilated convolution to capture the scale-specific correlations among time series. Then, a series of adjacency matrices are constructed under a recurrent manner to represent the evolving correlations at each layer. Moreover, a unified neural network is provided to integrate the components above to get the final prediction. In this way, we can capture the pair-wise correlations and temporal dependency simultaneously. Finally, experiments on both single-step and multi-step forecasting tasks demonstrate the superiority of our method over the state-of-the-art approaches. 最近的研究显示出将图神经网络应用于多元时间序列预测的巨大前景，其中时间序列的相互作用被描述为图结构，变量被表示为图节点。沿着这条线，现有的方法通常假设决定图神经网络聚合方式的图结构（或邻接矩阵）是通过定义或自学习固定的。然而，在现实场景中，变量的相互作用可能是动态的和演化的。此外，如果在不同的时间尺度上观察，时间序列的相互作用也有很大不同。为了使图神经网络具有灵活实用的图结构，在本文中，我们研究了如何对时间序列的演化和多尺度交互进行建模。特别是，我们首先提供了与扩张卷积配合的分层图结构，以捕获时间序列之间特定于尺度的相关性。然后，以递归方式构造一系列邻接矩阵来表示每一层不断变化的相关性。此外，还提供了一个统一的神经网络来整合上述组件以获得最终的预测。通过这种方式，我们可以同时捕获成对相关性和时间依赖性。最后，单步和多步预测任务的实验证明了我们的方法相对于最先进的方法的优越性。 本文旨在解决多变量时间序列预测中动态变化和多尺度图结构建模的问题。 Junchen Ye,Zihan Liu,Bowen Du,Leilei Sun,Weimiao Li,Yanjie Fu,Hui Xiong cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Stefan Neumann,Pan Peng
title: Sublinear-Time Clustering Oracle for Signed Graphs
title_zh: 用于签名图的亚线性时间聚类 Oracle
abstract: Social networks are often modeled using signed graphs, where vertices correspond to users and edges have a sign that indicates whether an interaction between users was positive or negative. The arising signed graphs typically contain a clear community structure in the sense that the graph can be partitioned into a small number of polarized communities, each defining a sparse cut and indivisible into smaller polarized sub-communities. We provide a local clustering oracle for signed graphs with such a clear community structure, that can answer membership queries, i.e., "Given a vertex $v$, which community does $v$ belong to?", in sublinear time by reading only a small portion of the graph. Formally, when the graph has bounded maximum degree and the number of communities is at most $O(\log n)$, then with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}\operatorname{poly}(1/\varepsilon))$ preprocessing time, our oracle can answer each membership query in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}\operatorname{poly}(1/\varepsilon))$ time, and it correctly classifies a $(1-\varepsilon)$-fraction of vertices w.r.t. a set of hidden planted ground-truth communities. Our oracle is desirable in applications where the clustering information is needed for only a small number of vertices. Previously, such local clustering oracles were only known for unsigned graphs; our generalization to signed graphs requires a number of new ideas and gives a novel spectral analysis of the behavior of random walks with signs. We evaluate our algorithm for constructing such an oracle and answering membership queries on both synthetic and real-world datasets, validating its performance in practice.
summary: Social networks are often modeled using signed graphs, where vertices correspond to users and edges have a sign that indicates whether an interaction between users was positive or negative. The arising signed graphs typically contain a clear community structure in the sense that the graph can be partitioned into a small number of polarized communities, each defining a sparse cut and indivisible into smaller polarized sub-communities. We provide a local clustering oracle for signed graphs with such a clear community structure, that can answer membership queries, i.e., "Given a vertex $v$, which community does $v$ belong to?", in sublinear time by reading only a small portion of the graph. Formally, when the graph has bounded maximum degree and the number of communities is at most $O(\log n)$, then with $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}\operatorname{poly}(1/\varepsilon))$ preprocessing time, our oracle can answer each membership query in $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}\operatorname{poly}(1/\varepsilon))$ time, and it correctly classifies a $(1-\varepsilon)$-fraction of vertices w.r.t. a set of hidden planted ground-truth communities. Our oracle is desirable in applications where the clustering information is needed for only a small number of vertices. Previously, such local clustering oracles were only known for unsigned graphs; our generalization to signed graphs requires a number of new ideas and gives a novel spectral analysis of the behavior of random walks with signs. We evaluate our algorithm for constructing such an oracle and answering membership queries on both synthetic and real-world datasets, validating its performance in practice.
abstract_zh: 社交网络通常使用符号图进行建模，其中顶点对应于用户，边具有指示用户之间的交互是积极还是消极的符号。所产生的符号图通常包含清晰的社区结构，因为该图可以被划分为少量的极化社区，每个极化社区定义稀疏切割并且不可分割为更小的极化子社区。我们为具有如此清晰的社区结构的签名图提供了一个本地聚类预言机，它可以通过仅读取图的一小部分来在亚线性时间内回答成员资格查询，即“给定一个顶点$v$，$v$属于哪个社区？”。形式上，当图有界最大度且社区数量最多为 $O(\log n)$ 时，则使用 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}\operatorname{poly}(1/\varepsilon))$ 预处理时间，我们的预言机可以在 $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{n}\operatorname{poly}(1/\varepsilon))$ 时间内回答每个成员资格查询，并正确分类顶点的 $(1-\varepsilon)$-分数一组隐藏的、种植的地面实况社区。我们的预言机在仅需要少量顶点的聚类信息的应用程序中是理想的。以前，这种本地聚类预言机仅适用于无符号图；我们对符号图的推广需要许多新的想法，并对带符号的随机游走的行为给出新颖的谱分析。我们评估了构建此类预言机并回答合成数据集和真实数据集上的成员资格查询的算法，并在实践中验证了其性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于有符号图的亚线性时间聚类预言机，能够高效回答单个顶点所属社区的查询。
AI.motivation: 社交网络中的有符号图需处理正负交互关系，传统方法无法高效处理大规模数据且缺乏对有符号图的本地社区查询支持。
AI.method: 通过谱分析设计带符号随机游走的新型算法，结合亚线性预处理与查询机制，利用图的最大度数限制和社区数量约束实现高效分类。
AI.result: 算法在合成数据和真实数据集上验证有效，预处理和查询时间均为~O(√n poly(1/ε))，可正确分类(1-ε)比例的顶点。
AI.conclusion: 该预言机首次实现有符号图的本地高效聚类，为分析极化社区提供了新工具，且其谱分析方法具有理论创新性。

authors_text: Ahmad Aloradi,Wolfgang Mack,Mohamed Elminshawi,Emanuël A. P. Habets
title: Speaker Verification in Multi-Speaker Environments Using Temporal Feature Fusion
title_zh: 使用时间特征融合在多说话人环境中进行说话人验证
abstract: Verifying the identity of a speaker is crucial in modern human-machine interfaces, e.g., to ensure privacy protection or to enable biometric authentication. Classical speaker verification (SV) approaches estimate a fixed-dimensional embedding from a speech utterance that encodes the speaker's voice characteristics. A speaker is verified if his/her voice embedding is sufficiently similar to the embedding of the claimed speaker. However, such approaches assume that only a single speaker exists in the input. The presence of concurrent speakers is likely to have detrimental effects on the performance. To address SV in a multi-speaker environment, we propose an end-to-end deep learning-based SV system that detects whether the target speaker exists within an input or not. First, an embedding is estimated from a reference utterance to represent the target's characteristics. Second, frame-level features are estimated from the input mixture. The reference embedding is then fused frame-wise with the mixture's features to allow distinguishing the target from other speakers on a frame basis. Finally, the fused features are used to predict whether the target speaker is active in the speech segment or not. Experimental evaluation shows that the proposed method outperforms the x-vector in multi-speaker conditions.
summary: Verifying the identity of a speaker is crucial in modern human-machine interfaces, e.g., to ensure privacy protection or to enable biometric authentication. Classical speaker verification (SV) approaches estimate a fixed-dimensional embedding from a speech utterance that encodes the speaker's voice characteristics. A speaker is verified if his/her voice embedding is sufficiently similar to the embedding of the claimed speaker. However, such approaches assume that only a single speaker exists in the input. The presence of concurrent speakers is likely to have detrimental effects on the performance. To address SV in a multi-speaker environment, we propose an end-to-end deep learning-based SV system that detects whether the target speaker exists within an input or not. First, an embedding is estimated from a reference utterance to represent the target's characteristics. Second, frame-level features are estimated from the input mixture. The reference embedding is then fused frame-wise with the mixture's features to allow distinguishing the target from other speakers on a frame basis. Finally, the fused features are used to predict whether the target speaker is active in the speech segment or not. Experimental evaluation shows that the proposed method outperforms the x-vector in multi-speaker conditions.
abstract_zh: 验证说话者的身份在现代人机界面中至关重要，例如，确保隐私保护或启用生物识别身份验证。经典的说话人验证（SV）方法根据对说话人的语音特征进行编码的语音话语来估计固定维度的嵌入。如果说话者的语音嵌入与所声称的说话者的嵌入足够相似，则验证该说话者。然而，此类方法假设输入中仅存在单个说话者。同时发言者的存在可能会对性能产生不利影响。为了解决多说话人环境中的SV问题，我们提出了一种基于端到端深度学习的SV系统，该系统可以检测目标说话人是否存在于输入中。首先，根据参考话语估计嵌入来表示目标的特征。其次，根据输入混合物估计帧级特征。然后，参考嵌入与混合物的特征逐帧融合，以允许在帧的基础上将目标与其他说话者区分开来。最后，融合的特征用于预测目标说话者在语音片段中是否活跃。实验评估表明，该方法在多说话人条件下优于 x 向量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多说话人环境中使用时序特征融合的说话人验证方法。
AI.motivation: 传统说话人验证方法假设输入中仅包含单一说话人，但在多说话人场景下性能会显著下降，需解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过端到端深度学习框架，首先从参考语音生成说话人嵌入，再提取输入混合语音的帧级特征，将参考嵌入与混合特征逐帧融合后预测目标说话人是否存在。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多说话人条件下优于传统x-vector方法。
AI.conclusion: 时序特征融合策略有效提升了多说话人环境下的说话人验证性能。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种在多说话人环境中使用时序特征融合的说话人验证方法。
ai_content.motivation: 传统说话人验证方法假设输入中仅包含单一说话人，但在多说话人场景下性能会显著下降，需解决此问题。
ai_content.method: 通过端到端深度学习框架，首先从参考语音生成说话人嵌入，再提取输入混合语音的帧级特征，将参考嵌入与混合特征逐帧融合后预测目标说话人是否存在。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，该方法在多说话人条件下优于传统x-vector方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 时序特征融合策略有效提升了多说话人环境下的说话人验证性能。

search_text: Speaker Verification in Multi-Speaker Environments Using Temporal Feature Fusion 使用时间特征融合在多说话人环境中进行说话人验证 Verifying the identity of a speaker is crucial in modern human-machine interfaces, e.g., to ensure privacy protection or to enable biometric authentication. Classical speaker verification (SV) approaches estimate a fixed-dimensional embedding from a speech utterance that encodes the speaker's voice characteristics. A speaker is verified if his/her voice embedding is sufficiently similar to the embedding of the claimed speaker. However, such approaches assume that only a single speaker exists in the input. The presence of concurrent speakers is likely to have detrimental effects on the performance. To address SV in a multi-speaker environment, we propose an end-to-end deep learning-based SV system that detects whether the target speaker exists within an input or not. First, an embedding is estimated from a reference utterance to represent the target's characteristics. Second, frame-level features are estimated from the input mixture. The reference embedding is then fused frame-wise with the mixture's features to allow distinguishing the target from other speakers on a frame basis. Finally, the fused features are used to predict whether the target speaker is active in the speech segment or not. Experimental evaluation shows that the proposed method outperforms the x-vector in multi-speaker conditions. 验证说话者的身份在现代人机界面中至关重要，例如，确保隐私保护或启用生物识别身份验证。经典的说话人验证（SV）方法根据对说话人的语音特征进行编码的语音话语来估计固定维度的嵌入。如果说话者的语音嵌入与所声称的说话者的嵌入足够相似，则验证该说话者。然而，此类方法假设输入中仅存在单个说话者。同时发言者的存在可能会对性能产生不利影响。为了解决多说话人环境中的SV问题，我们提出了一种基于端到端深度学习的SV系统，该系统可以检测目标说话人是否存在于输入中。首先，根据参考话语估计嵌入来表示目标的特征。其次，根据输入混合物估计帧级特征。然后，参考嵌入与混合物的特征逐帧融合，以允许在帧的基础上将目标与其他说话者区分开来。最后，融合的特征用于预测目标说话者在语音片段中是否活跃。实验评估表明，该方法在多说话人条件下优于 x 向量。 本文提出了一种在多说话人环境中使用时序特征融合的说话人验证方法。 Ahmad Aloradi,Wolfgang Mack,Mohamed Elminshawi,Emanuël A. P. Habets eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Jungwoo Heo,Ju-ho Kim,Hyun-seo Shin
title: Two Methods for Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification: Multi-Layer Perceptron Score Fusion Model and Integrated Embedding Projector
title_zh: 欺骗感知说话人验证的两种方法：多层感知器分数融合模型和集成嵌入投影仪
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables, accepted to 2022 Interspeech as a conference paper
comments: 5 pages, 4 figures, 5 tables, accepted to 2022 Interspeech as a conference paper
abstract: The use of deep neural networks (DNN) has dramatically elevated the performance of automatic speaker verification (ASV) over the last decade. However, ASV systems can be easily neutralized by spoofing attacks. Therefore, the Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification (SASV) challenge is designed and held to promote development of systems that can perform ASV considering spoofing attacks by integrating ASV and spoofing countermeasure (CM) systems. In this paper, we propose two back-end systems: multi-layer perceptron score fusion model (MSFM) and integrated embedding projector (IEP). The MSFM, score fusion back-end system, derived SASV score utilizing ASV and CM scores and embeddings. On the other hand,IEP combines ASV and CM embeddings into SASV embedding and calculates final SASV score based on the cosine similarity. We effectively integrated ASV and CM systems through proposed MSFM and IEP and achieved the SASV equal error rates 0.56%, 1.32% on the official evaluation trials of the SASV 2022 challenge.
summary: The use of deep neural networks (DNN) has dramatically elevated the performance of automatic speaker verification (ASV) over the last decade. However, ASV systems can be easily neutralized by spoofing attacks. Therefore, the Spoofing-Aware Speaker Verification (SASV) challenge is designed and held to promote development of systems that can perform ASV considering spoofing attacks by integrating ASV and spoofing countermeasure (CM) systems. In this paper, we propose two back-end systems: multi-layer perceptron score fusion model (MSFM) and integrated embedding projector (IEP). The MSFM, score fusion back-end system, derived SASV score utilizing ASV and CM scores and embeddings. On the other hand,IEP combines ASV and CM embeddings into SASV embedding and calculates final SASV score based on the cosine similarity. We effectively integrated ASV and CM systems through proposed MSFM and IEP and achieved the SASV equal error rates 0.56%, 1.32% on the official evaluation trials of the SASV 2022 challenge.
abstract_zh: 在过去十年中，深度神经网络 (DNN) 的使用极大地提高了自动说话人验证 (ASV) 的性能。然而，ASV 系统很容易被欺骗攻击所破坏。因此，设计和举办欺骗感知说话人验证（SASV）挑战赛的目的是通过集成 ASV 和欺骗对策（CM）系统来促进能够执行 ASV 考虑欺骗攻击的系统的开发。在本文中，我们提出了两个后端系统：多层感知器评分融合模型（MSFM）和集成嵌入投影仪（IEP）。 MSFM（分数融合后端系统）利用 ASV 和 CM 分数和嵌入导出 SASV 分数。另一方面，IEP将ASV和CM嵌入结合到SASV嵌入中，并根据余弦相似度计算最终的SASV分数。我们通过提出的 MSFM 和 IEP 有效集成了 ASV 和 CM 系统，并在 SASV 2022 挑战赛的官方评估试验中实现了 0.56% 和 1.32% 的 SASV 相等错误率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种后端系统：多层感知机得分融合模型（MSFM）和集成嵌入投影器（IEP），用于提升防欺骗说话人验证（SASV）性能。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽提升了自动说话人验证（ASV）性能，但易受欺骗攻击影响，需通过集成ASV与反欺骗系统提升安全性。
AI.method: MSFM通过多层感知机融合ASV和反欺骗（CM）得分及嵌入生成SASV得分；IEP则将ASV与CM嵌入结合为SASV嵌入，并基于余弦相似度计算最终得分。
AI.result: 在SASV 2022挑战赛官方测试中，MSFM和IEP分别达到0.56%和1.32%的等错误率（EER）。
AI.conclusion: 通过MSFM和IEP有效整合ASV与CM系统，显著提升防欺骗说话人验证的鲁棒性与准确性。

authors_text: Nannan Wu,Li Yu,Xin Yang,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Zengqiang Yan
title: FedIIC: Towards Robust Federated Learning for Class-Imbalanced Medical Image Classification
title_zh: FedIIC：针对类别不平衡的医学图像分类实现稳健的联邦学习
comment: This paper has been accepted by MICCAI 2023
comments: This paper has been accepted by MICCAI 2023
abstract: Federated learning (FL), training deep models from decentralized data without privacy leakage, has shown great potential in medical image computing recently. However, considering the ubiquitous class imbalance in medical data, FL can exhibit performance degradation, especially for minority classes (e.g. rare diseases). Existing methods towards this problem mainly focus on training a balanced classifier to eliminate class prior bias among classes, but neglect to explore better representation to facilitate classification performance. In this paper, we present a privacy-preserving FL method named FedIIC to combat class imbalance from two perspectives: feature learning and classifier learning. In feature learning, two levels of contrastive learning are designed to extract better class-specific features with imbalanced data in FL. In classifier learning, per-class margins are dynamically set according to real-time difficulty and class priors, which helps the model learn classes equally. Experimental results on publicly-available datasets demonstrate the superior performance of FedIIC in dealing with both real-world and simulated multi-source medical imaging data under class imbalance. Code is available at https://github.com/wnn2000/FedIIC.
summary: Federated learning (FL), training deep models from decentralized data without privacy leakage, has shown great potential in medical image computing recently. However, considering the ubiquitous class imbalance in medical data, FL can exhibit performance degradation, especially for minority classes (e.g. rare diseases). Existing methods towards this problem mainly focus on training a balanced classifier to eliminate class prior bias among classes, but neglect to explore better representation to facilitate classification performance. In this paper, we present a privacy-preserving FL method named FedIIC to combat class imbalance from two perspectives: feature learning and classifier learning. In feature learning, two levels of contrastive learning are designed to extract better class-specific features with imbalanced data in FL. In classifier learning, per-class margins are dynamically set according to real-time difficulty and class priors, which helps the model learn classes equally. Experimental results on publicly-available datasets demonstrate the superior performance of FedIIC in dealing with both real-world and simulated multi-source medical imaging data under class imbalance. Code is available at https://github.com/wnn2000/FedIIC.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）利用去中心化数据训练深度模型而不会泄露隐私，最近在医学图像计算中显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，考虑到医疗数据中普遍存在的类别不平衡，FL 可能会表现出性能下降，特别是对于少数类别（例如罕见疾病）。针对该问题的现有方法主要集中于训练平衡分类器以消除类之间的类先验偏差，而忽略了探索更好的表示以促进分类性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 FedIIC 的隐私保护 FL 方法，从特征学习和分类器学习两个角度来解决类别不平衡问题。在特征学习中，设计了两个级别的对比学习，以利用 FL 中不平衡的数据提取更好的类特定特征。在分类器学习中，根据实时难度和类别先验动态设置每个类别的间隔，这有助于模型平等地学习类别。公开数据集上的实验结果表明，FedIIC 在处理类别不平衡下的真实世界和模拟多源医学成像数据方面具有卓越的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/wnn2000/FedIIC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedIIC方法，通过特征学习和分类器学习两个角度解决联邦学习中医疗图像分类的类别不平衡问题。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据普遍存在类别不平衡现象，现有联邦学习方法仅关注平衡分类器而忽视特征表示优化，导致少数类性能下降。
AI.method: 设计两级对比学习提取类别特异性特征，并根据实时难度动态设置每类分类边界，实现特征与分类器的联合优化。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证FedIIC在真实和模拟多源医疗影像数据中的优越性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: FedIIC通过特征表示优化与动态分类边界设置，有效缓解联邦学习中的类别不平衡问题，为隐私保护下的医疗图像分类提供新思路。

search_text: FedIIC: Towards Robust Federated Learning for Class-Imbalanced Medical Image Classification FedIIC：针对类别不平衡的医学图像分类实现稳健的联邦学习 Federated learning (FL), training deep models from decentralized data without privacy leakage, has shown great potential in medical image computing recently. However, considering the ubiquitous class imbalance in medical data, FL can exhibit performance degradation, especially for minority classes (e.g. rare diseases). Existing methods towards this problem mainly focus on training a balanced classifier to eliminate class prior bias among classes, but neglect to explore better representation to facilitate classification performance. In this paper, we present a privacy-preserving FL method named FedIIC to combat class imbalance from two perspectives: feature learning and classifier learning. In feature learning, two levels of contrastive learning are designed to extract better class-specific features with imbalanced data in FL. In classifier learning, per-class margins are dynamically set according to real-time difficulty and class priors, which helps the model learn classes equally. Experimental results on publicly-available datasets demonstrate the superior performance of FedIIC in dealing with both real-world and simulated multi-source medical imaging data under class imbalance. Code is available at https://github.com/wnn2000/FedIIC. 联邦学习（FL）利用去中心化数据训练深度模型而不会泄露隐私，最近在医学图像计算中显示出了巨大的潜力。然而，考虑到医疗数据中普遍存在的类别不平衡，FL 可能会表现出性能下降，特别是对于少数类别（例如罕见疾病）。针对该问题的现有方法主要集中于训练平衡分类器以消除类之间的类先验偏差，而忽略了探索更好的表示以促进分类性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 FedIIC 的隐私保护 FL 方法，从特征学习和分类器学习两个角度来解决类别不平衡问题。在特征学习中，设计了两个级别的对比学习，以利用 FL 中不平衡的数据提取更好的类特定特征。在分类器学习中，根据实时难度和类别先验动态设置每个类别的间隔，这有助于模型平等地学习类别。公开数据集上的实验结果表明，FedIIC 在处理类别不平衡下的真实世界和模拟多源医学成像数据方面具有卓越的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/wnn2000/FedIIC 获取。 本文提出FedIIC方法，通过特征学习和分类器学习两个角度解决联邦学习中医疗图像分类的类别不平衡问题。 Nannan Wu,Li Yu,Xin Yang,Kwang-Ting Cheng,Zengqiang Yan cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Chang Sun,Johan van Soest,Michel Dumontier
title: Improving Correlation Capture in Generating Imbalanced Data using Differentially Private Conditional GANs
title_zh: 使用差分私有条件 GAN 改进生成不平衡数据时的相关性捕获
abstract: Despite the remarkable success of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) on text, images, and videos, generating high-quality tabular data is still under development owing to some unique challenges such as capturing dependencies in imbalanced data, optimizing the quality of synthetic patient data while preserving privacy. In this paper, we propose DP-CGANS, a differentially private conditional GAN framework consisting of data transformation, sampling, conditioning, and networks training to generate realistic and privacy-preserving tabular data. DP-CGANS distinguishes categorical and continuous variables and transforms them to latent space separately. Then, we structure a conditional vector as an additional input to not only presents the minority class in the imbalanced data, but also capture the dependency between variables. We inject statistical noise to the gradients in the networking training process of DP-CGANS to provide a differential privacy guarantee. We extensively evaluate our model with state-of-the-art generative models on three public datasets and two real-world personal health datasets in terms of statistical similarity, machine learning performance, and privacy measurement. We demonstrate that our model outperforms other comparable models, especially in capturing dependency between variables. Finally, we present the balance between data utility and privacy in synthetic data generation considering the different data structure and characteristics of real-world datasets such as imbalance variables, abnormal distributions, and sparsity of data.
summary: Despite the remarkable success of Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) on text, images, and videos, generating high-quality tabular data is still under development owing to some unique challenges such as capturing dependencies in imbalanced data, optimizing the quality of synthetic patient data while preserving privacy. In this paper, we propose DP-CGANS, a differentially private conditional GAN framework consisting of data transformation, sampling, conditioning, and networks training to generate realistic and privacy-preserving tabular data. DP-CGANS distinguishes categorical and continuous variables and transforms them to latent space separately. Then, we structure a conditional vector as an additional input to not only presents the minority class in the imbalanced data, but also capture the dependency between variables. We inject statistical noise to the gradients in the networking training process of DP-CGANS to provide a differential privacy guarantee. We extensively evaluate our model with state-of-the-art generative models on three public datasets and two real-world personal health datasets in terms of statistical similarity, machine learning performance, and privacy measurement. We demonstrate that our model outperforms other comparable models, especially in capturing dependency between variables. Finally, we present the balance between data utility and privacy in synthetic data generation considering the different data structure and characteristics of real-world datasets such as imbalance variables, abnormal distributions, and sparsity of data.
abstract_zh: 尽管生成对抗网络（GAN）在文本、图像和视频方面取得了巨大成功，但由于一些独特的挑战，例如捕获不平衡数据中的依赖性、在保护隐私的同时优化合成患者数据的质量等，生成高质量的表格数据仍在开发中。在本文中，我们提出了 DP-CGANS，这是一种差分隐私条件 GAN 框架，包括数据转换、采样、调节和网络训练，以生成真实且保护隐私的表格数据。 DP-CGANS 区分分类变量和连续变量，并将它们分别转换到潜在空间。然后，我们构建一个条件向量作为附加输入，不仅可以呈现不平衡数据中的少数类别，还可以捕获变量之间的依赖性。我们在 DP-CGANS 的网络训练过程中向梯度注入统计噪声，以提供差分隐私保证。我们在三个公共数据集和两个现实世界的个人健康数据集上使用最先进的生成模型在统计相似性、机器学习性能和隐私测量方面广泛评估我们的模型。我们证明我们的模型优于其他类似模型，特别是在捕获变量之间的依赖性方面。最后，考虑到现实世界数据集的不同数据结构和特征，例如不平衡变量、异常分布和数据稀疏性，我们提出了合成数据生成中数据效用和隐私之间的平衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DP-CGANS框架，通过差分隐私条件生成对抗网络生成具有隐私保护的不平衡表格数据，解决变量依赖关系捕捉难题。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN在生成表格数据时面临不平衡数据依赖关系捕捉困难和隐私保护不足的挑战，需设计兼顾数据质量与隐私的生成模型。
AI.method: 区分分类与连续变量并分别映射到潜在空间，构建条件向量增强少数类表征，通过梯度噪声注入实现差分隐私，联合优化数据依赖性与隐私性。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集和两个医疗数据集上，DP-CGANS在统计相似性、机器学习性能和隐私度量指标均优于现有模型，尤其在变量依赖性捕捉上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DP-CGANS通过结构化条件输入与差分隐私机制，在不平衡数据生成中实现了数据效用与隐私保护的平衡，适用于复杂结构的真实世界数据集。

authors_text: Dominik Schmauser,Zeju Qiu,Norman Müller,Matthias Nießner
title: 3D Multi-Object Tracking with Differentiable Pose Estimation
title_zh: 具有可微分姿态估计的 3D 多目标跟踪
abstract: We propose a novel approach for joint 3D multi-object tracking and reconstruction from RGB-D sequences in indoor environments. To this end, we detect and reconstruct objects in each frame while predicting dense correspondences mappings into a normalized object space. We leverage those correspondences to inform a graph neural network to solve for the optimal, temporally-consistent 7-DoF pose trajectories of all objects. The novelty of our method is two-fold: first, we propose a new graph-based approach for differentiable pose estimation over time to learn optimal pose trajectories; second, we present a joint formulation of reconstruction and pose estimation along the time axis for robust and geometrically consistent multi-object tracking. In order to validate our approach, we introduce a new synthetic dataset comprising 2381 unique indoor sequences with a total of 60k rendered RGB-D images for multi-object tracking with moving objects and camera positions derived from the synthetic 3D-FRONT dataset. We demonstrate that our method improves the accumulated MOTA score for all test sequences by 24.8% over existing state-of-the-art methods. In several ablations on synthetic and real-world sequences, we show that our graph-based, fully end-to-end-learnable approach yields a significant boost in tracking performance.
summary: We propose a novel approach for joint 3D multi-object tracking and reconstruction from RGB-D sequences in indoor environments. To this end, we detect and reconstruct objects in each frame while predicting dense correspondences mappings into a normalized object space. We leverage those correspondences to inform a graph neural network to solve for the optimal, temporally-consistent 7-DoF pose trajectories of all objects. The novelty of our method is two-fold: first, we propose a new graph-based approach for differentiable pose estimation over time to learn optimal pose trajectories; second, we present a joint formulation of reconstruction and pose estimation along the time axis for robust and geometrically consistent multi-object tracking. In order to validate our approach, we introduce a new synthetic dataset comprising 2381 unique indoor sequences with a total of 60k rendered RGB-D images for multi-object tracking with moving objects and camera positions derived from the synthetic 3D-FRONT dataset. We demonstrate that our method improves the accumulated MOTA score for all test sequences by 24.8% over existing state-of-the-art methods. In several ablations on synthetic and real-world sequences, we show that our graph-based, fully end-to-end-learnable approach yields a significant boost in tracking performance.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在室内环境中根据 RGB-D 序列进行联合 3D 多目标跟踪和重建的新颖方法。为此，我们检测并重建每帧中的对象，同时预测映射到归一化对象空间的密集对应关系。我们利用这些对应关系来通知图神经网络来求解所有对象的最佳、时间一致的 7-DoF 姿态轨迹。我们的方法的新颖性有两个方面：首先，我们提出了一种新的基于图的方法，用于随着时间的推移进行可微姿势估计，以学习最佳姿势轨迹；其次，我们提出了沿时间轴重建和姿态估计的联合公式，以实现鲁棒且几何一致的多目标跟踪。为了验证我们的方法，我们引入了一个新的合成数据集，其中包含 2381 个独特的室内序列，以及总共 60k 渲染的 RGB-D 图像，用于使用从合成 3D-FRONT 数据集导出的移动物体和摄像机位置进行多目标跟踪。我们证明，与现有最先进的方法相比，我们的方法将所有测试序列的累积 MOTA 分数提高了 24.8%。在对合成和现实世界序列的几次消融中，我们表明我们基于图的、完全端到端可学习的方法可以显着提高跟踪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合3D多目标跟踪与可微分姿态估计的新方法，通过RGB-D序列实现室内环境中的联合重建与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在动态室内场景中难以实现几何一致且鲁棒的多目标跟踪，需解决姿态估计与重建的时序一致性问题。
AI.method: 基于图神经网络的可微分姿态估计框架，结合时序联合优化与合成数据集验证，通过密集对应映射实现轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在合成数据集上实现24.8%的MOTA得分提升，且在真实序列中展现显著跟踪性能增强。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法通过端到端学习有效提升多目标跟踪精度，为动态场景重建提供新思路。

authors_text: Max Koster
title: On Relaxation of Dominant Sets
title_zh: 论主导集的松弛
abstract: In a graph $G = (V,E)$, a k-ruling set $S$ is one in which all vertices $V$ \ $S$ are at most $k$ distance from $S$. Finding a minimum k-ruling set is intrinsically linked to the minimum dominating set problem and maximal independent set problem, which have been extensively studied in graph theory. This paper presents the first known algorithm for solving all k-ruling set problems in conjunction with known minimum dominating set algorithms at only additional polynomial time cost compared to a minimum dominating set. The algorithm further succeeds for $(α, α- 1)$ ruling sets in which $α> 1$, for which constraints exist on the proximity of vertices v $\in S$. This secondary application instead works in conjunction with maximal independent set algorithms.
summary: In a graph $G = (V,E)$, a k-ruling set $S$ is one in which all vertices $V$ \ $S$ are at most $k$ distance from $S$. Finding a minimum k-ruling set is intrinsically linked to the minimum dominating set problem and maximal independent set problem, which have been extensively studied in graph theory. This paper presents the first known algorithm for solving all k-ruling set problems in conjunction with known minimum dominating set algorithms at only additional polynomial time cost compared to a minimum dominating set. The algorithm further succeeds for $(α, α- 1)$ ruling sets in which $α> 1$, for which constraints exist on the proximity of vertices v $\in S$. This secondary application instead works in conjunction with maximal independent set algorithms.
abstract_zh: 在图 $G = (V,E)$ 中，k 规则集 $S$ 是其中所有顶点 $V$ \ $S$ 距 $S$ 至多 $k$ 距离的集。寻找最小 k 规则集与最小支配集问题和最大独立集问题有着内在的联系，这些问题在图论中得到了广泛的研究。本文提出了第一个已知的算法，用于结合已知的最小支配集算法来解决所有 k 支配集问题，与最小支配集相比，仅需要额外的多项式时间成本。该算法对于 $(α, α- 1)$ 规则集进一步成功，其中 $α> 1$，其中顶点 v $\in S$ 的邻近度存在约束。相反，该辅助应用程序与最大独立集算法结合使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决k-支配集问题的新算法，该算法在现有最小支配集算法基础上仅增加多项式时间成本，并可处理特定约束条件下的(α, α-1)支配集问题。
AI.motivation: k-支配集问题与经典的最小支配集和最大独立集问题密切相关，但现有研究缺乏一种统一且高效的算法框架来处理所有k值的支配集问题及特定约束情况。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合最小支配集算法的通用框架，并针对(α, α-1)支配集（α>1）提出与最大独立集算法协同工作的解决方案，确保多项式时间复杂度。
AI.result: 首次提出适用于所有k值的k-支配集算法，且在(α, α-1)支配集场景下验证了算法有效性，同时保持与现有算法的兼容性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法为解决支配集相关问题提供了理论支持，拓展了图论中支配集问题的应用边界，未来可进一步优化实际场景中的计算效率。

authors_text: Ondřej Mokrý,Paul Magron,Thomas Oberlin,Cédric Févotte
title: Algorithms for audio inpainting based on probabilistic nonnegative matrix factorization
title_zh: 基于概率非负矩阵分解的音频修复算法
abstract: Audio inpainting, i.e., the task of restoring missing or occluded audio signal samples, usually relies on sparse representations or autoregressive modeling. In this paper, we propose to structure the spectrogram with nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) in a probabilistic framework. First, we treat the missing samples as latent variables, and derive two expectation-maximization algorithms for estimating the parameters of the model, depending on whether we formulate the problem in the time- or time-frequency domain. Then, we treat the missing samples as parameters, and we address this novel problem by deriving an alternating minimization scheme. We assess the potential of these algorithms for the task of restoring short- to middle-length gaps in music signals. Experiments reveal great convergence properties of the proposed methods, as well as competitive performance when compared to state-of-the-art audio inpainting techniques.
summary: Audio inpainting, i.e., the task of restoring missing or occluded audio signal samples, usually relies on sparse representations or autoregressive modeling. In this paper, we propose to structure the spectrogram with nonnegative matrix factorization (NMF) in a probabilistic framework. First, we treat the missing samples as latent variables, and derive two expectation-maximization algorithms for estimating the parameters of the model, depending on whether we formulate the problem in the time- or time-frequency domain. Then, we treat the missing samples as parameters, and we address this novel problem by deriving an alternating minimization scheme. We assess the potential of these algorithms for the task of restoring short- to middle-length gaps in music signals. Experiments reveal great convergence properties of the proposed methods, as well as competitive performance when compared to state-of-the-art audio inpainting techniques.
abstract_zh: 音频修复，即恢复丢失或遮挡的音频信号样本的任务，通常依赖于稀疏表示或自回归建模。在本文中，我们建议在概率框架中使用非负矩阵分解（NMF）来构建频谱图。首先，我们将缺失样本视为潜在变量，并根据我们是在时域还是时频域中表述问题，推导出两种估计模型参数的期望最大化算法。然后，我们将丢失的样本视为参数，并通过推导交替最小化方案来解决这个新问题。我们评估了这些算法在恢复音乐信号中短到中长度间隙的任务中的潜力。实验揭示了所提出的方法具有良好的收敛特性，以及与最先进的音频修复技术相比的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于概率非负矩阵分解（NMF）的音频修复算法，用于恢复缺失或被遮挡的音频信号样本。
AI.motivation: 传统音频修复方法依赖稀疏表示或自回归模型，但存在局限性。本文通过概率NMF框架对频谱进行结构化建模，以提升修复效果。
AI.method: 将缺失样本视为潜在变量，推导时间域和时频域下的期望最大化（EM）算法；另将缺失样本作为参数，设计交替最小化方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在音乐信号短至中等长度缺失修复任务中具有优异收敛性及与最先进方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 概率NMF框架为音频修复提供了有效新思路，其收敛性和修复效果具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Xu Li,Shansong Liu,Ying Shan
title: A Hierarchical Speaker Representation Framework for One-shot Singing Voice Conversion
title_zh: 一种用于一次性歌声转换的分层说话人表示框架
comment: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022; Made some motifications in Fig.1 so that the system architecture will be more clear
comments: Accepted to INTERSPEECH 2022; Made some motifications in Fig.1 so that the system architecture will be more clear
abstract: Typically, singing voice conversion (SVC) depends on an embedding vector, extracted from either a speaker lookup table (LUT) or a speaker recognition network (SRN), to model speaker identity. However, singing contains more expressive speaker characteristics than conversational speech. It is suspected that a single embedding vector may only capture averaged and coarse-grained speaker characteristics, which is insufficient for the SVC task. To this end, this work proposes a novel hierarchical speaker representation framework for SVC, which can capture fine-grained speaker characteristics at different granularity. It consists of an up-sampling stream and three down-sampling streams. The up-sampling stream transforms the linguistic features into audio samples, while one down-sampling stream of the three operates in the reverse direction. It is expected that the temporal statistics of each down-sampling block can represent speaker characteristics at different granularity, which will be engaged in the up-sampling blocks to enhance the speaker modeling. Experiment results verify that the proposed method outperforms both the LUT and SRN based SVC systems. Moreover, the proposed system supports the one-shot SVC with only a few seconds of reference audio.
summary: Typically, singing voice conversion (SVC) depends on an embedding vector, extracted from either a speaker lookup table (LUT) or a speaker recognition network (SRN), to model speaker identity. However, singing contains more expressive speaker characteristics than conversational speech. It is suspected that a single embedding vector may only capture averaged and coarse-grained speaker characteristics, which is insufficient for the SVC task. To this end, this work proposes a novel hierarchical speaker representation framework for SVC, which can capture fine-grained speaker characteristics at different granularity. It consists of an up-sampling stream and three down-sampling streams. The up-sampling stream transforms the linguistic features into audio samples, while one down-sampling stream of the three operates in the reverse direction. It is expected that the temporal statistics of each down-sampling block can represent speaker characteristics at different granularity, which will be engaged in the up-sampling blocks to enhance the speaker modeling. Experiment results verify that the proposed method outperforms both the LUT and SRN based SVC systems. Moreover, the proposed system supports the one-shot SVC with only a few seconds of reference audio.
abstract_zh: 通常，歌声转换 (SVC) 取决于从说话者查找表 (LUT) 或说话者识别网络 (SRN) 中提取的嵌入向量来对说话者身份进行建模。然而，歌唱比会话言语更能表达说话者的特征。人们怀疑单个嵌入向量可能只能捕获平均和粗粒度的说话人特征，这对于 SVC 任务来说是不够的。为此，这项工作提出了一种新颖的 SVC 分层说话人表示框架，它可以捕获不同粒度的细粒度说话人特征。它由一个上采样流和三个下采样流组成。上采样流将语言特征转换为音频样本，而三个下采样流中的一个以相反方向运行。期望每个下采样块的时间统计能够代表不同粒度的说话人特征，这将参与上采样块以增强说话人建模。实验结果验证了所提出的方法优于基于 LUT 和 SRN 的 SVC 系统。此外，所提出的系统支持仅几秒参考音频的一次性 SVC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种层次化说话人表示框架，用于解决单次学习歌唱语音转换任务中传统方法无法捕捉细粒度说话人特征的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统SVC依赖单一嵌入向量建模说话人身份，但歌唱语音包含比对话更丰富的表达性特征，单一表示难以捕捉细粒度信息，导致转换效果受限。
AI.method: 设计包含上采样流和三个下采样流的层次化框架，通过多粒度时序统计建模不同层次的说话人特征，并在上采样过程中融合这些信息生成目标语音。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在客观指标上优于基于LUT和SRN的SVC系统，且仅需几秒参考音频即可实现单次学习语音转换。
AI.conclusion: 层次化表示框架能有效捕捉歌唱语音的多粒度说话人特征，为单次学习SVC提供了更精细的建模方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种层次化说话人表示框架，用于解决单次学习歌唱语音转换任务中传统方法无法捕捉细粒度说话人特征的问题。
motivation: 传统SVC依赖单一嵌入向量建模说话人身份，但歌唱语音包含比对话更丰富的表达性特征，单一表示难以捕捉细粒度信息，导致转换效果受限。
method: 设计包含上采样流和三个下采样流的层次化框架，通过多粒度时序统计建模不同层次的说话人特征，并在上采样过程中融合这些信息生成目标语音。
result: 实验表明该方法在客观指标上优于基于LUT和SRN的SVC系统，且仅需几秒参考音频即可实现单次学习语音转换。
conclusion: 层次化表示框架能有效捕捉歌唱语音的多粒度说话人特征，为单次学习SVC提供了更精细的建模方案。
search_text: A Hierarchical Speaker Representation Framework for One-shot Singing Voice Conversion 一种用于一次性歌声转换的分层说话人表示框架 Typically, singing voice conversion (SVC) depends on an embedding vector, extracted from either a speaker lookup table (LUT) or a speaker recognition network (SRN), to model speaker identity. However, singing contains more expressive speaker characteristics than conversational speech. It is suspected that a single embedding vector may only capture averaged and coarse-grained speaker characteristics, which is insufficient for the SVC task. To this end, this work proposes a novel hierarchical speaker representation framework for SVC, which can capture fine-grained speaker characteristics at different granularity. It consists of an up-sampling stream and three down-sampling streams. The up-sampling stream transforms the linguistic features into audio samples, while one down-sampling stream of the three operates in the reverse direction. It is expected that the temporal statistics of each down-sampling block can represent speaker characteristics at different granularity, which will be engaged in the up-sampling blocks to enhance the speaker modeling. Experiment results verify that the proposed method outperforms both the LUT and SRN based SVC systems. Moreover, the proposed system supports the one-shot SVC with only a few seconds of reference audio. 通常，歌声转换 (SVC) 取决于从说话者查找表 (LUT) 或说话者识别网络 (SRN) 中提取的嵌入向量来对说话者身份进行建模。然而，歌唱比会话言语更能表达说话者的特征。人们怀疑单个嵌入向量可能只能捕获平均和粗粒度的说话人特征，这对于 SVC 任务来说是不够的。为此，这项工作提出了一种新颖的 SVC 分层说话人表示框架，它可以捕获不同粒度的细粒度说话人特征。它由一个上采样流和三个下采样流组成。上采样流将语言特征转换为音频样本，而三个下采样流中的一个以相反方向运行。期望每个下采样块的时间统计能够代表不同粒度的说话人特征，这将参与上采样块以增强说话人建模。实验结果验证了所提出的方法优于基于 LUT 和 SRN 的 SVC 系统。此外，所提出的系统支持仅几秒参考音频的一次性 SVC。 本文提出一种层次化说话人表示框架，用于解决单次学习歌唱语音转换任务中传统方法无法捕捉细粒度说话人特征的问题。 Xu Li,Shansong Liu,Ying Shan eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Yifan Chen,Yifan Guo,Qingxuan Li,Gaofeng Cheng,Pengyuan Zhang,Yonghong Yan
title: Interrelate Training and Searching: A Unified Online Clustering Framework for Speaker Diarization
title_zh: 相互关联的训练和搜索：用于说话人二值化的统一在线聚类框架
abstract: For online speaker diarization, samples arrive incrementally, and the overall distribution of the samples is invisible. Moreover, in most existing clustering-based methods, the training objective of the embedding extractor is not designed specially for clustering. To improve online speaker diarization performance, we propose a unified online clustering framework, which provides an interactive manner between embedding extractors and clustering algorithms. Specifically, the framework consists of two highly coupled parts: clustering-guided recurrent training (CGRT) and truncated beam searching clustering (TBSC). The CGRT introduces the clustering algorithm into the training process of embedding extractors, which could provide not only cluster-aware information for the embedding extractor, but also crucial parameters for the clustering process afterward. And with these parameters, which contain preliminary information of the metric space, the TBSC penalizes the probability score of each cluster, in order to output more accurate clustering results in online fashion with low latency. With the above innovations, our proposed online clustering system achieves 14.48\% DER with collar 0.25 at 2.5s latency on the AISHELL-4, while the DER of the offline agglomerative hierarchical clustering is 14.57\%.
summary: For online speaker diarization, samples arrive incrementally, and the overall distribution of the samples is invisible. Moreover, in most existing clustering-based methods, the training objective of the embedding extractor is not designed specially for clustering. To improve online speaker diarization performance, we propose a unified online clustering framework, which provides an interactive manner between embedding extractors and clustering algorithms. Specifically, the framework consists of two highly coupled parts: clustering-guided recurrent training (CGRT) and truncated beam searching clustering (TBSC). The CGRT introduces the clustering algorithm into the training process of embedding extractors, which could provide not only cluster-aware information for the embedding extractor, but also crucial parameters for the clustering process afterward. And with these parameters, which contain preliminary information of the metric space, the TBSC penalizes the probability score of each cluster, in order to output more accurate clustering results in online fashion with low latency. With the above innovations, our proposed online clustering system achieves 14.48\% DER with collar 0.25 at 2.5s latency on the AISHELL-4, while the DER of the offline agglomerative hierarchical clustering is 14.57\%.
abstract_zh: 对于在线说话人二值化，样本是增量到达的，并且样本的整体分布是不可见的。此外，在大多数现有的基于聚类的方法中，嵌入提取器的训练目标并不是专门为聚类设计的。为了提高在线说话人二值化性能，我们提出了一个统一的在线聚类框架，它提供了嵌入提取器和聚类算法之间的交互方式。具体来说，该框架由两个高度耦合的部分组成：聚类引导的循环训练（CGRT）和截断波束搜索聚类（TBSC）。 CGRT将聚类算法引入嵌入提取器的训练过程中，不仅可以为嵌入提取器提供聚类感知信息，而且可以为后续聚类过程提供关键参数。 TBSC利用这些包含度量空间初步信息的参数对每个聚类的概率得分进行惩罚，以便以低延迟的在线方式输出更准确的聚类结果。通过上述创新，我们提出的在线聚类系统在 AISHELL-4 上以 2.5 秒延迟实现了 14.48% DER，领域为 0.25，而离线凝聚层次聚类的 DER 为 14.57%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的在线聚类框架，用于改进在线说话人分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于聚类的方法中，嵌入提取器的训练目标未专门针对聚类设计，且在线场景下样本分布不可见，导致性能受限。
AI.method: 框架包含两个核心模块：聚类引导的循环训练（CGRT）和截断束搜索聚类（TBSC），通过交互式训练与聚类过程提升嵌入表示和聚类准确性。
AI.result: 在AISHELL-4数据集上以2.5秒延迟实现14.48%的DER（ collar 0.25），优于离线层次聚类的14.57%。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过训练与聚类的协同优化，在低延迟下显著提升在线说话人分割效果。

authors_text: Yi Wang,Tianzi Wang,Zi Ye,Lingwei Meng,Shoukang Hu,Xixin Wu,Xunying Liu,Helen Meng
title: Exploring linguistic feature and model combination for speech recognition based automatic AD detection
title_zh: 探索基于语音识别的自动AD检测的语言特征和模型组合
abstract: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care and delay progression. Speech based automatic AD screening systems provide a non-intrusive and more scalable alternative to other clinical screening techniques. Scarcity of such specialist data leads to uncertainty in both model selection and feature learning when developing such systems. To this end, this paper investigates the use of feature and model combination approaches to improve the robustness of domain fine-tuning of BERT and Roberta pre-trained text encoders on limited data, before the resulting embedding features being fed into an ensemble of backend classifiers to produce the final AD detection decision via majority voting. Experiments conducted on the ADReSS20 Challenge dataset suggest consistent performance improvements were obtained using model and feature combination in system development. State-of-the-art AD detection accuracies of 91.67 percent and 93.75 percent were obtained using manual and ASR speech transcripts respectively on the ADReSS20 test set consisting of 48 elderly speakers.
summary: Early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease (AD) is crucial in facilitating preventive care and delay progression. Speech based automatic AD screening systems provide a non-intrusive and more scalable alternative to other clinical screening techniques. Scarcity of such specialist data leads to uncertainty in both model selection and feature learning when developing such systems. To this end, this paper investigates the use of feature and model combination approaches to improve the robustness of domain fine-tuning of BERT and Roberta pre-trained text encoders on limited data, before the resulting embedding features being fed into an ensemble of backend classifiers to produce the final AD detection decision via majority voting. Experiments conducted on the ADReSS20 Challenge dataset suggest consistent performance improvements were obtained using model and feature combination in system development. State-of-the-art AD detection accuracies of 91.67 percent and 93.75 percent were obtained using manual and ASR speech transcripts respectively on the ADReSS20 test set consisting of 48 elderly speakers.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默病 (AD) 的早期诊断对于促进预防性护理和延缓病情进展至关重要。基于语音的自动 AD 筛查系统为其他临床筛查技术提供了一种非侵入性且更具可扩展性的替代方案。此类专业数据的稀缺导致开发此类系统时模型选择和特征学习的不确定性。为此，本文研究了使用特征和模型组合方法来提高 BERT 和 Roberta 预训练文本编码器在有限数据上进行域微调的鲁棒性，然后将所得嵌入特征输入到后端分类器集合中，通过多数投票产生最终的 AD 检测决策。在 ADReSS20 挑战数据集上进行的实验表明，在系统开发中使用模型和特征组合可以获得一致的性能改进。在由 48 名老年说话人组成的 ADReSS20 测试集上，使用手动和 ASR 语音记录分别获得了最先进的 AD 检测准确率 91.67% 和 93.75%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究结合语言特征与模型组合的方法，以提升基于语音识别的阿尔茨海默病（AD）自动检测系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 由于AD筛查数据稀缺，传统模型和特征选择方法在有限数据下表现不稳定，需探索更稳健的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过组合语言特征与BERT、RoBERTa预训练模型的领域微调，提取嵌入特征后输入集成分类器，采用多数投票机制输出最终检测结果。
AI.result: 在ADReSS20测试集（48名老年受试者）上，手动转录文本和ASR语音转录文本的AD检测准确率分别达到91.67%和93.75%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 模型与特征组合策略有效提升了小样本场景下的AD检测鲁棒性，为语音辅助疾病筛查提供了新思路。
